authors_text: Christian Steinparz,Thomas Schmied,Fabian Paischer,Marius-Constantin Dinu,Vihang Patil,Angela Bitto-Nemling,Hamid Eghbal-zadeh,Sepp Hochreiter
title: Reactive Exploration to Cope with Non-Stationarity in Lifelong Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 应对终身强化学习中非平稳性的反应性探索
abstract: In lifelong learning, an agent learns throughout its entire life without resets, in a constantly changing environment, as we humans do. Consequently, lifelong learning comes with a plethora of research problems such as continual domain shifts, which result in non-stationary rewards and environment dynamics. These non-stationarities are difficult to detect and cope with due to their continuous nature. Therefore, exploration strategies and learning methods are required that are capable of tracking the steady domain shifts, and adapting to them. We propose Reactive Exploration to track and react to continual domain shifts in lifelong reinforcement learning, and to update the policy correspondingly. To this end, we conduct experiments in order to investigate different exploration strategies. We empirically show that representatives of the policy-gradient family are better suited for lifelong learning, as they adapt more quickly to distribution shifts than Q-learning. Thereby, policy-gradient methods profit the most from Reactive Exploration and show good results in lifelong learning with continual domain shifts. Our code is available at: https://github.com/ml-jku/reactive-exploration.
summary: In lifelong learning, an agent learns throughout its entire life without resets, in a constantly changing environment, as we humans do. Consequently, lifelong learning comes with a plethora of research problems such as continual domain shifts, which result in non-stationary rewards and environment dynamics. These non-stationarities are difficult to detect and cope with due to their continuous nature. Therefore, exploration strategies and learning methods are required that are capable of tracking the steady domain shifts, and adapting to them. We propose Reactive Exploration to track and react to continual domain shifts in lifelong reinforcement learning, and to update the policy correspondingly. To this end, we conduct experiments in order to investigate different exploration strategies. We empirically show that representatives of the policy-gradient family are better suited for lifelong learning, as they adapt more quickly to distribution shifts than Q-learning. Thereby, policy-gradient methods profit the most from Reactive Exploration and show good results in lifelong learning with continual domain shifts. Our code is available at: https://github.com/ml-jku/reactive-exploration.
abstract_zh: 在终身学习中，智能体在其整个生命周期中不断学习，无需重置，在不断变化的环境中，就像我们人类一样。因此，终身学习伴随着大量的研究问题，例如持续的领域转移，这导致非平稳的奖励和环境动态。由于其连续性，这些非平稳性很难检测和处理。因此，需要能够跟踪稳定的领域变化并适应它们的探索策略和学习方法。我们提出反应性探索来跟踪和应对终身强化学习中持续的领域变化，并相应地更新策略。为此，我们进行实验以研究不同的探索策略。我们的经验表明，政策梯度系列的代表更适合终身学习，因为它们比 Q 学习更快地适应分布变化。因此，策略梯度方法从反应性探索中获益最多，并在持续领域转移的终身学习中显示出良好的结果。我们的代码位于：https://github.com/ml-jku/reactive-exploration。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Reactive Exploration的策略，用于应对长期强化学习中的非平稳性问题，通过跟踪持续变化的领域并动态调整策略来适应环境变化。
AI.motivation: 在长期强化学习中，环境持续变化导致奖励和动态非平稳，传统方法难以检测和适应这种连续变化，需要新的探索策略来应对持续领域转移。
AI.method: 提出Reactive Exploration方法，通过实验对比不同探索策略，发现策略梯度方法相较于Q-learning更能快速适应分布变化，并从该方法中获益最多。
AI.result: 实验表明，策略梯度方法结合Reactive Exploration在持续领域转移的长期强化学习任务中表现优异，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: Reactive Exploration能有效应对长期学习中的非平稳性问题，策略梯度方法在此类任务中更具优势，为持续领域适应提供了新思路。

Our code is available at: https://github.com/ml-jku/reactive-exploration. 在终身学习中，智能体在其整个生命周期中不断学习，无需重置，在不断变化的环境中，就像我们人类一样。因此，终身学习伴随着大量的研究问题，例如持续的领域转移，这导致非平稳的奖励和环境动态。由于其连续性，这些非平稳性很难检测和处理。因此，需要能够跟踪稳定的领域变化并适应它们的探索策略和学习方法。我们提出反应性探索来跟踪和应对终身强化学习中持续的领域变化，并相应地更新策略。为此，我们进行实验以研究不同的探索策略。我们的经验表明，政策梯度系列的代表更适合终身学习，因为它们比 Q 学习更快地适应分布变化。因此，策略梯度方法从反应性探索中获益最多，并在持续领域转移的终身学习中显示出良好的结果。我们的代码位于：https://github.com/ml-jku/reactive-exploration。 本文提出了一种名为Reactive Exploration的策略，用于应对长期强化学习中的非平稳性问题，通过跟踪持续变化的领域并动态调整策略来适应环境变化。 Christian Steinparz,Thomas Schmied,Fabian Paischer,Marius-Constantin Dinu,Vihang Patil,Angela Bitto-Nemling,Hamid Eghbal-zadeh,Sepp Hochreiter cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Kai-En Lin,Lin Yen-Chen,Wei-Sheng Lai,Tsung-Yi Lin,Yi-Chang Shih,Ravi Ramamoorthi
title: Vision Transformer for NeRF-Based View Synthesis from a Single Input Image
title_zh: 用于从单个输入图像进行基于 NeRF 的视图合成的 Vision Transformer
abstract: Although neural radiance fields (NeRF) have shown impressive advances for novel view synthesis, most methods typically require multiple input images of the same scene with accurate camera poses. In this work, we seek to substantially reduce the inputs to a single unposed image. Existing approaches condition on local image features to reconstruct a 3D object, but often render blurry predictions at viewpoints that are far away from the source view. To address this issue, we propose to leverage both the global and local features to form an expressive 3D representation. The global features are learned from a vision transformer, while the local features are extracted from a 2D convolutional network. To synthesize a novel view, we train a multilayer perceptron (MLP) network conditioned on the learned 3D representation to perform volume rendering. This novel 3D representation allows the network to reconstruct unseen regions without enforcing constraints like symmetry or canonical coordinate systems. Our method can render novel views from only a single input image and generalize across multiple object categories using a single model. Quantitative and qualitative evaluations demonstrate that the proposed method achieves state-of-the-art performance and renders richer details than existing approaches.
summary: Although neural radiance fields (NeRF) have shown impressive advances for novel view synthesis, most methods typically require multiple input images of the same scene with accurate camera poses. In this work, we seek to substantially reduce the inputs to a single unposed image. Existing approaches condition on local image features to reconstruct a 3D object, but often render blurry predictions at viewpoints that are far away from the source view. To address this issue, we propose to leverage both the global and local features to form an expressive 3D representation. The global features are learned from a vision transformer, while the local features are extracted from a 2D convolutional network. To synthesize a novel view, we train a multilayer perceptron (MLP) network conditioned on the learned 3D representation to perform volume rendering. This novel 3D representation allows the network to reconstruct unseen regions without enforcing constraints like symmetry or canonical coordinate systems. Our method can render novel views from only a single input image and generalize across multiple object categories using a single model. Quantitative and qualitative evaluations demonstrate that the proposed method achieves state-of-the-art performance and renders richer details than existing approaches.
abstract_zh: 尽管神经辐射场（NeRF）在新颖的视图合成方面取得了令人印象深刻的进步，但大多数方法通常需要同一场景的多个输入图像以及准确的相机姿势。在这项工作中，我们寻求大幅减少单个未摆姿势图像的输入。现有方法以局部图像特征为条件来重建 3D 对象，但通常会在远离源视图的视点处渲染模糊预测。为了解决这个问题，我们建议利用全局和局部特征来形成富有表现力的 3D 表示。全局特征是从视觉变换器中学习的，而局部特征是从 2D 卷积网络中提取的。为了合成新颖的视图，我们训练了一个以学习到的 3D 表示为条件的多层感知器 (MLP) 网络来执行体积渲染。这种新颖的 3D 表示允许网络重建看不见的区域，而无需强制执行对称性或规范坐标系等约束。我们的方法可以仅从单个输入图像呈现新颖的视图，并使用单个模型泛化多个对象类别。定量和定性评估表明，所提出的方法实现了最先进的性能，并呈现比现有方法更丰富的细节。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于视觉Transformer的NeRF方法，仅从单张输入图像实现新颖视角合成。
AI.motivation: 传统NeRF方法需多视角图像及精确相机参数，而现有单图方法在远距离视角易产生模糊预测，需提升重建质量与泛化能力。
AI.method: 融合视觉Transformer提取的全局特征与卷积网络提取的局部特征，构建表达性3D表示，并通过条件MLP进行体渲染。
AI.result: 在定量与定性评估中达到SOTA性能，相较现有方法呈现更丰富的细节且无需对称性或规范坐标系约束。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过全局-局部特征融合有效解决了单图视角合成中的模糊问题，实现了跨类别物体的单模型泛化。

authors_text: Manli Zhu,Edmond S. L. Ho,Hubert P. H. Shum
title: A Skeleton-aware Graph Convolutional Network for Human-Object Interaction Detection
title_zh: 用于人与物体交互检测的骨架感知图卷积网络
abstract: Detecting human-object interactions is essential for comprehensive understanding of visual scenes. In particular, spatial connections between humans and objects are important cues for reasoning interactions. To this end, we propose a skeleton-aware graph convolutional network for human-object interaction detection, named SGCN4HOI. Our network exploits the spatial connections between human keypoints and object keypoints to capture their fine-grained structural interactions via graph convolutions. It fuses such geometric features with visual features and spatial configuration features obtained from human-object pairs. Furthermore, to better preserve the object structural information and facilitate human-object interaction detection, we propose a novel skeleton-based object keypoints representation. The performance of SGCN4HOI is evaluated in the public benchmark V-COCO dataset. Experimental results show that the proposed approach outperforms the state-of-the-art pose-based models and achieves competitive performance against other models.
summary: Detecting human-object interactions is essential for comprehensive understanding of visual scenes. In particular, spatial connections between humans and objects are important cues for reasoning interactions. To this end, we propose a skeleton-aware graph convolutional network for human-object interaction detection, named SGCN4HOI. Our network exploits the spatial connections between human keypoints and object keypoints to capture their fine-grained structural interactions via graph convolutions. It fuses such geometric features with visual features and spatial configuration features obtained from human-object pairs. Furthermore, to better preserve the object structural information and facilitate human-object interaction detection, we propose a novel skeleton-based object keypoints representation. The performance of SGCN4HOI is evaluated in the public benchmark V-COCO dataset. Experimental results show that the proposed approach outperforms the state-of-the-art pose-based models and achieves competitive performance against other models.
abstract_zh: 检测人与物体的交互对于全面理解视觉场景至关重要。特别是，人与物体之间的空间联系是推理交互的重要线索。为此，我们提出了一种用于人与物体交互检测的骨架感知图卷积网络，名为 SGCN4HOI。我们的网络利用人类关键点和物体关键点之间的空间连接，通过图卷积捕获它们的细粒度结构交互。它将这些几何特征与从人-物体对获得的视觉特征和空间配置特征融合在一起。此外，为了更好地保留对象结构信息并促进人与对象交互检测，我们提出了一种新颖的基于骨架的对象关键点表示。 SGCN4HOI 的性能在公共基准 V-COCO 数据集中进行评估。实验结果表明，所提出的方法优于最先进的基于姿势的模型，并实现了与其他模型竞争的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于骨骼感知图卷积网络（SGCN4HOI）的人-物交互检测方法，通过利用人体和物体关键点的空间关系来提升检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在捕捉人-物交互的细粒度结构信息方面存在不足，需通过骨骼信息与空间关系建模来增强交互检测的准确性。
AI.method: 设计骨骼感知图卷积网络，融合人体与物体关键点的几何特征、视觉特征及空间配置特征，并提出基于骨骼的物体关键点表示方法以保留结构信息。
AI.result: 在V-COCO数据集上实验表明，SGCN4HOI优于基于姿态的最先进模型，并与其他方法具有竞争力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过有效建模人-物骨骼结构关系，显著提升了人-物交互检测的性能。

authors_text: Martin Nisser,Leon Cheng,Yashaswini Makaram,Ryo Suzuki,Stefanie Mueller
title: ElectroVoxel: Electromagnetically Actuated Pivoting for Scalable Modular Self-Reconfigurable Robots
title_zh: ElectroVoxel：用于可扩展模块化自重构机器人的电磁驱动旋转
comment: 2022 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA)
comments: 2022 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA)
abstract: This paper introduces a cube-based reconfigurable robot that utilizes an electromagnet-based actuation framework to reconfigure in three dimensions via pivoting. While a variety of actuation mechanisms for self-reconfigurable robots have been explored, they often suffer from cost, complexity, assembly and sizing requirements that prevent scaled production of such robots. To address this challenge, we use an actuation mechanism based on electromagnets embedded into the edges of each cube to interchangeably create identically or oppositely polarized electromagnet pairs, resulting in repulsive or attractive forces, respectively. By leveraging attraction for hinge formation, and repulsion to drive pivoting maneuvers, we can reconfigure the robot by voxelizing it and actuating its constituent modules - termed Electrovoxels - via electromagnetically actuated pivoting. To demonstrate this, we develop fully untethered, three-dimensional self-reconfigurable robots and demonstrate 2D and 3D self-reconfiguration using pivot and traversal maneuvers on an air-table and in microgravity on a parabolic flight. This paper describes the hardware design of our robots, its pivoting framework, our reconfiguration planning software, and an evaluation of the dynamical and electrical characteristics of our system to inform the design of scalable self-reconfigurable robots.
summary: This paper introduces a cube-based reconfigurable robot that utilizes an electromagnet-based actuation framework to reconfigure in three dimensions via pivoting. While a variety of actuation mechanisms for self-reconfigurable robots have been explored, they often suffer from cost, complexity, assembly and sizing requirements that prevent scaled production of such robots. To address this challenge, we use an actuation mechanism based on electromagnets embedded into the edges of each cube to interchangeably create identically or oppositely polarized electromagnet pairs, resulting in repulsive or attractive forces, respectively. By leveraging attraction for hinge formation, and repulsion to drive pivoting maneuvers, we can reconfigure the robot by voxelizing it and actuating its constituent modules - termed Electrovoxels - via electromagnetically actuated pivoting. To demonstrate this, we develop fully untethered, three-dimensional self-reconfigurable robots and demonstrate 2D and 3D self-reconfiguration using pivot and traversal maneuvers on an air-table and in microgravity on a parabolic flight. This paper describes the hardware design of our robots, its pivoting framework, our reconfiguration planning software, and an evaluation of the dynamical and electrical characteristics of our system to inform the design of scalable self-reconfigurable robots.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了一种基于立方体的可重构机器人，它利用基于电磁体的驱动框架通过旋转在三个维度上进行重构。虽然人们已经探索了用于自重构机器人的各种驱动机构，但它们常常受到成本、复杂性、组装和尺寸要求的影响，从而阻碍了此类机器人的规模生产。为了应对这一挑战，我们使用基于嵌入每个立方体边缘的电磁体的致动机制，以可互换地创建相同或相反极化的电磁体对，分别产生排斥力或吸引力。通过利用形成铰链的吸引力和驱动枢轴转动的斥力，我们可以通过对机器人进行体素化并通过电磁驱动枢轴驱动其组成模块（称为电体素）来重新配置机器人。为了证明这一点，我们开发了完全不受束缚的三维自重构机器人，并在空中平台上和微重力抛物线飞行中使用枢轴和遍历操作来演示 2D 和 3D 自重构。本文描述了我们的机器人的硬件设计、其旋转框架、我们的重构规划软件，以及对我们系统的动态和电气特性的评估，以便为可扩展的自重构机器人的设计提供信息。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于电磁驱动的模块化自重构机器人ElectroVoxel，通过嵌入式电磁铁实现三维空间中的模块化重构。
AI.motivation: 现有自重构机器人因成本高、结构复杂、组装困难等问题难以实现规模化生产，亟需更高效的驱动方案。
AI.method: 在立方体模块边缘嵌入电磁铁，通过磁极对的吸引/排斥力实现铰接形成与旋转动作，结合软件规划实现2D/3D重构。
AI.result: 成功开发出无线自重构机器人，验证了其在空气桌和微重力环境下的2D/3D重构能力，并评估了系统动态与电气特性。
AI.conclusion: ElectroVoxel框架为可扩展的模块化自重构机器人提供了可行方案，展示了电磁驱动在复杂环境中的有效性。

search_text: ElectroVoxel: Electromagnetically Actuated Pivoting for Scalable Modular Self-Reconfigurable Robots ElectroVoxel：用于可扩展模块化自重构机器人的电磁驱动旋转 This paper introduces a cube-based reconfigurable robot that utilizes an electromagnet-based actuation framework to reconfigure in three dimensions via pivoting. While a variety of actuation mechanisms for self-reconfigurable robots have been explored, they often suffer from cost, complexity, assembly and sizing requirements that prevent scaled production of such robots. To address this challenge, we use an actuation mechanism based on electromagnets embedded into the edges of each cube to interchangeably create identically or oppositely polarized electromagnet pairs, resulting in repulsive or attractive forces, respectively. By leveraging attraction for hinge formation, and repulsion to drive pivoting maneuvers, we can reconfigure the robot by voxelizing it and actuating its constituent modules - termed Electrovoxels - via electromagnetically actuated pivoting. To demonstrate this, we develop fully untethered, three-dimensional self-reconfigurable robots and demonstrate 2D and 3D self-reconfiguration using pivot and traversal maneuvers on an air-table and in microgravity on a parabolic flight. This paper describes the hardware design of our robots, its pivoting framework, our reconfiguration planning software, and an evaluation of the dynamical and electrical characteristics of our system to inform the design of scalable self-reconfigurable robots. 本文介绍了一种基于立方体的可重构机器人，它利用基于电磁体的驱动框架通过旋转在三个维度上进行重构。虽然人们已经探索了用于自重构机器人的各种驱动机构，但它们常常受到成本、复杂性、组装和尺寸要求的影响，从而阻碍了此类机器人的规模生产。为了应对这一挑战，我们使用基于嵌入每个立方体边缘的电磁体的致动机制，以可互换地创建相同或相反极化的电磁体对，分别产生排斥力或吸引力。通过利用形成铰链的吸引力和驱动枢轴转动的斥力，我们可以通过对机器人进行体素化并通过电磁驱动枢轴驱动其组成模块（称为电体素）来重新配置机器人。为了证明这一点，我们开发了完全不受束缚的三维自重构机器人，并在空中平台上和微重力抛物线飞行中使用枢轴和遍历操作来演示 2D 和 3D 自重构。本文描述了我们的机器人的硬件设计、其旋转框架、我们的重构规划软件，以及对我们系统的动态和电气特性的评估，以便为可扩展的自重构机器人的设计提供信息。 本文提出一种基于电磁驱动的模块化自重构机器人ElectroVoxel，通过嵌入式电磁铁实现三维空间中的模块化重构。 Martin Nisser,Leon Cheng,Yashaswini Makaram,Ryo Suzuki,Stefanie Mueller cs.RO

authors_text: Zeyu Jiang,Changxing Ding
title: 1st Place Solution to the EPIC-Kitchens Action Anticipation Challenge 2022
title_zh: 2022 年 EPIC-Kitchens 行动预期挑战赛第一名解决方案
comment: Technical report. Winner of EPIC-Kitchens Action Anticipation Challenge 2022 at EPIC@CVPR2022
comments: Technical report. Winner of EPIC-Kitchens Action Anticipation Challenge 2022 at EPIC@CVPR2022
abstract: In this report, we describe the technical details of our submission to the EPIC-Kitchens Action Anticipation Challenge 2022. In this competition, we develop the following two approaches. 1) Anticipation Time Knowledge Distillation using the soft labels learned by the teacher model as knowledge to guide the student network to learn the information of anticipation time; 2) Verb-Noun Relation Module for building the relationship between verbs and nouns. Our method achieves state-of-the-art results on the testing set of EPIC-Kitchens Action Anticipation Challenge 2022.
summary: In this report, we describe the technical details of our submission to the EPIC-Kitchens Action Anticipation Challenge 2022. In this competition, we develop the following two approaches. 1) Anticipation Time Knowledge Distillation using the soft labels learned by the teacher model as knowledge to guide the student network to learn the information of anticipation time; 2) Verb-Noun Relation Module for building the relationship between verbs and nouns. Our method achieves state-of-the-art results on the testing set of EPIC-Kitchens Action Anticipation Challenge 2022.
abstract_zh: 在本报告中，我们描述了我们向 2022 年 EPIC-Kitchens 行动预期挑战赛提交的技术细节。在本次竞赛中，我们开发了以下两种方法。 1）预期时间知识蒸馏，利用教师模型学习到的软标签作为知识，指导学生网络学习预期时间信息； 2) 动名词关系模块​​，用于构建动词和名词之间的关系。我们的方法在 2022 年 EPIC-Kitchens Action Anticipation Challenge 测试集上取得了最先进的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了在EPIC-Kitchens动作预判挑战赛2022中的技术方案，旨在通过两种创新方法提升动作预判的准确性。
AI.motivation: 为了解决动作预判任务中时间信息利用不足及动作语义关联弱的问题，提出更有效的模型架构与知识迁移策略。
AI.method: 1) 采用知识蒸馏技术，利用教师模型的软标签指导学生网络学习预判时间信息；2) 构建动词-名词关系模块以增强动作语义理解。
AI.result: 在EPIC-Kitchens Action Anticipation Challenge 2022测试集上达到当时最先进的性能表现。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的方法通过时间知识迁移与语义关系建模有效提升了动作预判性能，为相关研究提供了新思路。

authors_text: Yaniv Nemcovsky,Matan Jacoby,Alex M. Bronstein,Chaim Baskin
title: Physical Passive Patch Adversarial Attacks on Visual Odometry Systems
title_zh: 对视觉里程计系统的物理被动补丁对抗攻击
abstract: Deep neural networks are known to be susceptible to adversarial perturbations -- small perturbations that alter the output of the network and exist under strict norm limitations. While such perturbations are usually discussed as tailored to a specific input, a universal perturbation can be constructed to alter the model's output on a set of inputs. Universal perturbations present a more realistic case of adversarial attacks, as awareness of the model's exact input is not required. In addition, the universal attack setting raises the subject of generalization to unseen data, where given a set of inputs, the universal perturbations aim to alter the model's output on out-of-sample data. In this work, we study physical passive patch adversarial attacks on visual odometry-based autonomous navigation systems. A visual odometry system aims to infer the relative camera motion between two corresponding viewpoints, and is frequently used by vision-based autonomous navigation systems to estimate their state. For such navigation systems, a patch adversarial perturbation poses a severe security issue, as it can be used to mislead a system onto some collision course. To the best of our knowledge, we show for the first time that the error margin of a visual odometry model can be significantly increased by deploying patch adversarial attacks in the scene. We provide evaluation on synthetic closed-loop drone navigation data and demonstrate that a comparable vulnerability exists in real data. A reference implementation of the proposed method and the reported experiments is provided at https://github.com/patchadversarialattacks/patchadversarialattacks.
summary: Deep neural networks are known to be susceptible to adversarial perturbations -- small perturbations that alter the output of the network and exist under strict norm limitations. While such perturbations are usually discussed as tailored to a specific input, a universal perturbation can be constructed to alter the model's output on a set of inputs. Universal perturbations present a more realistic case of adversarial attacks, as awareness of the model's exact input is not required. In addition, the universal attack setting raises the subject of generalization to unseen data, where given a set of inputs, the universal perturbations aim to alter the model's output on out-of-sample data. In this work, we study physical passive patch adversarial attacks on visual odometry-based autonomous navigation systems. A visual odometry system aims to infer the relative camera motion between two corresponding viewpoints, and is frequently used by vision-based autonomous navigation systems to estimate their state. For such navigation systems, a patch adversarial perturbation poses a severe security issue, as it can be used to mislead a system onto some collision course. To the best of our knowledge, we show for the first time that the error margin of a visual odometry model can be significantly increased by deploying patch adversarial attacks in the scene. We provide evaluation on synthetic closed-loop drone navigation data and demonstrate that a comparable vulnerability exists in real data. A reference implementation of the proposed method and the reported experiments is provided at https://github.com/patchadversarialattacks/patchadversarialattacks.
abstract_zh: 众所周知，深度神经网络容易受到对抗性扰动的影响，这些扰动会改变网络的输出，并且存在于严格的规范限制下。虽然此类扰动通常被讨论为针对特定输入而定制，但可以构建通用扰动来改变模型在一组输入上的输出。普遍扰动呈现了更现实的对抗性攻击案例，因为不需要了解模型的确切输入。此外，通用攻击设置提出了对未见过的数据进行泛化的主题，在给定一组输入的情况下，通用扰动旨在改变模型对样本外数据的输出。在这项工作中，我们研究了对基于视觉里程计的自主导航系统的物理被动补丁对抗攻击。视觉里程计系统旨在推断两个相应视点之间的相对相机运动，并且经常被基于视觉的自主导航系统用来估计其状态。对于此类导航系统，补丁对抗性扰动会带来严重的安全问题，因为它可用于误导系统进入某些碰撞路线。据我们所知，我们首次证明，通过在场景中部署补丁对抗攻击可以显着增加视觉里程计模型的误差范围。我们对合成闭环无人机导航数据进行评估，并证明实际数据中存在类似的漏洞。 https://github.com/patchadversarialattacks/patchadversarialattacks 提供了所提出方法的参考实现和报告的实验。

AI.tldr: 本文研究针对基于视觉里程计的自主导航系统的物理被动贴片对抗攻击，展示通过场景中部署对抗性贴片可显著增加系统误差。
AI.motivation: 视觉里程计系统在自主导航中至关重要，但其易受对抗性扰动影响的漏洞可能引发碰撞等安全问题，现有研究缺乏对现实场景中此类攻击的系统性分析。
AI.method: 提出通用对抗扰动生成方法，通过合成闭环无人机导航数据与真实数据验证贴片攻击效果，并提供开源实现代码。
AI.result: 实验表明，对抗性贴片可使视觉里程计误差显著增加，且该漏洞在合成数据与真实场景中均存在。
AI.conclusion: 物理被动贴片攻击对视觉里程计系统构成严重安全威胁，需加强自主导航系统的鲁棒性设计。

tldr: 本文研究针对基于视觉里程计的自主导航系统的物理被动贴片对抗攻击，展示通过场景中部署对抗性贴片可显著增加系统误差。
motivation: 视觉里程计系统在自主导航中至关重要，但其易受对抗性扰动影响的漏洞可能引发碰撞等安全问题，现有研究缺乏对现实场景中此类攻击的系统性分析。
method: 提出通用对抗扰动生成方法，通过合成闭环无人机导航数据与真实数据验证贴片攻击效果，并提供开源实现代码。
result: 实验表明，对抗性贴片可使视觉里程计误差显著增加，且该漏洞在合成数据与真实场景中均存在。
conclusion: 物理被动贴片攻击对视觉里程计系统构成严重安全威胁，需加强自主导航系统的鲁棒性设计。
search_text: Physical Passive Patch Adversarial Attacks on Visual Odometry Systems 对视觉里程计系统的物理被动补丁对抗攻击 Deep neural networks are known to be susceptible to adversarial perturbations -- small perturbations that alter the output of the network and exist under strict norm limitations. While such perturbations are usually discussed as tailored to a specific input, a universal perturbation can be constructed to alter the model's output on a set of inputs. Universal perturbations present a more realistic case of adversarial attacks, as awareness of the model's exact input is not required. In addition, the universal attack setting raises the subject of generalization to unseen data, where given a set of inputs, the universal perturbations aim to alter the model's output on out-of-sample data. In this work, we study physical passive patch adversarial attacks on visual odometry-based autonomous navigation systems. A visual odometry system aims to infer the relative camera motion between two corresponding viewpoints, and is frequently used by vision-based autonomous navigation systems to estimate their state. For such navigation systems, a patch adversarial perturbation poses a severe security issue, as it can be used to mislead a system onto some collision course. To the best of our knowledge, we show for the first time that the error margin of a visual odometry model can be significantly increased by deploying patch adversarial attacks in the scene. We provide evaluation on synthetic closed-loop drone navigation data and demonstrate that a comparable vulnerability exists in real data. A reference implementation of the proposed method and the reported experiments is provided at https://github.com/patchadversarialattacks/patchadversarialattacks. 众所周知，深度神经网络容易受到对抗性扰动的影响，这些扰动会改变网络的输出，并且存在于严格的规范限制下。虽然此类扰动通常被讨论为针对特定输入而定制，但可以构建通用扰动来改变模型在一组输入上的输出。普遍扰动呈现了更现实的对抗性攻击案例，因为不需要了解模型的确切输入。此外，通用攻击设置提出了对未见过的数据进行泛化的主题，在给定一组输入的情况下，通用扰动旨在改变模型对样本外数据的输出。在这项工作中，我们研究了对基于视觉里程计的自主导航系统的物理被动补丁对抗攻击。视觉里程计系统旨在推断两个相应视点之间的相对相机运动，并且经常被基于视觉的自主导航系统用来估计其状态。对于此类导航系统，补丁对抗性扰动会带来严重的安全问题，因为它可用于误导系统进入某些碰撞路线。据我们所知，我们首次证明，通过在场景中部署补丁对抗攻击可以显着增加视觉里程计模型的误差范围。我们对合成闭环无人机导航数据进行评估，并证明实际数据中存在类似的漏洞。 https://github.com/patchadversarialattacks/patchadversarialattacks 提供了所提出方法的参考实现和报告的实验。 本文研究针对基于视觉里程计的自主导航系统的物理被动贴片对抗攻击，展示通过场景中部署对抗性贴片可显著增加系统误差。 Yaniv Nemcovsky,Matan Jacoby,Alex M. Bronstein,Chaim Baskin cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Tobias Hänel,Nishant Kumar,Dmitrij Schlesinger,Mengze Li,Erdem Ünal,Abouzar Eslami,Stefan Gumhold
title: Enhancing Fairness of Visual Attribute Predictors
title_zh: 增强视觉属性预测器的公平性
abstract: The performance of deep neural networks for image recognition tasks such as predicting a smiling face is known to degrade with under-represented classes of sensitive attributes. We address this problem by introducing fairness-aware regularization losses based on batch estimates of Demographic Parity, Equalized Odds, and a novel Intersection-over-Union measure. The experiments performed on facial and medical images from CelebA, UTKFace, and the SIIM-ISIC melanoma classification challenge show the effectiveness of our proposed fairness losses for bias mitigation as they improve model fairness while maintaining high classification performance. To the best of our knowledge, our work is the first attempt to incorporate these types of losses in an end-to-end training scheme for mitigating biases of visual attribute predictors. Our code is available at https://github.com/nish03/FVAP.
summary: The performance of deep neural networks for image recognition tasks such as predicting a smiling face is known to degrade with under-represented classes of sensitive attributes. We address this problem by introducing fairness-aware regularization losses based on batch estimates of Demographic Parity, Equalized Odds, and a novel Intersection-over-Union measure. The experiments performed on facial and medical images from CelebA, UTKFace, and the SIIM-ISIC melanoma classification challenge show the effectiveness of our proposed fairness losses for bias mitigation as they improve model fairness while maintaining high classification performance. To the best of our knowledge, our work is the first attempt to incorporate these types of losses in an end-to-end training scheme for mitigating biases of visual attribute predictors. Our code is available at https://github.com/nish03/FVAP.
abstract_zh: 众所周知，深度神经网络在图像识别任务（例如预测笑脸）中的性能会因敏感属性类别代表性不足而降低。我们通过引入基于人口平等、均衡赔率的批量估计和新颖的 Intersection-over-Union 度量的公平意识正则化损失来解决这个问题。对 CelebA、UTKFace 和 SIIM-ISIC 黑色素瘤分类挑战的面部和医学图像进行的实验表明，我们提出的公平性损失对于减轻偏差是有效的，因为它们在保持高分类性能的同时提高了模型公平性。据我们所知，我们的工作是首次尝试将这些类型的损失纳入端到端训练方案中，以减轻视觉属性预测器的偏差。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/nish03/FVAP 获取。

AI.tldr: 提升视觉属性预测器的公平性，减少敏感属性类别下的性能下降问题
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习模型在敏感属性类别代表性不足时性能下降，导致公平性问题，需提出新方法缓解此问题
AI.method: 引入基于批次估计的公平性正则化损失（人口统计公平性、均等机会及交并比指标），整合至端到端训练框架中
AI.result: 在CelebA、UTKFace及SIIM-ISIC数据集上验证，有效缓解偏见，提升公平性且保持高分类准确率
AI.conclusion: 首次将上述公平性损失应用于端到端训练，代码开源，为视觉属性预测的公平性研究提供新方向

authors_text: Jithendaraa Subramanian,Yashas Annadani,Ivaxi Sheth,Stefan Bauer,Derek Nowrouzezahrai,Samira Ebrahimi Kahou
title: Latent Variable Models for Bayesian Causal Discovery
title_zh: 贝叶斯因果发现的潜变量模型
comment: 7 figures, Published at the ICML 2022 Workshop on Spurious Correlations, Invariance, and Stability
comments: 7 figures, Published at the ICML 2022 Workshop on Spurious Correlations, Invariance, and Stability
abstract: Learning predictors that do not rely on spurious correlations involves building causal representations. However, learning such a representation is very challenging. We, therefore, formulate the problem of learning a causal representation from high dimensional data and study causal recovery with synthetic data. This work introduces a latent variable decoder model, Decoder BCD, for Bayesian causal discovery and performs experiments in mildly supervised and unsupervised settings. We present a series of synthetic experiments to characterize important factors for causal discovery and show that using known intervention targets as labels helps in unsupervised Bayesian inference over structure and parameters of linear Gaussian additive noise latent structural causal models.
summary: Learning predictors that do not rely on spurious correlations involves building causal representations. However, learning such a representation is very challenging. We, therefore, formulate the problem of learning a causal representation from high dimensional data and study causal recovery with synthetic data. This work introduces a latent variable decoder model, Decoder BCD, for Bayesian causal discovery and performs experiments in mildly supervised and unsupervised settings. We present a series of synthetic experiments to characterize important factors for causal discovery and show that using known intervention targets as labels helps in unsupervised Bayesian inference over structure and parameters of linear Gaussian additive noise latent structural causal models.
abstract_zh: 学习不依赖于虚假相关性的预测变量涉及构建因果表示。然而，学习这样的表示非常具有挑战性。因此，我们提出了从高维数据中学习因果表示的问题，并用合成数据研究因果恢复。这项工作引入了用于贝叶斯因果发现的潜在变量解码器模型 Decoder BCD，并在轻度监督和无监督设置中进行实验。我们提出了一系列综合实验来表征因果发现的重要因素，并表明使用已知的干预目标作为标签有助于对线性高斯加性噪声潜在结构因果模型的结构和参数进行无监督贝叶斯推理。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种潜在变量解码器模型Decoder BCD，用于贝叶斯因果发现，并在合成数据上验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: 高维数据中学习因果表示面临挑战，传统方法易受虚假相关性干扰，需探索更有效的因果发现框架。
AI.method: 设计潜在变量解码器模型Decoder BCD，在轻度监督和无监督场景下进行实验，利用已知干预目标作为标签辅助贝叶斯推理。
AI.result: 合成实验表明，使用干预标签可提升无监督贝叶斯推理对线性高斯加性噪声因果模型结构和参数的恢复效果。
AI.conclusion: 潜在变量模型能有效支持因果发现，干预标签的引入显著增强无监督学习性能，为实际应用提供新思路。

authors_text: Riccardo Barbano,Johannes Leuschner,Javier Antorán,Bangti Jin,José Miguel Hernández-Lobato
title: Bayesian Experimental Design for Computed Tomography with the Linearised Deep Image Prior
title_zh: 线性化深度图像先验的计算机断层扫描贝叶斯实验设计
abstract: We investigate adaptive design based on a single sparse pilot scan for generating effective scanning strategies for computed tomography reconstruction. We propose a novel approach using the linearised deep image prior. It allows incorporating information from the pilot measurements into the angle selection criteria, while maintaining the tractability of a conjugate Gaussian-linear model. On a synthetically generated dataset with preferential directions, linearised DIP design allows reducing the number of scans by up to 30% relative to an equidistant angle baseline.
summary: We investigate adaptive design based on a single sparse pilot scan for generating effective scanning strategies for computed tomography reconstruction. We propose a novel approach using the linearised deep image prior. It allows incorporating information from the pilot measurements into the angle selection criteria, while maintaining the tractability of a conjugate Gaussian-linear model. On a synthetically generated dataset with preferential directions, linearised DIP design allows reducing the number of scans by up to 30% relative to an equidistant angle baseline.
abstract_zh: 我们研究基于单个稀疏引导扫描的自适应设计，以生成用于计算机断层扫描重建的有效扫描策略。我们提出了一种使用线性化深度图像先验的新颖方法。它允许将来自飞行员测量的信息合并到角度选择标准中，同时保持共轭高斯线性模型的易处理性。在具有优先方向的综合生成数据集上，线性化 DIP 设计相对于等距角度基线可将扫描次数减少多达 30%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于线性化深度图像先验的自适应CT扫描策略设计方法，通过稀疏试点扫描优化角度选择以减少扫描次数。
AI.motivation: 传统CT扫描策略常采用等距角度基线，存在扫描次数多、效率低的问题，需探索能利用试点数据优化扫描角度的自适应方法。
AI.method: 结合线性化深度图像先验与共轭高斯线性模型，将试点测量信息嵌入角度选择准则，构建贝叶斯实验设计框架。
AI.result: 在具有优先方向的合成数据集上，该方法相比等距角度基线最多减少30%扫描次数。
AI.conclusion: 线性化DIP设计有效平衡了扫描效率与模型可解性，为CT扫描策略优化提供了新思路。

ai_content.motivation: 传统CT扫描策略常采用等距角度基线，存在扫描次数多、效率低的问题，需探索能利用试点数据优化扫描角度的自适应方法。

search_text: Bayesian Experimental Design for Computed Tomography with the Linearised Deep Image Prior 线性化深度图像先验的计算机断层扫描贝叶斯实验设计 We investigate adaptive design based on a single sparse pilot scan for generating effective scanning strategies for computed tomography reconstruction. We propose a novel approach using the linearised deep image prior. It allows incorporating information from the pilot measurements into the angle selection criteria, while maintaining the tractability of a conjugate Gaussian-linear model. On a synthetically generated dataset with preferential directions, linearised DIP design allows reducing the number of scans by up to 30% relative to an equidistant angle baseline. 我们研究基于单个稀疏引导扫描的自适应设计，以生成用于计算机断层扫描重建的有效扫描策略。我们提出了一种使用线性化深度图像先验的新颖方法。它允许将来自飞行员测量的信息合并到角度选择标准中，同时保持共轭高斯线性模型的易处理性。在具有优先方向的综合生成数据集上，线性化 DIP 设计相对于等距角度基线可将扫描次数减少多达 30%。 本文提出一种基于线性化深度图像先验的自适应CT扫描策略设计方法，通过稀疏试点扫描优化角度选择以减少扫描次数。 Riccardo Barbano,Johannes Leuschner,Javier Antorán,Bangti Jin,José Miguel Hernández-Lobato cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Lukas Mehl,Azin Jahedi,Jenny Schmalfuss,Andrés Bruhn
title: M-FUSE: Multi-frame Fusion for Scene Flow Estimation
title_zh: M-FUSE：用于场景流估计的多帧融合
comment: Accepted at the IEEE/CVF Winter Conference on Applications of Computer Vision (WACV), 2023. Copyright: IEEE
comments: Accepted at the IEEE/CVF Winter Conference on Applications of Computer Vision (WACV), 2023. Copyright: IEEE
abstract: Recently, neural network for scene flow estimation show impressive results on automotive data such as the KITTI benchmark. However, despite of using sophisticated rigidity assumptions and parametrizations, such networks are typically limited to only two frame pairs which does not allow them to exploit temporal information. In our paper we address this shortcoming by proposing a novel multi-frame approach that considers an additional preceding stereo pair. To this end, we proceed in two steps: Firstly, building upon the recent RAFT-3D approach, we develop an improved two-frame baseline by incorporating an advanced stereo method. Secondly, and even more importantly, exploiting the specific modeling concepts of RAFT-3D, we propose a U-Net architecture that performs a fusion of forward and backward flow estimates and hence allows to integrate temporal information on demand. Experiments on the KITTI benchmark do not only show that the advantages of the improved baseline and the temporal fusion approach complement each other, they also demonstrate that the computed scene flow is highly accurate. More precisely, our approach ranks second overall and first for the even more challenging foreground objects, in total outperforming the original RAFT-3D method by more than 16%. Code is available at https://github.com/cv-stuttgart/M-FUSE.
summary: Recently, neural network for scene flow estimation show impressive results on automotive data such as the KITTI benchmark. However, despite of using sophisticated rigidity assumptions and parametrizations, such networks are typically limited to only two frame pairs which does not allow them to exploit temporal information. In our paper we address this shortcoming by proposing a novel multi-frame approach that considers an additional preceding stereo pair. To this end, we proceed in two steps: Firstly, building upon the recent RAFT-3D approach, we develop an improved two-frame baseline by incorporating an advanced stereo method. Secondly, and even more importantly, exploiting the specific modeling concepts of RAFT-3D, we propose a U-Net architecture that performs a fusion of forward and backward flow estimates and hence allows to integrate temporal information on demand. Experiments on the KITTI benchmark do not only show that the advantages of the improved baseline and the temporal fusion approach complement each other, they also demonstrate that the computed scene flow is highly accurate. More precisely, our approach ranks second overall and first for the even more challenging foreground objects, in total outperforming the original RAFT-3D method by more than 16%. Code is available at https://github.com/cv-stuttgart/M-FUSE.
abstract_zh: 最近，用于场景流估计的神经网络在 KITTI 基准等汽车数据上显示出令人印象深刻的结果。然而，尽管使用复杂的刚性假设和参数化，此类网络通常仅限于两个帧对，这不允许它们利用时间信息。在我们的论文中，我们通过提出一种新颖的多帧方法来解决这个缺点，该方法考虑了额外的前置立体声对。为此，我们分两步进行：首先，在最近的 RAFT-3D 方法的基础上，我们通过结合先进的立体方法开发了改进的两帧基线。其次，更重要的是，利用 RAFT-3D 的特定建模概念，我们提出了一种 U-Net 架构，该架构执行前向和后向流估计的融合，从而允许按需集成时间信息。 KITTI基准测试不仅表明改进的基线和时间融合方法的优势相辅相成，而且还证明了计算的场景流是高度准确的。更准确地说，我们的方法总体排名第二，对于更具挑战性的前景物体排名第一，总体性能比原始 RAFT-3D 方法高出 16% 以上。代码可在 https://github.com/cv-stuttgart/M-FUSE 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出M-FUSE方法，通过多帧融合改进场景流估计，提升自动驾驶等领域的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有神经网络在场景流估计中仅使用两帧数据，无法有效利用时间信息，限制了性能提升。
AI.method: 基于RAFT-3D改进两帧基线并引入先进立体视觉方法，设计U-Net架构融合前向与后向流估计以整合时间信息。
AI.result: 在KITTI基准测试中，方法总体排名第二，前景目标排名第一，较原始RAFT-3D提升超16%。
AI.conclusion: 多帧融合策略有效结合了基线优化与时间信息利用，显著提升了场景流估计的精度与鲁棒性。

authors_text: Junwen Pan,Guanlin Chen,Yi Liu,Jiexiang Wang,Cheng Bian,Pengfei Zhu,Zhicheng Zhang
title: Tell Me the Evidence? Dual Visual-Linguistic Interaction for Answer Grounding
title_zh: 告诉我证据？双重视觉语言互动，为答案奠定基础
abstract: Answer grounding aims to reveal the visual evidence for visual question answering (VQA), which entails highlighting relevant positions in the image when answering questions about images. Previous attempts typically tackle this problem using pretrained object detectors, but without the flexibility for objects not in the predefined vocabulary. However, these black-box methods solely concentrate on the linguistic generation, ignoring the visual interpretability. In this paper, we propose Dual Visual-Linguistic Interaction (DaVI), a novel unified end-to-end framework with the capability for both linguistic answering and visual grounding. DaVI innovatively introduces two visual-linguistic interaction mechanisms: 1) visual-based linguistic encoder that understands questions incorporated with visual features and produces linguistic-oriented evidence for further answer decoding, and 2) linguistic-based visual decoder that focuses visual features on the evidence-related regions for answer grounding. This way, our approach ranked the 1st place in the answer grounding track of 2022 VizWiz Grand Challenge.
summary: Answer grounding aims to reveal the visual evidence for visual question answering (VQA), which entails highlighting relevant positions in the image when answering questions about images. Previous attempts typically tackle this problem using pretrained object detectors, but without the flexibility for objects not in the predefined vocabulary. However, these black-box methods solely concentrate on the linguistic generation, ignoring the visual interpretability. In this paper, we propose Dual Visual-Linguistic Interaction (DaVI), a novel unified end-to-end framework with the capability for both linguistic answering and visual grounding. DaVI innovatively introduces two visual-linguistic interaction mechanisms: 1) visual-based linguistic encoder that understands questions incorporated with visual features and produces linguistic-oriented evidence for further answer decoding, and 2) linguistic-based visual decoder that focuses visual features on the evidence-related regions for answer grounding. This way, our approach ranked the 1st place in the answer grounding track of 2022 VizWiz Grand Challenge.
abstract_zh: 答案接地旨在揭示视觉问答（VQA）的视觉证据，这需要在回答有关图像的问题时突出显示图像中的相关位置。以前的尝试通常使用预先训练的对象检测器来解决这个问题，但对于不在预定义词汇表中的对象缺乏灵活性。然而，这些黑盒方法仅仅关注语言生成，忽略了视觉可解释性。在本文中，我们提出了双重视觉语言交互（DaVI），这是一种新颖的统一端到端框架，具有语言回答和视觉基础的能力。 DaVI创新性地引入了两种视觉语言交互机制：1）基于视觉的语言编码器，理解与视觉特征相结合的问题，并产生面向语言的证据以供进一步解码答案；2）基于语言的视觉解码器，将视觉特征集中在证据相关区域以进行答案基础。这样，我们的方法在 2022 年 VizWiz Grand Challenge 答案基础赛道中排名第一。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种名为DaVI的双重视觉-语言交互框架，用于视觉问答中的答案定位任务，旨在通过结合视觉和语言信息来提升答案的可解释性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖预训练对象检测器，无法处理非预定义词汇的物体，且忽视了视觉证据的可解释性，导致答案缺乏视觉支持。
AI.method: 提出DaVI框架，包含两个交互机制：1) 基于视觉的语言编码器，融合视觉特征生成语言答案；2) 基于语言的视觉解码器，聚焦与答案相关的图像区域。
AI.result: 该方法在2022年VizWiz Grand Challenge的答案定位赛道中排名第一。
AI.conclusion: DaVI通过双重交互机制有效结合视觉与语言信息，提升了视觉问答中答案的可解释性和定位准确性。

authors_text: Prateek Chhikara,Anil Goyal,Chirag Sharma
title: RE-Tagger: A light-weight Real-Estate Image Classifier
title_zh: RE-Tagger：轻量级房地产图像分类器
comment: European Conference on Machine Learning and Principles and Practice of Knowledge Discovery in Databases (DEMO TRACK)
comments: European Conference on Machine Learning and Principles and Practice of Knowledge Discovery in Databases (DEMO TRACK)
abstract: Real-estate image tagging is one of the essential use-cases to save efforts involved in manual annotation and enhance the user experience. This paper proposes an end-to-end pipeline (referred to as RE-Tagger) for the real-estate image classification problem. We present a two-stage transfer learning approach using custom InceptionV3 architecture to classify images into different categories (i.e., bedroom, bathroom, kitchen, balcony, hall, and others). Finally, we released the application as REST API hosted as a web application running on 2 cores machine with 2 GB RAM. The demo video is available here.
summary: Real-estate image tagging is one of the essential use-cases to save efforts involved in manual annotation and enhance the user experience. This paper proposes an end-to-end pipeline (referred to as RE-Tagger) for the real-estate image classification problem. We present a two-stage transfer learning approach using custom InceptionV3 architecture to classify images into different categories (i.e., bedroom, bathroom, kitchen, balcony, hall, and others). Finally, we released the application as REST API hosted as a web application running on 2 cores machine with 2 GB RAM. The demo video is available here.
abstract_zh: 房地产图像标记是节省手动注释工作并增强用户体验的重要用例之一。本文针对房地产图像分类问题提出了一种端到端的管道（称为RE-Tagger）。我们提出了一种两阶段迁移学习方法，使用定制的 InceptionV3 架构将图像分类为不同的类别（即卧室、浴室、厨房、阳台、大厅等）。最后，我们将应用程序作为 REST API 发布，作为 Web 应用程序托管，在具有 2 GB RAM 的 2 核计算机上运行。演示视频可在此处获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种轻量级房地产图像分类系统RE-Tagger，通过迁移学习实现图像自动标注。
AI.motivation: 房地产图像手动标注耗时费力，且需提升用户交互体验，需开发轻量化解决方案适应资源限制。
AI.method: 基于定制InceptionV3架构，采用两阶段迁移学习方法，将图像分为卧室、浴室等6类，并部署为REST API。
AI.result: 成功开发出可在2核2GB机器运行的REST API服务，通过演示视频验证系统效率和分类准确性。
AI.conclusion: RE-Tagger证明了轻量化模型在房地产图像分类任务中的可行性，为实际应用提供了高效解决方案。

authors_text: Hadeel Mabrouk,Omar Abugabal,Nourhan Sakr,Hesham M. Eraqi
title: Lip-Listening: Mixing Senses to Understand Lips using Cross Modality Knowledge Distillation for Word-Based Models
title_zh: 唇听：使用基于单词的模型的跨模态知识蒸馏混合感官来理解嘴唇
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2108.03543
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2108.03543
abstract: In this work, we propose a technique to transfer speech recognition capabilities from audio speech recognition systems to visual speech recognizers, where our goal is to utilize audio data during lipreading model training. Impressive progress in the domain of speech recognition has been exhibited by audio and audio-visual systems. Nevertheless, there is still much to be explored with regards to visual speech recognition systems due to the visual ambiguity of some phonemes. To this end, the development of visual speech recognition models is crucial given the instability of audio models. The main contributions of this work are i) building on recent state-of-the-art word-based lipreading models by integrating sequence-level and frame-level Knowledge Distillation (KD) to their systems; ii) leveraging audio data during training visual models, a feat which has not been utilized in prior word-based work; iii) proposing the Gaussian-shaped averaging in frame-level KD, as an efficient technique that aids the model in distilling knowledge at the sequence model encoder. This work proposes a novel and competitive architecture for lip-reading, as we demonstrate a noticeable improvement in performance, setting a new benchmark equals to 88.64% on the LRW dataset.
summary: In this work, we propose a technique to transfer speech recognition capabilities from audio speech recognition systems to visual speech recognizers, where our goal is to utilize audio data during lipreading model training. Impressive progress in the domain of speech recognition has been exhibited by audio and audio-visual systems. Nevertheless, there is still much to be explored with regards to visual speech recognition systems due to the visual ambiguity of some phonemes. To this end, the development of visual speech recognition models is crucial given the instability of audio models. The main contributions of this work are i) building on recent state-of-the-art word-based lipreading models by integrating sequence-level and frame-level Knowledge Distillation (KD) to their systems; ii) leveraging audio data during training visual models, a feat which has not been utilized in prior word-based work; iii) proposing the Gaussian-shaped averaging in frame-level KD, as an efficient technique that aids the model in distilling knowledge at the sequence model encoder. This work proposes a novel and competitive architecture for lip-reading, as we demonstrate a noticeable improvement in performance, setting a new benchmark equals to 88.64% on the LRW dataset.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们提出了一种将语音识别功能从音频语音识别系统转移到视觉语音识别器的技术，我们的目标是在唇读模型训练期间利用音频数据。音频和视听系统在语音识别领域取得了令人印象深刻的进展。然而，由于某些音素的视觉模糊性，视觉语音识别系统仍有很多有待探索。为此，考虑到音频模型的不稳定性，视觉语音识别模型的开发至关重要。这项工作的主要贡献是 i）通过将序列级和框架级知识蒸馏（KD）集成到其系统中，建立在最近最先进的基于单词的唇读模型的基础上； ii）在训练视觉模型期间利用音频数据，这是之前基于单词的工作中尚未使用的壮举； iii) 提出帧级 KD 中的高斯形平均，作为一种有效的技术，帮助模型在序列模型编码器中提取知识。这项工作提出了一种新颖且有竞争力的唇读架构，我们证明了性能的显着提高，在 LRW 数据集上设置了相当于 88.64% 的新基准。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种跨模态知识蒸馏技术，将语音识别能力迁移至视觉唇语识别模型，通过结合音频数据提升唇语识别性能。
AI.motivation: 视觉语音识别因音素视觉模糊性存在挑战，而音频模型稳定性不足，需开发更鲁棒的视觉模型以利用音频数据辅助训练。
AI.method: 集成序列级与帧级知识蒸馏，引入高斯形状平均技术优化帧级知识蒸馏，并首次在基于单词的唇语模型中利用音频数据进行训练。
AI.result: 在LRW数据集上达到88.64%的识别准确率，创下单词级唇语识别新基准。
AI.conclusion: 跨模态知识蒸馏有效提升了视觉语音识别性能，为音频-视觉模态协同提供了新方法。

authors_text: Lukas Christ,Shahin Amiriparian,Alice Baird,Panagiotis Tzirakis,Alexander Kathan,Niklas Müller,Lukas Stappen,Eva-Maria Meßner,Andreas König,Alan Cowen,Erik Cambria,Björn W. Schuller
title: The MuSe 2022 Multimodal Sentiment Analysis Challenge: Humor, Emotional Reactions, and Stress
title_zh: MuSe 2022 多模态情感分析挑战：幽默、情绪反应和压力
comment: Baseline paper for the 3rd Multimodal Sentiment Analysis Challenge (MuSe) 2022, a full-day workshop at ACM Multimedia 2022
comments: Baseline paper for the 3rd Multimodal Sentiment Analysis Challenge (MuSe) 2022, a full-day workshop at ACM Multimedia 2022
abstract: The Multimodal Sentiment Analysis Challenge (MuSe) 2022 is dedicated to multimodal sentiment and emotion recognition. For this year's challenge, we feature three datasets: (i) the Passau Spontaneous Football Coach Humor (Passau-SFCH) dataset that contains audio-visual recordings of German football coaches, labelled for the presence of humour; (ii) the Hume-Reaction dataset in which reactions of individuals to emotional stimuli have been annotated with respect to seven emotional expression intensities, and (iii) the Ulm-Trier Social Stress Test (Ulm-TSST) dataset comprising of audio-visual data labelled with continuous emotion values (arousal and valence) of people in stressful dispositions. Using the introduced datasets, MuSe 2022 2022 addresses three contemporary affective computing problems: in the Humor Detection Sub-Challenge (MuSe-Humor), spontaneous humour has to be recognised; in the Emotional Reactions Sub-Challenge (MuSe-Reaction), seven fine-grained `in-the-wild' emotions have to be predicted; and in the Emotional Stress Sub-Challenge (MuSe-Stress), a continuous prediction of stressed emotion values is featured. The challenge is designed to attract different research communities, encouraging a fusion of their disciplines. Mainly, MuSe 2022 targets the communities of audio-visual emotion recognition, health informatics, and symbolic sentiment analysis. This baseline paper describes the datasets as well as the feature sets extracted from them. A recurrent neural network with LSTM cells is used to set competitive baseline results on the test partitions for each sub-challenge. We report an Area Under the Curve (AUC) of .8480 for MuSe-Humor; .2801 mean (from 7-classes) Pearson's Correlations Coefficient for MuSe-Reaction, as well as .4931 Concordance Correlation Coefficient (CCC) and .4761 for valence and arousal in MuSe-Stress, respectively.
summary: The Multimodal Sentiment Analysis Challenge (MuSe) 2022 is dedicated to multimodal sentiment and emotion recognition. For this year's challenge, we feature three datasets: (i) the Passau Spontaneous Football Coach Humor (Passau-SFCH) dataset that contains audio-visual recordings of German football coaches, labelled for the presence of humour; (ii) the Hume-Reaction dataset in which reactions of individuals to emotional stimuli have been annotated with respect to seven emotional expression intensities, and (iii) the Ulm-Trier Social Stress Test (Ulm-TSST) dataset comprising of audio-visual data labelled with continuous emotion values (arousal and valence) of people in stressful dispositions. Using the introduced datasets, MuSe 2022 2022 addresses three contemporary affective computing problems: in the Humor Detection Sub-Challenge (MuSe-Humor), spontaneous humour has to be recognised; in the Emotional Reactions Sub-Challenge (MuSe-Reaction), seven fine-grained `in-the-wild' emotions have to be predicted; and in the Emotional Stress Sub-Challenge (MuSe-Stress), a continuous prediction of stressed emotion values is featured. The challenge is designed to attract different research communities, encouraging a fusion of their disciplines. Mainly, MuSe 2022 targets the communities of audio-visual emotion recognition, health informatics, and symbolic sentiment analysis. This baseline paper describes the datasets as well as the feature sets extracted from them. A recurrent neural network with LSTM cells is used to set competitive baseline results on the test partitions for each sub-challenge. We report an Area Under the Curve (AUC) of .8480 for MuSe-Humor; .2801 mean (from 7-classes) Pearson's Correlations Coefficient for MuSe-Reaction, as well as .4931 Concordance Correlation Coefficient (CCC) and .4761 for valence and arousal in MuSe-Stress, respectively.
abstract_zh: 2022 年多模态情感分析挑战赛 (MuSe) 致力于多模态情感和情感识别。对于今年的挑战，我们提供了三个数据集：(i) 帕绍自发足球教练幽默 (Passau-SFCH) 数据集，其中包含德国足球教练的视听录音，并标记为幽默的存在； (ii) 休谟反应数据集，其中根据七种情绪表达强度注释了个体对情绪刺激的反应，以及 (iii) 乌尔姆-特里尔社会压力测试 (Ulm-TSST) 数据集，包含标有处于压力状态的人的连续情绪值（唤醒度和效价）的视听数据。使用引入的数据集，MuSe 2022 2022 解决了三个当代情感计算问题：在幽默检测子挑战（MuSe-Humor）中，必须识别自发的幽默；在情绪反应子挑战（MuSe-Reaction）中，必须预测七种细粒度的“野外”情绪；在情绪压力子挑战（MuSe-Stress）中，其特点是持续预测压力情绪值。该挑战旨在吸引不同的研究团体，鼓励不同学科的融合。 MuSe 2022 主要针对视听情感识别、健康信息学和符号情感分析社区。这篇基线论文描述了数据集以及从中提取的特征集。具有 LSTM 单元的循环神经网络用于在每个子挑战的测试分区上设置竞争基线结果。我们报告 MuSe-Humor 的曲线下面积 (AUC) 为 0.8480； MuSe-Reaction 的皮尔逊相关系数平均值（来自 7 类）为 0.2801，MuSe-Stress 中的效价和唤醒度分别为 0.4931 和 0.4931 一致性相关系数 (CCC) 和 0.4761。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了MuSe 2022多模态情感分析挑战赛，包含三个数据集，分别用于幽默检测、情感反应识别和压力情绪预测。
AI.motivation: 推动多模态情感计算研究，促进音频-视觉情感识别、健康信息学和符号情感分析等领域的跨学科融合。
AI.method: 使用带有LSTM单元的循环神经网络作为基线模型，从三个数据集中提取特征进行实验。
AI.result: 幽默检测AUC为0.8480，情感反应平均皮尔逊相关系数为0.2801，压力情绪预测中唤醒度CCC为0.4931，效价CCC为0.4761。
AI.conclusion: 挑战赛为多模态情感分析提供了基准数据集和模型，促进了跨领域方法的融合与验证。

ai_content.tldr: 本文介绍了MuSe 2022多模态情感分析挑战赛，包含三个数据集，分别用于幽默检测、情感反应识别和压力情绪预测。
ai_content.motivation: 推动多模态情感计算研究，促进音频-视觉情感识别、健康信息学和符号情感分析等领域的跨学科融合。

search_text: The MuSe 2022 Multimodal Sentiment Analysis Challenge: Humor, Emotional Reactions, and Stress MuSe 2022 多模态情感分析挑战：幽默、情绪反应和压力 The Multimodal Sentiment Analysis Challenge (MuSe) 2022 is dedicated to multimodal sentiment and emotion recognition. For this year's challenge, we feature three datasets: (i) the Passau Spontaneous Football Coach Humor (Passau-SFCH) dataset that contains audio-visual recordings of German football coaches, labelled for the presence of humour; (ii) the Hume-Reaction dataset in which reactions of individuals to emotional stimuli have been annotated with respect to seven emotional expression intensities, and (iii) the Ulm-Trier Social Stress Test (Ulm-TSST) dataset comprising of audio-visual data labelled with continuous emotion values (arousal and valence) of people in stressful dispositions. Using the introduced datasets, MuSe 2022 2022 addresses three contemporary affective computing problems: in the Humor Detection Sub-Challenge (MuSe-Humor), spontaneous humour has to be recognised; in the Emotional Reactions Sub-Challenge (MuSe-Reaction), seven fine-grained `in-the-wild' emotions have to be predicted; and in the Emotional Stress Sub-Challenge (MuSe-Stress), a continuous prediction of stressed emotion values is featured. The challenge is designed to attract different research communities, encouraging a fusion of their disciplines. Mainly, MuSe 2022 targets the communities of audio-visual emotion recognition, health informatics, and symbolic sentiment analysis. This baseline paper describes the datasets as well as the feature sets extracted from them. A recurrent neural network with LSTM cells is used to set competitive baseline results on the test partitions for each sub-challenge. We report an Area Under the Curve (AUC) of .8480 for MuSe-Humor; .2801 mean (from 7-classes) Pearson's Correlations Coefficient for MuSe-Reaction, as well as .4931 Concordance Correlation Coefficient (CCC) and .4761 for valence and arousal in MuSe-Stress, respectively. 2022 年多模态情感分析挑战赛 (MuSe) 致力于多模态情感和情感识别。对于今年的挑战，我们提供了三个数据集：(i) 帕绍自发足球教练幽默 (Passau-SFCH) 数据集，其中包含德国足球教练的视听录音，并标记为幽默的存在； (ii) 休谟反应数据集，其中根据七种情绪表达强度注释了个体对情绪刺激的反应，以及 (iii) 乌尔姆-特里尔社会压力测试 (Ulm-TSST) 数据集，包含标有处于压力状态的人的连续情绪值（唤醒度和效价）的视听数据。使用引入的数据集，MuSe 2022 2022 解决了三个当代情感计算问题：在幽默检测子挑战（MuSe-Humor）中，必须识别自发的幽默；在情绪反应子挑战（MuSe-Reaction）中，必须预测七种细粒度的“野外”情绪；在情绪压力子挑战（MuSe-Stress）中，其特点是持续预测压力情绪值。该挑战旨在吸引不同的研究团体，鼓励不同学科的融合。 MuSe 2022 主要针对视听情感识别、健康信息学和符号情感分析社区。这篇基线论文描述了数据集以及从中提取的特征集。具有 LSTM 单元的循环神经网络用于在每个子挑战的测试分区上设置竞争基线结果。我们报告 MuSe-Humor 的曲线下面积 (AUC) 为 0.8480； MuSe-Reaction 的皮尔逊相关系数平均值（来自 7 类）为 0.2801，MuSe-Stress 中的效价和唤醒度分别为 0.4931 和 0.4931 一致性相关系数 (CCC) 和 0.4761。 本文介绍了MuSe 2022多模态情感分析挑战赛，包含三个数据集，分别用于幽默检测、情感反应识别和压力情绪预测。 Lukas Christ,Shahin Amiriparian,Alice Baird,Panagiotis Tzirakis,Alexander Kathan,Niklas Müller,Lukas Stappen,Eva-Maria Meßner,Andreas König,Alan Cowen,Erik Cambria,Björn W. Schuller cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CL,cs.MM,eess.AS

authors_text: Chen Zhang,Luchin Chang,Songruoyao Wu,Xu Tan,Tao Qin,Tie-Yan Liu,Kejun Zhang
title: ReLyMe: Improving Lyric-to-Melody Generation by Incorporating Lyric-Melody Relationships
title_zh: ReLyMe：通过结合歌词与旋律关系来改进歌词与旋律的生成
abstract: Lyric-to-melody generation, which generates melody according to given lyrics, is one of the most important automatic music composition tasks. With the rapid development of deep learning, previous works address this task with end-to-end neural network models. However, deep learning models cannot well capture the strict but subtle relationships between lyrics and melodies, which compromises the harmony between lyrics and generated melodies. In this paper, we propose ReLyMe, a method that incorporates Relationships between Lyrics and Melodies from music theory to ensure the harmony between lyrics and melodies. Specifically, we first introduce several principles that lyrics and melodies should follow in terms of tone, rhythm, and structure relationships. These principles are then integrated into neural network lyric-to-melody models by adding corresponding constraints during the decoding process to improve the harmony between lyrics and melodies. We use a series of objective and subjective metrics to evaluate the generated melodies. Experiments on both English and Chinese song datasets show the effectiveness of ReLyMe, demonstrating the superiority of incorporating lyric-melody relationships from the music domain into neural lyric-to-melody generation.
summary: Lyric-to-melody generation, which generates melody according to given lyrics, is one of the most important automatic music composition tasks. With the rapid development of deep learning, previous works address this task with end-to-end neural network models. However, deep learning models cannot well capture the strict but subtle relationships between lyrics and melodies, which compromises the harmony between lyrics and generated melodies. In this paper, we propose ReLyMe, a method that incorporates Relationships between Lyrics and Melodies from music theory to ensure the harmony between lyrics and melodies. Specifically, we first introduce several principles that lyrics and melodies should follow in terms of tone, rhythm, and structure relationships. These principles are then integrated into neural network lyric-to-melody models by adding corresponding constraints during the decoding process to improve the harmony between lyrics and melodies. We use a series of objective and subjective metrics to evaluate the generated melodies. Experiments on both English and Chinese song datasets show the effectiveness of ReLyMe, demonstrating the superiority of incorporating lyric-melody relationships from the music domain into neural lyric-to-melody generation.
abstract_zh: 歌词到旋律生成，即根据给定的歌词生成旋律，是最重要的自动音乐创作任务之一。随着深度学习的快速发展，之前的工作通过端到端神经网络模型来解决这一任务。然而，深度学习模型无法很好地捕捉歌词和旋律之间严格但微妙的关系，这会损害歌词和生成的旋律之间的和谐。在本文中，我们提出了 ReLyMe，一种结合音乐理论中歌词和旋律之间关系的方法，以确保歌词和旋律之间的和谐。具体来说，我们首先从音调、节奏、结构关系等方面介绍歌词和旋律应遵循的几个原则。然后，通过在解码过程中添加相应的约束，将这些原理集成到神经网络歌词到旋律模型中，以提高歌词和旋律之间的和谐度。我们使用一系列客观和主观指标来评估生成的旋律。对英文和中文歌曲数据集的实验表明了 ReLyMe 的有效性，证明了将音乐领域的歌词-旋律关系融入到神经歌词-旋律生成中的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ReLyMe方法，通过融合歌词与旋律的音乐理论关系，提升歌词到旋律生成的和谐度。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习模型难以捕捉歌词与旋律间严格的细微关系，导致生成旋律与歌词不协调。
AI.method: 引入音高、节奏和结构关系的音乐理论原则，在解码过程中通过约束条件整合到神经网络模型中。
AI.result: 在英文和中文歌曲数据集上的实验表明，ReLyMe显著提升了生成旋律的和谐性与质量。
AI.conclusion: 将音乐领域的歌词-旋律关系纳入生成模型，能有效增强歌词与生成旋律的协调性。

authors_text: Siyi Hu,Chuanlong Xie,Xiaodan Liang,Xiaojun Chang
title: Policy Diagnosis via Measuring Role Diversity in Cooperative Multi-agent RL
title_zh: 通过测量合作多智能体强化学习中的角色多样性进行策略诊断
abstract: Cooperative multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) is making rapid progress for solving tasks in a grid world and real-world scenarios, in which agents are given different attributes and goals, resulting in different behavior through the whole multi-agent task. In this study, we quantify the agent's behavior difference and build its relationship with the policy performance via {\bf Role Diversity}, a metric to measure the characteristics of MARL tasks. We define role diversity from three perspectives: action-based, trajectory-based, and contribution-based to fully measure a multi-agent task. Through theoretical analysis, we find that the error bound in MARL can be decomposed into three parts that have a strong relation to the role diversity. The decomposed factors can significantly impact policy optimization on three popular directions including parameter sharing, communication mechanism, and credit assignment. The main experimental platforms are based on {\bf Multiagent Particle Environment (MPE)} and {\bf The StarCraft Multi-Agent Challenge (SMAC). Extensive experiments} clearly show that role diversity can serve as a robust measurement for the characteristics of a multi-agent cooperation task and help diagnose whether the policy fits the current multi-agent system for a better policy performance.
summary: Cooperative multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) is making rapid progress for solving tasks in a grid world and real-world scenarios, in which agents are given different attributes and goals, resulting in different behavior through the whole multi-agent task. In this study, we quantify the agent's behavior difference and build its relationship with the policy performance via {\bf Role Diversity}, a metric to measure the characteristics of MARL tasks. We define role diversity from three perspectives: action-based, trajectory-based, and contribution-based to fully measure a multi-agent task. Through theoretical analysis, we find that the error bound in MARL can be decomposed into three parts that have a strong relation to the role diversity. The decomposed factors can significantly impact policy optimization on three popular directions including parameter sharing, communication mechanism, and credit assignment. The main experimental platforms are based on {\bf Multiagent Particle Environment (MPE)} and {\bf The StarCraft Multi-Agent Challenge (SMAC). Extensive experiments} clearly show that role diversity can serve as a robust measurement for the characteristics of a multi-agent cooperation task and help diagnose whether the policy fits the current multi-agent system for a better policy performance.
abstract_zh: 协作多智能体强化学习（MARL）在解决网格世界和现实世界场景中的任务方面取得了快速进展，其中智能体被赋予不同的属性和目标，从而在整个多智能体任务中产生不同的行为。在本研究中，我们量化了代理的行为差异，并通过角色多样性（衡量 MARL 任务特征的指标）建立其与策略绩效的关系。我们从三个角度定义角色多样性：基于行动、基于轨迹和基于贡献，以充分衡量多智能体任务。通过理论分析，我们发现MARL中的误差界限可以分解为与角色多样性密切相关的三个部分。分解的因素可以显着影响参数共享、通信机制和信用分配三个热门方向的策略优化。主要实验平台基于{\bf 多智能体粒子环境 (MPE)} 和{\bf 星际争霸多智能体挑战赛 (SMAC)。大量的实验清楚地表明，角色多样性可以作为多智能体合作任务特征的稳健度量，并有助于诊断策略是否适合当前的多智能体系统，以获得更好的策略性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过量化多智能体强化学习任务中的角色多样性，诊断策略性能与任务特征的匹配性。
AI.motivation: 现有MARL方法难以有效处理智能体角色差异导致的策略优化问题，需建立任务特征与策略性能的关联性诊断指标。
AI.method: 从动作、轨迹和贡献三个维度定义角色多样性指标，理论分解MARL误差边界并关联到参数共享、通信机制和信用分配三个优化方向，基于MPE和SMAC平台进行实验验证。
AI.result: 实验表明角色多样性可有效衡量多智能体协作任务特征，显著提升策略诊断准确性及优化效果。
AI.conclusion: 角色多样性为多智能体系统提供了稳健的任务特征量化工具，可指导策略设计与优化方向选择。

conclusion: 角色多样性为多智能体系统提供了稳健的任务特征量化工具，可指导策略设计与优化方向选择。
search_text: Policy Diagnosis via Measuring Role Diversity in Cooperative Multi-agent RL 通过测量合作多智能体强化学习中的角色多样性进行策略诊断 Cooperative multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) is making rapid progress for solving tasks in a grid world and real-world scenarios, in which agents are given different attributes and goals, resulting in different behavior through the whole multi-agent task. In this study, we quantify the agent's behavior difference and build its relationship with the policy performance via {\bf Role Diversity}, a metric to measure the characteristics of MARL tasks. We define role diversity from three perspectives: action-based, trajectory-based, and contribution-based to fully measure a multi-agent task. Through theoretical analysis, we find that the error bound in MARL can be decomposed into three parts that have a strong relation to the role diversity. The decomposed factors can significantly impact policy optimization on three popular directions including parameter sharing, communication mechanism, and credit assignment. The main experimental platforms are based on {\bf Multiagent Particle Environment (MPE)} and {\bf The StarCraft Multi-Agent Challenge (SMAC). Extensive experiments} clearly show that role diversity can serve as a robust measurement for the characteristics of a multi-agent cooperation task and help diagnose whether the policy fits the current multi-agent system for a better policy performance. 协作多智能体强化学习（MARL）在解决网格世界和现实世界场景中的任务方面取得了快速进展，其中智能体被赋予不同的属性和目标，从而在整个多智能体任务中产生不同的行为。在本研究中，我们量化了代理的行为差异，并通过角色多样性（衡量 MARL 任务特征的指标）建立其与策略绩效的关系。我们从三个角度定义角色多样性：基于行动、基于轨迹和基于贡献，以充分衡量多智能体任务。通过理论分析，我们发现MARL中的误差界限可以分解为与角色多样性密切相关的三个部分。分解的因素可以显着影响参数共享、通信机制和信用分配三个热门方向的策略优化。主要实验平台基于{\bf 多智能体粒子环境 (MPE)} 和{\bf 星际争霸多智能体挑战赛 (SMAC)。大量的实验清楚地表明，角色多样性可以作为多智能体合作任务特征的稳健度量，并有助于诊断策略是否适合当前的多智能体系统，以获得更好的策略性能。 本文提出通过量化多智能体强化学习任务中的角色多样性，诊断策略性能与任务特征的匹配性。 Siyi Hu,Chuanlong Xie,Xiaodan Liang,Xiaojun Chang cs.MA,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Juan Manuel López-Correa,Caroline König,Alfredo Vellido
title: Long Short-Term Memory to predict 3D Amino acids Positions in GPCR Molecular Dynamics
title_zh: 长短期记忆可预测 GPCR 分子动力学中的 3D 氨基酸位置
comment: G-Protein Coupled Receptors, LSTM, Molecular Dynamics
comments: G-Protein Coupled Receptors, LSTM, Molecular Dynamics
abstract: G-Protein Coupled Receptors (GPCRs) are a big family of eukaryotic cell transmembrane proteins, responsible for numerous biological processes. From a practical viewpoint around 34\% of the drugs approved by the US Food and Drug Administration target these receptors. They can be analyzed from their simulated molecular dynamics, including the prediction of their behavior in the presence of drugs. In this paper, the capability of Long Short-Term Memory Networks (LSTMs) are evaluated to learn and predict the molecular dynamic trajectories of a receptor. Several models were trained with the 3D position of the amino acids of the receptor considering different transformations on the position of the amino acid, such as their centers of mass, the geometric centers and the position of the $α$--carbon for each amino acid. The error of the prediction of the position was evaluated by the mean average error (MAE) and root-mean-square deviation (RMSD). The LSTM models show a robust performance, with results comparable to the state-of-the-art in non-dynamic 3D predictions. The best MAE and RMSD values were found for the mass center of the amino acids with 0.078 Å and 0.156 Å respectively. This work shows the potential of LSTM to predict the molecular dynamics of GPRCs.
summary: G-Protein Coupled Receptors (GPCRs) are a big family of eukaryotic cell transmembrane proteins, responsible for numerous biological processes. From a practical viewpoint around 34\% of the drugs approved by the US Food and Drug Administration target these receptors. They can be analyzed from their simulated molecular dynamics, including the prediction of their behavior in the presence of drugs. In this paper, the capability of Long Short-Term Memory Networks (LSTMs) are evaluated to learn and predict the molecular dynamic trajectories of a receptor. Several models were trained with the 3D position of the amino acids of the receptor considering different transformations on the position of the amino acid, such as their centers of mass, the geometric centers and the position of the $α$--carbon for each amino acid. The error of the prediction of the position was evaluated by the mean average error (MAE) and root-mean-square deviation (RMSD). The LSTM models show a robust performance, with results comparable to the state-of-the-art in non-dynamic 3D predictions. The best MAE and RMSD values were found for the mass center of the amino acids with 0.078 Å and 0.156 Å respectively. This work shows the potential of LSTM to predict the molecular dynamics of GPRCs.
abstract_zh: G 蛋白偶联受体 (GPCR) 是真核细胞跨膜蛋白的一个大家族，负责许多生物过程。从实践的角度来看，美国食品和药物管理局批准的大约 34% 的药物都是针对这些受体的。 They can be analyzed from their simulated molecular dynamics, including the prediction of their behavior in the presence of drugs.在本文中，评估了长短期记忆网络（LSTM）学习和预测受体分子动态轨迹的能力。考虑到氨基酸位置的不同变换，例如每个氨基酸的质心、几何中心和 $α$-碳的位置，使用受体氨基酸的 3D 位置训练了几个模型。 The error of the prediction of the position was evaluated by the mean average error (MAE) and root-mean-square deviation (RMSD). LSTM 模型表现出强大的性能，其结果可与非动态 3D 预测的最先进技术相媲美。 The best MAE and RMSD values were found for the mass center of the amino acids with 0.078 Å and 0.156 Å respectively. This work shows the potential of LSTM to predict the molecular dynamics of GPRCs.

AI.tldr: 评估长短期记忆网络（LSTM）在预测G蛋白偶联受体（GPCR）分子动力学中三维氨基酸位置的能力。
AI.motivation: GPCR是药物开发的重要靶点，研究其分子动力学行为有助于理解药物作用机制，而现有静态3D预测方法难以满足动态分析需求。
AI.method: 采用LSTM模型，通过训练氨基酸质心、几何中心及α-碳位置等不同变换参数，利用MAE和RMSD指标评估预测误差。
AI.result: LSTM模型在氨基酸质心预测中达到最佳效果，MAE为0.078Å，RMSD为0.156Å，性能与静态3D预测前沿方法相当。
AI.conclusion: LSTM展现了预测GPCR分子动力学轨迹的潜力，为动态结构分析提供新方法。

authors_text: Shahrzad Naseri,Sravana Reddy,Joana Correia,Jussi Karlgren,Rosie Jones
title: The Contribution of Lyrics and Acoustics to Collaborative Understanding of Mood
title_zh: 歌词和声学对情绪协作理解的贡献
abstract: In this work, we study the association between song lyrics and mood through a data-driven analysis. Our data set consists of nearly one million songs, with song-mood associations derived from user playlists on the Spotify streaming platform. We take advantage of state-of-the-art natural language processing models based on transformers to learn the association between the lyrics and moods. We find that a pretrained transformer-based language model in a zero-shot setting -- i.e., out of the box with no further training on our data -- is powerful for capturing song-mood associations. Moreover, we illustrate that training on song-mood associations results in a highly accurate model that predicts these associations for unseen songs. Furthermore, by comparing the prediction of a model using lyrics with one using acoustic features, we observe that the relative importance of lyrics for mood prediction in comparison with acoustics depends on the specific mood. Finally, we verify if the models are capturing the same information about lyrics and acoustics as humans through an annotation task where we obtain human judgments of mood-song relevance based on lyrics and acoustics.
summary: In this work, we study the association between song lyrics and mood through a data-driven analysis. Our data set consists of nearly one million songs, with song-mood associations derived from user playlists on the Spotify streaming platform. We take advantage of state-of-the-art natural language processing models based on transformers to learn the association between the lyrics and moods. We find that a pretrained transformer-based language model in a zero-shot setting -- i.e., out of the box with no further training on our data -- is powerful for capturing song-mood associations. Moreover, we illustrate that training on song-mood associations results in a highly accurate model that predicts these associations for unseen songs. Furthermore, by comparing the prediction of a model using lyrics with one using acoustic features, we observe that the relative importance of lyrics for mood prediction in comparison with acoustics depends on the specific mood. Finally, we verify if the models are capturing the same information about lyrics and acoustics as humans through an annotation task where we obtain human judgments of mood-song relevance based on lyrics and acoustics.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们通过数据驱动的分析来研究歌词和情绪之间的关联。我们的数据集包含近一百万首歌曲，歌曲与情绪的关联源自 Spotify 流媒体平台上的用户播放列表。我们利用基于 Transformer 的最先进的自然语言处理模型来学习歌词和情绪之间的关联。我们发现，在零样本设置中预训练的基于 Transformer 的语言模型（即开箱即用，无需对我们的数据进行进一步训练）对于捕获歌曲情绪关联非常有用。此外，我们还说明，对歌曲与情绪关联的训练会产生一个高度准确的模型，可以预测未见过的歌曲的这些关联。此外，通过将使用歌词的模型的预测与使用声学特征的模型的预测进行比较，我们观察到，与声学相比，歌词对于情绪预测的相对重要性取决于特定的情绪。最后，我们通过注释任务验证模型是否捕获与人类相同的歌词和声学信息，在该任务中，我们根据歌词和声学获得人类对情绪歌曲相关性的判断。

AI.tldr: 本论文研究歌词与声学特征对歌曲情绪预测的贡献，通过大规模数据集和自然语言处理模型分析歌曲与情绪的关联。
AI.motivation: 探索歌词和声学特征在情绪识别中的相对重要性，以改进音乐推荐系统和情绪分析技术。
AI.method: 利用Spotify平台的一百万首歌曲数据集，结合预训练的Transformer模型进行零样本学习，并通过训练模型对比歌词与声学特征的预测效果，最后通过人类标注任务验证模型与人类判断的一致性。
AI.result: 预训练模型在零样本设置下表现优异，训练后模型预测准确率显著提升；歌词与声学特征的重要性因情绪类型而异，且模型预测结果与人类标注高度一致。
AI.conclusion: 歌词和声学特征在情绪预测中均具价值，但其影响程度依赖具体情绪类型，模型能有效捕捉人类对歌曲情绪的相关判断。

title: DDI Prediction via Heterogeneous Graph Attention Networks
title_zh: 通过异构图注意力网络进行 DDI 预测
comment: 10 pages, 3 figures, 8 tables, accepted in BioKDD
comments: 10 pages, 3 figures, 8 tables, accepted in BioKDD
abstract: Polypharmacy, defined as the use of multiple drugs together, is a standard treatment method, especially for severe and chronic diseases. However, using multiple drugs together may cause interactions between drugs. Drug-drug interaction (DDI) is the activity that occurs when the impact of one drug changes when combined with another. DDIs may obstruct, increase, or decrease the intended effect of either drug or, in the worst-case scenario, create adverse side effects. While it is critical to detect DDIs on time, it is timeconsuming and expensive to identify them in clinical trials due to their short duration and many possible drug pairs to be considered for testing. As a result, computational methods are needed for predicting DDIs. In this paper, we present a novel heterogeneous graph attention model, HAN-DDI to predict drug-drug interactions. We create a heterogeneous network of drugs with different biological entities. Then, we develop a heterogeneous graph attention network to learn DDIs using relations of drugs with other entities. It consists of an attention-based heterogeneous graph node encoder for obtaining drug node representations and a decoder for predicting drug-drug interactions. Further, we utilize comprehensive experiments to evaluate of our model and to compare it with state-of-the-art models. Experimental results show that our proposed method, HAN-DDI, outperforms the baselines significantly and accurately predicts DDIs, even for new drugs.
summary: Polypharmacy, defined as the use of multiple drugs together, is a standard treatment method, especially for severe and chronic diseases. However, using multiple drugs together may cause interactions between drugs. Drug-drug interaction (DDI) is the activity that occurs when the impact of one drug changes when combined with another. DDIs may obstruct, increase, or decrease the intended effect of either drug or, in the worst-case scenario, create adverse side effects. While it is critical to detect DDIs on time, it is timeconsuming and expensive to identify them in clinical trials due to their short duration and many possible drug pairs to be considered for testing. As a result, computational methods are needed for predicting DDIs. In this paper, we present a novel heterogeneous graph attention model, HAN-DDI to predict drug-drug interactions. We create a heterogeneous network of drugs with different biological entities. Then, we develop a heterogeneous graph attention network to learn DDIs using relations of drugs with other entities. It consists of an attention-based heterogeneous graph node encoder for obtaining drug node representations and a decoder for predicting drug-drug interactions. Further, we utilize comprehensive experiments to evaluate of our model and to compare it with state-of-the-art models. Experimental results show that our proposed method, HAN-DDI, outperforms the baselines significantly and accurately predicts DDIs, even for new drugs.
abstract_zh: 多药治疗，定义为同时使用多种药物，是一种标准的治疗方法，特别是对于严重和慢性疾病。然而，多种药物一起使用可能会导致药物之间的相互作用。药物相互作用 (DDI) 是一种药物与另一种药物组合时影响发生变化的活动。 DDI 可能会阻碍、增加或减少药物的预期效果，或者在最坏的情况下产生不良副作用。虽然及时检测 DDI 至关重要，但由于其持续时间短且需要考虑测试许多可能的药物对，因此在临床试验中识别它们既耗时又昂贵。因此，需要计算方法来预测 DDI。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的异构图注意力模型 HAN-DDI 来预测药物相互作用。我们创建了具有不同生物实体的异构药物网络。然后，我们开发了一个异构图注意网络，利用药物与其他实体的关系来学习 DDI。它由用于获取药物节点表示的基于注意力的异构图节点编码器和用于预测药物-药物相互作用的解码器组成。此外，我们利用综合实验来评估我们的模型并将其与最先进的模型进行比较。实验结果表明，我们提出的方法 HAN-DDI 显着优于基线，并且能够准确预测 DDI，即使对于新药也是如此。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于异构图注意力网络（HAN-DDI）的计算方法，用于预测药物间相互作用（DDI）。
AI.motivation: 多药联用虽是常见治疗手段，但可能导致药物间相互作用（DDI），而临床试验检测DDI成本高且耗时，亟需高效计算方法。
AI.method: 构建包含药物与其他生物实体关系的异构网络，设计基于注意力机制的异构图节点编码器获取药物表示，并通过解码器预测DDI。
AI.result: 实验表明HAN-DDI显著优于现有方法，在新药DDI预测中也表现出高准确性。
AI.conclusion: HAN-DDI通过异构图注意力机制有效捕捉药物间复杂关系，为DDI预测提供了高效可靠的解决方案。
