search_text: DDI Prediction via Heterogeneous Graph Attention Networks 通过异构图注意力网络进行 DDI 预测 Polypharmacy, defined as the use of multiple drugs together, is a standard treatment method, especially for severe and chronic diseases. However, using multiple drugs together may cause interactions between drugs. Drug-drug interaction (DDI) is the activity that occurs when the impact of one drug changes when combined with another. DDIs may obstruct, increase, or decrease the intended effect of either drug or, in the worst-case scenario, create adverse side effects. While it is critical to detect DDIs on time, it is timeconsuming and expensive to identify them in clinical trials due to their short duration and many possible drug pairs to be considered for testing. As a result, computational methods are needed for predicting DDIs. In this paper, we present a novel heterogeneous graph attention model, HAN-DDI to predict drug-drug interactions. We create a heterogeneous network of drugs with different biological entities. Then, we develop a heterogeneous graph attention network to learn DDIs using relations of drugs with other entities. It consists of an attention-based heterogeneous graph node encoder for obtaining drug node representations and a decoder for predicting drug-drug interactions. Further, we utilize comprehensive experiments to evaluate of our model and to compare it with state-of-the-art models. Experimental results show that our proposed method, HAN-DDI, outperforms the baselines significantly and accurately predicts DDIs, even for new drugs. 多药治疗，定义为同时使用多种药物，是一种标准的治疗方法，特别是对于严重和慢性疾病。然而，多种药物一起使用可能会导致药物之间的相互作用。药物相互作用 (DDI) 是一种药物与另一种药物组合时影响发生变化的活动。 DDI 可能会阻碍、增加或减少药物的预期效果，或者在最坏的情况下产生不良副作用。虽然及时检测 DDI 至关重要，但由于其持续时间短且需要考虑测试许多可能的药物对，因此在临床试验中识别它们既耗时又昂贵。因此，需要计算方法来预测 DDI。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的异构图注意力模型 HAN-DDI 来预测药物相互作用。我们创建了具有不同生物实体的异构药物网络。然后，我们开发了一个异构图注意网络，利用药物与其他实体的关系来学习 DDI。它由用于获取药物节点表示的基于注意力的异构图节点编码器和用于预测药物-药物相互作用的解码器组成。此外，我们利用综合实验来评估我们的模型并将其与最先进的模型进行比较。实验结果表明，我们提出的方法 HAN-DDI 显着优于基线，并且能够准确预测 DDI，即使对于新药也是如此。 本文提出一种基于异构图注意力网络（HAN-DDI）的计算方法，用于预测药物间相互作用（DDI）。 Farhan Tanvir,Khaled Mohammed Saifuddin,Esra Akbas cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.IR

authors_text: Hung Le
title: Approximate Distance Oracles for Planar Graphs with Subpolynomial Error Dependency
title_zh: 具有次多项式误差依赖性的平面图的近似距离预言
abstract: Thorup [FOCS'01, JACM'04] and Klein [SODA'01] independently showed that there exists a $(1+ε)$-approximate distance oracle for planar graphs with $O(n (\log n)ε^{-1})$ space and $O(ε^{-1})$ query time. While the dependency on $n$ is nearly linear, the space-query product of their oracles depend quadratically on $1/ε$. Many follow-up results either improved the space \emph{or} the query time of the oracles while having the same, sometimes worst, dependency on $1/ε$. Kawarabayashi, Sommer, and Thorup [SODA'13] were the first to improve the dependency on $1/ε$ from quadratic to nearly linear (at the cost of $\log^*(n)$ factors). It is plausible to conjecture that the linear dependency on $1/ε$ is optimal: for many known distance-related problems in planar graphs, it was proved that the dependency on $1/ε$ is at least linear. In this work, we disprove this conjecture by reducing the dependency of the space-query product on $1/ε$ from linear all the way down to \emph{subpolynomial} $(1/ε)^{o(1)}$. More precisely, we construct an oracle with $O(n\log(n)(ε^{-o(1)} + \log^*n))$ space and $\log^{2+o(1)}(1/ε)$ query time. Our construction is the culmination of several different ideas developed over the past two decades.
summary: Thorup [FOCS'01, JACM'04] and Klein [SODA'01] independently showed that there exists a $(1+ε)$-approximate distance oracle for planar graphs with $O(n (\log n)ε^{-1})$ space and $O(ε^{-1})$ query time. While the dependency on $n$ is nearly linear, the space-query product of their oracles depend quadratically on $1/ε$. Many follow-up results either improved the space \emph{or} the query time of the oracles while having the same, sometimes worst, dependency on $1/ε$. Kawarabayashi, Sommer, and Thorup [SODA'13] were the first to improve the dependency on $1/ε$ from quadratic to nearly linear (at the cost of $\log^*(n)$ factors). It is plausible to conjecture that the linear dependency on $1/ε$ is optimal: for many known distance-related problems in planar graphs, it was proved that the dependency on $1/ε$ is at least linear. In this work, we disprove this conjecture by reducing the dependency of the space-query product on $1/ε$ from linear all the way down to \emph{subpolynomial} $(1/ε)^{o(1)}$. More precisely, we construct an oracle with $O(n\log(n)(ε^{-o(1)} + \log^*n))$ space and $\log^{2+o(1)}(1/ε)$ query time. Our construction is the culmination of several different ideas developed over the past two decades.
abstract_zh: Thorup [FOCS'01, JACM'04] 和 Klein [SODA'01] 独立地表明，对于具有 $O(n (\log n)ε^{-1})$ 空间和 $O(ε^{-1})$ 查询时间的平面图，存在 $(1+ε)$ 近似距离预言。虽然对 $n$ 的依赖性几乎是线性的，但其预言机的空间查询乘积与 $1/ε$ 呈二次方关系。许多后续结果要么改善了空间 \emph{，要么改善了预言机的查询时间，同时对 $1/ε$ 具有相同（有时是最差）的依赖性。 Kawarabayashi、Sommer 和 Thorup [SODA'13] 第一个将 $1/ε$ 的依赖性从二次型改进为近线性（以 $\log^*(n)$ 因子为代价）。推测 $1/ε$ 的线性依赖性是最优的是合理的：对于平面图中许多已知的距离相关问题，已经证明对 $1/ε$ 的依赖性至少是线性的。在这项工作中，我们通过将空间查询乘积对 $1/ε$ 的依赖性从线性一直降低到 \emph{subpolynomial} $(1/ε)^{o(1)}$ 来反驳这一猜想。更准确地说，我们构建了一个具有 $O(n\log(n)(ε^{-o(1)} + \log^*n))$ 空间和 $\log^{2+o(1)}(1/ε)$ 查询时间的预言机。我们的建筑是过去二十年中几种不同想法的结晶。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对平面图的近似距离预言机，将误差依赖性从线性降低到亚多项式级别。
AI.motivation: 此前平面图距离预言机的时空复杂度对1/ε的依赖性为二次或线性，而线性依赖性被广泛认为是理论下限。本文旨在推翻这一猜想。
AI.method: 融合过去二十年中多项技术成果，设计新型预言机结构，优化空间与查询时间的ε依赖性。
AI.result: 构造出空间复杂度为O(n log n (ε^{-o(1)} + log^*n))、查询时间为log^{2+o(1)}(1/ε)的预言机，实现亚多项式误差依赖性。
AI.conclusion: 证明线性ε依赖性并非最优，首次实现平面图距离预言机的亚多项式误差依赖性突破。

authors_text: Xiao Pan,Hao Luo,Weihua Chen,Fan Wang,Hao Li,Wei Jiang,Jianming Zhang,Jianyang Gu,Peike Li
title: Dynamic Gradient Reactivation for Backward Compatible Person Re-identification
title_zh: 用于向后兼容人员重新识别的动态梯度重新激活
comment: Submitted to Pattern Recognition on Dec 06, 2021. Under Review
comments: Submitted to Pattern Recognition on Dec 06, 2021. Under Review
abstract: We study the backward compatible problem for person re-identification (Re-ID), which aims to constrain the features of an updated new model to be comparable with the existing features from the old model in galleries. Most of the existing works adopt distillation-based methods, which focus on pushing new features to imitate the distribution of the old ones. However, the distillation-based methods are intrinsically sub-optimal since it forces the new feature space to imitate the inferior old feature space. To address this issue, we propose the Ranking-based Backward Compatible Learning (RBCL), which directly optimizes the ranking metric between new features and old features. Different from previous methods, RBCL only pushes the new features to find best-ranking positions in the old feature space instead of strictly alignment, and is in line with the ultimate goal of backward retrieval. However, the sharp sigmoid function used to make the ranking metric differentiable also incurs the gradient vanish issue, therefore stems the ranking refinement during the later period of training. To address this issue, we propose the Dynamic Gradient Reactivation (DGR), which can reactivate the suppressed gradients by adding dynamic computed constant during forward step. To further help targeting the best-ranking positions, we include the Neighbor Context Agents (NCAs) to approximate the entire old feature space during training. Unlike previous works which only test on the in-domain settings, we make the first attempt to introduce the cross-domain settings (including both supervised and unsupervised), which are more meaningful and difficult. The experimental results on all five settings show that the proposed RBCL outperforms previous state-of-the-art methods by large margins under all settings.
summary: We study the backward compatible problem for person re-identification (Re-ID), which aims to constrain the features of an updated new model to be comparable with the existing features from the old model in galleries. Most of the existing works adopt distillation-based methods, which focus on pushing new features to imitate the distribution of the old ones. However, the distillation-based methods are intrinsically sub-optimal since it forces the new feature space to imitate the inferior old feature space. To address this issue, we propose the Ranking-based Backward Compatible Learning (RBCL), which directly optimizes the ranking metric between new features and old features. Different from previous methods, RBCL only pushes the new features to find best-ranking positions in the old feature space instead of strictly alignment, and is in line with the ultimate goal of backward retrieval. However, the sharp sigmoid function used to make the ranking metric differentiable also incurs the gradient vanish issue, therefore stems the ranking refinement during the later period of training. To address this issue, we propose the Dynamic Gradient Reactivation (DGR), which can reactivate the suppressed gradients by adding dynamic computed constant during forward step. To further help targeting the best-ranking positions, we include the Neighbor Context Agents (NCAs) to approximate the entire old feature space during training. Unlike previous works which only test on the in-domain settings, we make the first attempt to introduce the cross-domain settings (including both supervised and unsupervised), which are more meaningful and difficult. The experimental results on all five settings show that the proposed RBCL outperforms previous state-of-the-art methods by large margins under all settings.
abstract_zh: 我们研究人员重新识别（Re-ID）的向后兼容问题，其目的是限制更新后的新模型的特征与画廊中旧模型的现有特征进行比较。现有的工作大多数采用基于蒸馏的方法，重点是推新特征来模仿旧特征的分布。然而，基于蒸馏的方法本质上是次优的，因为它迫使新的特征空间模仿较差的旧特征空间。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了基于排名的向后兼容学习（RBCL），它直接优化新特征和旧特征之间的排名指标。与以往的方法不同，RBCL只是推动新特征在旧特征空间中寻找最佳排名位置，而不是严格对齐，符合向后检索的最终目标。然而，用于使排名指标可微分的尖锐 sigmoid 函数也会引发梯度消失问题，因此阻碍了训练后期的排名细化。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了动态梯度重新激活（DGR），它可以通过在前向步骤中添加动态计算常数来重新激活被抑制的梯度。为了进一步帮助定位最佳排名位置，我们引入了邻居上下文代理 (NCA)，以在训练期间近似整个旧特征空间。与之前的工作仅在域内设置上进行测试不同，我们首次尝试引入跨域设置（包括有监督和无监督），这更有意义，也更困难。所有五种设置的实验结果表明，所提出的 RBCL 在所有设置下都大幅优于以前的最先进方法。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在人员重识别（Re-ID）中实现模型向后兼容的问题，即确保新模型的特征与旧模型的特征在检索时具有可比性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通过知识蒸馏强制新特征模仿旧特征分布，但这种方式本质上次优，因为旧特征空间可能质量较低，无法满足实际检索需求。
AI.method: 提出基于排序的向后兼容学习（RBCL），直接优化新旧特征间的排序度量；设计动态梯度重激活（DGR）解决梯度消失问题，并引入邻域上下文代理（NCAs）近似旧特征空间；首次在跨域场景（含监督与无监督）中验证方法有效性。
AI.result: 在五种设置下，RBCL均显著优于现有最先进方法，尤其在跨域场景中表现突出。
AI.conclusion: RBCL通过直接优化排序目标并结合动态梯度机制，有效解决了向后兼容问题，为跨域Re-ID任务提供了更优解决方案。

search_text: Dynamic Gradient Reactivation for Backward Compatible Person Re-identification 用于向后兼容人员重新识别的动态梯度重新激活 We study the backward compatible problem for person re-identification (Re-ID), which aims to constrain the features of an updated new model to be comparable with the existing features from the old model in galleries. Most of the existing works adopt distillation-based methods, which focus on pushing new features to imitate the distribution of the old ones. However, the distillation-based methods are intrinsically sub-optimal since it forces the new feature space to imitate the inferior old feature space. To address this issue, we propose the Ranking-based Backward Compatible Learning (RBCL), which directly optimizes the ranking metric between new features and old features. Different from previous methods, RBCL only pushes the new features to find best-ranking positions in the old feature space instead of strictly alignment, and is in line with the ultimate goal of backward retrieval. However, the sharp sigmoid function used to make the ranking metric differentiable also incurs the gradient vanish issue, therefore stems the ranking refinement during the later period of training. To address this issue, we propose the Dynamic Gradient Reactivation (DGR), which can reactivate the suppressed gradients by adding dynamic computed constant during forward step. To further help targeting the best-ranking positions, we include the Neighbor Context Agents (NCAs) to approximate the entire old feature space during training. Unlike previous works which only test on the in-domain settings, we make the first attempt to introduce the cross-domain settings (including both supervised and unsupervised), which are more meaningful and difficult. The experimental results on all five settings show that the proposed RBCL outperforms previous state-of-the-art methods by large margins under all settings. 我们研究人员重新识别（Re-ID）的向后兼容问题，其目的是限制更新后的新模型的特征与画廊中旧模型的现有特征进行比较。现有的工作大多数采用基于蒸馏的方法，重点是推新特征来模仿旧特征的分布。然而，基于蒸馏的方法本质上是次优的，因为它迫使新的特征空间模仿较差的旧特征空间。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了基于排名的向后兼容学习（RBCL），它直接优化新特征和旧特征之间的排名指标。与以往的方法不同，RBCL只是推动新特征在旧特征空间中寻找最佳排名位置，而不是严格对齐，符合向后检索的最终目标。然而，用于使排名指标可微分的尖锐 sigmoid 函数也会引发梯度消失问题，因此阻碍了训练后期的排名细化。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了动态梯度重新激活（DGR），它可以通过在前向步骤中添加动态计算常数来重新激活被抑制的梯度。为了进一步帮助定位最佳排名位置，我们引入了邻居上下文代理 (NCA)，以在训练期间近似整个旧特征空间。与之前的工作仅在域内设置上进行测试不同，我们首次尝试引入跨域设置（包括有监督和无监督），这更有意义，也更困难。所有五种设置的实验结果表明，所提出的 RBCL 在所有设置下都大幅优于以前的最先进方法。 本文研究了在人员重识别（Re-ID）中实现模型向后兼容的问题，即确保新模型的特征与旧模型的特征在检索时具有可比性。 Xiao Pan,Hao Luo,Weihua Chen,Fan Wang,Hao Li,Wei Jiang,Jianming Zhang,Jianyang Gu,Peike Li cs.CV

authors_text: Songtao Lu
title: A Single-Loop Gradient Descent and Perturbed Ascent Algorithm for Nonconvex Functional Constrained Optimization
title_zh: 非凸函数约束优化的单循环梯度下降和扰动上升算法
comment: This work was published in the Proceedings of the Thirty-Ninth International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML 2022)
comments: This work was published in the Proceedings of the Thirty-Ninth International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML 2022)
abstract: Nonconvex constrained optimization problems can be used to model a number of machine learning problems, such as multi-class Neyman-Pearson classification and constrained Markov decision processes. However, such kinds of problems are challenging because both the objective and constraints are possibly nonconvex, so it is difficult to balance the reduction of the loss value and reduction of constraint violation. Although there are a few methods that solve this class of problems, all of them are double-loop or triple-loop algorithms, and they require oracles to solve some subproblems up to certain accuracy by tuning multiple hyperparameters at each iteration. In this paper, we propose a novel gradient descent and perturbed ascent (GDPA) algorithm to solve a class of smooth nonconvex inequality constrained problems. The GDPA is a primal-dual algorithm, which only exploits the first-order information of both the objective and constraint functions to update the primal and dual variables in an alternating way. The key feature of the proposed algorithm is that it is a single-loop algorithm, where only two step-sizes need to be tuned. We show that under a mild regularity condition GDPA is able to find Karush-Kuhn-Tucker (KKT) points of nonconvex functional constrained problems with convergence rate guarantees. To the best of our knowledge, it is the first single-loop algorithm that can solve the general nonconvex smooth problems with nonconvex inequality constraints. Numerical results also showcase the superiority of GDPA compared with the best-known algorithms (in terms of both stationarity measure and feasibility of the obtained solutions).
summary: Nonconvex constrained optimization problems can be used to model a number of machine learning problems, such as multi-class Neyman-Pearson classification and constrained Markov decision processes. However, such kinds of problems are challenging because both the objective and constraints are possibly nonconvex, so it is difficult to balance the reduction of the loss value and reduction of constraint violation. Although there are a few methods that solve this class of problems, all of them are double-loop or triple-loop algorithms, and they require oracles to solve some subproblems up to certain accuracy by tuning multiple hyperparameters at each iteration. In this paper, we propose a novel gradient descent and perturbed ascent (GDPA) algorithm to solve a class of smooth nonconvex inequality constrained problems. The GDPA is a primal-dual algorithm, which only exploits the first-order information of both the objective and constraint functions to update the primal and dual variables in an alternating way. The key feature of the proposed algorithm is that it is a single-loop algorithm, where only two step-sizes need to be tuned. We show that under a mild regularity condition GDPA is able to find Karush-Kuhn-Tucker (KKT) points of nonconvex functional constrained problems with convergence rate guarantees. To the best of our knowledge, it is the first single-loop algorithm that can solve the general nonconvex smooth problems with nonconvex inequality constraints. Numerical results also showcase the superiority of GDPA compared with the best-known algorithms (in terms of both stationarity measure and feasibility of the obtained solutions).
abstract_zh: 非凸约束优化问题可用于对许多机器学习问题进行建模，例如多类 Neyman-Pearson 分类和约束马尔可夫决策过程。然而，此类问题具有挑战性，因为目标和约束都可能是非凸的，因此很难平衡损失值的减少和约束违反的减少。虽然解决此类问题的方法有几种，但它们都是双循环或三循环算法，并且需要预言机通过在每次迭代时调整多个超参数来解决某些子问题，达到一定的精度。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的梯度下降和扰动上升（GDPA）算法来解决一类平滑非凸不等式约束问题。 GDPA是一种原对偶算法，仅利用目标函数和约束函数的一阶信息以交替方式更新原变量和对偶变量。该算法的主要特点是它是一种单循环算法，只需调整两个步长。我们证明，在温和的规律性条件下，GDPA 能够找到具有收敛速度保证的非凸函数约束问题的 Karush-Kuhn-Tucker (KKT) 点。据我们所知，它是第一个可以解决具有非凸不等式约束的一般非凸平滑问题的单循环算法。数值结果还展示了 GDPA 与最著名算法相比的优越性（在平稳性度量和所获得解决方案的可行性方面）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种单循环梯度下降与扰动上升算法（GDPA），用于解决具有非凸不等式约束的非凸函数优化问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法多为双循环或三循环算法，需多次调参并求解子问题，计算复杂度高且难以平衡目标函数与约束条件的优化。
AI.method: 设计单循环对偶算法GDPA，仅利用目标函数与约束函数的一阶信息交替更新原变量和对偶变量，仅需调整两个步长参数。
AI.result: 在温和正则性条件下，GDPA可收敛至非凸约束问题的KKT点，数值实验显示其在解的平稳性与可行性上优于现有最佳算法。
AI.conclusion: GDPA是首个适用于一般非凸光滑问题的单循环算法，在计算效率与解的质量上均具有显著优势。

authors_text: Antoine Fosset,Mohamed El-Mennaoui,Amine Rebei,Paul Calligaro,Elise Farge Di Maria,Hélène Nguyen-Ban,Francesca Rea,Marie-Charlotte Vallade,Elisabetta Vitullo,Christophe Zhang,Guillaume Charpiat,Mathieu Rosenbaum
title: Docent: A content-based recommendation system to discover contemporary art
title_zh: 讲解员：基于内容的推荐系统来发现当代艺术
abstract: Recommendation systems have been widely used in various domains such as music, films, e-shopping etc. After mostly avoiding digitization, the art world has recently reached a technological turning point due to the pandemic, making online sales grow significantly as well as providing quantitative online data about artists and artworks. In this work, we present a content-based recommendation system on contemporary art relying on images of artworks and contextual metadata of artists. We gathered and annotated artworks with advanced and art-specific information to create a completely unique database that was used to train our models. With this information, we built a proximity graph between artworks. Similarly, we used NLP techniques to characterize the practices of the artists and we extracted information from exhibitions and other event history to create a proximity graph between artists. The power of graph analysis enables us to provide an artwork recommendation system based on a combination of visual and contextual information from artworks and artists. After an assessment by a team of art specialists, we get an average final rating of 75% of meaningful artworks when compared to their professional evaluations.
summary: Recommendation systems have been widely used in various domains such as music, films, e-shopping etc. After mostly avoiding digitization, the art world has recently reached a technological turning point due to the pandemic, making online sales grow significantly as well as providing quantitative online data about artists and artworks. In this work, we present a content-based recommendation system on contemporary art relying on images of artworks and contextual metadata of artists. We gathered and annotated artworks with advanced and art-specific information to create a completely unique database that was used to train our models. With this information, we built a proximity graph between artworks. Similarly, we used NLP techniques to characterize the practices of the artists and we extracted information from exhibitions and other event history to create a proximity graph between artists. The power of graph analysis enables us to provide an artwork recommendation system based on a combination of visual and contextual information from artworks and artists. After an assessment by a team of art specialists, we get an average final rating of 75% of meaningful artworks when compared to their professional evaluations.
abstract_zh: 推荐系统已广泛应用于音乐、电影、电子购物等各个领域。艺术界在很大程度上避免了数字化之后，最近因疫情而达到了技术转折点，使得在线销售大幅增长，并提供了有关艺术家和艺术品的定量在线数据。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个基于内容的当代艺术推荐系统，依赖于艺术品的图像和艺术家的上下文元数据。我们使用先进的艺术特定信息收集和注释艺术品，以创建一个完全独特的数据库，用于训练我们的模型。有了这些信息，我们就建立了艺术品之间的邻近图。同样，我们使用 NLP 技术来描述艺术家的实践，并从展览和其他事件历史中提取信息来创建艺术家之间的邻近图。图形分析的力量使我们能够提供基于艺术品和艺术家的视觉和上下文信息相结合的艺术品推荐系统。经过艺术专家团队的评估，与他们的专业评估相比，我们最终平均获得了 75% 的有意义的艺术品评分。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个基于内容的当代艺术推荐系统，利用艺术品图像和艺术家上下文元数据构建推荐模型。
AI.motivation: 艺术领域因疫情加速数字化，产生大量线上数据，但缺乏有效推荐系统以挖掘艺术作品和艺术家关联性。
AI.method: 构建包含艺术特定信息的数据库，通过图像分析和NLP技术生成艺术品及艺术家的邻近图，结合图分析实现跨模态推荐。
AI.result: 经艺术专家评估，系统推荐结果与专业评价匹配度达75%的有意义艺术品。
AI.conclusion: 基于视觉与上下文信息的图分析推荐系统可有效应用于当代艺术领域，验证了跨模态数据融合的可行性。

authors_text: Koorosh Aslansefat,Panagiota Nikolaou,Martin Walker,Mohammed Naveed Akram,Ioannis Sorokos,Jan Reich,Panayiotis Kolios,Maria K. Michael,Theocharis Theocharides,Georgios Ellinas,Daniel Schneider,Yiannis Papadopoulos
title: SafeDrones: Real-Time Reliability Evaluation of UAVs using Executable Digital Dependable Identities
title_zh: SafeDrones：使用可执行数字可靠身份对无人机进行实时可靠性评估
comment: ef:8th International Symposium on Model-Based Safety and Assessment (IMBSA), Munich, Germany, September 2022
comments: ef:8th International Symposium on Model-Based Safety and Assessment (IMBSA), Munich, Germany, September 2022
abstract: The use of Unmanned Arial Vehicles (UAVs) offers many advantages across a variety of applications. However, safety assurance is a key barrier to widespread usage, especially given the unpredictable operational and environmental factors experienced by UAVs, which are hard to capture solely at design-time. This paper proposes a new reliability modeling approach called SafeDrones to help address this issue by enabling runtime reliability and risk assessment of UAVs. It is a prototype instantiation of the Executable Digital Dependable Identity (EDDI) concept, which aims to create a model-based solution for real-time, data-driven dependability assurance for multi-robot systems. By providing real-time reliability estimates, SafeDrones allows UAVs to update their missions accordingly in an adaptive manner.
summary: The use of Unmanned Arial Vehicles (UAVs) offers many advantages across a variety of applications. However, safety assurance is a key barrier to widespread usage, especially given the unpredictable operational and environmental factors experienced by UAVs, which are hard to capture solely at design-time. This paper proposes a new reliability modeling approach called SafeDrones to help address this issue by enabling runtime reliability and risk assessment of UAVs. It is a prototype instantiation of the Executable Digital Dependable Identity (EDDI) concept, which aims to create a model-based solution for real-time, data-driven dependability assurance for multi-robot systems. By providing real-time reliability estimates, SafeDrones allows UAVs to update their missions accordingly in an adaptive manner.
abstract_zh: 无人机 (UAV) 的使用在各种应用中提供了许多优势。然而，安全保证是广泛使用的一个关键障碍，特别是考虑到无人机所经历的不可预测的操作和环境因素，这些因素很难仅在设计时捕获。本文提出了一种名为 SafeDrones 的新可靠性建模方法，通过实现无人机的运行时可靠性和风险评估来帮助解决这个问题。它是可执行数字可信身份 (EDDI) 概念的原型实例，旨在为多机器人系统创建基于模型的解决方案，以实现实时、数据驱动的可靠性保证。通过提供实时可靠性估计，SafeDrones 允许无人机以自适应方式相应地更新其任务。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SafeDrones方法，通过可执行数字可信身份（EDDI）实现无人机（UAV）的实时可靠性评估，以应对运行时不可预测的环境因素带来的安全挑战。
AI.motivation: 无人机的广泛应用面临安全保证难题，传统设计时的可靠性评估难以应对运行时动态变化的环境和操作因素，亟需实时可靠性评估机制。
AI.method: 基于EDDI概念构建模型驱动的解决方案，通过实时数据动态评估无人机可靠性，结合运行时信息调整任务策略，实现多机器人系统的实时可信保障。
AI.result: SafeDrones原型系统可提供实时可靠性估计，使无人机能够根据动态风险调整任务，提升复杂环境下的运行安全性和适应性。
AI.conclusion: SafeDrones通过实时可靠性评估有效解决了无人机运行时的安全性问题，为多机器人系统的动态可信保障提供了可行的技术路径。

authors_text: Yuhua Sun,Tailai Zhang,Xingjun Ma,Pan Zhou,Jian Lou,Zichuan Xu,Xing Di,Yu Cheng,Lichao
title: Backdoor Attacks on Crowd Counting
title_zh: 人群计数的后门攻击
comment: To appear in ACMMM 2022. 10pages, 6 figures and 2 tables
comments: To appear in ACMMM 2022. 10pages, 6 figures and 2 tables
abstract: Crowd counting is a regression task that estimates the number of people in a scene image, which plays a vital role in a range of safety-critical applications, such as video surveillance, traffic monitoring and flow control. In this paper, we investigate the vulnerability of deep learning based crowd counting models to backdoor attacks, a major security threat to deep learning. A backdoor attack implants a backdoor trigger into a target model via data poisoning so as to control the model's predictions at test time. Different from image classification models on which most of existing backdoor attacks have been developed and tested, crowd counting models are regression models that output multi-dimensional density maps, thus requiring different techniques to manipulate. In this paper, we propose two novel Density Manipulation Backdoor Attacks (DMBA$^{-}$ and DMBA$^{+}$) to attack the model to produce arbitrarily large or small density estimations. Experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of our DMBA attacks on five classic crowd counting models and four types of datasets. We also provide an in-depth analysis of the unique challenges of backdooring crowd counting models and reveal two key elements of effective attacks: 1) full and dense triggers and 2) manipulation of the ground truth counts or density maps. Our work could help evaluate the vulnerability of crowd counting models to potential backdoor attacks.
summary: Crowd counting is a regression task that estimates the number of people in a scene image, which plays a vital role in a range of safety-critical applications, such as video surveillance, traffic monitoring and flow control. In this paper, we investigate the vulnerability of deep learning based crowd counting models to backdoor attacks, a major security threat to deep learning. A backdoor attack implants a backdoor trigger into a target model via data poisoning so as to control the model's predictions at test time. Different from image classification models on which most of existing backdoor attacks have been developed and tested, crowd counting models are regression models that output multi-dimensional density maps, thus requiring different techniques to manipulate. In this paper, we propose two novel Density Manipulation Backdoor Attacks (DMBA$^{-}$ and DMBA$^{+}$) to attack the model to produce arbitrarily large or small density estimations. Experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of our DMBA attacks on five classic crowd counting models and four types of datasets. We also provide an in-depth analysis of the unique challenges of backdooring crowd counting models and reveal two key elements of effective attacks: 1) full and dense triggers and 2) manipulation of the ground truth counts or density maps. Our work could help evaluate the vulnerability of crowd counting models to potential backdoor attacks.
abstract_zh: 人群计数是一种回归任务，用于估计场景图像中的人数，在视频监控、交通监控和流量控制等一系列安全关键应用中发挥着至关重要的作用。在本文中，我们研究了基于深度学习的人群计数模型对后门攻击的脆弱性，这是深度学习的主要安全威胁。后门攻击通过数据中毒的方式将后门触发器植入目标模型中，从而在测试时控制模型的预测。与大多数现有后门攻击已经开发和测试的图像分类模型不同，人群计数模型是输出多维密度图的回归模型，因此需要不同的技术来操作。在本文中，我们提出了两种新颖的密度操纵后门攻击（DMBA$^{-}$ 和 DMBA$^{+}$）来攻击模型以产生任意大或小的密度估计。实验结果证明了我们的 DMBA 攻击对五种经典人群计数模型和四种类型的数据集的有效性。我们还深入分析了后门人群计数模型的独特挑战，并揭示了有效攻击的两个关键要素：1）完整且密集的触发器，2）操纵地面实况计数或密度图。我们的工作可以帮助评估人群计数模型对潜在后门攻击的脆弱性。

AI.tldr: 研究针对人群计数模型的后门攻击方法，提出两种新型攻击技术以操控模型输出密度估计。
AI.motivation: 现有后门攻击多针对分类模型，而人群计数模型作为回归模型具有独特挑战，需探索其攻击方法以评估安全性。
AI.method: 提出两种密度操控后门攻击（DMBA⁻和DMBA⁺），通过数据中毒植入触发器，操控模型生成任意大小的密度估计。
AI.result: 实验验证了攻击在五种模型和四种数据集上的有效性，并揭示了有效攻击的两个关键要素：密集触发器和地面真实数据操控。
AI.conclusion: 该研究揭示了人群计数模型的后门攻击方法及关键因素，为评估其安全性提供了依据。

ai_content.result: 实验验证了攻击在五种模型和四种数据集上的有效性，并揭示了有效攻击的两个关键要素：密集触发器和地面真实数据操控。

search_text: Backdoor Attacks on Crowd Counting 人群计数的后门攻击 Crowd counting is a regression task that estimates the number of people in a scene image, which plays a vital role in a range of safety-critical applications, such as video surveillance, traffic monitoring and flow control. In this paper, we investigate the vulnerability of deep learning based crowd counting models to backdoor attacks, a major security threat to deep learning. A backdoor attack implants a backdoor trigger into a target model via data poisoning so as to control the model's predictions at test time. Different from image classification models on which most of existing backdoor attacks have been developed and tested, crowd counting models are regression models that output multi-dimensional density maps, thus requiring different techniques to manipulate. In this paper, we propose two novel Density Manipulation Backdoor Attacks (DMBA$^{-}$ and DMBA$^{+}$) to attack the model to produce arbitrarily large or small density estimations. Experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of our DMBA attacks on five classic crowd counting models and four types of datasets. We also provide an in-depth analysis of the unique challenges of backdooring crowd counting models and reveal two key elements of effective attacks: 1) full and dense triggers and 2) manipulation of the ground truth counts or density maps. Our work could help evaluate the vulnerability of crowd counting models to potential backdoor attacks. 人群计数是一种回归任务，用于估计场景图像中的人数，在视频监控、交通监控和流量控制等一系列安全关键应用中发挥着至关重要的作用。在本文中，我们研究了基于深度学习的人群计数模型对后门攻击的脆弱性，这是深度学习的主要安全威胁。后门攻击通过数据中毒的方式将后门触发器植入目标模型中，从而在测试时控制模型的预测。与大多数现有后门攻击已经开发和测试的图像分类模型不同，人群计数模型是输出多维密度图的回归模型，因此需要不同的技术来操作。在本文中，我们提出了两种新颖的密度操纵后门攻击（DMBA$^{-}$ 和 DMBA$^{+}$）来攻击模型以产生任意大或小的密度估计。实验结果证明了我们的 DMBA 攻击对五种经典人群计数模型和四种类型的数据集的有效性。我们还深入分析了后门人群计数模型的独特挑战，并揭示了有效攻击的两个关键要素：1）完整且密集的触发器，2）操纵地面实况计数或密度图。我们的工作可以帮助评估人群计数模型对潜在后门攻击的脆弱性。 研究针对人群计数模型的后门攻击方法，提出两种新型攻击技术以操控模型输出密度估计。 Yuhua Sun,Tailai Zhang,Xingjun Ma,Pan Zhou,Jian Lou,Zichuan Xu,Xing Di,Yu Cheng,Lichao cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Davide Talon,Alessio Del Bue,Stuart James
title: GANzzle: Reframing jigsaw puzzle solving as a retrieval task using a generative mental image
title_zh: GANzzle：使用生成心理图像将拼图游戏重构为检索任务
comment: Accepted at International Conference of Image Processing (ICIP22)
comments: Accepted at International Conference of Image Processing (ICIP22)
abstract: Puzzle solving is a combinatorial challenge due to the difficulty of matching adjacent pieces. Instead, we infer a mental image from all pieces, which a given piece can then be matched against avoiding the combinatorial explosion. Exploiting advancements in Generative Adversarial methods, we learn how to reconstruct the image given a set of unordered pieces, allowing the model to learn a joint embedding space to match an encoding of each piece to the cropped layer of the generator. Therefore we frame the problem as a R@1 retrieval task, and then solve the linear assignment using differentiable Hungarian attention, making the process end-to-end. In doing so our model is puzzle size agnostic, in contrast to prior deep learning methods which are single size. We evaluate on two new large-scale datasets, where our model is on par with deep learning methods, while generalizing to multiple puzzle sizes.
summary: Puzzle solving is a combinatorial challenge due to the difficulty of matching adjacent pieces. Instead, we infer a mental image from all pieces, which a given piece can then be matched against avoiding the combinatorial explosion. Exploiting advancements in Generative Adversarial methods, we learn how to reconstruct the image given a set of unordered pieces, allowing the model to learn a joint embedding space to match an encoding of each piece to the cropped layer of the generator. Therefore we frame the problem as a R@1 retrieval task, and then solve the linear assignment using differentiable Hungarian attention, making the process end-to-end. In doing so our model is puzzle size agnostic, in contrast to prior deep learning methods which are single size. We evaluate on two new large-scale datasets, where our model is on par with deep learning methods, while generalizing to multiple puzzle sizes.
abstract_zh: 由于匹配相邻拼图的难度，解谜是一项组合挑战。相反，我们从所有片段中推断出一个心理图像，然后可以将给定的片段与该图像进行匹配，以避免组合爆炸。利用生成对抗方法的进步，我们学习如何在给定一组无序片段的情况下重建图像，从而允许模型学习联合嵌入空间，以将每个片段的编码与生成器的裁剪层相匹配。因此，我们将问题框架为 R@1 检索任务，然后使用可微匈牙利注意力解决线性分配，使该过程端到端。在此过程中，我们的模型与谜题大小无关，与之前单一大小的深度学习方法形成鲜明对比。我们对两个新的大型数据集进行评估，其中我们的模型与深度学习方法相当，同时推广到多个谜题大小。

AI.tldr: 将拼图求解转化为检索任务，通过生成心理图像进行匹配
AI.motivation: 传统方法因组合爆炸难以处理，新方法通过生成心理图像避免此问题，并适应多尺寸拼图
AI.method: 利用GAN生成心理图像，构建联合嵌入空间，转化为检索任务，使用可微匈牙利注意力实现端到端求解
AI.result: 在两个新数据集上表现与深度学习方法相当，且支持多尺寸拼图
AI.conclusion: 模型无需调整即可处理不同尺寸拼图，优于传统方法

authors_text: Wentse Chen,Shiyu Huang,Yuan Chiang,Tim Pearce,Wei-Wei Tu,Ting Chen,Jun Zhu
title: DGPO: Discovering Multiple Strategies with Diversity-Guided Policy Optimization
title_zh: DGPO：通过多样性引导的政策优化发现多种策略
abstract: Most reinforcement learning algorithms seek a single optimal strategy that solves a given task. However, it can often be valuable to learn a diverse set of solutions, for instance, to make an agent's interaction with users more engaging, or improve the robustness of a policy to an unexpected perturbance. We propose Diversity-Guided Policy Optimization (DGPO), an on-policy algorithm that discovers multiple strategies for solving a given task. Unlike prior work, it achieves this with a shared policy network trained over a single run. Specifically, we design an intrinsic reward based on an information-theoretic diversity objective. Our final objective alternately constraints on the diversity of the strategies and on the extrinsic reward. We solve the constrained optimization problem by casting it as a probabilistic inference task and use policy iteration to maximize the derived lower bound. Experimental results show that our method efficiently discovers diverse strategies in a wide variety of reinforcement learning tasks. Compared to baseline methods, DGPO achieves comparable rewards, while discovering more diverse strategies, and often with better sample efficiency.
summary: Most reinforcement learning algorithms seek a single optimal strategy that solves a given task. However, it can often be valuable to learn a diverse set of solutions, for instance, to make an agent's interaction with users more engaging, or improve the robustness of a policy to an unexpected perturbance. We propose Diversity-Guided Policy Optimization (DGPO), an on-policy algorithm that discovers multiple strategies for solving a given task. Unlike prior work, it achieves this with a shared policy network trained over a single run. Specifically, we design an intrinsic reward based on an information-theoretic diversity objective. Our final objective alternately constraints on the diversity of the strategies and on the extrinsic reward. We solve the constrained optimization problem by casting it as a probabilistic inference task and use policy iteration to maximize the derived lower bound. Experimental results show that our method efficiently discovers diverse strategies in a wide variety of reinforcement learning tasks. Compared to baseline methods, DGPO achieves comparable rewards, while discovering more diverse strategies, and often with better sample efficiency.
abstract_zh: 大多数强化学习算法都寻求解决给定任务的单一最优策略。然而，学习一组不同的解决方案通常是有价值的，例如，使代理与用户的交互更具吸引力，或者提高策略对意外扰动的鲁棒性。我们提出了多样性引导策略优化（DGPO），这是一种策略算法，可以发现解决给定任务的多种策略。与之前的工作不同，它通过在单次运行中训练的共享策略网络来实现这一目标。具体来说，我们根据信息论多样性目标设计内在奖励。我们的最终目标交替限制策略的多样性和外在奖励。我们通过将约束优化问题转换为概率推理任务来解决它，并使用策略迭代来最大化导出的下界。实验结果表明，我们的方法可以有效地发现各种强化学习任务中的不同策略。与基线方法相比，DGPO 实现了可比的奖励，同时发现了更多样化的策略，并且通常具有更好的样本效率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为DGPO的强化学习算法，旨在通过单一运行发现多种解决任务的策略。
AI.motivation: 传统强化学习算法仅追求单一最优策略，而多样化策略可提升交互趣味性及策略鲁棒性。
AI.method: 设计基于信息论的内在奖励机制，通过概率推断与策略迭代优化策略多样性与外部奖励的平衡目标。
AI.result: 实验表明DGPO在多种任务中高效生成多样化策略，奖励表现与基线相当且样本效率更优。
AI.conclusion: DGPO通过共享策略网络有效实现多策略发现，在多样性与样本效率上优于现有方法。

authors_text: Enrico Ferrentino,Heitor J. Savino,Antonio Franchi,Pasquale Chiacchio
title: A Dynamic Programming Framework for Optimal Planning of Redundant Robots Along Prescribed Paths With Kineto-Dynamic Constraints
title_zh: 具有运动动态约束的冗余机器人沿规定路径优化规划的动态规划框架
comment: ef:IEEE Transactions on Automation Science and Engineering, 2023
comments: ef:IEEE Transactions on Automation Science and Engineering, 2023
abstract: Offline optimal planning of trajectories for redundant robots along prescribed task space paths is usually broken down into two consecutive processes: first, the task space path is inverted to obtain a joint space path, then, the latter is parametrized with a time law. If the two processes are separated, they cannot optimize the same objective function, ultimately providing sub-optimal results. In this paper, a unified approach is presented where dynamic programming is the underlying optimization technique. Its flexibility allows accommodating arbitrary constraints and objective functions, thus providing a generic framework for optimal planning of real systems. To demonstrate its applicability to a real world scenario, the framework is instantiated for time-optimality on Franka Emika's Panda robot. The well-known issues associated with the execution of non-smooth trajectories on a real controller are partially addressed at planning level, through the enforcement of constraints, and partially through post-processing of the optimal solution. The experiments show that the proposed framework is able to effectively exploit kinematic redundancy to optimize the performance index defined at planning level and generate feasible trajectories that can be executed on real hardware with satisfactory results.
summary: Offline optimal planning of trajectories for redundant robots along prescribed task space paths is usually broken down into two consecutive processes: first, the task space path is inverted to obtain a joint space path, then, the latter is parametrized with a time law. If the two processes are separated, they cannot optimize the same objective function, ultimately providing sub-optimal results. In this paper, a unified approach is presented where dynamic programming is the underlying optimization technique. Its flexibility allows accommodating arbitrary constraints and objective functions, thus providing a generic framework for optimal planning of real systems. To demonstrate its applicability to a real world scenario, the framework is instantiated for time-optimality on Franka Emika's Panda robot. The well-known issues associated with the execution of non-smooth trajectories on a real controller are partially addressed at planning level, through the enforcement of constraints, and partially through post-processing of the optimal solution. The experiments show that the proposed framework is able to effectively exploit kinematic redundancy to optimize the performance index defined at planning level and generate feasible trajectories that can be executed on real hardware with satisfactory results.
abstract_zh: 沿着指定任务空间路径的冗余机器人轨迹的离线优化规划通常分为两个连续的过程：首先，任务空间路径被反转以获得关节空间路径，然后，后者用时间定律参数化。如果两个过程分开，它们就无法优化相同的目标函数，最终提供次优结果。在本文中，提出了一种统一的方法，其中动态规划是底层优化技术。它的灵活性允许容纳任意约束和目标函数，从而为实际系统的优化规划提供通用框架。为了证明其在现实世界场景中的适用性，该框架在 Franka Emika 的 Panda 机器人上进行了实例化，以实现时间最优。与在实际控制器上执行非平滑轨迹相关的众所周知的问题部分在规划级别通过约束的实施得到解决，部分通过最优解决方案的后处理得到解决。实验表明，所提出的框架能够有效地利用运动冗余来优化规划级别定义的性能指标，并生成可以在真实硬件上执行的可行轨迹，并获得令人满意的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于动态规划的框架，用于在满足运动学和动力学约束的前提下，为冗余机器人沿预定路径进行最优轨迹规划。
AI.motivation: 传统方法将轨迹规划分为路径逆解与时间参数化两步，导致无法统一优化目标函数，从而产生次优结果。本文旨在通过统一框架解决此问题。
AI.method: 采用动态规划作为核心优化技术，整合路径逆解与时间参数化过程，允许任意约束和目标函数，并通过约束施加与后处理解决非光滑轨迹问题。
AI.result: 实验表明，该框架能有效利用运动学冗余优化规划目标，生成可在实际硬件上执行的可行轨迹，且在Franka Emika Panda机器人上验证了时间最优性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的动态规划框架为冗余机器人最优轨迹规划提供了通用灵活的解决方案，成功解决了实际应用中的关键问题。

search_text: A Dynamic Programming Framework for Optimal Planning of Redundant Robots Along Prescribed Paths With Kineto-Dynamic Constraints 具有运动动态约束的冗余机器人沿规定路径优化规划的动态规划框架 Offline optimal planning of trajectories for redundant robots along prescribed task space paths is usually broken down into two consecutive processes: first, the task space path is inverted to obtain a joint space path, then, the latter is parametrized with a time law. If the two processes are separated, they cannot optimize the same objective function, ultimately providing sub-optimal results. In this paper, a unified approach is presented where dynamic programming is the underlying optimization technique. Its flexibility allows accommodating arbitrary constraints and objective functions, thus providing a generic framework for optimal planning of real systems. To demonstrate its applicability to a real world scenario, the framework is instantiated for time-optimality on Franka Emika's Panda robot. The well-known issues associated with the execution of non-smooth trajectories on a real controller are partially addressed at planning level, through the enforcement of constraints, and partially through post-processing of the optimal solution. The experiments show that the proposed framework is able to effectively exploit kinematic redundancy to optimize the performance index defined at planning level and generate feasible trajectories that can be executed on real hardware with satisfactory results. 沿着指定任务空间路径的冗余机器人轨迹的离线优化规划通常分为两个连续的过程：首先，任务空间路径被反转以获得关节空间路径，然后，后者用时间定律参数化。如果两个过程分开，它们就无法优化相同的目标函数，最终提供次优结果。在本文中，提出了一种统一的方法，其中动态规划是底层优化技术。它的灵活性允许容纳任意约束和目标函数，从而为实际系统的优化规划提供通用框架。为了证明其在现实世界场景中的适用性，该框架在 Franka Emika 的 Panda 机器人上进行了实例化，以实现时间最优。与在实际控制器上执行非平滑轨迹相关的众所周知的问题部分在规划级别通过约束的实施得到解决，部分通过最优解决方案的后处理得到解决。实验表明，所提出的框架能够有效地利用运动冗余来优化规划级别定义的性能指标，并生成可以在真实硬件上执行的可行轨迹，并获得令人满意的结果。 本文提出了一种基于动态规划的框架，用于在满足运动学和动力学约束的前提下，为冗余机器人沿预定路径进行最优轨迹规划。 Enrico Ferrentino,Heitor J. authors_text: Sixiang Chen,Tian Ye,Yun Liu,Taodong Liao,Jingxia Jiang,Erkang Chen,Peng Chen
title: MSP-Former: Multi-Scale Projection Transformer for Single Image Desnowing
title_zh: MSP-Former：用于单图像除雪的多尺度投影变压器
abstract: Snow removal causes challenges due to its characteristic of complex degradations. To this end, targeted treatment of multi-scale snow degradations is critical for the network to learn effective snow removal. In order to handle the diverse scenes, we propose a multi-scale projection transformer (MSP-Former), which understands and covers a variety of snow degradation features in a multi-path manner, and integrates comprehensive scene context information for clean reconstruction via self-attention operation. For the local details of various snow degradations, the local capture module is introduced in parallel to assist in the rebuilding of a clean image. Such design achieves the SOTA performance on three desnowing benchmark datasets while costing the low parameters and computational complexity, providing a guarantee of practicality.
summary: Snow removal causes challenges due to its characteristic of complex degradations. To this end, targeted treatment of multi-scale snow degradations is critical for the network to learn effective snow removal. In order to handle the diverse scenes, we propose a multi-scale projection transformer (MSP-Former), which understands and covers a variety of snow degradation features in a multi-path manner, and integrates comprehensive scene context information for clean reconstruction via self-attention operation. For the local details of various snow degradations, the local capture module is introduced in parallel to assist in the rebuilding of a clean image. Such design achieves the SOTA performance on three desnowing benchmark datasets while costing the low parameters and computational complexity, providing a guarantee of practicality.
abstract_zh: 由于其复杂的退化特性，除雪带来了挑战。为此，多尺度降雪的针对性处理对于网络学习有效除雪至关重要。为了处理不同的场景，我们提出了一种多尺度投影变换器（MSP-Former），它以多路径方式理解和覆盖各种雪退化特征，并通过自注意力操作集成全面的场景上下文信息以进行干净的重建。针对各种雪质劣化的局部细节，并行引入局部捕捉模块，辅助重建干净的图像。这样的设计在三个除雪基准数据集上实现了SOTA性能，同时以较低的参数和计算复杂度为代价，为实用性提供了保证。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MSP-Former模型，针对单幅图像去雪任务，解决复杂降雪退化问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以处理多尺度雪降解特性，需设计能捕捉多尺度特征并整合场景信息的网络架构。
AI.method: 设计多尺度投影Transformer（MSP-Former），通过多路径处理不同雪降解特征，结合自注意力机制整合场景上下文，并引入局部捕获模块重建细节。
AI.result: 在三个去雪基准数据集上达到SOTA性能，同时保持低参数量和计算复杂度。
AI.conclusion: MSP-Former通过多尺度特征处理和高效架构设计，为实际应用提供了可行的雪去除方案。

authors_text: António J. Abreu,Luís A. Alexandre,João A. Santos,Filippo Basso
title: LudVision -- Remote Detection of Exotic Invasive Aquatic Floral Species using Drone-Mounted Multispectral Data
title_zh: LudVision——使用无人机多光谱数据远程检测外来入侵水生花卉物种
abstract: Remote sensing is the process of detecting and monitoring the physical characteristics of an area by measuring its reflected and emitted radiation at a distance. It is being broadly used to monitor ecosystems, mainly for their preservation. Ever-growing reports of invasive species have affected the natural balance of ecosystems. Exotic invasive species have a critical impact when introduced into new ecosystems and may lead to the extinction of native species. In this study, we focus on Ludwigia peploides, considered by the European Union as an aquatic invasive species. Its presence can negatively impact the surrounding ecosystem and human activities such as agriculture, fishing, and navigation. Our goal was to develop a method to identify the presence of the species. We used images collected by a drone-mounted multispectral sensor to achieve this, creating our LudVision data set. To identify the targeted species on the collected images, we propose a new method for detecting Ludwigia p. in multispectral images. The method is based on existing state-of-the-art semantic segmentation methods modified to handle multispectral data. The proposed method achieved a producer's accuracy of 79.9% and a user's accuracy of 95.5%.
summary: Remote sensing is the process of detecting and monitoring the physical characteristics of an area by measuring its reflected and emitted radiation at a distance. It is being broadly used to monitor ecosystems, mainly for their preservation. Ever-growing reports of invasive species have affected the natural balance of ecosystems. Exotic invasive species have a critical impact when introduced into new ecosystems and may lead to the extinction of native species. In this study, we focus on Ludwigia peploides, considered by the European Union as an aquatic invasive species. Its presence can negatively impact the surrounding ecosystem and human activities such as agriculture, fishing, and navigation. Our goal was to develop a method to identify the presence of the species. We used images collected by a drone-mounted multispectral sensor to achieve this, creating our LudVision data set. To identify the targeted species on the collected images, we propose a new method for detecting Ludwigia p. in multispectral images. The method is based on existing state-of-the-art semantic segmentation methods modified to handle multispectral data. The proposed method achieved a producer's accuracy of 79.9% and a user's accuracy of 95.5%.
abstract_zh: 遥感是通过测量远距离反射和发射的辐射来检测和监测一个区域的物理特征的过程。它被广泛用于监测生态系统，主要是为了保护生态系统。越来越多的入侵物种报告影响了生态系统的自然平衡。外来入侵物种在引入新的生态系统时会产生重大影响，并可能导致本地物种灭绝。在这项研究中，我们关注的是 Ludwigia peploides，它被欧盟视为水生入侵物种。它的存在会对周围的生态系统和农业、渔业和航海等人类活动产生负面影响。我们的目标是开发一种方法来识别该物种的存在。我们使用无人机安装的多光谱传感器收集的图像来实现这一目标，创建了 LudVision 数据集。为了识别收集到的图像上的目标物种，我们提出了一种检测 Ludwigia p. 的新方法。在多光谱图像中。该方法基于现有最先进的语义分割方法，经过修改以处理多光谱数据。该方法的生产者准确率达到 79.9%，用户准确率达到 95.5%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出LudVision方法，利用无人机搭载的多光谱传感器远程检测入侵水生植物Ludwigia peploides。
AI.motivation: 入侵物种会破坏生态系统平衡并影响人类活动，传统监测方法效率低，需开发高效检测技术。
AI.method: 基于多光谱图像构建数据集，改进现有语义分割模型以适应多光谱数据进行物种检测。
AI.result: 方法在检测中达到79.9%的生产者精度和95.5%的用户精度。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为入侵物种监测提供了有效技术手段，可支持生态保护与管理决策。

In this study, we focus on Ludwigia peploides, considered by the European Union as an aquatic invasive species. Its presence can negatively impact the surrounding ecosystem and human activities such as agriculture, fishing, and navigation. Our goal was to develop a method to identify the presence of the species. We used images collected by a drone-mounted multispectral sensor to achieve this, creating our LudVision data set. To identify the targeted species on the collected images, we propose a new method for detecting Ludwigia p. in multispectral images. The method is based on existing state-of-the-art semantic segmentation methods modified to handle multispectral data. The proposed method achieved a producer's accuracy of 79.9% and a user's accuracy of 95.5%. 遥感是通过测量远距离反射和发射的辐射来检测和监测一个区域的物理特征的过程。它被广泛用于监测生态系统，主要是为了保护生态系统。越来越多的入侵物种报告影响了生态系统的自然平衡。外来入侵物种在引入新的生态系统时会产生重大影响，并可能导致本地物种灭绝。在这项研究中，我们关注的是 Ludwigia peploides，它被欧盟视为水生入侵物种。它的存在会对周围的生态系统和农业、渔业和航海等人类活动产生负面影响。我们的目标是开发一种方法来识别该物种的存在。我们使用无人机安装的多光谱传感器收集的图像来实现这一目标，创建了 LudVision 数据集。为了识别收集到的图像上的目标物种，我们提出了一种检测 Ludwigia p. 的新方法。在多光谱图像中。该方法基于现有最先进的语义分割方法，经过修改以处理多光谱数据。该方法的生产者准确率达到 79.9%，用户准确率达到 95.5%。 本文提出LudVision方法，利用无人机搭载的多光谱传感器远程检测入侵水生植物Ludwigia peploides。 António J. authors_text: Nicolas Michel,Romain Negrel,Giovanni Chierchia,Jean-François Bercher
title: Contrastive Learning for Online Semi-Supervised General Continual Learning
title_zh: 在线半监督通用持续学习的对比学习
abstract: We study Online Continual Learning with missing labels and propose SemiCon, a new contrastive loss designed for partly labeled data. We demonstrate its efficiency by devising a memory-based method trained on an unlabeled data stream, where every data added to memory is labeled using an oracle. Our approach outperforms existing semi-supervised methods when few labels are available, and obtain similar results to state-of-the-art supervised methods while using only 2.6% of labels on Split-CIFAR10 and 10% of labels on Split-CIFAR100.
summary: We study Online Continual Learning with missing labels and propose SemiCon, a new contrastive loss designed for partly labeled data. We demonstrate its efficiency by devising a memory-based method trained on an unlabeled data stream, where every data added to memory is labeled using an oracle. Our approach outperforms existing semi-supervised methods when few labels are available, and obtain similar results to state-of-the-art supervised methods while using only 2.6% of labels on Split-CIFAR10 and 10% of labels on Split-CIFAR100.
abstract_zh: 我们研究了缺失标签的在线持续学习，并提出了 SemiCon，这是一种专为部分标记数据设计的新对比损失。我们通过设计一种基于内存的方法来证明其效率，该方法在未标记的数据流上进行训练，其中添加到内存中的每个数据都使用预言机进行标记。当可用标签很少时，我们的方法优于现有的半监督方法，并且在 Split-CIFAR10 上仅使用 2.6% 的标签和 Split-CIFAR100 上仅使用 10% 的标签时获得与最先进的监督方法相似的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在线半监督持续学习中的标签缺失问题，提出一种名为SemiCon的对比学习方法。
AI.motivation: 现有半监督方法在标签稀缺时效果有限，而持续学习需处理数据流与标签缺失的挑战，需更高效的学习策略。
AI.method: 设计SemiCon对比损失处理部分标记数据，结合基于内存的训练机制，通过预言机为内存数据标注标签。
AI.result: 在Split-CIFAR10/100数据集上，仅用2.6%/10%标签即可超越半监督方法，接近监督方法性能。
AI.conclusion: SemiCon有效解决了标签稀缺下的在线持续学习问题，未来可优化标签选择策略以提升效率。

authors_text: Wenlong Huang,Fei Xia,Ted Xiao,Harris Chan,Jacky Liang,Pete Florence,Andy Zeng,Jonathan Tompson,Igor Mordatch,Yevgen Chebotar,Pierre Sermanet,Noah Brown,Tomas Jackson,Linda Luu,Sergey Levine,Karol Hausman,Brian Ichter
title: Inner Monologue: Embodied Reasoning through Planning with Language Models
title_zh: 内心独白：通过语言模型规划进行具身推理
abstract: Recent works have shown how the reasoning capabilities of Large Language Models (LLMs) can be applied to domains beyond natural language processing, such as planning and interaction for robots. These embodied problems require an agent to understand many semantic aspects of the world: the repertoire of skills available, how these skills influence the world, and how changes to the world map back to the language. LLMs planning in embodied environments need to consider not just what skills to do, but also how and when to do them - answers that change over time in response to the agent's own choices. In this work, we investigate to what extent LLMs used in such embodied contexts can reason over sources of feedback provided through natural language, without any additional training. We propose that by leveraging environment feedback, LLMs are able to form an inner monologue that allows them to more richly process and plan in robotic control scenarios. We investigate a variety of sources of feedback, such as success detection, scene description, and human interaction. We find that closed-loop language feedback significantly improves high-level instruction completion on three domains, including simulated and real table top rearrangement tasks and long-horizon mobile manipulation tasks in a kitchen environment in the real world.
summary: Recent works have shown how the reasoning capabilities of Large Language Models (LLMs) can be applied to domains beyond natural language processing, such as planning and interaction for robots. These embodied problems require an agent to understand many semantic aspects of the world: the repertoire of skills available, how these skills influence the world, and how changes to the world map back to the language. LLMs planning in embodied environments need to consider not just what skills to do, but also how and when to do them - answers that change over time in response to the agent's own choices. In this work, we investigate to what extent LLMs used in such embodied contexts can reason over sources of feedback provided through natural language, without any additional training. We propose that by leveraging environment feedback, LLMs are able to form an inner monologue that allows them to more richly process and plan in robotic control scenarios. We investigate a variety of sources of feedback, such as success detection, scene description, and human interaction. We find that closed-loop language feedback significantly improves high-level instruction completion on three domains, including simulated and real table top rearrangement tasks and long-horizon mobile manipulation tasks in a kitchen environment in the real world.
abstract_zh: 最近的工作表明，大型语言模型（LLM）的推理能力如何应用于自然语言处理以外的领域，例如机器人的规划和交互。这些具体问题要求智能体理解世界的许多语义方面：可用的技能、这些技能如何影响世界，以及世界的变化如何映射回语言。法学硕士在具体环境中的规划不仅需要考虑要做什么技能，还要考虑如何以及何时进行这些技能——答案会随着时间的推移而变化，以响应代理自己的选择。在这项工作中，我们调查了在这种具体环境中使用的法学硕士可以在多大程度上对通过自然语言提供的反馈源进行推理，而无需任何额外的培训。我们建议，通过利用环境反馈，法学硕士能够形成内心独白，使他们能够在机器人控制场景中进行更丰富的处理和计划。我们调查各种反馈来源，例如成功检测、场景描述和人机交互。我们发现闭环语言反馈显着提高了三个领域的高级指令完成度，包括模拟和真实的桌面重新排列任务以及现实世界厨房环境中的长视距移动操作任务。

AI.tldr: 本文研究大型语言模型（LLMs）在具身环境中如何通过自然语言反馈进行规划，以提升机器人控制任务的指令完成能力。
AI.motivation: 具身任务需要代理理解环境语义并动态调整技能执行，而现有LLMs缺乏对反馈的实时利用能力，限制了其在复杂场景中的表现。
AI.method: 通过引入环境反馈（如任务成功检测、场景描述和人类交互）构建LLMs的内部对话机制，使其在闭环中动态调整规划策略。
AI.result: 在模拟和真实场景的桌面重排及厨房移动操作任务中，闭环语言反馈显著提升了高层指令完成率。
AI.conclusion: 自然语言反馈能增强LLMs的具身推理能力，未来需进一步探索反馈机制与长期规划的结合方式。

authors_text: Tian Ye,Sixiang Chen,Yun Liu,Yi Ye,Erkang Chen
title: Towards Real-time High-Definition Image Snow Removal: Efficient Pyramid Network with Asymmetrical Encoder-decoder Architecture
title_zh: 迈向实时高清图像除雪：具有非对称编码器-解码器架构的高效金字塔网络
abstract: In winter scenes, the degradation of images taken under snow can be pretty complex, where the spatial distribution of snowy degradation is varied from image to image. Recent methods adopt deep neural networks to directly recover clean scenes from snowy images. However, due to the paradox caused by the variation of complex snowy degradation, achieving reliable High-Definition image desnowing performance in real time is a considerable challenge. We develop a novel Efficient Pyramid Network with asymmetrical encoder-decoder architecture for real-time HD image desnowing. The general idea of our proposed network is to utilize the multi-scale feature flow fully and implicitly mine clean cues from features. Compared with previous state-of-the-art desnowing methods, our approach achieves a better complexity-performance trade-off and effectively handles the processing difficulties of HD and Ultra-HD images. The extensive experiments on three large-scale image desnowing datasets demonstrate that our method surpasses all state-of-the-art approaches by a large margin both quantitatively and qualitatively, boosting the PSNR metric from 31.76 dB to 34.10 dB on the CSD test dataset and from 28.29 dB to 30.87 dB on the SRRS test dataset.
summary: In winter scenes, the degradation of images taken under snow can be pretty complex, where the spatial distribution of snowy degradation is varied from image to image. Recent methods adopt deep neural networks to directly recover clean scenes from snowy images. However, due to the paradox caused by the variation of complex snowy degradation, achieving reliable High-Definition image desnowing performance in real time is a considerable challenge. We develop a novel Efficient Pyramid Network with asymmetrical encoder-decoder architecture for real-time HD image desnowing. The general idea of our proposed network is to utilize the multi-scale feature flow fully and implicitly mine clean cues from features. Compared with previous state-of-the-art desnowing methods, our approach achieves a better complexity-performance trade-off and effectively handles the processing difficulties of HD and Ultra-HD images. The extensive experiments on three large-scale image desnowing datasets demonstrate that our method surpasses all state-of-the-art approaches by a large margin both quantitatively and qualitatively, boosting the PSNR metric from 31.76 dB to 34.10 dB on the CSD test dataset and from 28.29 dB to 30.87 dB on the SRRS test dataset.
abstract_zh: 在冬季场景中，在雪下拍摄的图像的退化可能非常复杂，其中雪地退化的空间分布因图像而异。最近的方法采用深度神经网络直接从雪图像中恢复干净的场景。然而，由于复杂的积雪退化变化所带来的悖论，实时实现可靠的高清图像除雪性能是一个相当大的挑战。我们开发了一种新颖的高效金字塔网络，具有非对称编码器-解码器架构，用于实时高清图像除雪。我们提出的网络的总体思想是充分利用多尺度特征流并隐式地从特征中挖掘干净的线索。与之前最先进的除雪方法相比，我们的方法实现了更好的复杂性与性能权衡，有效解决了高清和超高清图像的处理困难。对三个大型图像除雪数据集的广泛实验表明，我们的方法在数量和质量上都远远超过了所有最先进的方法，将 CSD 测试数据集上的 PSNR 指标从 31.76 dB 提高到 34.10 dB，将 SRRS 测试数据集上的 PSNR 指标从 28.29 dB 提高到 30.87 dB。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种高效金字塔网络，通过非对称编码器-解码器架构实现实时高清图像去雪。
AI.motivation: 现有去雪方法难以应对复杂雪降质变化及高清图像实时处理需求，需在计算复杂度与性能间寻求平衡。
AI.method: 设计非对称编码器-解码器结构，利用多尺度特征流隐式挖掘纯净图像线索，优化高清/超高清图像处理效率。
AI.result: 在CSD数据集上PSNR提升2.34dB（31.76→34.10），在SRRS数据集上提升2.58dB（28.29→30.87），超越现有最优方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过高效网络结构实现复杂雪降质场景下的实时高清去雪，为高分辨率图像处理提供新思路。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种高效金字塔网络，通过非对称编码器-解码器架构实现实时高清图像去雪。

search_text: Towards Real-time High-Definition Image Snow Removal: Efficient Pyramid Network with Asymmetrical Encoder-decoder Architecture 迈向实时高清图像除雪：具有非对称编码器-解码器架构的高效金字塔网络 In winter scenes, the degradation of images taken under snow can be pretty complex, where the spatial distribution of snowy degradation is varied from image to image. Recent methods adopt deep neural networks to directly recover clean scenes from snowy images. However, due to the paradox caused by the variation of complex snowy degradation, achieving reliable High-Definition image desnowing performance in real time is a considerable challenge. We develop a novel Efficient Pyramid Network with asymmetrical encoder-decoder architecture for real-time HD image desnowing. The general idea of our proposed network is to utilize the multi-scale feature flow fully and implicitly mine clean cues from features. Compared with previous state-of-the-art desnowing methods, our approach achieves a better complexity-performance trade-off and effectively handles the processing difficulties of HD and Ultra-HD images. The extensive experiments on three large-scale image desnowing datasets demonstrate that our method surpasses all state-of-the-art approaches by a large margin both quantitatively and qualitatively, boosting the PSNR metric from 31.76 dB to 34.10 dB on the CSD test dataset and from 28.29 dB to 30.87 dB on the SRRS test dataset. 在冬季场景中，在雪下拍摄的图像的退化可能非常复杂，其中雪地退化的空间分布因图像而异。最近的方法采用深度神经网络直接从雪图像中恢复干净的场景。然而，由于复杂的积雪退化变化所带来的悖论，实时实现可靠的高清图像除雪性能是一个相当大的挑战。我们开发了一种新颖的高效金字塔网络，具有非对称编码器-解码器架构，用于实时高清图像除雪。我们提出的网络的总体思想是充分利用多尺度特征流并隐式地从特征中挖掘干净的线索。与之前最先进的除雪方法相比，我们的方法实现了更好的复杂性与性能权衡，有效解决了高清和超高清图像的处理困难。对三个大型图像除雪数据集的广泛实验表明，我们的方法在数量和质量上都远远超过了所有最先进的方法，将 CSD 测试数据集上的 PSNR 指标从 31.76 dB 提高到 34.10 dB，将 SRRS 测试数据集上的 PSNR 指标从 28.29 dB 提高到 30.87 dB。 本文提出一种高效金字塔网络，通过非对称编码器-解码器架构实现实时高清图像去雪。 Tian Ye,Sixiang Chen,Yun Liu,Yi Ye,Erkang Chen cs.CV

authors_text: Vincenzo Petrone,Enrico Ferrentino,Pasquale Chiacchio
title: Time-Optimal Trajectory Planning with Interaction with the Environment
title_zh: 与环境交互的时间最优轨迹规划
comment: ef:IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters, vol. 7, no. 4, pp. 10399-10405, Oct. 2022
comments: ef:IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters, vol. 7, no. 4, pp. 10399-10405, Oct. 2022
abstract: Optimal motion planning along prescribed paths can be solved with several techniques, but most of them do not take into account the wrenches exerted by the end-effector when in contact with the environment. When a dynamic model of the environment is not available, no consolidated methodology exists to consider the effect of the interaction. Regardless of the specific performance index to optimize, this article proposes a strategy to include external wrenches in the optimal planning algorithm, considering the task specifications. This procedure is instantiated for minimum-time trajectories and validated on a real robot performing an interaction task under admittance control. The results prove that the inclusion of end-effector wrenches affect the planned trajectory, in fact modifying the manipulator's dynamic capability.
summary: Optimal motion planning along prescribed paths can be solved with several techniques, but most of them do not take into account the wrenches exerted by the end-effector when in contact with the environment. When a dynamic model of the environment is not available, no consolidated methodology exists to consider the effect of the interaction. Regardless of the specific performance index to optimize, this article proposes a strategy to include external wrenches in the optimal planning algorithm, considering the task specifications. This procedure is instantiated for minimum-time trajectories and validated on a real robot performing an interaction task under admittance control. The results prove that the inclusion of end-effector wrenches affect the planned trajectory, in fact modifying the manipulator's dynamic capability.
abstract_zh: 沿着规定路径的最佳运动规划可以通过多种技术来解决，但大多数技术都没有考虑末端执行器在与环境接触时施加的扳手。当环境的动态模型不可用时，就没有统一的方法来考虑相互作用的影响。无论要优化的具体性能指标如何，本文都提出了一种策略，在考虑任务规范的情况下，在最优规划算法中包含外部扳手。该过程针对最短时间轨迹进行实例化，并在准入控制下执行交互任务的真实机器人上进行验证。结果证明，末端执行器扳手的加入会影响计划轨迹，实际上会改变机械手的动态能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在最优轨迹规划中考虑末端执行器与环境相互作用力的方法。
AI.motivation: 现有最优运动规划方法大多未考虑末端执行器与环境接触时的力矩影响，缺乏一种在无环境动态模型的情况下考虑交互作用的统一方法。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种策略，将外部力矩纳入最优规划算法中，并针对最小时间轨迹进行实例化，通过实际机器人进行验证。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，末端执行器的力矩影响规划轨迹，从而改变了机械臂的动态能力。
AI.conclusion: 考虑末端执行器与环境的相互作用力可以显著影响轨迹规划，提高机械臂在交互任务中的动态性能。

authors_text: Liren Yang
title: Ego-motion Estimation Based on Fusion of Images and Events
title_zh: 基于图像与事件融合的自我运动估计
abstract: Event camera is a novel bio-inspired vision sensor that outputs event stream. In this paper, we propose a novel data fusion algorithm called EAS to fuse conventional intensity images with the event stream. The fusion result is applied to some ego-motion estimation frameworks, and is evaluated on a public dataset acquired in dim scenes. In our 3-DoF rotation estimation framework, EAS achieves the highest estimation accuracy among intensity images and representations of events including event slice, TS and SITS. Compared with original images, EAS reduces the average APE by 69%, benefiting from the inclusion of more features for tracking. The result shows that our algorithm effectively leverages the high dynamic range of event cameras to improve the performance of the ego-motion estimation framework based on optical flow tracking in difficult illumination conditions.
summary: Event camera is a novel bio-inspired vision sensor that outputs event stream. In this paper, we propose a novel data fusion algorithm called EAS to fuse conventional intensity images with the event stream. The fusion result is applied to some ego-motion estimation frameworks, and is evaluated on a public dataset acquired in dim scenes. In our 3-DoF rotation estimation framework, EAS achieves the highest estimation accuracy among intensity images and representations of events including event slice, TS and SITS. Compared with original images, EAS reduces the average APE by 69%, benefiting from the inclusion of more features for tracking. The result shows that our algorithm effectively leverages the high dynamic range of event cameras to improve the performance of the ego-motion estimation framework based on optical flow tracking in difficult illumination conditions.
abstract_zh: 事件相机是一种新颖的仿生视觉传感器，可输出事件流。在本文中，我们提出了一种称为 EAS 的新型数据融合算法，用于将传统强度图像与事件流融合。融合结果应用于一些自我运动估计框架，并在昏暗场景中获取的公共数据集上进行评估。在我们的 3-DoF 旋转估计框架中，EAS 在强度图像和事件表示（包括事件切片、TS 和 SITS）中实现了最高的估计精度。与原始图像相比，EAS 将平均 APE 降低了 69%，这得益于包含更多的跟踪特征。结果表明，我们的算法有效地利用事件相机的高动态范围来提高基于困难照明条件下的光流跟踪的自我运动估计框架的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为EAS的图像与事件流融合算法，用于提升低光环境下自我运动估计的准确性。
AI.motivation: 事件相机在低光场景下具有高动态范围优势，但单独使用事件流或传统图像均存在局限，需通过数据融合提升跟踪性能。
AI.method: 设计EAS算法融合强度图像与事件流，生成更丰富的特征表示，并应用于基于光流跟踪的3-DoF旋转估计框架。
AI.result: EAS在公开数据集上将平均轨迹误差（APE）降低69%，在旋转估计中优于纯图像及各类事件表示方法。
AI.conclusion: EAS算法通过有效融合多模态数据，显著提升了低光照条件下基于光流的自我运动估计性能。

authors_text: Yuhao Yang,Chao Huang,Lianghao Xia,Yuxuan Liang,Yanwei Yu,Chenliang Li
title: Multi-Behavior Hypergraph-Enhanced Transformer for Sequential Recommendation
title_zh: 用于顺序推荐的多行为超图增强变压器
comment: Published as a KDD'22 full paper
comments: Published as a KDD'22 full paper
abstract: Learning dynamic user preference has become an increasingly important component for many online platforms (e.g., video-sharing sites, e-commerce systems) to make sequential recommendations. Previous works have made many efforts to model item-item transitions over user interaction sequences, based on various architectures, e.g., recurrent neural networks and self-attention mechanism. Recently emerged graph neural networks also serve as useful backbone models to capture item dependencies in sequential recommendation scenarios. Despite their effectiveness, existing methods have far focused on item sequence representation with singular type of interactions, and thus are limited to capture dynamic heterogeneous relational structures between users and items (e.g., page view, add-to-favorite, purchase). To tackle this challenge, we design a Multi-Behavior Hypergraph-enhanced Transformer framework (MBHT) to capture both short-term and long-term cross-type behavior dependencies. Specifically, a multi-scale Transformer is equipped with low-rank self-attention to jointly encode behavior-aware sequential patterns from fine-grained and coarse-grained levels. Additionally, we incorporate the global multi-behavior dependency into the hypergraph neural architecture to capture the hierarchical long-range item correlations in a customized manner. Experimental results demonstrate the superiority of our MBHT over various state-of-the-art recommendation solutions across different settings. Further ablation studies validate the effectiveness of our model design and benefits of the new MBHT framework. Our implementation code is released at: https://github.com/yuh-yang/MBHT-KDD22.
summary: Learning dynamic user preference has become an increasingly important component for many online platforms (e.g., video-sharing sites, e-commerce systems) to make sequential recommendations. Previous works have made many efforts to model item-item transitions over user interaction sequences, based on various architectures, e.g., recurrent neural networks and self-attention mechanism. Recently emerged graph neural networks also serve as useful backbone models to capture item dependencies in sequential recommendation scenarios. Despite their effectiveness, existing methods have far focused on item sequence representation with singular type of interactions, and thus are limited to capture dynamic heterogeneous relational structures between users and items (e.g., page view, add-to-favorite, purchase). To tackle this challenge, we design a Multi-Behavior Hypergraph-enhanced Transformer framework (MBHT) to capture both short-term and long-term cross-type behavior dependencies. Specifically, a multi-scale Transformer is equipped with low-rank self-attention to jointly encode behavior-aware sequential patterns from fine-grained and coarse-grained levels. Additionally, we incorporate the global multi-behavior dependency into the hypergraph neural architecture to capture the hierarchical long-range item correlations in a customized manner. Experimental results demonstrate the superiority of our MBHT over various state-of-the-art recommendation solutions across different settings. Further ablation studies validate the effectiveness of our model design and benefits of the new MBHT framework. Our implementation code is released at: https://github.com/yuh-yang/MBHT-KDD22.
abstract_zh: 学习动态用户偏好已成为许多在线平台（例如视频共享网站、电子商务系统）进行顺序推荐的一个越来越重要的组成部分。之前的工作基于各种架构（例如循环神经网络和自注意力机制），在用户交互序列上的项目-项目转换建模方面做出了很多努力。最近出现的图神经网络也可以作为有用的骨干模型来捕获顺序推荐场景中的项目依赖性。尽管有效，现有方法仍然主要关注具有单一交互类型的项目序列表示，因此仅限于捕获用户和项目之间的动态异构关系结构（例如页面视图、添加到收藏夹、购买）。为了应对这一挑战，我们设计了一个多行为超图增强型 Transformer 框架（MBHT）来捕获短期和长期跨类型行为依赖性。具体来说，多尺度 Transformer 配备了低秩自注意力，可以从细粒度和粗粒度级别联合编码行为感知序列模式。此外，我们将全局多行为依赖性合并到超图神经架构中，以定制的方式捕获分层的远程项目相关性。实验结果证明了我们的 MBHT 在不同设置下优于各种最先进的推荐解决方案。进一步的消融研究验证了我们模型设计的有效性以及新 MBHT 框架的优势。我们的实现代码发布于：https://github.com/yuh-yang/MBHT-KDD22。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多行为超图增强的Transformer框架（MBHT），用于捕捉用户在序列推荐中的短期和长期跨类型行为依赖关系。
AI.motivation: 现有方法仅关注单一交互类型的物品序列表示，无法有效建模用户与物品间的动态异构关系（如浏览、收藏、购买等）。
AI.method: 设计多尺度Transformer结合低秩自注意力机制，从细粒度和粗粒度层面编码行为感知的序列模式，并通过超图神经网络架构捕捉全局多行为依赖的分层长距离物品关联。
AI.result: 实验表明MBHT在多种设置下优于现有先进推荐方法，消融研究验证了模型设计的有效性。
AI.conclusion: MBHT框架通过融合多行为超图与多尺度Transformer，有效提升了序列推荐中对异构动态关系的建模能力。

search_text: Multi-Behavior Hypergraph-Enhanced Transformer for Sequential Recommendation 用于顺序推荐的多行为超图增强变压器 Learning dynamic user preference has become an increasingly important component for many online platforms (e.g., video-sharing sites, e-commerce systems) to make sequential recommendations. Previous works have made many efforts to model item-item transitions over user interaction sequences, based on various architectures, e.g., recurrent neural networks and self-attention mechanism. Recently emerged graph neural networks also serve as useful backbone models to capture item dependencies in sequential recommendation scenarios. Despite their effectiveness, existing methods have far focused on item sequence representation with singular type of interactions, and thus are limited to capture dynamic heterogeneous relational structures between users and items (e.g., page view, add-to-favorite, purchase). To tackle this challenge, we design a Multi-Behavior Hypergraph-enhanced Transformer framework (MBHT) to capture both short-term and long-term cross-type behavior dependencies. Specifically, a multi-scale Transformer is equipped with low-rank self-attention to jointly encode behavior-aware sequential patterns from fine-grained and coarse-grained levels. Additionally, we incorporate the global multi-behavior dependency into the hypergraph neural architecture to capture the hierarchical long-range item correlations in a customized manner. Experimental results demonstrate the superiority of our MBHT over various state-of-the-art recommendation solutions across different settings. Further ablation studies validate the effectiveness of our model design and benefits of the new MBHT framework. Our implementation code is released at: https://github.com/yuh-yang/MBHT-KDD22. 学习动态用户偏好已成为许多在线平台（例如视频共享网站、电子商务系统）进行顺序推荐的一个越来越重要的组成部分。之前的工作基于各种架构（例如循环神经网络和自注意力机制），在用户交互序列上的项目-项目转换建模方面做出了很多努力。最近出现的图神经网络也可以作为有用的骨干模型来捕获顺序推荐场景中的项目依赖性。尽管有效，现有方法仍然主要关注具有单一交互类型的项目序列表示，因此仅限于捕获用户和项目之间的动态异构关系结构（例如页面视图、添加到收藏夹、购买）。为了应对这一挑战，我们设计了一个多行为超图增强型 Transformer 框架（MBHT）来捕获短期和长期跨类型行为依赖性。具体来说，多尺度 Transformer 配备了低秩自注意力，可以从细粒度和粗粒度级别联合编码行为感知序列模式。此外，我们将全局多行为依赖性合并到超图神经架构中，以定制的方式捕获分层的远程项目相关性。实验结果证明了我们的 MBHT 在不同设置下优于各种最先进的推荐解决方案。进一步的消融研究验证了我们模型设计的有效性以及新 MBHT 框架的优势。我们的实现代码发布于：https://github.com/yuh-yang/MBHT-KDD22。 本文提出一种多行为超图增强的Transformer框架（MBHT），用于捕捉用户在序列推荐中的短期和长期跨类型行为依赖关系。 Yuhao Yang,Chao Huang,Lianghao Xia,Yuxuan Liang,Yanwei Yu,Chenliang Li cs.IR,cs.AI

authors_text: Xiang Li,Jinglu Wang,Xiaohao Xu,Bhiksha Raj,Yan Lu
title: Online Video Instance Segmentation via Robust Context Fusion
title_zh: 通过鲁棒上下文融合进行在线视频实例分割
abstract: Video instance segmentation (VIS) aims at classifying, segmenting and tracking object instances in video sequences. Recent transformer-based neural networks have demonstrated their powerful capability of modeling spatio-temporal correlations for the VIS task. Relying on video- or clip-level input, they suffer from high latency and computational cost. We propose a robust context fusion network to tackle VIS in an online fashion, which predicts instance segmentation frame-by-frame with a few preceding frames. To acquire the precise and temporal-consistent prediction for each frame efficiently, the key idea is to fuse effective and compact context from reference frames into the target frame. Considering the different effects of reference and target frames on the target prediction, we first summarize contextual features through importance-aware compression. A transformer encoder is adopted to fuse the compressed context. Then, we leverage an order-preserving instance embedding to convey the identity-aware information and correspond the identities to predicted instance masks. We demonstrate that our robust fusion network achieves the best performance among existing online VIS methods and is even better than previously published clip-level methods on the Youtube-VIS 2019 and 2021 benchmarks. In addition, visual objects often have acoustic signatures that are naturally synchronized with them in audio-bearing video recordings. By leveraging the flexibility of our context fusion network on multi-modal data, we further investigate the influence of audios on the video-dense prediction task, which has never been discussed in existing works. We build up an Audio-Visual Instance Segmentation dataset, and demonstrate that acoustic signals in the wild scenarios could benefit the VIS task.
summary: Video instance segmentation (VIS) aims at classifying, segmenting and tracking object instances in video sequences. Recent transformer-based neural networks have demonstrated their powerful capability of modeling spatio-temporal correlations for the VIS task. Relying on video- or clip-level input, they suffer from high latency and computational cost. We propose a robust context fusion network to tackle VIS in an online fashion, which predicts instance segmentation frame-by-frame with a few preceding frames. To acquire the precise and temporal-consistent prediction for each frame efficiently, the key idea is to fuse effective and compact context from reference frames into the target frame. Considering the different effects of reference and target frames on the target prediction, we first summarize contextual features through importance-aware compression. A transformer encoder is adopted to fuse the compressed context. Then, we leverage an order-preserving instance embedding to convey the identity-aware information and correspond the identities to predicted instance masks. We demonstrate that our robust fusion network achieves the best performance among existing online VIS methods and is even better than previously published clip-level methods on the Youtube-VIS 2019 and 2021 benchmarks. In addition, visual objects often have acoustic signatures that are naturally synchronized with them in audio-bearing video recordings. By leveraging the flexibility of our context fusion network on multi-modal data, we further investigate the influence of audios on the video-dense prediction task, which has never been discussed in existing works. We build up an Audio-Visual Instance Segmentation dataset, and demonstrate that acoustic signals in the wild scenarios could benefit the VIS task.
abstract_zh: 视频实例分割（VIS）旨在对视频序列中的对象实例进行分类、分割和跟踪。最近基于 Transformer 的神经网络已经证明了其为 VIS 任务建模时空相关性的强大能力。它们依赖于视频或剪辑级输入，因此存在高延迟和计算成本。我们提出了一个强大的上下文融合网络来以在线方式处理 VIS，该网络通过前面的一些帧逐帧预测实例分割。为了有效地获得每帧的精确且时间一致的预测，关键思想是将参考帧中的有效且紧凑的上下文融合到目标帧中。考虑到参考帧和目标帧对目标预测的不同影响，我们首先通过重要性感知压缩总结上下文特征。采用变压器编码器来融合压缩上下文。然后，我们利用保序实例嵌入来传达身份感知信息，并将身份与预测的实例掩码相对应。我们证明，我们强大的融合网络在现有在线 VIS 方法中实现了最佳性能，甚至比之前在 Youtube-VIS 2019 和 2021 基准上发布的剪辑级方法还要好。此外，视觉对象通常具有与音频视频录制中自然同步的声学特征。通过利用我们的上下文融合网络在多模态数据上的灵活性，我们进一步研究了音频对视频密集预测任务的影响，这在现有的工作中从未被讨论过。我们建立了一个视听实例分割数据集，并证明野外场景中的声学信号可以有利于 VIS 任务。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种在线视频实例分割方法，通过鲁棒上下文融合实现逐帧预测。
AI.motivation: 现有基于Transformer的视频实例分割方法依赖视频级或片段级输入，导致计算成本高且延迟大，难以实现实时处理。
AI.method: 设计鲁棒上下文融合网络，利用少量前帧信息进行逐帧预测，通过重要性感知压缩提取参考帧特征，结合Transformer编码器融合上下文，并采用顺序保留的实例嵌入实现身份关联。
AI.result: 在Youtube-VIS 2019和2021数据集上超越现有在线方法及部分片段级方法，同时构建音频-视觉实例分割数据集，验证了声学信号对VIS任务的辅助作用。
AI.conclusion: 提出的在线方法显著提升视频实例分割效率与性能，并首次探索音频信息对视觉密集预测任务的增强效果。

authors_text: Niki Maria Foteinopoulou,Ioannis Patras
title: Learning from Label Relationships in Human Affect
title_zh: 从人类情感中的标签关系中学习
comment: Accepted at ACM Multimedia (ACMMM) 2022, 10 pages, 4 figures
comments: Accepted at ACM Multimedia (ACMMM) 2022, 10 pages, 4 figures
abstract: Human affect and mental state estimation in an automated manner, face a number of difficulties, including learning from labels with poor or no temporal resolution, learning from few datasets with little data (often due to confidentiality constraints) and, (very) long, in-the-wild videos. For these reasons, deep learning methodologies tend to overfit, that is, arrive at latent representations with poor generalisation performance on the final regression task. To overcome this, in this work, we introduce two complementary contributions. First, we introduce a novel relational loss for multilabel regression and ordinal problems that regularises learning and leads to better generalisation. The proposed loss uses label vector inter-relational information to learn better latent representations by aligning batch label distances to the distances in the latent feature space. Second, we utilise a two-stage attention architecture that estimates a target for each clip by using features from the neighbouring clips as temporal context. We evaluate the proposed methodology on both continuous affect and schizophrenia severity estimation problems, as there are methodological and contextual parallels between the two. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed methodology outperforms all baselines. In the domain of schizophrenia, the proposed methodology outperforms previous state-of-the-art by a large margin, achieving a PCC of up to 78% performance close to that of human experts (85%) and much higher than previous works (uplift of up to 40%). In the case of affect recognition, we outperform previous vision-based methods in terms of CCC on both the OMG and the AMIGOS datasets. Specifically for AMIGOS, we outperform previous SoTA CCC for both arousal and valence by 9% and 13% respectively, and in the OMG dataset we outperform previous vision works by up to 5% for both arousal and valence.
summary: Human affect and mental state estimation in an automated manner, face a number of difficulties, including learning from labels with poor or no temporal resolution, learning from few datasets with little data (often due to confidentiality constraints) and, (very) long, in-the-wild videos. For these reasons, deep learning methodologies tend to overfit, that is, arrive at latent representations with poor generalisation performance on the final regression task. To overcome this, in this work, we introduce two complementary contributions.
