The proposed loss uses label vector inter-relational information to learn better latent representations by aligning batch label distances to the distances in the latent feature space. Second, we utilise a two-stage attention architecture that estimates a target for each clip by using features from the neighbouring clips as temporal context. We evaluate the proposed methodology on both continuous affect and schizophrenia severity estimation problems, as there are methodological and contextual parallels between the two. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed methodology outperforms all baselines. In the domain of schizophrenia, the proposed methodology outperforms previous state-of-the-art by a large margin, achieving a PCC of up to 78% performance close to that of human experts (85%) and much higher than previous works (uplift of up to 40%). In the case of affect recognition, we outperform previous vision-based methods in terms of CCC on both the OMG and the AMIGOS datasets. Specifically for AMIGOS, we outperform previous SoTA CCC for both arousal and valence by 9% and 13% respectively, and in the OMG dataset we outperform previous vision works by up to 5% for both arousal and valence.
abstract_zh: 以自动化方式估计人类情感和心理状态面临着许多困难，包括从时间分辨率差或没有时间分辨率的标签中学习、从数据很少的数据集中学习（通常由于保密限制）以及（非常）长的野外视频。由于这些原因，深度学习方法往往会过度拟合，即在最终回归任务中得到泛化性能较差的潜在表示。为了克服这个问题，在这项工作中，我们引入了两项互补的贡献。首先，我们为多标签回归和序数问题引入了一种新颖的关系损失，它可以规范学习并带来更好的泛化能力。所提出的损失使用标签向量相互关系信息，通过将批量标签距离与潜在特征空间中的距离对齐来学习更好的潜在表示。其次，我们利用两阶段注意力架构，通过使用相邻剪辑的特征作为时间上下文来估计每个剪辑的目标。我们评估了针对连续情感和精神分裂症严重程度估计问题所提出的方法，因为两者之间存在方法论和背景相似之处。实验结果表明，所提出的方法优于所有基线。在精神分裂症领域，所提出的方法大大优于以前的最先进技术，实现了高达 78% 的 PCC 性能，接近人类专家 (85%)，并且远高于以前的工作（提升高达 40%）。在情感识别方面，我们在 OMG 和 AMIGOS 数据集上的 CCC 方面都优于之前基于视觉的方法。特别是对于 AMIGOS，我们在唤醒度和效价方面分别比之前的 SoTA CCC 提高了 9% 和 13%，并且在 OMG 数据集中，我们在唤醒度和效价方面比之前的视觉工作提高了 5%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过标签关系学习人类情感和精神状态估计的新方法，以解决深度学习在数据不足和长视频处理中的过拟合问题。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法在处理时间分辨率低、数据量少及长视频等挑战时容易过拟合，导致泛化性能不足。
AI.method: 引入关系损失函数利用标签向量间的关系正则化学习，并采用双阶段注意力架构利用相邻片段的时序上下文信息。
AI.result: 在精神分裂症严重程度估计中PCC达78%（接近人类专家水平），在情感识别任务中AMIGOS数据集上唤醒度和效价CCC分别提升9%和13%。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过标签关系建模和时序注意力机制有效提升了模型泛化能力，在多个基准数据集上显著优于现有方法。

search_text: Learning from Label Relationships in Human Affect 从人类情感中的标签关系中学习 Human affect and mental state estimation in an automated manner, face a number of difficulties, including learning from labels with poor or no temporal resolution, learning from few datasets with little data (often due to confidentiality constraints) and, (very) long, in-the-wild videos. For these reasons, deep learning methodologies tend to overfit, that is, arrive at latent representations with poor generalisation performance on the final regression task. To overcome this, in this work, we introduce two complementary contributions. First, we introduce a novel relational loss for multilabel regression and ordinal problems that regularises learning and leads to better generalisation. The proposed loss uses label vector inter-relational information to learn better latent representations by aligning batch label distances to the distances in the latent feature space. Second, we utilise a two-stage attention architecture that estimates a target for each clip by using features from the neighbouring clips as temporal context. We evaluate the proposed methodology on both continuous affect and schizophrenia severity estimation problems, as there are methodological and contextual parallels between the two. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed methodology outperforms all baselines. In the domain of schizophrenia, the proposed methodology outperforms previous state-of-the-art by a large margin, achieving a PCC of up to 78% performance close to that of human experts (85%) and much higher than previous works (uplift of up to 40%). In the case of affect recognition, we outperform previous vision-based methods in terms of CCC on both the OMG and the AMIGOS datasets. Specifically for AMIGOS, we outperform previous SoTA CCC for both arousal and valence by 9% and 13% respectively, and in the OMG dataset we outperform previous vision works by up to 5% for both arousal and valence. 以自动化方式估计人类情感和心理状态面临着许多困难，包括从时间分辨率差或没有时间分辨率的标签中学习、从数据很少的数据集中学习（通常由于保密限制）以及（非常）长的野外视频。由于这些原因，深度学习方法往往会过度拟合，即在最终回归任务中得到泛化性能较差的潜在表示。为了克服这个问题，在这项工作中，我们引入了两项互补的贡献。首先，我们为多标签回归和序数问题引入了一种新颖的关系损失，它可以规范学习并带来更好的泛化能力。所提出的损失使用标签向量相互关系信息，通过将批量标签距离与潜在特征空间中的距离对齐来学习更好的潜在表示。其次，我们利用两阶段注意力架构，通过使用相邻剪辑的特征作为时间上下文来估计每个剪辑的目标。我们评估了针对连续情感和精神分裂症严重程度估计问题所提出的方法，因为两者之间存在方法论和背景相似之处。实验结果表明，所提出的方法优于所有基线。在精神分裂症领域，所提出的方法大大优于以前的最先进技术，实现了高达 78% 的 PCC 性能，接近人类专家 (85%)，并且远高于以前的工作（提升高达 40%）。在情感识别方面，我们在 OMG 和 AMIGOS 数据集上的 CCC 方面都优于之前基于视觉的方法。特别是对于 AMIGOS，我们在唤醒度和效价方面分别比之前的 SoTA CCC 提高了 9% 和 13%，并且在 OMG 数据集中，我们在唤醒度和效价方面比之前的视觉工作提高了 5%。 本文提出了一种通过标签关系学习人类情感和精神状态估计的新方法，以解决深度学习在数据不足和长视频处理中的过拟合问题。 Niki Maria Foteinopoulou,Ioannis Patras cs.CV,cs.HC,cs.MM

authors_text: Isha Hameed,Samuel Sharpe,Daniel Barcklow,Justin Au-Yeung,Sahil Verma,Jocelyn Huang,Brian Barr,C. Bayan Bruss
title: BASED-XAI: Breaking Ablation Studies Down for Explainable Artificial Intelligence
title_zh: BASED-XAI：打破消融研究以实现可解释的人工智能
comment: 6 pages, accepted by the KDD 2022 Workshop on Machine Learning for Finance (KDD MLF 2022)
comments: 6 pages, accepted by the KDD 2022 Workshop on Machine Learning for Finance (KDD MLF 2022)
abstract: Explainable artificial intelligence (XAI) methods lack ground truth. In its place, method developers have relied on axioms to determine desirable properties for their explanations' behavior. For high stakes uses of machine learning that require explainability, it is not sufficient to rely on axioms as the implementation, or its usage, can fail to live up to the ideal. As a result, there exists active research on validating the performance of XAI methods. The need for validation is especially magnified in domains with a reliance on XAI. A procedure frequently used to assess their utility, and to some extent their fidelity, is an ablation study. By perturbing the input variables in rank order of importance, the goal is to assess the sensitivity of the model's performance. Perturbing important variables should correlate with larger decreases in measures of model capability than perturbing less important features. While the intent is clear, the actual implementation details have not been studied rigorously for tabular data. Using five datasets, three XAI methods, four baselines, and three perturbations, we aim to show 1) how varying perturbations and adding simple guardrails can help to avoid potentially flawed conclusions, 2) how treatment of categorical variables is an important consideration in both post-hoc explainability and ablation studies, and 3) how to identify useful baselines for XAI methods and viable perturbations for ablation studies.
summary: Explainable artificial intelligence (XAI) methods lack ground truth. In its place, method developers have relied on axioms to determine desirable properties for their explanations' behavior. For high stakes uses of machine learning that require explainability, it is not sufficient to rely on axioms as the implementation, or its usage, can fail to live up to the ideal. As a result, there exists active research on validating the performance of XAI methods. The need for validation is especially magnified in domains with a reliance on XAI. A procedure frequently used to assess their utility, and to some extent their fidelity, is an ablation study. By perturbing the input variables in rank order of importance, the goal is to assess the sensitivity of the model's performance. Perturbing important variables should correlate with larger decreases in measures of model capability than perturbing less important features. While the intent is clear, the actual implementation details have not been studied rigorously for tabular data. Using five datasets, three XAI methods, four baselines, and three perturbations, we aim to show 1) how varying perturbations and adding simple guardrails can help to avoid potentially flawed conclusions, 2) how treatment of categorical variables is an important consideration in both post-hoc explainability and ablation studies, and 3) how to identify useful baselines for XAI methods and viable perturbations for ablation studies.
abstract_zh: 可解释的人工智能（XAI）方法缺乏基本事实。取而代之的是，方法开发人员依赖公理来确定其解释行为的所需属性。对于需要可解释性的机器学习的高风险用途，仅仅依靠公理是不够的，因为其实现或其使用可能无法达到理想的效果。因此，验证 XAI 方法性能的研究非常活跃。在依赖 XAI 的领域中，验证的需求尤其明显。经常用于评估其效用以及某种程度上其保真度的程序是消融研究。通过按重要性排序扰动输入变量，目标是评估模型性能的敏感性。与扰动不太重要的特征相比，扰动重要变量应该与模型能力度量的更大下降相关。虽然意图很明确，但尚未对表格数据的实际实现细节进行严格研究。使用五个数据集、三个 XAI 方法、四个基线和三个扰动，我们的目标是展示 1）不同的扰动和添加简单的护栏如何有助于避免潜在的有缺陷的结论，2）分类变量的处理如何成为事后可解释性和消融研究中的重要考虑因素，以及 3）如何确定 XAI 方法的有用基线和消融研究的可行扰动。

AI.tldr: 本文通过分析消融研究的实施细节，旨在提升可解释人工智能（XAI）方法的验证效果，特别是在处理分类变量和选择基线及扰动方面。
AI.motivation: 现有XAI方法缺乏真实标准，依赖公理验证可能不足以保证高风险场景下的可靠性，需通过更严谨的消融研究改进验证流程。
AI.method: 使用五个数据集、三种XAI方法、四个基线及三种扰动策略，分析不同扰动方式对模型性能的影响，并探讨分类变量处理对结果的干扰。
AI.result: 发现扰动策略和分类变量处理方式显著影响结论可靠性，提出简单防护措施可避免误判，并识别出有效基线和扰动组合。
AI.conclusion: 优化消融研究实施细节、重视分类变量处理及合理选择基线与扰动，可有效提升XAI方法的验证准确性与实际应用可靠性。

authors_text: Hongjian Fang,Yi Zeng,Jianbo Tang,Yuwei Wang,Yao Liang,Xin Liu
title: Brain-inspired Graph Spiking Neural Networks for Commonsense Knowledge Representation and Reasoning
title_zh: 用于常识知识表示和推理的类脑图尖峰神经网络
abstract: How neural networks in the human brain represent commonsense knowledge, and complete related reasoning tasks is an important research topic in neuroscience, cognitive science, psychology, and artificial intelligence. Although the traditional artificial neural network using fixed-length vectors to represent symbols has gained good performance in some specific tasks, it is still a black box that lacks interpretability, far from how humans perceive the world. Inspired by the grandmother-cell hypothesis in neuroscience, this work investigates how population encoding and spiking timing-dependent plasticity (STDP) mechanisms can be integrated into the learning of spiking neural networks, and how a population of neurons can represent a symbol via guiding the completion of sequential firing between different neuron populations. The neuron populations of different communities together constitute the entire commonsense knowledge graph, forming a giant graph spiking neural network. Moreover, we introduced the Reward-modulated spiking timing-dependent plasticity (R-STDP) mechanism to simulate the biological reinforcement learning process and completed the related reasoning tasks accordingly, achieving comparable accuracy and faster convergence speed than the graph convolutional artificial neural networks. For the fields of neuroscience and cognitive science, the work in this paper provided the foundation of computational modeling for further exploration of the way the human brain represents commonsense knowledge. For the field of artificial intelligence, this paper indicated the exploration direction for realizing a more robust and interpretable neural network by constructing a commonsense knowledge representation and reasoning spiking neural networks with solid biological plausibility.

The neuron populations of different communities together constitute the entire commonsense knowledge graph, forming a giant graph spiking neural network. Moreover, we introduced the Reward-modulated spiking timing-dependent plasticity (R-STDP) mechanism to simulate the biological reinforcement learning process and completed the related reasoning tasks accordingly, achieving comparable accuracy and faster convergence speed than the graph convolutional artificial neural networks. For the fields of neuroscience and cognitive science, the work in this paper provided the foundation of computational modeling for further exploration of the way the human brain represents commonsense knowledge. For the field of artificial intelligence, this paper indicated the exploration direction for realizing a more robust and interpretable neural network by constructing a commonsense knowledge representation and reasoning spiking neural networks with solid biological plausibility.
abstract_zh: 人脑中的神经网络如何表征常识知识，并完成相关推理任务，是神经科学、认知科学、心理学和人工智能领域的重要研究课题。尽管使用固定长度向量表示符号的传统人工神经网络在一些特定任务中获得了良好的性能，但它仍然是一个缺乏可解释性的黑匣子，与人类感知世界的方式相去甚远。受神经科学中祖母细胞假说的启发，这项工作研究了如何将群体编码和脉冲时间依赖性可塑性（STDP）机制整合到脉冲神经网络的学习中，以及神经元群体如何通过指导完成不同神经元群体之间的顺序放电来表示符号。不同群体的神经元群体共同构成了整个常识知识图谱，形成了一个巨大的图尖峰神经网络。此外，我们引入了奖励调制尖峰时序相关可塑性（R-STDP）机制来模拟生物强化学习过程并相应完成相关推理任务，实现了与图卷积人工神经网络相当的精度和更快的收敛速度。对于神经科学和认知科学领域，本文的工作为进一步探索人脑表示常识知识的方式提供了计算建模的基础。对于人工智能领域，本文通过构建具有扎实的生物学合理性的常识知识表示和推理尖峰神经网络，指明了实现更鲁棒和可解释的神经网络的探索方向。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种受大脑启发的图脉冲神经网络，用于常识知识表示与推理。
AI.motivation: 传统神经网络在表示常识知识时缺乏可解释性，难以模拟人类感知方式，需探索更具生物合理性的模型。
AI.method: 结合群体编码与脉冲时序依赖可塑性（STDP）机制，引入奖励调节的STDP（R-STDP）模拟生物强化学习，构建多群体神经元组成的图脉冲神经网络。
AI.result: 在常识推理任务中达到与图卷积神经网络相当的准确率，且收敛速度更快。
AI.conclusion: 为神经科学提供计算模型基础，为人工智能领域指明构建更具鲁棒性和可解释性的生物合理神经网络的方向。

search_text: Brain-inspired Graph Spiking Neural Networks for Commonsense Knowledge Representation and Reasoning 用于常识知识表示和推理的类脑图尖峰神经网络 How neural networks in the human brain represent commonsense knowledge, and complete related reasoning tasks is an important research topic in neuroscience, cognitive science, psychology, and artificial intelligence. Although the traditional artificial neural network using fixed-length vectors to represent symbols has gained good performance in some specific tasks, it is still a black box that lacks interpretability, far from how humans perceive the world. Inspired by the grandmother-cell hypothesis in neuroscience, this work investigates how population encoding and spiking timing-dependent plasticity (STDP) mechanisms can be integrated into the learning of spiking neural networks, and how a population of neurons can represent a symbol via guiding the completion of sequential firing between different neuron populations. The neuron populations of different communities together constitute the entire commonsense knowledge graph, forming a giant graph spiking neural network. Moreover, we introduced the Reward-modulated spiking timing-dependent plasticity (R-STDP) mechanism to simulate the biological reinforcement learning process and completed the related reasoning tasks accordingly, achieving comparable accuracy and faster convergence speed than the graph convolutional artificial neural networks. For the fields of neuroscience and cognitive science, the work in this paper provided the foundation of computational modeling for further exploration of the way the human brain represents commonsense knowledge. For the field of artificial intelligence, this paper indicated the exploration direction for realizing a more robust and interpretable neural network by constructing a commonsense knowledge representation and reasoning spiking neural networks with solid biological plausibility. 人脑中的神经网络如何表征常识知识，并完成相关推理任务，是神经科学、认知科学、心理学和人工智能领域的重要研究课题。尽管使用固定长度向量表示符号的传统人工神经网络在一些特定任务中获得了良好的性能，但它仍然是一个缺乏可解释性的黑匣子，与人类感知世界的方式相去甚远。受神经科学中祖母细胞假说的启发，这项工作研究了如何将群体编码和脉冲时间依赖性可塑性（STDP）机制整合到脉冲神经网络的学习中，以及神经元群体如何通过指导完成不同神经元群体之间的顺序放电来表示符号。不同群体的神经元群体共同构成了整个常识知识图谱，形成了一个巨大的图尖峰神经网络。此外，我们引入了奖励调制尖峰时序相关可塑性（R-STDP）机制来模拟生物强化学习过程并相应完成相关推理任务，实现了与图卷积人工神经网络相当的精度和更快的收敛速度。对于神经科学和认知科学领域，本文的工作为进一步探索人脑表示常识知识的方式提供了计算建模的基础。对于人工智能领域，本文通过构建具有扎实的生物学合理性的常识知识表示和推理尖峰神经网络，指明了实现更鲁棒和可解释的神经网络的探索方向。 本文提出了一种受大脑启发的图脉冲神经网络，用于常识知识表示与推理。 Hongjian Fang,Yi Zeng,Jianbo Tang,Yuwei Wang,Yao Liang,Xin Liu cs.NE,cs.AI,cs.LG,q-bio.NC

authors_text: Tao Huang,Lang Huang,Shan You,Fei Wang,Chen Qian,Chang Xu
title: LightViT: Towards Light-Weight Convolution-Free Vision Transformers
title_zh: LightViT：迈向轻量级无卷积视觉变压器
abstract: Vision transformers (ViTs) are usually considered to be less light-weight than convolutional neural networks (CNNs) due to the lack of inductive bias. Recent works thus resort to convolutions as a plug-and-play module and embed them in various ViT counterparts. In this paper, we argue that the convolutional kernels perform information aggregation to connect all tokens; however, they would be actually unnecessary for light-weight ViTs if this explicit aggregation could function in a more homogeneous way. Inspired by this, we present LightViT as a new family of light-weight ViTs to achieve better accuracy-efficiency balance upon the pure transformer blocks without convolution. Concretely, we introduce a global yet efficient aggregation scheme into both self-attention and feed-forward network (FFN) of ViTs, where additional learnable tokens are introduced to capture global dependencies; and bi-dimensional channel and spatial attentions are imposed over token embeddings. Experiments show that our model achieves significant improvements on image classification, object detection, and semantic segmentation tasks. For example, our LightViT-T achieves 78.7% accuracy on ImageNet with only 0.7G FLOPs, outperforming PVTv2-B0 by 8.2% while 11% faster on GPU. Code is available at https://github.com/hunto/LightViT.
summary: Vision transformers (ViTs) are usually considered to be less light-weight than convolutional neural networks (CNNs) due to the lack of inductive bias. Recent works thus resort to convolutions as a plug-and-play module and embed them in various ViT counterparts. In this paper, we argue that the convolutional kernels perform information aggregation to connect all tokens; however, they would be actually unnecessary for light-weight ViTs if this explicit aggregation could function in a more homogeneous way. Inspired by this, we present LightViT as a new family of light-weight ViTs to achieve better accuracy-efficiency balance upon the pure transformer blocks without convolution. Concretely, we introduce a global yet efficient aggregation scheme into both self-attention and feed-forward network (FFN) of ViTs, where additional learnable tokens are introduced to capture global dependencies; and bi-dimensional channel and spatial attentions are imposed over token embeddings. Experiments show that our model achieves significant improvements on image classification, object detection, and semantic segmentation tasks. For example, our LightViT-T achieves 78.7% accuracy on ImageNet with only 0.7G FLOPs, outperforming PVTv2-B0 by 8.2% while 11% faster on GPU. Code is available at https://github.com/hunto/LightViT.
abstract_zh: 由于缺乏归纳偏差，视觉变换器 (ViT) 通常被认为不如卷积神经网络 (CNN) 轻量。因此，最近的工作将卷积作为即插即用模块，并将它们嵌入到各种 ViT 对应模块中。在本文中，我们认为卷积核执行信息聚合来连接所有标记；然而，如果这种显式聚合能够以更同质的方式发挥作用，那么对于轻量级 ViT 来说，它们实际上是不必要的。受此启发，我们将 LightViT 作为一个新的轻量级 ViT 系列推出，以在没有卷积的纯变压器块上实现更好的精度-效率平衡。具体来说，我们在 ViT 的自注意力网络和前馈网络（FFN）中引入了一种全局且高效的聚合方案，其中引入了额外的可学习标记来捕获全局依赖性；对令牌嵌入施加二维通道和空间注意力。实验表明，我们的模型在图像分类、对象检测和语义分割任务上取得了显着的改进。例如，我们的 LightViT-T 在 ImageNet 上实现了 78.7% 的准确率，仅 0.7G FLOPs，比 PVTv2-B0 快 8.2%，而在 GPU 上快 11%。代码可在 https://github.com/hunto/LightViT 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出LightViT，一种无需卷积的轻量级视觉Transformer，旨在实现更高的精度与效率平衡。
AI.motivation: 传统视觉Transformer（ViT）因缺乏归纳偏置而被认为不如CNN轻量，现有工作通过引入卷积模块改进效率，但作者认为若能通过更均匀的信息聚合方式，可无需卷积实现轻量化。
AI.method: 在ViT的自注意力和FFN模块中引入全局高效聚合方案，通过添加可学习token捕捉全局依赖，并施加二维通道与空间注意力机制。
AI.result: LightViT-T在ImageNet上达到78.7%准确率（0.7G FLOPs），相比PVTv2-B0精度高8.2%且GPU推理快11%；在目标检测与语义分割任务中也表现优异。
AI.conclusion: LightViT通过优化Transformer内部的信息聚合机制，无需卷积即可实现更优的精度-效率平衡，为轻量级视觉模型设计提供新思路。

authors_text: Julia Koch,Florian Lux,Nadja Schauffler,Toni Bernhart,Felix Dieterle,Jonas Kuhn,Sandra Richter,Gabriel Viehhauser,Ngoc Thang Vu
title: PoeticTTS -- Controllable Poetry Reading for Literary Studies
title_zh: PoeticTTS——文学研究的可控诗歌阅读
abstract: Speech synthesis for poetry is challenging due to specific intonation patterns inherent to poetic speech. In this work, we propose an approach to synthesise poems with almost human like naturalness in order to enable literary scholars to systematically examine hypotheses on the interplay between text, spoken realisation, and the listener's perception of poems. To meet these special requirements for literary studies, we resynthesise poems by cloning prosodic values from a human reference recitation, and afterwards make use of fine-grained prosody control to manipulate the synthetic speech in a human-in-the-loop setting to alter the recitation w.r.t. specific phenomena. We find that finetuning our TTS model on poetry captures poetic intonation patterns to a large extent which is beneficial for prosody cloning and manipulation and verify the success of our approach both in an objective evaluation as well as in human studies.
summary: Speech synthesis for poetry is challenging due to specific intonation patterns inherent to poetic speech. In this work, we propose an approach to synthesise poems with almost human like naturalness in order to enable literary scholars to systematically examine hypotheses on the interplay between text, spoken realisation, and the listener's perception of poems. To meet these special requirements for literary studies, we resynthesise poems by cloning prosodic values from a human reference recitation, and afterwards make use of fine-grained prosody control to manipulate the synthetic speech in a human-in-the-loop setting to alter the recitation w.r.t. specific phenomena. We find that finetuning our TTS model on poetry captures poetic intonation patterns to a large extent which is beneficial for prosody cloning and manipulation and verify the success of our approach both in an objective evaluation as well as in human studies.
abstract_zh: 由于诗歌语音固有的特定语调模式，诗歌的语音合成具有挑战性。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种以近乎人类般的自然性来合成诗歌的方法，以使文学学者能够系统地研究关于文本、口头实现和听众对诗歌的感知之间相互作用的假设。为了满足文学研究的这些特殊要求，我们通过从人类参考朗诵中克隆韵律值来重新合成诗歌，然后利用细粒度的韵律控制在人机循环环境中操纵合成语音，以改变朗诵。具体现象。我们发现，对诗歌 TTS 模型进行微调可以在很大程度上捕获诗歌语调模式，这有利于韵律克隆和操作，并验证了我们的方法在客观评估和人类研究中的成功。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PoeticTTS系统，通过可控的诗歌朗读技术辅助文学研究，实现对诗歌文本、语音表现与听众感知关系的系统性分析。
AI.motivation: 诗歌语音合成需特定语调模式，而现有技术难以满足文学研究对系统性验证和可控性调整的需求。
AI.method: 克隆人类参考朗诵的韵律特征，并通过细粒度韵律控制在人机交互中调整语音，结合诗歌微调的TTS模型实现语调模式捕捉。
AI.result: 客观评估与人类实验均验证了系统在诗歌语音合成的自然度及可控性调整的有效性。

search_text: PoeticTTS -- Controllable Poetry Reading for Literary Studies PoeticTTS——文学研究的可控诗歌阅读 Speech synthesis for poetry is challenging due to specific intonation patterns inherent to poetic speech. In this work, we propose an approach to synthesise poems with almost human like naturalness in order to enable literary scholars to systematically examine hypotheses on the interplay between text, spoken realisation, and the listener's perception of poems. To meet these special requirements for literary studies, we resynthesise poems by cloning prosodic values from a human reference recitation, and afterwards make use of fine-grained prosody control to manipulate the synthetic speech in a human-in-the-loop setting to alter the recitation w.r.t. specific phenomena. We find that finetuning our TTS model on poetry captures poetic intonation patterns to a large extent which is beneficial for prosody cloning and manipulation and verify the success of our approach both in an objective evaluation as well as in human studies. 由于诗歌语音固有的特定语调模式，诗歌的语音合成具有挑战性。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种以近乎人类般的自然性来合成诗歌的方法，以使文学学者能够系统地研究关于文本、口头实现和听众对诗歌的感知之间相互作用的假设。为了满足文学研究的这些特殊要求，我们通过从人类参考朗诵中克隆韵律值来重新合成诗歌，然后利用细粒度的韵律控制在人机循环环境中操纵合成语音，以改变朗诵。具体现象。我们发现，对诗歌 TTS 模型进行微调可以在很大程度上捕获诗歌语调模式，这有利于韵律克隆和操作，并验证了我们的方法在客观评估和人类研究中的成功。 本文提出PoeticTTS系统，通过可控的诗歌朗读技术辅助文学研究，实现对诗歌文本、语音表现与听众感知关系的系统性分析。 Julia Koch,Florian Lux,Nadja Schauffler,Toni Bernhart,Felix Dieterle,Jonas Kuhn,Sandra Richter,Gabriel Viehhauser,Ngoc Thang Vu eess.AS,cs.CL,cs.LG,cs.SD

authors_text: Harun Teper,Anggera Bayuwindra,Raphael Riebl,Ricardo Severino,Jian-Jia Chen,Kuan-Hsun Chen
title: AuNa: Modularly Integrated Simulation Framework for Cooperative Autonomous Navigation
title_zh: AuNa：协作自主导航的模块化集成仿真框架
abstract: In the near future, the development of autonomous driving will get more complex as the vehicles will not only rely on their own sensors but also communicate with other vehicles and the infrastructure to cooperate and improve the driving experience. Towards this, several research areas, such as robotics, communication, and control, are required to collaborate in order to implement future-ready methods. However, each area focuses on the development of its own components first, while the effects the components may have on the whole system are only considered at a later stage. In this work, we integrate the simulation tools of robotics, communication and control namely ROS2, OMNeT++, and MATLAB to evaluate cooperative driving scenarios. The framework can be utilized to develop the individual components using the designated tools, while the final evaluation can be conducted in a complete scenario, enabling the simulation of advanced multi-robot applications for cooperative driving. Furthermore, it can be used to integrate additional tools, as the integration is done in a modular way. We showcase the framework by demonstrating a platooning scenario under cooperative adaptive cruise control (CACC) and the ETSI ITS-G5 communication architecture. Additionally, we compare the differences of the controller performance between the theoretical analysis and practical case study.
summary: In the near future, the development of autonomous driving will get more complex as the vehicles will not only rely on their own sensors but also communicate with other vehicles and the infrastructure to cooperate and improve the driving experience. Towards this, several research areas, such as robotics, communication, and control, are required to collaborate in order to implement future-ready methods. However, each area focuses on the development of its own components first, while the effects the components may have on the whole system are only considered at a later stage. In this work, we integrate the simulation tools of robotics, communication and control namely ROS2, OMNeT++, and MATLAB to evaluate cooperative driving scenarios. The framework can be utilized to develop the individual components using the designated tools, while the final evaluation can be conducted in a complete scenario, enabling the simulation of advanced multi-robot applications for cooperative driving. Furthermore, it can be used to integrate additional tools, as the integration is done in a modular way. We showcase the framework by demonstrating a platooning scenario under cooperative adaptive cruise control (CACC) and the ETSI ITS-G5 communication architecture. Additionally, we compare the differences of the controller performance between the theoretical analysis and practical case study.
abstract_zh: 在不久的将来，自动驾驶的发展将变得更加复杂，因为车辆不仅依赖自身的传感器，还要与其他车辆和基础设施进行通信，以协作并改善驾驶体验。为此，需要机器人、通信和控制等多个研究领域进行合作，以实施面向未来的方法。然而，每个领域首先关注的是自己的组件的开发，而组件对整个系统可能产生的影响是在后期才考虑的。在这项工作中，我们集成了机器人、通信和控制的仿真工具，即 ROS2、OMNeT++ 和 MATLAB，来评估协作驾驶场景。该框架可用于使用指定工具开发各个组件，而最终评估可以在完整的场景中进行，从而能够模拟用于协作驾驶的先进多机器人应用。此外，它还可用于集成其他工具，因为集成是以模块化方式完成的。我们通过演示协作自适应巡航控制 (CACC) 和 ETSI ITS-G5 通信架构下的队列场景来展示该框架。此外，我们还比较了理论分析和实际案例研究之间控制器性能的差异。

AI.tldr: 本文提出AuNa框架，通过整合ROS2、OMNeT++和MATLAB等工具，构建模块化仿真环境以评估协作自动驾驶场景。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶发展需多领域协同，但现有研究常孤立开发组件，缺乏系统级整合，导致整体效果评估滞后。
AI.method: 集成机器人、通信与控制领域的仿真工具，采用模块化设计支持组件独立开发与全场景联合仿真，并验证ETSI ITS-G5通信架构下的协同自适应巡航控制场景。
AI.result: 成功演示了车队协同场景，对比了理论分析与实际案例中的控制器性能差异，验证了框架的有效性与扩展性。
AI.conclusion: AuNa框架为跨学科协作提供了可扩展的仿真平台，有助于加速自动驾驶系统的研发与验证，同时揭示了理论与实践间的性能差距。

authors_text: Harrison Zhu,Carles Balsells Rodas,Yingzhen Li
title: Markovian Gaussian Process Variational Autoencoders
title_zh: 马尔可夫高斯过程变分自动编码器
comment: Conference paper published at ICML 2023 https://openreview.net/pdf?id=Z8QlQ207V6
comments: Conference paper published at ICML 2023 https://openreview.net/pdf?id=Z8QlQ207V6
abstract: Sequential VAEs have been successfully considered for many high-dimensional time series modelling problems, with many variant models relying on discrete-time mechanisms such as recurrent neural networks (RNNs). On the other hand, continuous-time methods have recently gained attraction, especially in the context of irregularly-sampled time series, where they can better handle the data than discrete-time methods. One such class are Gaussian process variational autoencoders (GPVAEs), where the VAE prior is set as a Gaussian process (GP). However, a major limitation of GPVAEs is that it inherits the cubic computational cost as GPs, making it unattractive to practioners. In this work, we leverage the equivalent discrete state space representation of Markovian GPs to enable linear time GPVAE training via Kalman filtering and smoothing. For our model, Markovian GPVAE (MGPVAE), we show on a variety of high-dimensional temporal and spatiotemporal tasks that our method performs favourably compared to existing approaches whilst being computationally highly scalable.
summary: Sequential VAEs have been successfully considered for many high-dimensional time series modelling problems, with many variant models relying on discrete-time mechanisms such as recurrent neural networks (RNNs). On the other hand, continuous-time methods have recently gained attraction, especially in the context of irregularly-sampled time series, where they can better handle the data than discrete-time methods. One such class are Gaussian process variational autoencoders (GPVAEs), where the VAE prior is set as a Gaussian process (GP). However, a major limitation of GPVAEs is that it inherits the cubic computational cost as GPs, making it unattractive to practioners. In this work, we leverage the equivalent discrete state space representation of Markovian GPs to enable linear time GPVAE training via Kalman filtering and smoothing. For our model, Markovian GPVAE (MGPVAE), we show on a variety of high-dimensional temporal and spatiotemporal tasks that our method performs favourably compared to existing approaches whilst being computationally highly scalable.
abstract_zh: 序列 VAE 已成功地应用于许多高维时间序列建模问题，其中许多变体模型依赖于离散时间机制，例如循环神经网络 (RNN)。另一方面，连续时间方法最近受到了关注，特别是在不规则采样时间序列的背景下，它们比离散时间方法可以更好地处理数据。其中一类是高斯过程变分自动编码器（GPVAE），其中 VAE 先验被设置为高斯过程（GP）。然而，GPVAE 的一个主要限制是它继承了 GP 的三次计算成本，这使得它对实践者没有吸引力。在这项工作中，我们利用马尔可夫 GP 的等效离散状态空间表示，通过卡尔曼滤波和平滑实现线性时间 GPVAE 训练。对于我们的模型马尔可夫 GPVAE (MGPVAE)，我们在各种高维时间和时空任务上展示了我们的方法与现有方法相比表现良好，同时在计算上具有高度可扩展性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Markovian GPVAE（MGPVAE）的模型，通过马尔可夫高斯过程的离散状态空间表示和卡尔曼滤波技术，解决传统GPVAE计算复杂度高的问题，实现高效训练。
AI.motivation: 传统GPVAE在处理高维时间序列时计算复杂度为立方级，限制了其应用；而连续时间方法在处理不规则采样数据时更有效，需解决计算效率问题。
AI.method: 利用马尔可夫高斯过程的等效离散状态空间表示，结合卡尔曼滤波与平滑技术，将GPVAE训练复杂度降至线性级别，构建MGPVAE模型。
AI.result: 在多种高维时序和时空任务中，MGPVAE相比现有方法表现更优，且计算可扩展性显著提升。
AI.conclusion: MGPVAE通过降低计算复杂度，在保持模型性能的同时，为大规模不规则时间序列分析提供了高效解决方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Markovian GPVAE（MGPVAE）的模型，通过马尔可夫高斯过程的离散状态空间表示和卡尔曼滤波技术，解决传统GPVAE计算复杂度高的问题，实现高效训练。

motivation: 传统GPVAE在处理高维时间序列时计算复杂度为立方级，限制了其应用；而连续时间方法在处理不规则采样数据时更有效，需解决计算效率问题。
method: 利用马尔可夫高斯过程的等效离散状态空间表示，结合卡尔曼滤波与平滑技术，将GPVAE训练复杂度降至线性级别，构建MGPVAE模型。
result: 在多种高维时序和时空任务中，MGPVAE相比现有方法表现更优，且计算可扩展性显著提升。
conclusion: MGPVAE通过降低计算复杂度，在保持模型性能的同时，为大规模不规则时间序列分析提供了高效解决方案。
search_text: Markovian Gaussian Process Variational Autoencoders 马尔可夫高斯过程变分自动编码器 Sequential VAEs have been successfully considered for many high-dimensional time series modelling problems, with many variant models relying on discrete-time mechanisms such as recurrent neural networks (RNNs). On the other hand, continuous-time methods have recently gained attraction, especially in the context of irregularly-sampled time series, where they can better handle the data than discrete-time methods. One such class are Gaussian process variational autoencoders (GPVAEs), where the VAE prior is set as a Gaussian process (GP). However, a major limitation of GPVAEs is that it inherits the cubic computational cost as GPs, making it unattractive to practioners. In this work, we leverage the equivalent discrete state space representation of Markovian GPs to enable linear time GPVAE training via Kalman filtering and smoothing. For our model, Markovian GPVAE (MGPVAE), we show on a variety of high-dimensional temporal and spatiotemporal tasks that our method performs favourably compared to existing approaches whilst being computationally highly scalable. 序列 VAE 已成功地应用于许多高维时间序列建模问题，其中许多变体模型依赖于离散时间机制，例如循环神经网络 (RNN)。另一方面，连续时间方法最近受到了关注，特别是在不规则采样时间序列的背景下，它们比离散时间方法可以更好地处理数据。其中一类是高斯过程变分自动编码器（GPVAE），其中 VAE 先验被设置为高斯过程（GP）。然而，GPVAE 的一个主要限制是它继承了 GP 的三次计算成本，这使得它对实践者没有吸引力。在这项工作中，我们利用马尔可夫 GP 的等效离散状态空间表示，通过卡尔曼滤波和平滑实现线性时间 GPVAE 训练。对于我们的模型马尔可夫 GPVAE (MGPVAE)，我们在各种高维时间和时空任务上展示了我们的方法与现有方法相比表现良好，同时在计算上具有高度可扩展性。 本文提出一种名为Markovian GPVAE（MGPVAE）的模型，通过马尔可夫高斯过程的离散状态空间表示和卡尔曼滤波技术，解决传统GPVAE计算复杂度高的问题，实现高效训练。 Harrison Zhu,Carles Balsells Rodas,Yingzhen Li cs.LG,cs.CV,stat.ML

authors_text: Jörg Encke,Mathias Dietz
title: Statistics of the interaural parameters for dichotic tones in diotic noise ($N_0 S_ψ$)
title_zh: 双耳噪音中双耳音的耳间参数统计 ($N_0 S_ψ$)
abstract: Stimuli consisting of an interaurally phase-shifted tone in diotic noise -- often referred to as $N_0 S_ψ$ -- are commonly used in the field of binaural hearing. As a consequence of mixing diotic noise with a dichotic tone, this type of stimulus contains random fluctuations in both interaural phase- and level-difference. This study reports the joint probability density functions of the two interaural differences as a function of amplitude and interaural phase of the tone. Furthermore, a second joint probability density function for interaural phase differences and the instantaneous power of the stimulus is derived.
summary: Stimuli consisting of an interaurally phase-shifted tone in diotic noise -- often referred to as $N_0 S_ψ$ -- are commonly used in the field of binaural hearing. As a consequence of mixing diotic noise with a dichotic tone, this type of stimulus contains random fluctuations in both interaural phase- and level-difference. This study reports the joint probability density functions of the two interaural differences as a function of amplitude and interaural phase of the tone. Furthermore, a second joint probability density function for interaural phase differences and the instantaneous power of the stimulus is derived.
abstract_zh: 由双耳噪声中的耳间相移音调组成的刺激（通常称为 $N_0 S_ψ$）通常用于双耳听力领域。由于将双耳噪音与双耳音混合，这种类型的刺激包含耳间相位差和声级差的随机波动。这项研究报告了两个耳间差异的联合概率密度函数作为音调的幅度和耳间相位的函数。此外，导出了耳间相位差和刺激的瞬时功率的第二联合概率密度函数。

AI.tldr: 本研究分析了双耳噪声中双耳相位差和强度差的联合概率密度函数，以及双耳相位差与刺激瞬时功率的联合概率密度函数。
AI.motivation: N₀Sψ刺激在双耳听觉研究中广泛应用，但其包含的随机相位和强度波动特性尚未被系统量化，需建立统计模型以支持相关研究。
AI.method: 通过数学推导和信号处理方法，分析双耳相位差与强度差的统计关系，并建立联合概率密度函数模型。
AI.result: 推导出两个联合概率密度函数：1) 双耳相位差与强度差的联合分布；2) 双耳相位差与刺激瞬时功率的联合分布。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为双耳听觉中的信号统计特性提供了理论基础，有助于更精确地建模和分析双耳感知机制。

authors_text: Nathan Baum,Mark A. Minor
title: Identification and Control of a Soft-Robotic Bladder Towards Impedance-Style Haptic Terrain Display
title_zh: 软机器人膀胱的阻抗式触觉地形显示的识别和控制
abstract: This paper evaluates the capabilities of a soft robotic pneumatic actuator derived from the terrain display haptic device, "The Smart Shoe." The bladder design of the Smart Shoe is upgraded to include a pressure supply and greater output flow capabilities. A bench top setup is created to rigorously test this new type of actuator. The bandwidth and stiffness capability of this new actuator are evaluated relative to forces and displacements encountered during human gait. Four force vs. displacement profiles relevant to haptic terrain display are proposed and tested using sliding-mode tracking control. It was found that the actuator could sustain a stiffness similar to a soft-soled shoe on concrete, as well as other terrain (sand, dirt, etc.), while the bandwidth of 7.3 Hz fell short of the goal bandwidth of 10 Hz. Compressions of the bladder done at 20 mm/s, which is similar to the speed of human gait, showed promising results in tracking a desired force trajectory. The results in this paper show this actuator is capable of displaying haptic terrain trajectories, providing a basis for futurep wearable haptic terrain display devices.
summary: This paper evaluates the capabilities of a soft robotic pneumatic actuator derived from the terrain display haptic device, "The Smart Shoe." The bladder design of the Smart Shoe is upgraded to include a pressure supply and greater output flow capabilities. A bench top setup is created to rigorously test this new type of actuator. The bandwidth and stiffness capability of this new actuator are evaluated relative to forces and displacements encountered during human gait. Four force vs. displacement profiles relevant to haptic terrain display are proposed and tested using sliding-mode tracking control. It was found that the actuator could sustain a stiffness similar to a soft-soled shoe on concrete, as well as other terrain (sand, dirt, etc.), while the bandwidth of 7.3 Hz fell short of the goal bandwidth of 10 Hz. Compressions of the bladder done at 20 mm/s, which is similar to the speed of human gait, showed promising results in tracking a desired force trajectory. The results in this paper show this actuator is capable of displaying haptic terrain trajectories, providing a basis for futurep wearable haptic terrain display devices.
abstract_zh: 本文评估了源自地形显示触觉设备“智能鞋”的软机器人气动执行器的功能。智能鞋的气囊设计经过升级，包括压力供应和更大的输出流量能力。创建了一个台式装置来严格测试这种新型执行器。这种新型执行器的带宽和刚度能力是根据人类步态期间遇到的力和位移进行评估的。提出了与触觉地形显示相关的四种力与位移曲线，并使用滑模跟踪控制进行了测试。结果发现，执行器可以在混凝土以及其他地形（沙子、泥土等）上维持类似于软底鞋的刚度，而 7.3 Hz 的带宽低于 10 Hz 的目标带宽。以 20 毫米/秒的速度（类似于人类步态的速度）进行膀胱压缩，在跟踪所需的力轨迹方面显示出有希望的结果。本文的结果表明该执行器能够显示触觉地形轨迹，为未来的可穿戴触觉地形显示设备提供了基础。

AI.tldr: 本文评估了一种升级版软体机器人气动执行器在触觉地形显示中的性能，并通过实验验证其控制能力。
AI.motivation: 为提升触觉反馈设备的地形模拟真实性，需开发能适应人类步态力与位移特性的柔性执行器。
AI.method: 升级Smart Shoe的气囊设计以增强供压与流量能力，搭建实验平台测试带宽与刚度，并采用滑模控制算法跟踪四种力-位移曲线。
AI.result: 执行器可实现类似软底鞋在混凝土等地形的刚度表现，但带宽仅达7.3 Hz（未达10 Hz目标）；以20 mm/s速度压缩时力轨迹跟踪效果良好。
AI.conclusion: 该执行器具备触觉地形显示潜力，为未来可穿戴设备提供基础，但需进一步提升动态响应带宽。

authors_text: Gang Li,Xiang Li,Yujie Wang,Yichao Wu,Ding Liang,Shanshan Zhang
title: DTG-SSOD: Dense Teacher Guidance for Semi-Supervised Object Detection
title_zh: DTG-SSOD：半监督目标检测的密集教师指导
abstract: The Mean-Teacher (MT) scheme is widely adopted in semi-supervised object detection (SSOD). In MT, the sparse pseudo labels, offered by the final predictions of the teacher (e.g., after Non Maximum Suppression (NMS) post-processing), are adopted for the dense supervision for the student via hand-crafted label assignment. However, the sparse-to-dense paradigm complicates the pipeline of SSOD, and simultaneously neglects the powerful direct, dense teacher supervision. In this paper, we attempt to directly leverage the dense guidance of teacher to supervise student training, i.e., the dense-to-dense paradigm. Specifically, we propose the Inverse NMS Clustering (INC) and Rank Matching (RM) to instantiate the dense supervision, without the widely used, conventional sparse pseudo labels. INC leads the student to group candidate boxes into clusters in NMS as the teacher does, which is implemented by learning grouping information revealed in NMS procedure of the teacher. After obtaining the same grouping scheme as the teacher via INC, the student further imitates the rank distribution of the teacher over clustered candidates through Rank Matching. With the proposed INC and RM, we integrate Dense Teacher Guidance into Semi-Supervised Object Detection (termed DTG-SSOD), successfully abandoning sparse pseudo labels and enabling more informative learning on unlabeled data. On COCO benchmark, our DTG-SSOD achieves state-of-the-art performance under various labelling ratios. For example, under 10% labelling ratio, DTG-SSOD improves the supervised baseline from 26.9 to 35.9 mAP, outperforming the previous best method Soft Teacher by 1.9 points.
summary: The Mean-Teacher (MT) scheme is widely adopted in semi-supervised object detection (SSOD). In MT, the sparse pseudo labels, offered by the final predictions of the teacher (e.g., after Non Maximum Suppression (NMS) post-processing), are adopted for the dense supervision for the student via hand-crafted label assignment. However, the sparse-to-dense paradigm complicates the pipeline of SSOD, and simultaneously neglects the powerful direct, dense teacher supervision. In this paper, we attempt to directly leverage the dense guidance of teacher to supervise student training, i.e., the dense-to-dense paradigm. INC leads the student to group candidate boxes into clusters in NMS as the teacher does, which is implemented by learning grouping information revealed in NMS procedure of the teacher. After obtaining the same grouping scheme as the teacher via INC, the student further imitates the rank distribution of the teacher over clustered candidates through Rank Matching. With the proposed INC and RM, we integrate Dense Teacher Guidance into Semi-Supervised Object Detection (termed DTG-SSOD), successfully abandoning sparse pseudo labels and enabling more informative learning on unlabeled data. On COCO benchmark, our DTG-SSOD achieves state-of-the-art performance under various labelling ratios. For example, under 10% labelling ratio, DTG-SSOD improves the supervised baseline from 26.9 to 35.9 mAP, outperforming the previous best method Soft Teacher by 1.9 points.
abstract_zh: Mean-Teacher (MT) 方案在半监督目标检测 (SSOD) 中被广泛采用。在 MT 中，由教师的最终预测提供的稀疏伪标签（例如，在非极大值抑制 (NMS) 后处理之后）被采用，通过手工制作的标签分配对学生进行密集监督。然而，从稀疏到密集的范式使 SSOD 的流程变得复杂，同时忽视了强大的直接、密集的教师监督。在本文中，我们尝试直接利用教师的密集指导来监督学生的训练，即密集到密集的范式。具体来说，我们提出逆 NMS 聚类（INC）和排名匹配（RM）来实例化密集监督，而无需广泛使用的传统稀疏伪标签。 INC引导学生像老师一样在NMS中将候选框分组为簇，这是通过学习老师的NMS过程中揭示的分组信息来实现的。通过INC获得与老师相同的分组方案后，学生通过Rank Matching进一步模仿老师在聚类候选者中的排名分布。通过提出的 INC 和 RM，我们将密集教师指导集成到半监督对象检测（称为 DTG-SSOD）中，成功地放弃了稀疏伪标签，并实现了对未标记数据进行更多信息学习。在 COCO 基准上，我们的 DTG-SSOD 在各种标签比率下实现了最先进的性能。例如，在 10% 标记率下，DTG-SSOD 将监督基线从 26.9 mAP 提高到 35.9 mAP，比之前的最佳方法 Soft Teacher 提高了 1.9 个百分点。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DTG-SSOD方法，通过密集教师指导实现半监督目标检测，摒弃传统稀疏伪标签方案。
AI.motivation: 现有半监督目标检测方法依赖稀疏伪标签导致流程复杂且忽略密集教师监督，难以充分利用未标记数据信息。
AI.method: 提出逆NMS聚类（INC）和排名匹配（RM）模块，通过教师模型NMS过程学习聚类信息，并使学生模型模仿教师的候选框排名分布，实现端到端密集监督。
AI.result: 在COCO数据集上，10%标注比例下mAP从26.9提升至35.9，较Soft Teacher方法提升1.9点，达到SOTA性能。
AI.conclusion: 密集教师指导范式有效提升了半监督目标检测性能，验证了无需稀疏伪标签的直接密集监督可行性。

search_text: DTG-SSOD: Dense Teacher Guidance for Semi-Supervised Object Detection DTG-SSOD：半监督目标检测的密集教师指导 The Mean-Teacher (MT) scheme is widely adopted in semi-supervised object detection (SSOD). In MT, the sparse pseudo labels, offered by the final predictions of the teacher (e.g., after Non Maximum Suppression (NMS) post-processing), are adopted for the dense supervision for the student via hand-crafted label assignment. However, the sparse-to-dense paradigm complicates the pipeline of SSOD, and simultaneously neglects the powerful direct, dense teacher supervision. In this paper, we attempt to directly leverage the dense guidance of teacher to supervise student training, i.e., the dense-to-dense paradigm. Specifically, we propose the Inverse NMS Clustering (INC) and Rank Matching (RM) to instantiate the dense supervision, without the widely used, conventional sparse pseudo labels. INC leads the student to group candidate boxes into clusters in NMS as the teacher does, which is implemented by learning grouping information revealed in NMS procedure of the teacher. After obtaining the same grouping scheme as the teacher via INC, the student further imitates the rank distribution of the teacher over clustered candidates through Rank Matching. With the proposed INC and RM, we integrate Dense Teacher Guidance into Semi-Supervised Object Detection (termed DTG-SSOD), successfully abandoning sparse pseudo labels and enabling more informative learning on unlabeled data. On COCO benchmark, our DTG-SSOD achieves state-of-the-art performance under various labelling ratios. For example, under 10% labelling ratio, DTG-SSOD improves the supervised baseline from 26.9 to 35.9 mAP, outperforming the previous best method Soft Teacher by 1.9 points. authors_text: Amit Henig,Raja Giryes
title: Utilizing Excess Resources in Training Neural Networks
title_zh: 利用多余的资源训练神经网络
comment: Accepted to ICIP 2022. Code available at https://github.com/AmitHenig/KFLO
comments: Accepted to ICIP 2022. Code available at https://github.com/AmitHenig/KFLO
abstract: In this work, we suggest Kernel Filtering Linear Overparameterization (KFLO), where a linear cascade of filtering layers is used during training to improve network performance in test time. We implement this cascade in a kernel filtering fashion, which prevents the trained architecture from becoming unnecessarily deeper. This also allows using our approach with almost any network architecture and let combining the filtering layers into a single layer in test time. Thus, our approach does not add computational complexity during inference. We demonstrate the advantage of KFLO on various network models and datasets in supervised learning.
summary: In this work, we suggest Kernel Filtering Linear Overparameterization (KFLO), where a linear cascade of filtering layers is used during training to improve network performance in test time. We implement this cascade in a kernel filtering fashion, which prevents the trained architecture from becoming unnecessarily deeper. This also allows using our approach with almost any network architecture and let combining the filtering layers into a single layer in test time. Thus, our approach does not add computational complexity during inference. We demonstrate the advantage of KFLO on various network models and datasets in supervised learning.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们建议使用内核过滤线性超参数化（KFLO），其中在训练期间使用过滤层的线性级联来提高测试时的网络性能。我们以内核过滤方式实现这个级联，这可以防止训练后的架构变得不必要的更深。这也允许将我们的方法用于几乎任何网络架构，并在测试时将过滤层组合成单个层。因此，我们的方法不会增加推理过程中的计算复杂性。我们在监督学习中的各种网络模型和数据集上展示了 KFLO 的优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种利用训练过程中冗余资源的方法，通过引入核过滤线性过参数化（KFLO）来提升神经网络的测试性能。
AI.motivation: 传统过参数化方法可能导致网络深度增加和计算复杂度上升，而KFLO通过过滤层级联结构避免了这一问题，同时保持推理阶段的计算效率。
AI.method: 提出核过滤线性过参数化（KFLO），通过线性级联的过滤层在训练时提升性能，测试时合并为单层以避免计算复杂度增加。
AI.result: 在多个网络模型和数据集的监督学习任务中验证了KFLO的有效性，证明其能提升测试性能且不增加推理计算负担。
AI.conclusion: KFLO通过有效利用训练冗余资源，在保持模型泛化能力的同时优化了计算效率，适用于各种网络架构。

authors_text: Yoli Shavit,Yosi Keller
title: Camera Pose Auto-Encoders for Improving Pose Regression
title_zh: 用于改善姿势回归的相机姿势自动编码器
abstract: Absolute pose regressor (APR) networks are trained to estimate the pose of the camera given a captured image. They compute latent image representations from which the camera position and orientation are regressed. APRs provide a different tradeoff between localization accuracy, runtime, and memory, compared to structure-based localization schemes that provide state-of-the-art accuracy. In this work, we introduce Camera Pose Auto-Encoders (PAEs), multilayer perceptrons that are trained via a Teacher-Student approach to encode camera poses using APRs as their teachers. We show that the resulting latent pose representations can closely reproduce APR performance and demonstrate their effectiveness for related tasks. Specifically, we propose a light-weight test-time optimization in which the closest train poses are encoded and used to refine camera position estimation. This procedure achieves a new state-of-the-art position accuracy for APRs, on both the CambridgeLandmarks and 7Scenes benchmarks. We also show that train images can be reconstructed from the learned pose encoding, paving the way for integrating visual information from the train set at a low memory cost. Our code and pre-trained models are available at https://github.com/yolish/camera-pose-auto-encoders.
summary: Absolute pose regressor (APR) networks are trained to estimate the pose of the camera given a captured image. They compute latent image representations from which the camera position and orientation are regressed. APRs provide a different tradeoff between localization accuracy, runtime, and memory, compared to structure-based localization schemes that provide state-of-the-art accuracy. In this work, we introduce Camera Pose Auto-Encoders (PAEs), multilayer perceptrons that are trained via a Teacher-Student approach to encode camera poses using APRs as their teachers. We show that the resulting latent pose representations can closely reproduce APR performance and demonstrate their effectiveness for related tasks. Specifically, we propose a light-weight test-time optimization in which the closest train poses are encoded and used to refine camera position estimation. This procedure achieves a new state-of-the-art position accuracy for APRs, on both the CambridgeLandmarks and 7Scenes benchmarks. We also show that train images can be reconstructed from the learned pose encoding, paving the way for integrating visual information from the train set at a low memory cost. Our code and pre-trained models are available at https://github.com/yolish/camera-pose-auto-encoders.
abstract_zh: 绝对姿态回归器 (APR) 网络经过训练，可以在给定捕获图像的情况下估计相机的姿态。他们计算潜在图像表示，从中回归相机位置和方向。与提供最先进精度的基于结构的定位方案相比，APR 在定位精度、运行时间和内存之间提供了不同的权衡。在这项工作中，我们介绍了相机姿势自动编码器（PAE），这是一种多层感知器，通过师生方法进行训练，以 APR 作为老师来编码相机姿势。我们表明，由此产生的潜在姿势表示可以密切再现 APR 性能并证明其对相关任务的有效性。具体来说，我们提出了一种轻量级测试时间优化，其中对最接近的列车姿态进行编码并用于改进相机位置估计。该程序在 CambridgeLandmarks 和 7Scenes 基准测试中实现了 APR 的新的最先进的位置精度。我们还表明，可以从学习的姿势编码中重建列车图像，为以较低的内存成本整合列车集中的视觉信息铺平了道路。我们的代码和预训练模型可在 https://github.com/yolish/camera-pose-auto-encoders 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Camera Pose Auto-Encoders (PAEs)的新方法，通过教师-学生框架改进相机姿态回归，提升定位精度并降低内存消耗。
AI.motivation: 传统绝对姿态回归（APR）方法在定位精度与计算效率之间存在权衡，而结构化方法虽准确但复杂度高。需探索更高效且精准的姿态估计方案，并降低训练数据的内存占用。
AI.method: 基于教师-学生框架，利用APR作为教师模型训练多层感知机（PAEs）编码相机姿态；提出测试时轻量优化策略，通过最近邻训练姿态编码优化位置估计，并实现训练图像的低内存重建。
AI.result: 在CambridgeLandmarks和7Scenes基准上，PAEs达到APR的最先进位置精度；通过姿态编码成功重建训练图像，验证了方法在内存效率上的优势。
AI.conclusion: PAEs通过编码-解码结构有效提升了姿态回归性能，为低内存下融合训练数据提供了新途径，具有实际应用潜力。

search_text: Camera Pose Auto-Encoders for Improving Pose Regression 用于改善姿势回归的相机姿势自动编码器 Absolute pose regressor (APR) networks are trained to estimate the pose of the camera given a captured image. They compute latent image representations from which the camera position and orientation are regressed. APRs provide a different tradeoff between localization accuracy, runtime, and memory, compared to structure-based localization schemes that provide state-of-the-art accuracy. In this work, we introduce Camera Pose Auto-Encoders (PAEs), multilayer perceptrons that are trained via a Teacher-Student approach to encode camera poses using APRs as their teachers. We show that the resulting latent pose representations can closely reproduce APR performance and demonstrate their effectiveness for related tasks. Specifically, we propose a light-weight test-time optimization in which the closest train poses are encoded and used to refine camera position estimation. This procedure achieves a new state-of-the-art position accuracy for APRs, on both the CambridgeLandmarks and 7Scenes benchmarks. We also show that train images can be reconstructed from the learned pose encoding, paving the way for integrating visual information from the train set at a low memory cost. Our code and pre-trained models are available at https://github.com/yolish/camera-pose-auto-encoders. 绝对姿态回归器 (APR) 网络经过训练，可以在给定捕获图像的情况下估计相机的姿态。他们计算潜在图像表示，从中回归相机位置和方向。与提供最先进精度的基于结构的定位方案相比，APR 在定位精度、运行时间和内存之间提供了不同的权衡。在这项工作中，我们介绍了相机姿势自动编码器（PAE），这是一种多层感知器，通过师生方法进行训练，以 APR 作为老师来编码相机姿势。我们表明，由此产生的潜在姿势表示可以密切再现 APR 性能并证明其对相关任务的有效性。具体来说，我们提出了一种轻量级测试时间优化，其中对最接近的列车姿态进行编码并用于改进相机位置估计。该程序在 CambridgeLandmarks 和 7Scenes 基准测试中实现了 APR 的新的最先进的位置精度。我们还表明，可以从学习的姿势编码中重建列车图像，为以较低的内存成本整合列车集中的视觉信息铺平了道路。我们的代码和预训练模型可在 https://github.com/yolish/camera-pose-auto-encoders 获取。 本文提出了一种名为Camera Pose Auto-Encoders (PAEs)的新方法，通过教师-学生框架改进相机姿态回归，提升定位精度并降低内存消耗。 Yoli Shavit,Yosi Keller cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Hao Zhang,Lechao Cheng,Yanbin Hao,Chong-Wah Ngo
title: Long-term Leap Attention, Short-term Periodic Shift for Video Classification
title_zh: 视频分类的长期跳跃注意力、短期周期平移
comment: Accepted by ACM Multimedia 2022, 10 pages, 4 figures
comments: Accepted by ACM Multimedia 2022, 10 pages, 4 figures
abstract: Video transformer naturally incurs a heavier computation burden than a static vision transformer, as the former processes $T$ times longer sequence than the latter under the current attention of quadratic complexity $(T^2N^2)$. The existing works treat the temporal axis as a simple extension of spatial axes, focusing on shortening the spatio-temporal sequence by either generic pooling or local windowing without utilizing temporal redundancy. However, videos naturally contain redundant information between neighboring frames; thereby, we could potentially suppress attention on visually similar frames in a dilated manner. Based on this hypothesis, we propose the LAPS, a long-term ``\textbf{\textit{Leap Attention}}'' (LA), short-term ``\textbf{\textit{Periodic Shift}}'' (\textit{P}-Shift) module for video transformers, with $(2TN^2)$ complexity. Specifically, the ``LA'' groups long-term frames into pairs, then refactors each discrete pair via attention. The ``\textit{P}-Shift'' exchanges features between temporal neighbors to confront the loss of short-term dynamics. By replacing a vanilla 2D attention with the LAPS, we could adapt a static transformer into a video one, with zero extra parameters and neglectable computation overhead ($\sim$2.6\%). Experiments on the standard Kinetics-400 benchmark demonstrate that our LAPS transformer could achieve competitive performances in terms of accuracy, FLOPs, and Params among CNN and transformer SOTAs. We open-source our project in \sloppy \href{https://github.com/VideoNetworks/LAPS-transformer}{\textit{\color{magenta}{https://github.com/VideoNetworks/LAPS-transformer}}} .
summary: Video transformer naturally incurs a heavier computation burden than a static vision transformer, as the former processes $T$ times longer sequence than the latter under the current attention of quadratic complexity $(T^2N^2)$. The existing works treat the temporal axis as a simple extension of spatial axes, focusing on shortening the spatio-temporal sequence by either generic pooling or local windowing without utilizing temporal redundancy. However, videos naturally contain redundant information between neighboring frames; thereby, we could potentially suppress attention on visually similar frames in a dilated manner. Based on this hypothesis, we propose the LAPS, a long-term ``\textbf{\textit{Leap Attention}}'' (LA), short-term ``\textbf{\textit{Periodic Shift}}'' (\textit{P}-Shift) module for video transformers, with $(2TN^2)$ complexity. Specifically, the ``LA'' groups long-term frames into pairs, then refactors each discrete pair via attention. The ``\textit{P}-Shift'' exchanges features between temporal neighbors to confront the loss of short-term dynamics. By replacing a vanilla 2D attention with the LAPS, we could adapt a static transformer into a video one, with zero extra parameters and neglectable computation overhead ($\sim$2.6\%). Experiments on the standard Kinetics-400 benchmark demonstrate that our LAPS transformer could achieve competitive performances in terms of accuracy, FLOPs, and Params among CNN and transformer SOTAs. We open-source our project in \sloppy \href{https://github.com/VideoNetworks/LAPS-transformer}{\textit{\color{magenta}{https://github.com/VideoNetworks/LAPS-transformer}}} .
abstract_zh: 视频转换器自然会比静态视觉转换器承担更重的计算负担，因为在当前二次复杂度 $(T^2N^2)$ 的关注下，前者处理的序列比后者长 $T$ 倍。现有的工作将时间轴视为空间轴的简单延伸，重点是通过通用池或局部窗口来缩短时空序列，而不利用时间冗余。然而，视频自然地在相邻帧之间包含冗余信息；因此，我们可能会以扩张的方式抑制对视觉上相似的帧的注意力。基于这个假设，我们提出了 LAPS，一个用于视频转换器的长期“\textbf{\textit{Leap Attention}}”（LA）、短期“\textbf{\textit{Periodic Shift}}”（\textit{P}-Shift）模块，复杂度为 $(2TN^2)$。具体来说，“LA”将长期帧分组为对，然后通过注意力重构每个离散对。 “\textit{P}-Shift”在时间邻居之间交换特征以应对短期动态的损失。通过用 LAPS 替换普通的 2D 注意力，我们可以将静态变压器改编为视频变压器，额外参数为零，计算开销可忽略不计（$\sim$2.6\%）。标准 Kinetics-400 基准测试的实验表明，我们的 LAPS 变压器在准确度、FLOP 和参数方面可以在 CNN 和变压器 SOTA 中实现具有竞争力的性能。我们在 \sloppy \href{https://github.com/VideoNetworks/LAPS-transformer}{\textit{\color{magenta}{https://github.com/VideoNetworks/LAPS-transformer}}} 中开源了我们的项目。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为LAPS的视频分类方法，通过引入长时隙注意力（Leap Attention）和短时周期位移（Periodic Shift）模块，优化视频变换器的计算效率和性能。
AI.motivation: 现有视频变换器因处理长序列导致计算复杂度高（T²N²），且未充分利用视频中相邻帧的冗余信息，导致效率低下。
AI.method: 设计长时隙注意力（LA）模块对远距离帧进行配对注意计算，结合短时周期位移（P-Shift）模块交换相邻帧特征以保留短期动态，整体复杂度降至2TN²。
AI.result: 在Kinetics-400基准测试中，LAPS变换器在准确率、计算量（FLOPs）和参数量（Params）上均达到与CNN和Transformer最先进方法相当的水平。
AI.conclusion: LAPS通过有效利用时间冗余性，在保持零额外参数和低计算开销的前提下，显著提升了视频分类的效率和性能。

authors_text: Ming Xin,Mark A. Minor
title: Integrating Vehicle Slip and Yaw in Overarching Multi-Tiered Automated Vehicle Steering Control to Balance Path Following Accuracy, Gracefulness, and Safety
title_zh: 将车辆滑移和偏航集成到总体多层自动车辆转向控制中，以平衡路径跟踪准确性、优雅性和安全性
abstract: Balancing path following accuracy and error convergence with graceful motion in steering control is challenging due to the competing nature of these requirements, especially across a range of operating speeds and conditions. This paper demonstrates that an integrated multi-tiered steering controller considering the impact of slip on kinematic control, dynamic control, and steering actuator rate commands achieves accurate and graceful path following. This work is founded on multi-tiered sideslip and yaw-based models, which allow derivation of controllers considering error due to sideslip and the mapping between steering commands and graceful lateral motion. Observer based sideslip estimates are combined with heading error in the kinematic controller to provide feedforward slip compensation. Path following error is compensated by a continuous Variable Structure Controller (VSC) using speed-based path manifolds to balance graceful motion and error convergence. Resulting yaw rate commands are used by a backstepping dynamic controller to generate steering rate commands. A High Gain Observer (HGO) estimates sideslip and yaw rate for output feedback control. Stability analysis of the output feedback controller is provided, and peaking is resolved. The work focuses on lateral control alone so that the steering controller can be combined with other speed controllers. Field results provide comparisons to related approaches demonstrating gracefulness and accuracy in different complex scenarios with varied weather conditions and perturbations.
summary: Balancing path following accuracy and error convergence with graceful motion in steering control is challenging due to the competing nature of these requirements, especially across a range of operating speeds and conditions. This paper demonstrates that an integrated multi-tiered steering controller considering the impact of slip on kinematic control, dynamic control, and steering actuator rate commands achieves accurate and graceful path following. This work is founded on multi-tiered sideslip and yaw-based models, which allow derivation of controllers considering error due to sideslip and the mapping between steering commands and graceful lateral motion. Observer based sideslip estimates are combined with heading error in the kinematic controller to provide feedforward slip compensation. Path following error is compensated by a continuous Variable Structure Controller (VSC) using speed-based path manifolds to balance graceful motion and error convergence. Resulting yaw rate commands are used by a backstepping dynamic controller to generate steering rate commands. A High Gain Observer (HGO) estimates sideslip and yaw rate for output feedback control. Stability analysis of the output feedback controller is provided, and peaking is resolved. The work focuses on lateral control alone so that the steering controller can be combined with other speed controllers. Field results provide comparisons to related approaches demonstrating gracefulness and accuracy in different complex scenarios with varied weather conditions and perturbations.
abstract_zh: 由于这些要求的竞争性质，特别是在一系列运行速度和条件下，平衡路径跟随精度和误差收敛与转向控制中的优雅运动具有挑战性。本文证明，考虑滑移对运动控制、动态控制和转向执行器速率命令的影响的集成多层转向控制器可实现准确且优雅的路径跟随。这项工作建立在多层侧滑和偏航模型的基础上，这些模型允许在推导控制器时考虑侧滑引起的误差以及转向命令和优雅的横向运动之间的映射。基于观察器的侧滑估计与运动控制器中的航向误差相结合，以提供前馈滑移补偿。路径跟随误差由连续可变结构控制器 (VSC) 补偿，该控制器使用基于速度的路径流形来平衡优雅运动和误差收敛。产生的偏航速率命令由反步动态控制器用来生成转向速率命令。高增益观测器 (HGO) 估计侧滑率和偏航率以进行输出反馈控制。提供了输出反馈控制器的稳定性分析，并解决了峰值问题。这项工作仅关注横向控制，以便转向控制器可以与其他速度控制器结合使用。现场结果提供了与相关方法的比较，证明了在具有不同天气条件和扰动的不同复杂场景中的优雅性和准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多层级自动车辆转向控制方法，整合车辆滑移与偏航信息，以实现路径跟随的准确性、优雅性与安全性的平衡。
AI.motivation: 传统转向控制难以在复杂工况下同时满足路径跟踪精度、运动平滑性及安全性需求，尤其在速度变化和环境扰动下存在性能冲突。
AI.method: 构建多层级侧滑与偏航模型，结合观测器估计侧滑量，采用连续变结构控制器（VSC）与反步法动态控制器，通过高增益观测器实现输出反馈控制，并进行稳定性分析以消除峰值效应。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在多场景（含恶劣天气与扰动）中展现出优于现有方法的路径跟踪精度与运动平滑性，验证了控制策略的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该横向控制方法可独立于速度控制器实现模块化集成，通过理论分析与实证验证了其在复杂工况下的鲁棒性与实用性。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种多层级自动车辆转向控制方法，整合车辆滑移与偏航信息，以实现路径跟随的准确性、优雅性与安全性的平衡。

search_text: Integrating Vehicle Slip and Yaw in Overarching Multi-Tiered Automated Vehicle Steering Control to Balance Path Following Accuracy, Gracefulness, and Safety 将车辆滑移和偏航集成到总体多层自动车辆转向控制中，以平衡路径跟踪准确性、优雅性和安全性 Balancing path following accuracy and error convergence with graceful motion in steering control is challenging due to the competing nature of these requirements, especially across a range of operating speeds and conditions. This paper demonstrates that an integrated multi-tiered steering controller considering the impact of slip on kinematic control, dynamic control, and steering actuator rate commands achieves accurate and graceful path following. This work is founded on multi-tiered sideslip and yaw-based models, which allow derivation of controllers considering error due to sideslip and the mapping between steering commands and graceful lateral motion. Observer based sideslip estimates are combined with heading error in the kinematic controller to provide feedforward slip compensation. Path following error is compensated by a continuous Variable Structure Controller (VSC) using speed-based path manifolds to balance graceful motion and error convergence. Resulting yaw rate commands are used by a backstepping dynamic controller to generate steering rate commands. A High Gain Observer (HGO) estimates sideslip and yaw rate for output feedback control. Stability analysis of the output feedback controller is provided, and peaking is resolved. The work focuses on lateral control alone so that the steering controller can be combined with other speed controllers. Field results provide comparisons to related approaches demonstrating gracefulness and accuracy in different complex scenarios with varied weather conditions and perturbations. 由于这些要求的竞争性质，特别是在一系列运行速度和条件下，平衡路径跟随精度和误差收敛与转向控制中的优雅运动具有挑战性。本文证明，考虑滑移对运动控制、动态控制和转向执行器速率命令的影响的集成多层转向控制器可实现准确且优雅的路径跟随。这项工作建立在多层侧滑和偏航模型的基础上，这些模型允许在推导控制器时考虑侧滑引起的误差以及转向命令和优雅的横向运动之间的映射。基于观察器的侧滑估计与运动控制器中的航向误差相结合，以提供前馈滑移补偿。路径跟随误差由连续可变结构控制器 (VSC) 补偿，该控制器使用基于速度的路径流形来平衡优雅运动和误差收敛。产生的偏航速率命令由反步动态控制器用来生成转向速率命令。高增益观测器 (HGO) 估计侧滑率和偏航率以进行输出反馈控制。提供了输出反馈控制器的稳定性分析，并解决了峰值问题。这项工作仅关注横向控制，以便转向控制器可以与其他速度控制器结合使用。现场结果提供了与相关方法的比较，证明了在具有不同天气条件和扰动的不同复杂场景中的优雅性和准确性。 本文提出一种多层级自动车辆转向控制方法，整合车辆滑移与偏航信息，以实现路径跟随的准确性、优雅性与安全性的平衡。 Ming Xin,Mark A. Minor cs.RO

authors_text: Zelin Zhao,Ze Wu,Yueqing Zhuang,Boxun Li,Jiaya Jia
title: Tracking Objects as Pixel-wise Distributions
title_zh: 以像素分布方式跟踪对象
comment: Accepted in ECCV22 as an oral presentation paper. The code&project page is at https://github.com/dvlab-research/ECCV22-P3AFormer-Tracking-Objects-as-Pixel-wise-Distributions
comments: Accepted in ECCV22 as an oral presentation paper. The code&project page is at https://github.com/dvlab-research/ECCV22-P3AFormer-Tracking-Objects-as-Pixel-wise-Distributions
abstract: Multi-object tracking (MOT) requires detecting and associating objects through frames. Unlike tracking via detected bounding boxes or tracking objects as points, we propose tracking objects as pixel-wise distributions. We instantiate this idea on a transformer-based architecture, P3AFormer, with pixel-wise propagation, prediction, and association. P3AFormer propagates pixel-wise features guided by flow information to pass messages between frames. Furthermore, P3AFormer adopts a meta-architecture to produce multi-scale object feature maps. During inference, a pixel-wise association procedure is proposed to recover object connections through frames based on the pixel-wise prediction. P3AFormer yields 81.2\% in terms of MOTA on the MOT17 benchmark -- the first among all transformer networks to reach 80\% MOTA in literature. P3AFormer also outperforms state-of-the-arts on the MOT20 and KITTI benchmarks.
summary: Multi-object tracking (MOT) requires detecting and associating objects through frames. Unlike tracking via detected bounding boxes or tracking objects as points, we propose tracking objects as pixel-wise distributions. We instantiate this idea on a transformer-based architecture, P3AFormer, with pixel-wise propagation, prediction, and association. P3AFormer propagates pixel-wise features guided by flow information to pass messages between frames. Furthermore, P3AFormer adopts a meta-architecture to produce multi-scale object feature maps. During inference, a pixel-wise association procedure is proposed to recover object connections through frames based on the pixel-wise prediction. P3AFormer yields 81.2\% in terms of MOTA on the MOT17 benchmark -- the first among all transformer networks to reach 80\% MOTA in literature. P3AFormer also outperforms state-of-the-arts on the MOT20 and KITTI benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 多对象跟踪（MOT）需要通过帧检测和关联对象。与通过检测到的边界框进行跟踪或将对象作为点进行跟踪不同，我们建议将对象作为像素分布进行跟踪。我们在基于 Transformer 的架构 P3AFormer 上实例化了这个想法，具有逐像素传播、预测和关联功能。 P3AFormer 传播由流信息引导的逐像素特征，以在帧之间传递消息。此外，P3AFormer 采用元架构来生成多尺度对象特征图。在推理过程中，提出了逐像素关联过程，以基于逐像素预测通过帧恢复对象连接。 P3AFormer 在 MOT17 基准上的 MOTA 收益率为 81.2%，这是所有变压器网络中第一个在文献中达到 80% MOTA 的网络。 P3AFormer 在 MOT20 和 KITTI 基准测试中的表现也优于最先进的技术。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于像素级分布的多目标跟踪方法，通过像素级传播、预测和关联机制实现更精确的跟踪。
AI.motivation: 传统多目标跟踪方法依赖检测框或点级表示，难以处理遮挡和复杂场景下的像素级细节，需更精细的表示方式提升跟踪性能。
AI.method: 设计了基于Transformer的P3AFormer架构，通过像素级特征传播（结合光流信息）、多尺度特征图生成及像素级关联算法实现跨帧目标关联。
AI.result: 在MOT17数据集上达到81.2%的MOTA指标，首次突破80%大关，并在MOT20和KITTI数据集上超越现有最优方法。
AI.conclusion: 像素级分布表示能有效捕捉目标细节特征，结合Transformer架构和像素级关联机制显著提升了多目标跟踪的准确性和鲁棒性。

search_text: Tracking Objects as Pixel-wise Distributions 以像素分布方式跟踪对象 Multi-object tracking (MOT) requires detecting and associating objects through frames. Unlike tracking via detected bounding boxes or tracking objects as points, we propose tracking objects as pixel-wise distributions. We instantiate this idea on a transformer-based architecture, P3AFormer, with pixel-wise propagation, prediction, and association. P3AFormer propagates pixel-wise features guided by flow information to pass messages between frames. Furthermore, P3AFormer adopts a meta-architecture to produce multi-scale object feature maps. During inference, a pixel-wise association procedure is proposed to recover object connections through frames based on the pixel-wise prediction. P3AFormer yields 81.2\% in terms of MOTA on the MOT17 benchmark -- the first among all transformer networks to reach 80\% MOTA in literature. P3AFormer also outperforms state-of-the-arts on the MOT20 and KITTI benchmarks. 多对象跟踪（MOT）需要通过帧检测和关联对象。与通过检测到的边界框进行跟踪或将对象作为点进行跟踪不同，我们建议将对象作为像素分布进行跟踪。我们在基于 Transformer 的架构 P3AFormer 上实例化了这个想法，具有逐像素传播、预测和关联功能。 P3AFormer 传播由流信息引导的逐像素特征，以在帧之间传递消息。此外，P3AFormer 采用元架构来生成多尺度对象特征图。在推理过程中，提出了逐像素关联过程，以基于逐像素预测通过帧恢复对象连接。 P3AFormer 在 MOT17 基准上的 MOTA 收益率为 81.2%，这是所有变压器网络中第一个在文献中达到 80% MOTA 的网络。 P3AFormer 在 MOT20 和 KITTI 基准测试中的表现也优于最先进的技术。 本文提出了一种基于像素级分布的多目标跟踪方法，通过像素级传播、预测和关联机制实现更精确的跟踪。 Zelin Zhao,Ze Wu,Yueqing Zhuang,Boxun Li,Jiaya Jia cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Yifei Huang,Lijin Yang,Yoichi Sato
title: Compound Prototype Matching for Few-shot Action Recognition
title_zh: 用于少样本动作识别的复合原型匹配
abstract: Few-shot action recognition aims to recognize novel action classes using only a small number of labeled training samples. In this work, we propose a novel approach that first summarizes each video into compound prototypes consisting of a group of global prototypes and a group of focused prototypes, and then compares video similarity based on the prototypes. Each global prototype is encouraged to summarize a specific aspect from the entire video, for example, the start/evolution of the action. Since no clear annotation is provided for the global prototypes, we use a group of focused prototypes to focus on certain timestamps in the video. We compare video similarity by matching the compound prototypes between the support and query videos. The global prototypes are directly matched to compare videos from the same perspective, for example, to compare whether two actions start similarly. For the focused prototypes, since actions have various temporal variations in the videos, we apply bipartite matching to allow the comparison of actions with different temporal positions and shifts. Experiments demonstrate that our proposed method achieves state-of-the-art results on multiple benchmarks.
summary: Few-shot action recognition aims to recognize novel action classes using only a small number of labeled training samples. In this work, we propose a novel approach that first summarizes each video into compound prototypes consisting of a group of global prototypes and a group of focused prototypes, and then compares video similarity based on the prototypes. Each global prototype is encouraged to summarize a specific aspect from the entire video, for example, the start/evolution of the action. Since no clear annotation is provided for the global prototypes, we use a group of focused prototypes to focus on certain timestamps in the video. We compare video similarity by matching the compound prototypes between the support and query videos. The global prototypes are directly matched to compare videos from the same perspective, for example, to compare whether two actions start similarly. For the focused prototypes, since actions have various temporal variations in the videos, we apply bipartite matching to allow the comparison of actions with different temporal positions and shifts. Experiments demonstrate that our proposed method achieves state-of-the-art results on multiple benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 少镜头动作识别旨在仅使用少量标记的训练样本来识别新的动作类别。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的方法，首先将每个视频总结为由一组全局原型和一组焦点原型组成的复合原型，然后根据原型比较视频相似度。鼓励每个全局原型总结整个视频的特定方面，例如动作的开始/演变。由于没有为全局原型提供明确的注释，因此我们使用一组聚焦原型来关注视频中的某些时间戳。我们通过匹配支持视频和查询视频之间的复合原型来比较视频相似度。直接匹配全局原型来比较同一视角的视频，例如比较两个动作是否开始相似。对于重点原型，由于动作在视频中具有各种时间变化，因此我们应用二分匹配来允许比较具有不同时间位置和变化的动作。实验表明，我们提出的方法在多个基准测试中取得了最先进的结果。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种复合原型匹配方法，用于解决少样本动作识别问题，通过构建全局和聚焦原型来比较视频相似性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理动作的时间变化和不同时间位置时存在挑战，需要更有效的方法来捕捉动作的多方面特征。
AI.method: 方法通过构建全局原型（总结动作整体特征）和聚焦原型（关注特定时间点），结合直接匹配和二分图匹配策略，比较支持集与查询集视频的复合原型。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在多个基准测试中达到最先进水平。
AI.conclusion: 复合原型匹配方法能有效捕捉动作多方面特征，处理时间变化，提升少样本动作识别性能。

In this work, we propose a novel approach that first summarizes each video into compound prototypes consisting of a group of global prototypes and a group of focused prototypes, and then compares video similarity based on the prototypes. Each global prototype is encouraged to summarize a specific aspect from the entire video, for example, the start/evolution of the action. Since no clear annotation is provided for the global prototypes, we use a group of focused prototypes to focus on certain timestamps in the video. We compare video similarity by matching the compound prototypes between the support and query videos. The global prototypes are directly matched to compare videos from the same perspective, for example, to compare whether two actions start similarly. For the focused prototypes, since actions have various temporal variations in the videos, we apply bipartite matching to allow the comparison of actions with different temporal positions and shifts. Experiments demonstrate that our proposed method achieves state-of-the-art results on multiple benchmarks. 少镜头动作识别旨在仅使用少量标记的训练样本来识别新的动作类别。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的方法，首先将每个视频总结为由一组全局原型和一组焦点原型组成的复合原型，然后根据原型比较视频相似度。鼓励每个全局原型总结整个视频的特定方面，例如动作的开始/演变。由于没有为全局原型提供明确的注释，因此我们使用一组聚焦原型来关注视频中的某些时间戳。我们通过匹配支持视频和查询视频之间的复合原型来比较视频相似度。直接匹配全局原型来比较同一视角的视频，例如比较两个动作是否开始相似。对于重点原型，由于动作在视频中具有各种时间变化，因此我们应用二分匹配来允许比较具有不同时间位置和变化的动作。实验表明，我们提出的方法在多个基准测试中取得了最先进的结果。 该论文提出了一种复合原型匹配方法，用于解决少样本动作识别问题，通过构建全局和聚焦原型来比较视频相似性。 Yifei Huang,Lijin Yang,Yoichi Sato cs.CV

authors_text: Yang Tan,Enming Zhang,Yang Li,Shao-Lun Huang,Xiao-Ping Zhang
title: Transferability-Guided Cross-Domain Cross-Task Transfer Learning
title_zh: 可迁移性引导的跨域跨任务迁移学习
comment: This work is accepted by IEEE TNNLS. Please see the official version https://ieeexplore.ieee.org/abstract/document/10420486.Copyright may be transferred without notice, after which this version may no longer be accessible
comments: This work is accepted by IEEE TNNLS. Please see the official version https://ieeexplore.ieee.org/abstract/document/10420486.Copyright may be transferred without notice, after which this version may no longer be accessible
abstract: We propose two novel transferability metrics F-OTCE (Fast Optimal Transport based Conditional Entropy) and JC-OTCE (Joint Correspondence OTCE) to evaluate how much the source model (task) can benefit the learning of the target task and to learn more transferable representations for cross-domain cross-task transfer learning. Unlike the existing metric that requires evaluating the empirical transferability on auxiliary tasks, our metrics are auxiliary-free such that they can be computed much more efficiently. Specifically, F-OTCE estimates transferability by first solving an Optimal Transport (OT) problem between source and target distributions, and then uses the optimal coupling to compute the Negative Conditional Entropy between source and target labels. It can also serve as a loss function to maximize the transferability of the source model before finetuning on the target task. Meanwhile, JC-OTCE improves the transferability robustness of F-OTCE by including label distances in the OT problem, though it may incur additional computation cost. Extensive experiments demonstrate that F-OTCE and JC-OTCE outperform state-of-the-art auxiliary-free metrics by 18.85% and 28.88%, respectively in correlation coefficient with the ground-truth transfer accuracy. By eliminating the training cost of auxiliary tasks, the two metrics reduces the total computation time of the previous method from 43 minutes to 9.32s and 10.78s, respectively, for a pair of tasks. When used as a loss function, F-OTCE shows consistent improvements on the transfer accuracy of the source model in few-shot classification experiments, with up to 4.41% accuracy gain.
summary: We propose two novel transferability metrics F-OTCE (Fast Optimal Transport based Conditional Entropy) and JC-OTCE (Joint Correspondence OTCE) to evaluate how much the source model (task) can benefit the learning of the target task and to learn more transferable representations for cross-domain cross-task transfer learning. Unlike the existing metric that requires evaluating the empirical transferability on auxiliary tasks, our metrics are auxiliary-free such that they can be computed much more efficiently. Specifically, F-OTCE estimates transferability by first solving an Optimal Transport (OT) problem between source and target distributions, and then uses the optimal coupling to compute the Negative Conditional Entropy between source and target labels. It can also serve as a loss function to maximize the transferability of the source model before finetuning on the target task. Meanwhile, JC-OTCE improves the transferability robustness of F-OTCE by including label distances in the OT problem, though it may incur additional computation cost. Extensive experiments demonstrate that F-OTCE and JC-OTCE outperform state-of-the-art auxiliary-free metrics by 18.85% and 28.88%, respectively in correlation coefficient with the ground-truth transfer accuracy. By eliminating the training cost of auxiliary tasks, the two metrics reduces the total computation time of the previous method from 43 minutes to 9.32s and 10.78s, respectively, for a pair of tasks. When used as a loss function, F-OTCE shows consistent improvements on the transfer accuracy of the source model in few-shot classification experiments, with up to 4.41% accuracy gain.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了两种新颖的可迁移性指标 F-OTCE（基于条件熵的快速最优传输）和 JC-OTCE（联合对应 OTCE）来评估源模型（任务）对目标任务的学习有多大帮助，并为跨域跨任务迁移学习学习更多可迁移表示。与需要评估辅助任务的经验可转移性的现有指标不同，我们的指标是无辅助的，因此可以更有效地计算它们。具体来说，F-OTCE 通过首先解决源分布和目标分布之间的最优传输（OT）问题来估计可转移性，然后使用最优耦合来计算源标签和目标标签之间的负条件熵。它还可以用作损失函数，在对目标任务进行微调之前最大化源模型的可转移性。同时，JC-OTCE通过在OT问题中包含标签距离来提高F-OTCE的可转移性鲁棒性，尽管这可能会产生额外的计算成本。大量实验表明，F-OTCE 和 JC-OTCE 在与地面实况传输精度的相关系数方面分别优于最先进的无辅助指标 18.85% 和 28.88%。通过消除辅助任务的训练成本，这两个指标将之前方法的总计算时间从 43 分钟减少到一对任务的 9.32 秒和 10.78 秒。当用作损失函数时，F-OTCE 在少样本分类实验中显示出对源模型的传输精度的持续改进，精度增益高达 4.41%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出两种新型可转移性度量指标F-OTCE和JC-OTCE，用于跨领域跨任务迁移学习中评估源模型对目标任务的贡献并学习更可转移的表示。
AI.motivation: 现有迁移学习方法依赖辅助任务评估可转移性，导致计算效率低下且需要额外训练成本。
AI.method: 基于最优传输理论，通过计算源域与目标域分布间的最优耦合关系，结合条件熵和标签距离改进可转移性度量，无需辅助任务即可直接优化。
AI.result: F-OTCE和JC-OTCE在真实迁移准确率相关系数上分别优于现有方法18.85%和28.88%，单任务对计算时间从43分钟缩短至9.32秒和10.78秒，且在少样本分类中提升源模型准确率最高4.41%。
AI.conclusion: 提出的度量方法在保持高迁移性能的同时显著降低计算成本，为跨领域跨任务迁移学习提供了高效解决方案。

authors_text: Jan Schlüter,Gerald Gutenbrunner
title: EfficientLEAF: A Faster LEarnable Audio Frontend of Questionable Use
title_zh: EfficientLEAF：一种使用可疑的更快的可学习音频前端
comment: Accepted at EUSIPCO 2022. Code at https://github.com/CPJKU/EfficientLEAF
comments: Accepted at EUSIPCO 2022. Code at https://github.com/CPJKU/EfficientLEAF
abstract: In audio classification, differentiable auditory filterbanks with few parameters cover the middle ground between hard-coded spectrograms and raw audio. LEAF (arXiv:2101.08596), a Gabor-based filterbank combined with Per-Channel Energy Normalization (PCEN), has shown promising results, but is computationally expensive. With inhomogeneous convolution kernel sizes and strides, and by replacing PCEN with better parallelizable operations, we can reach similar results more efficiently. In experiments on six audio classification tasks, our frontend matches the accuracy of LEAF at 3% of the cost, but both fail to consistently outperform a fixed mel filterbank. The quest for learnable audio frontends is not solved.
summary: In audio classification, differentiable auditory filterbanks with few parameters cover the middle ground between hard-coded spectrograms and raw audio. LEAF (arXiv:2101.08596), a Gabor-based filterbank combined with Per-Channel Energy Normalization (PCEN), has shown promising results, but is computationally expensive. With inhomogeneous convolution kernel sizes and strides, and by replacing PCEN with better parallelizable operations, we can reach similar results more efficiently. In experiments on six audio classification tasks, our frontend matches the accuracy of LEAF at 3% of the cost, but both fail to consistently outperform a fixed mel filterbank. The quest for learnable audio frontends is not solved.
abstract_zh: 在音频分类中，参数很少的可微听觉滤波器组覆盖了硬编码频谱图和原始音频之间的中间地带。 LEAF (arXiv:2101.08596) 是一种基于 Gabor 的滤波器组，与每通道能量归一化 (PCEN) 相结合，已显示出有希望的结果，但计算成本较高。通过使用不均匀的卷积核大小和步长，并通过用更好的可并行操作替换 PCEN，我们可以更有效地达到类似的结果。在六个音频分类任务的实验中，我们的前端以 3% 的成本与 LEAF 的准确性相匹配，但两者都未能始终优于固定的梅尔滤波器组。对可学习音频前端的探索尚未解决。

AI.tldr: 本文提出EfficientLEAF，一种更高效的可学习音频前端，旨在降低LEAF的计算成本。
AI.motivation: LEAF虽在音频分类中表现良好，但其计算复杂度高，限制了实际应用。
AI.method: 通过采用不均匀卷积核大小和步长，并将PCEN替换为更易并行化的操作。
AI.result: 实验显示EfficientLEAF在3%计算成本下达到LEAF的准确率，但两者均未显著优于固定梅尔滤波器。
AI.conclusion: 可学习音频前端的研究仍需进一步探索，当前方法尚未完全解决问题。
