authors_text: Théo Lepage,Réda Dehak
title: Label-Efficient Self-Supervised Speaker Verification With Information Maximization and Contrastive Learning
title_zh: 通过信息最大化和对比学习进行标签高效的自监督说话人验证
abstract: State-of-the-art speaker verification systems are inherently dependent on some kind of human supervision as they are trained on massive amounts of labeled data. However, manually annotating utterances is slow, expensive and not scalable to the amount of data available today. In this study, we explore self-supervised learning for speaker verification by learning representations directly from raw audio. The objective is to produce robust speaker embeddings that have small intra-speaker and large inter-speaker variance. Our approach is based on recent information maximization learning frameworks and an intensive data augmentation pre-processing step. We evaluate the ability of these methods to work without contrastive samples before showing that they achieve better performance when combined with a contrastive loss. Furthermore, we conduct experiments to show that our method reaches competitive results compared to existing techniques and can get better performances compared to a supervised baseline when fine-tuned with a small portion of labeled data.
summary: State-of-the-art speaker verification systems are inherently dependent on some kind of human supervision as they are trained on massive amounts of labeled data. However, manually annotating utterances is slow, expensive and not scalable to the amount of data available today. In this study, we explore self-supervised learning for speaker verification by learning representations directly from raw audio. The objective is to produce robust speaker embeddings that have small intra-speaker and large inter-speaker variance. Our approach is based on recent information maximization learning frameworks and an intensive data augmentation pre-processing step. We evaluate the ability of these methods to work without contrastive samples before showing that they achieve better performance when combined with a contrastive loss. Furthermore, we conduct experiments to show that our method reaches competitive results compared to existing techniques and can get better performances compared to a supervised baseline when fine-tuned with a small portion of labeled data.
abstract_zh: 最先进的说话人验证系统本质上依赖于某种人类监督，因为它们接受了大量标记数据的训练。然而，手动注释话语速度慢、成本高，并且无法扩展到当今可用的数据量。在本研究中，我们通过直接从原始音频学习表示来探索用于说话人验证的自监督学习。目标是产生稳健的说话人嵌入，其说话人内部差异较小，说话人间差异较大。我们的方法基于最新的信息最大化学习框架和密集的数据增强预处理步骤。我们评估了这些方法在没有对比样本的情况下工作的能力，然后表明它们与对比损失相结合时可以获得更好的性能。此外，我们进行的实验表明，与现有技术相比，我们的方法达到了有竞争力的结果，并且在使用一小部分标记数据进行微调时，与监督基线相比可以获得更好的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于信息最大化和对比学习的自监督说话人验证方法，旨在减少对标注数据的依赖。
AI.motivation: 当前说话人验证系统依赖大量标注数据，但人工标注成本高且难以扩展，亟需减少对标签的依赖。
AI.method: 通过自监督学习从原始音频中学习表示，结合信息最大化框架与数据增强预处理，并引入对比损失以提升性能。
AI.result: 该方法在无对比样本时表现良好，结合对比损失后性能进一步提升，且在少量标注数据微调下优于监督基线。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效降低了标签需求，证明了自监督学习在说话人验证中的可行性，为减少标注成本提供了新思路。

search_text: Label-Efficient Self-Supervised Speaker Verification With Information Maximization and Contrastive Learning 通过信息最大化和对比学习进行标签高效的自监督说话人验证 State-of-the-art speaker verification systems are inherently dependent on some kind of human supervision as they are trained on massive amounts of labeled data. However, manually annotating utterances is slow, expensive and not scalable to the amount of data available today. In this study, we explore self-supervised learning for speaker verification by learning representations directly from raw audio. The objective is to produce robust speaker embeddings that have small intra-speaker and large inter-speaker variance. Our approach is based on recent information maximization learning frameworks and an intensive data augmentation pre-processing step. We evaluate the ability of these methods to work without contrastive samples before showing that they achieve better performance when combined with a contrastive loss. Furthermore, we conduct experiments to show that our method reaches competitive results compared to existing techniques and can get better performances compared to a supervised baseline when fine-tuned with a small portion of labeled data. 最先进的说话人验证系统本质上依赖于某种人类监督，因为它们接受了大量标记数据的训练。然而，手动注释话语速度慢、成本高，并且无法扩展到当今可用的数据量。在本研究中，我们通过直接从原始音频学习表示来探索用于说话人验证的自监督学习。目标是产生稳健的说话人嵌入，其说话人内部差异较小，说话人间差异较大。我们的方法基于最新的信息最大化学习框架和密集的数据增强预处理步骤。我们评估了这些方法在没有对比样本的情况下工作的能力，然后表明它们与对比损失相结合时可以获得更好的性能。此外，我们进行的实验表明，与现有技术相比，我们的方法达到了有竞争力的结果，并且在使用一小部分标记数据进行微调时，与监督基线相比可以获得更好的性能。 本文提出了一种基于信息最大化和对比学习的自监督说话人验证方法，旨在减少对标注数据的依赖。 Théo Lepage,Réda Dehak eess.AS,cs.LG,cs.SD

authors_text: Jiashi Li,Xin Xia,Wei Li,Huixia Li,Xing Wang,Xuefeng Xiao,Rui Wang,Min Zheng,Xin Pan
title: Next-ViT: Next Generation Vision Transformer for Efficient Deployment in Realistic Industrial Scenarios
title_zh: Next-ViT：下一代视觉转换器，可在现实工业场景中高效部署
abstract: Due to the complex attention mechanisms and model design, most existing vision Transformers (ViTs) can not perform as efficiently as convolutional neural networks (CNNs) in realistic industrial deployment scenarios, e.g. TensorRT and CoreML. This poses a distinct challenge: Can a visual neural network be designed to infer as fast as CNNs and perform as powerful as ViTs? Recent works have tried to design CNN-Transformer hybrid architectures to address this issue, yet the overall performance of these works is far away from satisfactory. To end these, we propose a next generation vision Transformer for efficient deployment in realistic industrial scenarios, namely Next-ViT, which dominates both CNNs and ViTs from the perspective of latency/accuracy trade-off. In this work, the Next Convolution Block (NCB) and Next Transformer Block (NTB) are respectively developed to capture local and global information with deployment-friendly mechanisms. Then, Next Hybrid Strategy (NHS) is designed to stack NCB and NTB in an efficient hybrid paradigm, which boosts performance in various downstream tasks. Extensive experiments show that Next-ViT significantly outperforms existing CNNs, ViTs and CNN-Transformer hybrid architectures with respect to the latency/accuracy trade-off across various vision tasks. On TensorRT, Next-ViT surpasses ResNet by 5.5 mAP (from 40.4 to 45.9) on COCO detection and 7.7% mIoU (from 38.8% to 46.5%) on ADE20K segmentation under similar latency. Meanwhile, it achieves comparable performance with CSWin, while the inference speed is accelerated by 3.6x. On CoreML, Next-ViT surpasses EfficientFormer by 4.6 mAP (from 42.6 to 47.2) on COCO detection and 3.5% mIoU (from 45.1% to 48.6%) on ADE20K segmentation under similar latency. Our code and models are made public at: https://github.com/bytedance/Next-ViT

In this work, the Next Convolution Block (NCB) and Next Transformer Block (NTB) are respectively developed to capture local and global information with deployment-friendly mechanisms. Then, Next Hybrid Strategy (NHS) is designed to stack NCB and NTB in an efficient hybrid paradigm, which boosts performance in various downstream tasks. Extensive experiments show that Next-ViT significantly outperforms existing CNNs, ViTs and CNN-Transformer hybrid architectures with respect to the latency/accuracy trade-off across various vision tasks. On TensorRT, Next-ViT surpasses ResNet by 5.5 mAP (from 40.4 to 45.9) on COCO detection and 7.7% mIoU (from 38.8% to 46.5%) on ADE20K segmentation under similar latency. Meanwhile, it achieves comparable performance with CSWin, while the inference speed is accelerated by 3.6x. On CoreML, Next-ViT surpasses EfficientFormer by 4.6 mAP (from 42.6 to 47.2) on COCO detection and 3.5% mIoU (from 45.1% to 48.6%) on ADE20K segmentation under similar latency. Our code and models are made public at: https://github.com/bytedance/Next-ViT
abstract_zh: 由于复杂的注意力机制和模型设计，大多数现有的视觉 Transformer (ViT) 在实际工业部署场景中无法像卷积神经网络 (CNN) 那样高效地运行，例如： TensorRT 和 CoreML。这提出了一个独特的挑战：视觉神经网络能否设计得像 CNN 一样快速推理并像 ViT 一样强大？最近的工作尝试设计 CNN-Transformer 混合架构来解决这个问题，但这些工作的整体性能还远远不能令人满意。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了下一代愿景 Transformer，用于在现实工业场景中进行高效部署，即 Next-ViT，从延迟/准确性权衡的角度来看，它在 CNN 和 ViT 中都占主导地位。在这项工作中，分别开发了下一个卷积块（NCB）和下一个变压器块（NTB），以通过部署友好的机制捕获本地和全局信息。然后，下一代混合策略（NHS）旨在以高效的混合范例堆叠 NCB 和 NTB，从而提高各种下游任务的性能。大量实验表明，在各种视觉任务的延迟/准确性权衡方面，Next-ViT 显着优于现有的 CNN、ViT 和 CNN-Transformer 混合架构。在 TensorRT 上，Next-ViT 在 COCO 检测上超过 ResNet 5.5 mAP（从 40.4 到 45.9），在 ADE20K 分割上在相似延迟下超过 7.7% mIoU（从 38.8% 到 46.5%）。同时，它实现了与CSWin相当的性能，而推理速度加快了3.6倍。在 CoreML 上，Next-ViT 在 COCO 检测上超过 EfficientFormer 4.6 mAP（从 42.6 到 47.2），在 ADE20K 分割上超过 EfficientFormer 3.5% mIoU（从 45.1% 到 48.6%），在相似的延迟下。我们的代码和模型公开于：https://github.com/bytedance/Next-ViT

AI.tldr: 本文提出Next-ViT，一种在工业部署场景中兼顾效率与性能的下一代视觉Transformer模型。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉Transformer（ViT）因复杂注意力机制导致在TensorRT和CoreML等工业部署场景中效率低于CNN，而混合架构性能仍不理想，亟需设计兼具CNN速度与ViT性能的模型。
AI.method: 开发Next Convolution Block（NCB）和Next Transformer Block（NTB）分别捕捉局部与全局信息，并设计Next Hybrid Strategy（NHS）以高效堆叠两者，构建混合架构。
AI.result: 在TensorRT上，Next-ViT相较ResNet在COCO检测提升5.5 mAP，在ADE20K分割提升7.7% mIoU；相较CSWin推理加速3.6倍。在CoreML上超越EfficientFormer，COCO检测提升4.6 mAP，ADE20K分割提升3.5% mIoU。
AI.conclusion: Next-ViT通过创新混合架构在延迟/精度权衡上全面超越CNN、ViT及现有混合模型，验证了其在工业部署场景中的有效性。

authors_text: Jiashuo Yu,Jinyu Liu,Ying Cheng,Rui Feng,Yuejie Zhang
title: Modality-Aware Contrastive Instance Learning with Self-Distillation for Weakly-Supervised Audio-Visual Violence Detection
title_zh: 用于弱监督视听暴力检测的模态感知对比实例学习和自蒸馏
abstract: Weakly-supervised audio-visual violence detection aims to distinguish snippets containing multimodal violence events with video-level labels. Many prior works perform audio-visual integration and interaction in an early or intermediate manner, yet overlooking the modality heterogeneousness over the weakly-supervised setting. In this paper, we analyze the modality asynchrony and undifferentiated instances phenomena of the multiple instance learning (MIL) procedure, and further investigate its negative impact on weakly-supervised audio-visual learning. To address these issues, we propose a modality-aware contrastive instance learning with self-distillation (MACIL-SD) strategy. Specifically, we leverage a lightweight two-stream network to generate audio and visual bags, in which unimodal background, violent, and normal instances are clustered into semi-bags in an unsupervised way. Then audio and visual violent semi-bag representations are assembled as positive pairs, and violent semi-bags are combined with background and normal instances in the opposite modality as contrastive negative pairs. Furthermore, a self-distillation module is applied to transfer unimodal visual knowledge to the audio-visual model, which alleviates noises and closes the semantic gap between unimodal and multimodal features. Experiments show that our framework outperforms previous methods with lower complexity on the large-scale XD-Violence dataset. Results also demonstrate that our proposed approach can be used as plug-in modules to enhance other networks. Codes are available at https://github.com/JustinYuu/MACIL_SD.
summary: Weakly-supervised audio-visual violence detection aims to distinguish snippets containing multimodal violence events with video-level labels. Many prior works perform audio-visual integration and interaction in an early or intermediate manner, yet overlooking the modality heterogeneousness over the weakly-supervised setting. In this paper, we analyze the modality asynchrony and undifferentiated instances phenomena of the multiple instance learning (MIL) procedure, and further investigate its negative impact on weakly-supervised audio-visual learning. To address these issues, we propose a modality-aware contrastive instance learning with self-distillation (MACIL-SD) strategy. Specifically, we leverage a lightweight two-stream network to generate audio and visual bags, in which unimodal background, violent, and normal instances are clustered into semi-bags in an unsupervised way. Then audio and visual violent semi-bag representations are assembled as positive pairs, and violent semi-bags are combined with background and normal instances in the opposite modality as contrastive negative pairs. Furthermore, a self-distillation module is applied to transfer unimodal visual knowledge to the audio-visual model, which alleviates noises and closes the semantic gap between unimodal and multimodal features. Experiments show that our framework outperforms previous methods with lower complexity on the large-scale XD-Violence dataset. Results also demonstrate that our proposed approach can be used as plug-in modules to enhance other networks. Codes are available at https://github.com/JustinYuu/MACIL_SD.
abstract_zh: 弱监督视听暴力检测旨在区分包含具有视频级标签的多模式暴力事件的片段。许多先前的作品以早期或中期的方式进行视听集成和交互，但却忽视了弱监督环境下的模态异构性。在本文中，我们分析了多实例学习（MIL）过程的模态异步和未分化实例现象，并进一步研究其对弱监督视听学习的负面影响。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种具有自蒸馏功能的模态感知对比实例学习（MACIL-SD）策略。具体来说，我们利用轻量级双流网络来生成音频和视觉包，其中单峰背景、暴力和正常实例以无监督的方式聚集成半包。然后，将音频和视觉暴力半袋表示组装为正对，并将暴力半袋与相反模态的背景和正常实例组合为对比负对。此外，应用自蒸馏模块将单模态视觉知识转移到视听模型，从而减轻噪声并缩小单模态和多模态特征之间的语义差距。实验表明，我们的框架在大规模 XD-Violence 数据集上以较低的复杂度优于以前的方法。结果还表明，我们提出的方法可以用作插件模块来增强其他网络。代码可在 https://github.com/JustinYuu/MACIL_SD 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于模态感知对比实例学习与自蒸馏的弱监督音视频暴力检测方法，旨在解决多模态特征异步性和实例混淆问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在弱监督设置下忽视了音频和视觉模态的异质性，导致多实例学习中出现模态异步性和实例混淆，影响检测性能。
AI.method: 设计轻量级双流网络生成音视频包，通过无监督聚类划分单模态背景、暴力和正常实例；构建跨模态对比正负样本对，并引入自蒸馏模块传递单模态知识以缩小语义差距。
AI.result: 在XD-Violence数据集上优于现有方法且复杂度更低，所提模块可作为插件增强其他网络。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了弱监督音视频暴力检测中的模态异质性问题，为多模态学习提供了新的实例对比与知识蒸馏框架。

search_text: Modality-Aware Contrastive Instance Learning with Self-Distillation for Weakly-Supervised Audio-Visual Violence Detection 用于弱监督视听暴力检测的模态感知对比实例学习和自蒸馏 Weakly-supervised audio-visual violence detection aims to distinguish snippets containing multimodal violence events with video-level labels. Many prior works perform audio-visual integration and interaction in an early or intermediate manner, yet overlooking the modality heterogeneousness over the weakly-supervised setting. In this paper, we analyze the modality asynchrony and undifferentiated instances phenomena of the multiple instance learning (MIL) procedure, and further investigate its negative impact on weakly-supervised audio-visual learning. To address these issues, we propose a modality-aware contrastive instance learning with self-distillation (MACIL-SD) strategy. Specifically, we leverage a lightweight two-stream network to generate audio and visual bags, in which unimodal background, violent, and normal instances are clustered into semi-bags in an unsupervised way. Then audio and visual violent semi-bag representations are assembled as positive pairs, and violent semi-bags are combined with background and normal instances in the opposite modality as contrastive negative pairs. Furthermore, a self-distillation module is applied to transfer unimodal visual knowledge to the audio-visual model, which alleviates noises and closes the semantic gap between unimodal and multimodal features. Experiments show that our framework outperforms previous methods with lower complexity on the large-scale XD-Violence dataset. Results also demonstrate that our proposed approach can be used as plug-in modules to enhance other networks. Codes are available at https://github.com/JustinYuu/MACIL_SD. 弱监督视听暴力检测旨在区分包含具有视频级标签的多模式暴力事件的片段。许多先前的作品以早期或中期的方式进行视听集成和交互，但却忽视了弱监督环境下的模态异构性。在本文中，我们分析了多实例学习（MIL）过程的模态异步和未分化实例现象，并进一步研究其对弱监督视听学习的负面影响。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种具有自蒸馏功能的模态感知对比实例学习（MACIL-SD）策略。具体来说，我们利用轻量级双流网络来生成音频和视觉包，其中单峰背景、暴力和正常实例以无监督的方式聚集成半包。然后，将音频和视觉暴力半袋表示组装为正对，并将暴力半袋与相反模态的背景和正常实例组合为对比负对。此外，应用自蒸馏模块将单模态视觉知识转移到视听模型，从而减轻噪声并缩小单模态和多模态特征之间的语义差距。实验表明，我们的框架在大规模 XD-Violence 数据集上以较低的复杂度优于以前的方法。结果还表明，我们提出的方法可以用作插件模块来增强其他网络。代码可在 https://github.com/JustinYuu/MACIL_SD 获取。 本文提出一种基于模态感知对比实例学习与自蒸馏的弱监督音视频暴力检测方法，旨在解决多模态特征异步性和实例混淆问题。 Jiashuo Yu,Jinyu Liu,Ying Cheng,Rui Feng,Yuejie Zhang cs.CV,cs.MM

authors_text: Bo Ju,Zhikang Zou,Xiaoqing Ye,Minyue Jiang,Xiao Tan,Errui Ding,Jingdong Wang
title: Paint and Distill: Boosting 3D Object Detection with Semantic Passing Network
title_zh: 绘制和提取：利用语义传递网络增强 3D 对象检测
abstract: 3D object detection task from lidar or camera sensors is essential for autonomous driving. Pioneer attempts at multi-modality fusion complement the sparse lidar point clouds with rich semantic texture information from images at the cost of extra network designs and overhead. In this work, we propose a novel semantic passing framework, named SPNet, to boost the performance of existing lidar-based 3D detection models with the guidance of rich context painting, with no extra computation cost during inference. Our key design is to first exploit the potential instructive semantic knowledge within the ground-truth labels by training a semantic-painted teacher model and then guide the pure-lidar network to learn the semantic-painted representation via knowledge passing modules at different granularities: class-wise passing, pixel-wise passing and instance-wise passing. Experimental results show that the proposed SPNet can seamlessly cooperate with most existing 3D detection frameworks with 1~5% AP gain and even achieve new state-of-the-art 3D detection performance on the KITTI test benchmark. Code is available at: https://github.com/jb892/SPNet.
summary: 3D object detection task from lidar or camera sensors is essential for autonomous driving. Pioneer attempts at multi-modality fusion complement the sparse lidar point clouds with rich semantic texture information from images at the cost of extra network designs and overhead. In this work, we propose a novel semantic passing framework, named SPNet, to boost the performance of existing lidar-based 3D detection models with the guidance of rich context painting, with no extra computation cost during inference. Our key design is to first exploit the potential instructive semantic knowledge within the ground-truth labels by training a semantic-painted teacher model and then guide the pure-lidar network to learn the semantic-painted representation via knowledge passing modules at different granularities: class-wise passing, pixel-wise passing and instance-wise passing. Experimental results show that the proposed SPNet can seamlessly cooperate with most existing 3D detection frameworks with 1~5% AP gain and even achieve new state-of-the-art 3D detection performance on the KITTI test benchmark. Code is available at: https://github.com/jb892/SPNet.
abstract_zh: 来自激光雷达或摄像头传感器的 3D 物体检测任务对于自动驾驶至关重要。多模态融合的先驱尝试用来自图像的丰富语义纹理信息来补充稀疏激光雷达点云，但代价是额外的网络设计和开销。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的语义传递框架，名为 SPNet，以在丰富的上下文绘制的指导下提高现有基于激光雷达的 3D 检测模型的性能，并且在推理过程中无需额外的计算成本。我们的关键设计是首先通过训练语义绘制教师模型来开发真实标签中潜在的指导性语义知识，然后引导纯激光雷达网络通过不同粒度的知识传递模块学习语义绘制表示：类明智传递、像素明智传递和实例明智传递。实验结果表明，所提出的 SPNet 可以与大多数现有 3D 检测框架无缝配合，AP 增益为 1~5%，甚至在 KITTI 测试基准上实现新的最先进的 3D 检测性能。代码位于：https://github.com/jb892/SPNet。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为SPNet的语义传递网络框架，通过利用图像语义信息提升基于激光雷达的3D物体检测性能，且无需额外计算成本。
AI.motivation: 现有3D检测方法依赖多模态融合但需额外网络设计与计算开销，而SPNet旨在通过语义知识传递提升纯激光雷达检测模型性能，降低计算负担。
AI.method: 训练语义涂画教师模型，通过类级、像素级和实例级知识传递模块，将语义信息引导至纯激光雷达网络，实现语义表示学习。
AI.result: 实验表明SPNet可无缝集成至主流3D检测框架，提升1~5%的AP指标，并在KITTI基准上达到新的SOTA性能。
AI.conclusion: SPNet通过高效语义传递机制显著提升3D检测性能，验证了语义引导在激光雷达检测中的有效性，具有广泛适用性。

authors_text: Marek Szykuła,Adam Zyzik
title: An Improved Algorithm for Finding the Shortest Synchronizing Words
title_zh: 一种改进的最短同步词查找算法
abstract: A synchronizing word of a deterministic finite complete automaton is a word whose action maps every state to a single one. Finding a shortest or a short synchronizing word is a central computational problem in the theory of synchronizing automata and is applied in other areas such as model-based testing and the theory of codes. Because the problem of finding a shortest synchronizing word is computationally hard, among \emph{exact} algorithms only exponential ones are known. We redesign the previously fastest known exact algorithm based on the bidirectional breadth-first search and improve it with respect to time and space in a practical sense. We develop new algorithmic enhancements and adapt the algorithm to multithreaded and GPU computing. Our experiments show that the new algorithm is multiple times faster than the previously fastest one and its advantage quickly grows with the hardness of the problem instance. Given a modest time limit, we compute the lengths of the shortest synchronizing words for random binary automata up to 570 states, significantly beating the previous record. We refine the experimental estimation of the average reset threshold of these automata. Finally, we develop a general computational package devoted to the problem, where an efficient and practical implementation of our algorithm is included, together with several well-known heuristics.

We refine the experimental estimation of the average reset threshold of these automata. Finally, we develop a general computational package devoted to the problem, where an efficient and practical implementation of our algorithm is included, together with several well-known heuristics.
abstract_zh: 确定性有限完全自动机的同步字是其动作将每个状态映射到单个状态的字。寻找最短或短的同步词是同步自动机理论中的核心计算问题，并且应用于其他领域，例如基于模型的测试和代码理论。因为找到最短同步字的问题在计算上是困难的，所以在 \emph{exact} 算法中只有指数算法是已知的。我们基于双向广度优先搜索重新设计了先前已知最快的精确算法，并在实际意义上在时间和空间方面对其进行了改进。我们开发新的算法增强功能，并使算法适应多线程和 GPU 计算。我们的实验表明，新算法比以前最快的算法快了数倍，并且其优势随着问题实例的难度而迅速增长。在给定适度的时间限制的情况下，我们计算了随机二元自动机的最短同步字的长度，最多 570 个状态，显着打破了之前的记录。我们改进了这些自动机平均重置阈值的实验估计。最后，我们开发了一个专门针对该问题的通用计算包，其中包括我们算法的高效实用实现，以及一些众所周知的启发式方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种改进的精确算法，用于更高效地寻找确定性有限自动机的最短同步词。
AI.motivation: 寻找最短同步词是同步自动机理论中的核心计算问题，但现有精确算法时间复杂度高，难以处理大规模实例。
AI.method: 基于双向广度优先搜索改进算法，优化时间与空间效率，并适配多线程及GPU计算架构。
AI.result: 新算法在实例难度增加时速度优势显著，突破了随机二进制自动机570状态的最短同步词计算记录，并开发了集成多种启发式的计算工具包。
AI.conclusion: 改进的算法在实际效率和可扩展性上取得显著进展，为同步自动机理论及相关应用提供了更实用的计算方案。

search_text: An Improved Algorithm for Finding the Shortest Synchronizing Words 一种改进的最短同步词查找算法 A synchronizing word of a deterministic finite complete automaton is a word whose action maps every state to a single one. Finding a shortest or a short synchronizing word is a central computational problem in the theory of synchronizing automata and is applied in other areas such as model-based testing and the theory of codes. Because the problem of finding a shortest synchronizing word is computationally hard, among \emph{exact} algorithms only exponential ones are known. We redesign the previously fastest known exact algorithm based on the bidirectional breadth-first search and improve it with respect to time and space in a practical sense. We develop new algorithmic enhancements and adapt the algorithm to multithreaded and GPU computing. Our experiments show that the new algorithm is multiple times faster than the previously fastest one and its advantage quickly grows with the hardness of the problem instance. Given a modest time limit, we compute the lengths of the shortest synchronizing words for random binary automata up to 570 states, significantly beating the previous record. We refine the experimental estimation of the average reset threshold of these automata. Finally, we develop a general computational package devoted to the problem, where an efficient and practical implementation of our algorithm is included, together with several well-known heuristics. 确定性有限完全自动机的同步字是其动作将每个状态映射到单个状态的字。寻找最短或短的同步词是同步自动机理论中的核心计算问题，并且应用于其他领域，例如基于模型的测试和代码理论。因为找到最短同步字的问题在计算上是困难的，所以在 \emph{exact} 算法中只有指数算法是已知的。我们基于双向广度优先搜索重新设计了先前已知最快的精确算法，并在实际意义上在时间和空间方面对其进行了改进。我们开发新的算法增强功能，并使算法适应多线程和 GPU 计算。我们的实验表明，新算法比以前最快的算法快了数倍，并且其优势随着问题实例的难度而迅速增长。在给定适度的时间限制的情况下，我们计算了随机二元自动机的最短同步字的长度，最多 570 个状态，显着打破了之前的记录。我们改进了这些自动机平均重置阈值的实验估计。最后，我们开发了一个专门针对该问题的通用计算包，其中包括我们算法的高效实用实现，以及一些众所周知的启发式方法。 本文提出了一种改进的精确算法，用于更高效地寻找确定性有限自动机的最短同步词。 Marek Szykuła,Adam Zyzik cs.FL,cs.DS

authors_text: Hao Xing,Darius Burschka
title: Skeletal Human Action Recognition using Hybrid Attention based Graph Convolutional Network
title_zh: 使用基于混合注意力的图卷积网络进行骨骼人体动作识别
abstract: In skeleton-based action recognition, Graph Convolutional Networks model human skeletal joints as vertices and connect them through an adjacency matrix, which can be seen as a local attention mask. However, in most existing Graph Convolutional Networks, the local attention mask is defined based on natural connections of human skeleton joints and ignores the dynamic relations for example between head, hands and feet joints. In addition, the attention mechanism has been proven effective in Natural Language Processing and image description, which is rarely investigated in existing methods. In this work, we proposed a new adaptive spatial attention layer that extends local attention map to global based on relative distance and relative angle information. Moreover, we design a new initial graph adjacency matrix that connects head, hands and feet, which shows visible improvement in terms of action recognition accuracy. The proposed model is evaluated on two large-scale and challenging datasets in the field of human activities in daily life: NTU-RGB+D and Kinetics skeleton. The results demonstrate that our model has strong performance on both dataset.
summary: In skeleton-based action recognition, Graph Convolutional Networks model human skeletal joints as vertices and connect them through an adjacency matrix, which can be seen as a local attention mask. However, in most existing Graph Convolutional Networks, the local attention mask is defined based on natural connections of human skeleton joints and ignores the dynamic relations for example between head, hands and feet joints. In addition, the attention mechanism has been proven effective in Natural Language Processing and image description, which is rarely investigated in existing methods. In this work, we proposed a new adaptive spatial attention layer that extends local attention map to global based on relative distance and relative angle information. Moreover, we design a new initial graph adjacency matrix that connects head, hands and feet, which shows visible improvement in terms of action recognition accuracy. The proposed model is evaluated on two large-scale and challenging datasets in the field of human activities in daily life: NTU-RGB+D and Kinetics skeleton. The results demonstrate that our model has strong performance on both dataset.
abstract_zh: 在基于骨架的动作识别中，图卷积网络将人类骨骼关节建模为顶点，并通过邻接矩阵将它们连接起来，邻接矩阵可以看作是局部注意掩模。然而，在大多数现有的图卷积网络中，局部注意力掩模是基于人体骨骼关节的自然连接来定义的，而忽略了头、手和脚关节之间的动态关系。此外，注意力机制在自然语言处理和图像描述中已被证明是有效的，这在现有方法中很少被研究。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新的自适应空间注意力层，它根据相对距离和相对角度信息将局部注意力图扩展到全局。此外，我们设计了一个新的初始图邻接矩阵，连接头、手和脚，这在动作识别准确性方面显示出明显的改进。所提出的模型在人类日常生活活动领域的两个大规模且具有挑战性的数据集上进行了评估：NTU-RGB+D 和动力学骨架。结果表明我们的模型在两个数据集上都有很强的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合自适应空间注意力机制和改进图结构的图卷积网络，用于提升骨骼数据驱动的人体动作识别性能。
AI.motivation: 现有图卷积网络的邻接矩阵仅依赖骨骼关节的自然连接关系，忽视了头部、手部和足部等动态部位间的关联，且未充分挖掘注意力机制在动作识别中的潜力。
AI.method: 设计自适应空间注意力层，通过相对距离和角度信息扩展局部注意力至全局；构建连接头/手/足的关键部位初始邻接矩阵，形成混合注意力机制的图卷积网络。
AI.result: 在NTU-RGB+D和Kinetics skeleton两个大规模数据集上均取得优于现有方法的识别准确率，验证了模型有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入动态关系建模的自适应注意力机制和优化图结构，显著提升了骨骼动作识别的准确性和鲁棒性。

authors_text: Telikepalli Kavitha
title: Popular Matchings with One-Sided Bias
title_zh: 带有片面偏见的热门搭配
comment: A preliminary version of this paper appeared in Proc. of the 47th International Colloquium on Automata, Languages, and Programming (ICALP 2020), 70:1--70:18, 2020
comments: A preliminary version of this paper appeared in Proc. of the 47th International Colloquium on Automata, Languages, and Programming (ICALP 2020), 70:1--70:18, 2020
abstract: Let $G = (A \cup B,E)$ be a bipartite graph where the set $A$ consists of agents or main players and the set $B$ consists of jobs or secondary players. Every vertex has a strict ranking of its neighbors. A matching $M$ is popular if for any matching $N$, the number of vertices that prefer $M$ to $N$ is at least the number that prefer $N$ to $M$. Popular matchings always exist in $G$ since every stable matching is popular. A matching $M$ is $A$-popular if for any matching $N$, the number of agents (i.e., vertices in $A$) that prefer $M$ to $N$ is at least the number of agents that prefer $N$ to $M$. Unlike popular matchings, $A$-popular matchings need not exist in a given instance $G$ and there is a simple linear time algorithm to decide if $G$ admits an $A$-popular matching and compute one, if so. We consider the problem of deciding if $G$ admits a matching that is both popular and $A$-popular and finding one, if so. We call such matchings fully popular. A fully popular matching is useful when $A$ is the more important side -- so along with overall popularity, we would like to maintain ``popularity within the set $A$''. A fully popular matching is not necessarily a min-size/max-size popular matching and all known polynomial-time algorithms for popular matching problems compute either min-size or max-size popular matchings. Here we show a linear time algorithm for the fully popular matching problem, thus our result shows a new tractable subclass of popular matchings.
summary: Let $G = (A \cup B,E)$ be a bipartite graph where the set $A$ consists of agents or main players and the set $B$ consists of jobs or secondary players. Every vertex has a strict ranking of its neighbors. A matching $M$ is popular if for any matching $N$, the number of vertices that prefer $M$ to $N$ is at least the number that prefer $N$ to $M$. Popular matchings always exist in $G$ since every stable matching is popular. A matching $M$ is $A$-popular if for any matching $N$, the number of agents (i.e., vertices in $A$) that prefer $M$ to $N$ is at least the number of agents that prefer $N$ to $M$. Unlike popular matchings, $A$-popular matchings need not exist in a given instance $G$ and there is a simple linear time algorithm to decide if $G$ admits an $A$-popular matching and compute one, if so. We consider the problem of deciding if $G$ admits a matching that is both popular and $A$-popular and finding one, if so. We call such matchings fully popular. A fully popular matching is useful when $A$ is the more important side -- so along with overall popularity, we would like to maintain ``popularity within the set $A$''. A fully popular matching is not necessarily a min-size/max-size popular matching and all known polynomial-time algorithms for popular matching problems compute either min-size or max-size popular matchings. Here we show a linear time algorithm for the fully popular matching problem, thus our result shows a new tractable subclass of popular matchings.
abstract_zh: 令 $G = (A \cup B,E)$ 为二分图，其中集合 $A$ 由代理人或主要参与者组成，集合 $B$ 由工作或次要参与者组成。每个顶点对其邻居都有严格的排序。如果对于任何匹配 $N$，相比于 $N$ 更喜欢 $M$ 的顶点数至少是比 $M$ 更喜欢 $N$ 的顶点数，则匹配 $M$ 是受欢迎的。热门匹配始终存在于 $G$ 中，因为每个稳定的匹配都是热门的。如果对于任何匹配的 $N$，相比于 $N$ 更喜欢 $M$ 的智能体（即 $A$ 中的顶点）的数量至少是比 $M$ 更喜欢 $N$ 的智能体的数量，则匹配的 $M$ 是 $A$ 流行的。与流行匹配不同，$A$-流行匹配不需要存在于给定实例$G$中，并且有一个简单的线性时间算法来决定$G$是否承认$A$-流行匹配并计算一个，如果是的话。我们考虑这样的问题：决定 $G$ 是否承认一个既受欢迎又$A$-受欢迎的匹配，如果是的话，找到一个。我们称这种匹配为完全流行。当 $A$ 是更重要的一方时，完全流行的匹配非常有用 - 因此，除了整体流行度之外，我们还希望保持“$A$ 集合中的流行度”。完全流行的匹配不一定是最小尺寸/最大尺寸的流行匹配，并且所有已知的流行匹配问题的多项式时间算法都计算最小尺寸或最大尺寸的流行匹配。在这里，我们展示了完全流行的匹配问题的线性时间算法，因此我们的结果显示了流行匹配的新的易于处理的子类。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在二分图中寻找同时满足整体流行性和A侧流行性的匹配问题，即'完全流行匹配'。
AI.motivation: 现有流行匹配算法仅关注整体或单侧（A或B）的流行性，但实际场景中需同时保障A侧（重要参与者）的偏好与整体流行性，因此需要新的算法框架。
AI.method: 提出线性时间算法，判断图中是否存在完全流行匹配并构造该匹配，通过扩展传统流行匹配的定义和约束条件实现。
AI.result: 证明完全流行匹配问题可在线性时间内解决，并发现该问题构成流行匹配的一个新可解子类。
AI.conclusion: 该成果为需要兼顾整体稳定性与关键群体偏好的场景（如招聘市场）提供了高效算法支持。

search_text: Popular Matchings with One-Sided Bias 带有片面偏见的热门搭配 Let $G = (A \cup B,E)$ be a bipartite graph where the set $A$ consists of agents or main players and the set $B$ consists of jobs or secondary players. Every vertex has a strict ranking of its neighbors. A matching $M$ is popular if for any matching $N$, the number of vertices that prefer $M$ to $N$ is at least the number that prefer $N$ to $M$. Popular matchings always exist in $G$ since every stable matching is popular. A matching $M$ is $A$-popular if for any matching $N$, the number of agents (i.e., vertices in $A$) that prefer $M$ to $N$ is at least the number of agents that prefer $N$ to $M$. Unlike popular matchings, $A$-popular matchings need not exist in a given instance $G$ and there is a simple linear time algorithm to decide if $G$ admits an $A$-popular matching and compute one, if so. We consider the problem of deciding if $G$ admits a matching that is both popular and $A$-popular and finding one, if so. We call such matchings fully popular. A fully popular matching is useful when $A$ is the more important side -- so along with overall popularity, we would like to maintain ``popularity within the set $A$''. A fully popular matching is not necessarily a min-size/max-size popular matching and all known polynomial-time algorithms for popular matching problems compute either min-size or max-size popular matchings. Here we show a linear time algorithm for the fully popular matching problem, thus our result shows a new tractable subclass of popular matchings. 令 $G = (A \cup B,E)$ 为二分图，其中集合 $A$ 由代理人或主要参与者组成，集合 $B$ 由工作或次要参与者组成。每个顶点对其邻居都有严格的排序。如果对于任何匹配 $N$，相比于 $N$ 更喜欢 $M$ 的顶点数至少是比 $M$ 更喜欢 $N$ 的顶点数，则匹配 $M$ 是受欢迎的。热门匹配始终存在于 $G$ 中，因为每个稳定的匹配都是热门的。如果对于任何匹配的 $N$，相比于 $N$ 更喜欢 $M$ 的智能体（即 $A$ 中的顶点）的数量至少是比 $M$ 更喜欢 $N$ 的智能体的数量，则匹配的 $M$ 是 $A$ 流行的。与流行匹配不同，$A$-流行匹配不需要存在于给定实例$G$中，并且有一个简单的线性时间算法来决定$G$是否承认$A$-流行匹配并计算一个，如果是的话。我们考虑这样的问题：决定 $G$ 是否承认一个既受欢迎又$A$-受欢迎的匹配，如果是的话，找到一个。我们称这种匹配为完全流行。当 $A$ 是更重要的一方时，完全流行的匹配非常有用 - 因此，除了整体流行度之外，我们还希望保持“$A$ 集合中的流行度”。完全流行的匹配不一定是最小尺寸/最大尺寸的流行匹配，并且所有已知的流行匹配问题的多项式时间算法都计算最小尺寸或最大尺寸的流行匹配。在这里，我们展示了完全流行的匹配问题的线性时间算法，因此我们的结果显示了流行匹配的新的易于处理的子类。 本文研究了在二分图中寻找同时满足整体流行性和A侧流行性的匹配问题，即'完全流行匹配'。 Telikepalli Kavitha cs.DS

authors_text: Siyu Ren,Yiming Zeng,Junhui Hou,Xiaodong Chen
title: CorrI2P: Deep Image-to-Point Cloud Registration via Dense Correspondence
title_zh: CorrI2P：通过密集对应进行深度图像到点云配准
abstract: Motivated by the intuition that the critical step of localizing a 2D image in the corresponding 3D point cloud is establishing 2D-3D correspondence between them, we propose the first feature-based dense correspondence framework for addressing the image-to-point cloud registration problem, dubbed CorrI2P, which consists of three modules, i.e., feature embedding, symmetric overlapping region detection, and pose estimation through the established correspondence. Specifically, given a pair of a 2D image and a 3D point cloud, we first transform them into high-dimensional feature space and feed the resulting features into a symmetric overlapping region detector to determine the region where the image and point cloud overlap each other. Then we use the features of the overlapping regions to establish the 2D-3D correspondence before running EPnP within RANSAC to estimate the camera's pose. Experimental results on KITTI and NuScenes datasets show that our CorrI2P outperforms state-of-the-art image-to-point cloud registration methods significantly. We will make the code publicly available.
summary: Motivated by the intuition that the critical step of localizing a 2D image in the corresponding 3D point cloud is establishing 2D-3D correspondence between them, we propose the first feature-based dense correspondence framework for addressing the image-to-point cloud registration problem, dubbed CorrI2P, which consists of three modules, i.e., feature embedding, symmetric overlapping region detection, and pose estimation through the established correspondence. Specifically, given a pair of a 2D image and a 3D point cloud, we first transform them into high-dimensional feature space and feed the resulting features into a symmetric overlapping region detector to determine the region where the image and point cloud overlap each other. Then we use the features of the overlapping regions to establish the 2D-3D correspondence before running EPnP within RANSAC to estimate the camera's pose. Experimental results on KITTI and NuScenes datasets show that our CorrI2P outperforms state-of-the-art image-to-point cloud registration methods significantly. We will make the code publicly available.
abstract_zh: 直觉认为，在相应的 3D 点云中定位 2D 图像的关键步骤是在它们之间建立 2D-3D 对应关系，我们提出了第一个用于解决图像到点云配准问题的基于特征的密集对应框架，称为 CorrI2P，它由三个模块组成，即特征嵌入、对称重叠区域检测和通过建立的对应关系进行姿态估计。具体来说，给定一对 2D 图像和 3D 点云，我们首先将它们转换为高维特征空间，并将所得特征输入对称重叠区域检测器，以确定图像和点云彼此重叠的区域。然后，我们使用重叠区域的特征来建立 2D-3D 对应关系，然后在 RANSAC 内运行 EPnP 来估计相机的姿态。 KITTI 和 NuScenes 数据集上的实验结果表明，我们的 CorrI2P 显着优于最先进的图像到点云配准方法。我们将公开该代码。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的图像到点云配准方法CorrI2P，通过建立密集的2D-3D对应关系实现图像与点云的对齐。
AI.motivation: 图像在三维点云中的定位关键在于建立2D-3D对应关系，但现有方法在密集对应和鲁棒性方面存在不足。
AI.method: 方法包含三个模块：特征嵌入（将图像和点云映射到高维特征空间）、对称重叠区域检测（确定图像与点云的重叠区域）、基于对应关系的位姿估计（通过EPnP和RANSAC计算相机位姿）。
AI.result: 在KITTI和NuScenes数据集上的实验表明，CorrI2P显著优于现有图像到点云配准方法。
AI.conclusion: CorrI2P通过密集对应关系有效解决了图像与点云配准问题，代码将公开发布。

authors_text: Yao Chen,Yuanhan Mo,Aimee Readie,Gregory Ligozio,Thibaud Coroller,Bartlomiej W. Papiez
title: VertXNet: Automatic Segmentation and Identification of Lumbar and Cervical Vertebrae from Spinal X-ray Images
title_zh: VertXNet：从脊柱 X 射线图像中自动分割和识别腰椎和颈椎
abstract: Manual annotation of vertebrae on spinal X-ray imaging is costly and time-consuming due to bone shape complexity and image quality variations. In this study, we address this challenge by proposing an ensemble method called VertXNet, to automatically segment and label vertebrae in X-ray spinal images. VertXNet combines two state-of-the-art segmentation models, namely U-Net and Mask R-CNN to improve vertebrae segmentation. A main feature of VertXNet is to also infer vertebrae labels thanks to its Mask R-CNN component (trained to detect 'reference' vertebrae) on a given spinal X-ray image. VertXNet was evaluated on an in-house dataset of lateral cervical and lumbar X-ray imaging for ankylosing spondylitis (AS) patients. Our results show that VertXNet can accurately label spinal X-rays (mean Dice of 0.9). It can be used to circumvent the lack of annotated vertebrae without requiring human expert review. This step is crucial to investigate clinical associations by solving the lack of segmentation, a common bottleneck for most computational imaging projects.
summary: Manual annotation of vertebrae on spinal X-ray imaging is costly and time-consuming due to bone shape complexity and image quality variations. In this study, we address this challenge by proposing an ensemble method called VertXNet, to automatically segment and label vertebrae in X-ray spinal images. VertXNet combines two state-of-the-art segmentation models, namely U-Net and Mask R-CNN to improve vertebrae segmentation. A main feature of VertXNet is to also infer vertebrae labels thanks to its Mask R-CNN component (trained to detect 'reference' vertebrae) on a given spinal X-ray image. VertXNet was evaluated on an in-house dataset of lateral cervical and lumbar X-ray imaging for ankylosing spondylitis (AS) patients. Our results show that VertXNet can accurately label spinal X-rays (mean Dice of 0.9). It can be used to circumvent the lack of annotated vertebrae without requiring human expert review. This step is crucial to investigate clinical associations by solving the lack of segmentation, a common bottleneck for most computational imaging projects.
abstract_zh: 由于骨骼形状的复杂性和图像质量的变化，在脊柱 X 射线成像上对椎骨进行手动注释既昂贵又耗时。在本研究中，我们通过提出一种名为 VertXNet 的集成方法来解决这一挑战，以自动分割和标记 X 射线脊柱图像中的椎骨。 VertXNet 结合了两种最先进的分割模型，即 U-Net 和 Mask R-CNN，以改进椎骨分割。 VertXNet 的一个主要功能是还可以通过其 Mask R-CNN 组件（经过训练以检测给定脊柱 X 射线图像上的“参考”椎骨）来推断椎骨标签。 VertXNet 在强直性脊柱炎 (AS) 患者颈椎侧位和腰椎 X 射线成像的内部数据集上进行了评估。我们的结果表明，VertXNet 可以准确地标记脊柱 X 射线（平均 Dice 为 0.9）。它可以用来避免缺乏注释的椎骨，而不需要人类专家的审查。此步骤对于通过解决分割缺乏（大多数计算成像项目的常见瓶颈）来研究临床关联至关重要。

AI.tldr: 本文提出VertXNet方法，通过结合U-Net和Mask R-CNN模型，实现对脊柱X光图像中腰椎和颈椎的自动分割与识别。
AI.motivation: 手动标注脊柱X光图像中的椎骨因骨结构复杂和图像质量差异而耗时耗力，且缺乏标注数据会阻碍临床研究，需开发自动化解决方案。
AI.method: VertXNet采用U-Net和Mask R-CNN的集成方法，利用Mask R-CNN检测参考椎骨以推断标签，结合分割模型提升准确性。
AI.result: 在强直性脊柱炎患者的颈椎和腰椎X光数据集上，VertXNet达到0.9的平均Dice系数，可无需人工审核实现精准标注。
AI.conclusion: VertXNet有效解决了椎骨分割与标签识别难题，为临床关联研究提供了无需人工干预的标注方案，突破了计算成像项目的常见瓶颈。

search_text: VertXNet: Automatic Segmentation and Identification of Lumbar and Cervical Vertebrae from Spinal X-ray Images VertXNet：从脊柱 X 射线图像中自动分割和识别腰椎和颈椎 Manual annotation of vertebrae on spinal X-ray imaging is costly and time-consuming due to bone shape complexity and image quality variations. In this study, we address this challenge by proposing an ensemble method called VertXNet, to automatically segment and label vertebrae in X-ray spinal images. VertXNet combines two state-of-the-art segmentation models, namely U-Net and Mask R-CNN to improve vertebrae segmentation. A main feature of VertXNet is to also infer vertebrae labels thanks to its Mask R-CNN component (trained to detect 'reference' vertebrae) on a given spinal X-ray image. VertXNet was evaluated on an in-house dataset of lateral cervical and lumbar X-ray imaging for ankylosing spondylitis (AS) patients. Our results show that VertXNet can accurately label spinal X-rays (mean Dice of 0.9). It can be used to circumvent the lack of annotated vertebrae without requiring human expert review. This step is crucial to investigate clinical associations by solving the lack of segmentation, a common bottleneck for most computational imaging projects. 由于骨骼形状的复杂性和图像质量的变化，在脊柱 X 射线成像上对椎骨进行手动注释既昂贵又耗时。在本研究中，我们通过提出一种名为 VertXNet 的集成方法来解决这一挑战，以自动分割和标记 X 射线脊柱图像中的椎骨。 VertXNet 结合了两种最先进的分割模型，即 U-Net 和 Mask R-CNN，以改进椎骨分割。 VertXNet 的一个主要功能是还可以通过其 Mask R-CNN 组件（经过训练以检测给定脊柱 X 射线图像上的“参考”椎骨）来推断椎骨标签。 VertXNet 在强直性脊柱炎 (AS) 患者颈椎侧位和腰椎 X 射线成像的内部数据集上进行了评估。我们的结果表明，VertXNet 可以准确地标记脊柱 X 射线（平均 Dice 为 0.9）。它可以用来避免缺乏注释的椎骨，而不需要人类专家的审查。此步骤对于通过解决分割缺乏（大多数计算成像项目的常见瓶颈）来研究临床关联至关重要。 本文提出VertXNet方法，通过结合U-Net和Mask R-CNN模型，实现对脊柱X光图像中腰椎和颈椎的自动分割与识别。 Yao Chen,Yuanhan Mo,Aimee Readie,Gregory Ligozio,Thibaud Coroller,Bartlomiej W. Papiez eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Vinod Patidar,Gurpreet Kaur
title: A novel conservative chaos driven dynamic DNA coding for image encryption
title_zh: 一种新颖的保守混沌驱动的动态 DNA 编码图像加密
abstract: In this paper, we propose a novel conservative chaotic standard map-driven dynamic DNA coding (encoding, addition, subtraction and decoding) for the image encryption. The proposed image encryption algorithm is a dynamic DNA coding algorithm i.e., for the encryption of each pixel different rules for encoding, addition/subtraction, decoding etc. are randomly selected based on the pseudorandom sequences generated with the help of the conservative chaotic standard map. We propose a novel way to generate pseudo-random sequences through the conservative chaotic standard map and also test them rigorously through the most stringent test suite of pseudo-randomness, the NIST test suite, before using them in the proposed image encryption algorithm. Our image encryption algorithm incorporates a unique feed-forward and feedback mechanisms to generate and modify the dynamic one-time pixels that are further used for the encryption of each pixel of the plain image, therefore, bringing in the desired sensitivity on plaintext as well as ciphertext. All the controlling pseudorandom sequences used in the algorithm are generated for a different value of the parameter (part of the secret key) with inter-dependency through the iterates of the chaotic map (in the generation process) and therefore possess extreme key sensitivity too. The performance and security analysis has been executed extensively through histogram analysis, correlation analysis, information entropy analysis, DNA sequence-based analysis, perceptual quality analysis, key sensitivity analysis, plaintext sensitivity analysis, etc., The results are promising and prove the robustness of the algorithm against various common cryptanalytic attacks.
summary: In this paper, we propose a novel conservative chaotic standard map-driven dynamic DNA coding (encoding, addition, subtraction and decoding) for the image encryption. The proposed image encryption algorithm is a dynamic DNA coding algorithm i.e., for the encryption of each pixel different rules for encoding, addition/subtraction, decoding etc. are randomly selected based on the pseudorandom sequences generated with the help of the conservative chaotic standard map. We propose a novel way to generate pseudo-random sequences through the conservative chaotic standard map and also test them rigorously through the most stringent test suite of pseudo-randomness, the NIST test suite, before using them in the proposed image encryption algorithm. Our image encryption algorithm incorporates a unique feed-forward and feedback mechanisms to generate and modify the dynamic one-time pixels that are further used for the encryption of each pixel of the plain image, therefore, bringing in the desired sensitivity on plaintext as well as ciphertext. All the controlling pseudorandom sequences used in the algorithm are generated for a different value of the parameter (part of the secret key) with inter-dependency through the iterates of the chaotic map (in the generation process) and therefore possess extreme key sensitivity too. The performance and security analysis has been executed extensively through histogram analysis, correlation analysis, information entropy analysis, DNA sequence-based analysis, perceptual quality analysis, key sensitivity analysis, plaintext sensitivity analysis, etc., The results are promising and prove the robustness of the algorithm against various common cryptanalytic attacks.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的保守混沌标准映射驱动的动态 DNA 编码（编码、加法、减法和解码）用于图像加密。所提出的图像加密算法是一种动态DNA编码算法，即，对于每个像素的加密，基于借助保守混沌标准图生成的伪随机序列随机选择不同的编码、加/减、解码等规则。我们提出了一种通过保守混沌标准图生成伪随机序列的新颖方法，并在将它们用于所提出的图像加密算法之前，通过最严格的伪随机性测试套件（NIST 测试套件）对其进行严格测试。我们的图像加密算法采用独特的前馈和反馈机制来生成和修改动态一次性像素，这些像素进一步用于加密明文图像的每个像素，因此，为明文和密文带来所需的灵敏度。该算法中使用的所有控制伪随机序列都是通过混沌映射的迭代（在生成过程中）针对不同的参数值（秘密密钥的一部分）生成的，并且具有相互依赖性，因此也具有极高的密钥敏感性。通过直方图分析、相关性分析、信息熵分析、基于DNA序列的分析、感知质量分析、密钥敏感性分析、明文敏感性分析等广泛执行了性能和安全性分析，结果令人鼓舞，并证明了算法对各种常见密码分析攻击的鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于保守混沌标准地图的动态DNA编码图像加密算法，通过动态调整编码规则提升加密安全性。
AI.motivation: 传统图像加密算法存在密钥敏感性不足和抗攻击能力弱的问题，需设计更复杂的动态加密机制以增强安全性。
AI.method: 利用保守混沌标准地图生成伪随机序列驱动DNA编码过程，结合前馈与反馈机制动态生成加密像素，通过NIST测试验证序列随机性。
AI.result: 实验表明算法在直方图分析、信息熵、密钥敏感性等指标表现优异，能有效抵御常见密码分析攻击。
AI.conclusion: 该动态DNA编码方案显著提升了图像加密的鲁棒性和安全性，验证了保守混沌系统在加密领域的应用潜力。

authors_text: Matteo Zambra,Alberto Testolin,Marco Zorzi
title: A developmental approach for training deep belief networks
title_zh: 训练深度信念网络的开发方法
abstract: Deep belief networks (DBNs) are stochastic neural networks that can extract rich internal representations of the environment from the sensory data. DBNs had a catalytic effect in triggering the deep learning revolution, demonstrating for the very first time the feasibility of unsupervised learning in networks with many layers of hidden neurons. These hierarchical architectures incorporate plausible biological and cognitive properties, making them particularly appealing as computational models of human perception and cognition. However, learning in DBNs is usually carried out in a greedy, layer-wise fashion, which does not allow to simulate the holistic maturation of cortical circuits and prevents from modeling cognitive development. Here we present iDBN, an iterative learning algorithm for DBNs that allows to jointly update the connection weights across all layers of the model. We evaluate the proposed iterative algorithm on two different sets of visual stimuli, measuring the generative capabilities of the learned model and its potential to support supervised downstream tasks. We also track network development in terms of graph theoretical properties and investigate the potential extension of iDBN to continual learning scenarios. DBNs trained using our iterative approach achieve a final performance comparable to that of the greedy counterparts, at the same time allowing to accurately analyze the gradual development of internal representations in the deep network and the progressive improvement in task performance. Our work paves the way to the use of iDBN for modeling neurocognitive development.
summary: Deep belief networks (DBNs) are stochastic neural networks that can extract rich internal representations of the environment from the sensory data. DBNs had a catalytic effect in triggering the deep learning revolution, demonstrating for the very first time the feasibility of unsupervised learning in networks with many layers of hidden neurons. These hierarchical architectures incorporate plausible biological and cognitive properties, making them particularly appealing as computational models of human perception and cognition. However, learning in DBNs is usually carried out in a greedy, layer-wise fashion, which does not allow to simulate the holistic maturation of cortical circuits and prevents from modeling cognitive development. Here we present iDBN, an iterative learning algorithm for DBNs that allows to jointly update the connection weights across all layers of the model. We evaluate the proposed iterative algorithm on two different sets of visual stimuli, measuring the generative capabilities of the learned model and its potential to support supervised downstream tasks. We also track network development in terms of graph theoretical properties and investigate the potential extension of iDBN to continual learning scenarios. DBNs trained using our iterative approach achieve a final performance comparable to that of the greedy counterparts, at the same time allowing to accurately analyze the gradual development of internal representations in the deep network and the progressive improvement in task performance. Our work paves the way to the use of iDBN for modeling neurocognitive development.
abstract_zh: 深度信念网络（DBN）是随机神经网络，可以从感知数据中提取丰富的环境内部表征。 DBN 在引发深度学习革命方面发挥了催化作用，首次证明了在具有多层隐藏神经元的网络中进行无监督学习的可行性。这些层次结构结合了合理的生物学和认知特性，使它们作为人类感知和认知的计算模型特别有吸引力。然而，DBN 中的学习通常以贪婪、分层的方式进行，这不允许模拟皮质回路的整体成熟，也无法对认知发展进行建模。在这里，我们提出 iDBN，一种 DBN 迭代学习算法，允许联合更新模型所有层的连接权重。我们在两组不同的视觉刺激上评估所提出的迭代算法，测量学习模型的生成能力及其支持监督下游任务的潜力。我们还根据图论特性跟踪网络发展，并研究 iDBN 到持续学习场景的潜在扩展。使用我们的迭代方法训练的 DBN 达到了与贪婪对应模型相当的最终性能，同时允许准确分析深层网络中内部表示的逐步发展和任务性能的逐步改进。我们的工作为使用 iDBN 模拟神经认知发展铺平了道路。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为iDBN的迭代学习算法，用于联合更新深度信念网络（DBN）各层的连接权重，以更准确地模拟神经认知发育过程。
AI.motivation: 传统DBN采用贪婪逐层训练方式，无法模拟大脑皮层电路的整体成熟过程，限制了对认知发展的建模能力。
AI.method: 开发iDBN算法实现跨层联合权重更新，通过视觉刺激数据集评估生成能力与监督任务性能，并从图论角度追踪网络发展特性。
AI.result: iDBN最终性能与贪婪算法相当，同时能精确分析内部表征的渐进发展及任务性能提升过程，验证了其在持续学习场景的扩展潜力。
AI.conclusion: iDBN为建立神经认知发育的计算模型提供了新方法，推动了深度学习与认知科学的交叉研究。

We also track network development in terms of graph theoretical properties and investigate the potential extension of iDBN to continual learning scenarios. DBNs trained using our iterative approach achieve a final performance comparable to that of the greedy counterparts, at the same time allowing to accurately analyze the gradual development of internal representations in the deep network and the progressive improvement in task performance. Our work paves the way to the use of iDBN for modeling neurocognitive development. 深度信念网络（DBN）是随机神经网络，可以从感知数据中提取丰富的环境内部表征。 DBN 在引发深度学习革命方面发挥了催化作用，首次证明了在具有多层隐藏神经元的网络中进行无监督学习的可行性。这些层次结构结合了合理的生物学和认知特性，使它们作为人类感知和认知的计算模型特别有吸引力。然而，DBN 中的学习通常以贪婪、分层的方式进行，这不允许模拟皮质回路的整体成熟，也无法对认知发展进行建模。在这里，我们提出 iDBN，一种 DBN 迭代学习算法，允许联合更新模型所有层的连接权重。我们在两组不同的视觉刺激上评估所提出的迭代算法，测量学习模型的生成能力及其支持监督下游任务的潜力。我们还根据图论特性跟踪网络发展，并研究 iDBN 到持续学习场景的潜在扩展。使用我们的迭代方法训练的 DBN 达到了与贪婪对应模型相当的最终性能，同时允许准确分析深层网络中内部表示的逐步发展和任务性能的逐步改进。我们的工作为使用 iDBN 模拟神经认知发展铺平了道路。 本文提出了一种名为iDBN的迭代学习算法，用于联合更新深度信念网络（DBN）各层的连接权重，以更准确地模拟神经认知发育过程。 Matteo Zambra,Alberto Testolin,Marco Zorzi cs.LG,cs.NE

authors_text: Chau Yi Li,Andrea Cavallaro
title: On the limits of perceptual quality measures for enhanced underwater images
title_zh: 增强水下图像感知质量测量的局限性
abstract: The appearance of objects in underwater images is degraded by the selective attenuation of light, which reduces contrast and causes a colour cast. This degradation depends on the water environment, and increases with depth and with the distance of the object from the camera. Despite an increasing volume of works in underwater image enhancement and restoration, the lack of a commonly accepted evaluation measure is hindering the progress as it is difficult to compare methods. In this paper, we review commonly used colour accuracy measures, such as colour reproduction error and CIEDE2000, and no-reference image quality measures, such as UIQM, UCIQE and CCF, which have not yet been systematically validated. We show that none of the no-reference quality measures satisfactorily rates the quality of enhanced underwater images and discuss their main shortcomings. Images and results are available at https://puiqe.eecs.qmul.ac.uk.
summary: The appearance of objects in underwater images is degraded by the selective attenuation of light, which reduces contrast and causes a colour cast. This degradation depends on the water environment, and increases with depth and with the distance of the object from the camera. Despite an increasing volume of works in underwater image enhancement and restoration, the lack of a commonly accepted evaluation measure is hindering the progress as it is difficult to compare methods. In this paper, we review commonly used colour accuracy measures, such as colour reproduction error and CIEDE2000, and no-reference image quality measures, such as UIQM, UCIQE and CCF, which have not yet been systematically validated. We show that none of the no-reference quality measures satisfactorily rates the quality of enhanced underwater images and discuss their main shortcomings. Images and results are available at https://puiqe.eecs.qmul.ac.uk.
abstract_zh: 水下图像中物体的外观会因光的选择性衰减而降低，从而降低对比度并导致色偏。这种退化取决于水环境，并且随着深度以及物体距相机的距离而增加。尽管水下图像增强和恢复方面的工作量不断增加，但由于难以比较方法，缺乏普遍接受的评估措施阻碍了进展。在本文中，我们回顾了常用的颜色精度测量，例如颜色再现误差和 CIEDE2000，以及尚未经过系统验证的无参考图像质量测量，例如 UIQM、UCIQE 和 CCF。我们表明，没有一种无参考质量测量方法能够令人满意地评价增强水下图像的质量，并讨论了它们的主要缺点。图像和结果可在 https://puiqe.eecs.qmul.ac.uk 上获取。

AI.tldr: 评估现有无参考质量度量在增强水下图像中的有效性
AI.motivation: 由于缺乏公认的评估标准，难以比较不同水下图像增强方法的效果
AI.method: 回顾并分析了多种色彩准确度和无参考图像质量度量方法
AI.result: 发现现有无参考质量度量无法有效评估增强后水下图像的质量
AI.conclusion: 现有无参考质量度量存在局限性，需进一步研究更有效的评估方法

authors_text: Martin Flechl,Shou-Chun Yin,Junho Park,Peter Skala
title: End-to-end speech recognition modeling from de-identified data
title_zh: 根据去识别化数据进行端到端语音识别建模
abstract: De-identification of data used for automatic speech recognition modeling is a critical component in protecting privacy, especially in the medical domain. However, simply removing all personally identifiable information (PII) from end-to-end model training data leads to a significant performance degradation in particular for the recognition of names, dates, locations, and words from similar categories. We propose and evaluate a two-step method for partially recovering this loss. First, PII is identified, and each occurrence is replaced with a random word sequence of the same category. Then, corresponding audio is produced via text-to-speech or by splicing together matching audio fragments extracted from the corpus. These artificial audio/label pairs, together with speaker turns from the original data without PII, are used to train models. We evaluate the performance of this method on in-house data of medical conversations and observe a recovery of almost the entire performance degradation in the general word error rate while still maintaining a strong diarization performance. Our main focus is the improvement of recall and precision in the recognition of PII-related words. Depending on the PII category, between $50\% - 90\%$ of the performance degradation can be recovered using our proposed method.
summary: De-identification of data used for automatic speech recognition modeling is a critical component in protecting privacy, especially in the medical domain. However, simply removing all personally identifiable information (PII) from end-to-end model training data leads to a significant performance degradation in particular for the recognition of names, dates, locations, and words from similar categories. We propose and evaluate a two-step method for partially recovering this loss. First, PII is identified, and each occurrence is replaced with a random word sequence of the same category. Then, corresponding audio is produced via text-to-speech or by splicing together matching audio fragments extracted from the corpus. These artificial audio/label pairs, together with speaker turns from the original data without PII, are used to train models. We evaluate the performance of this method on in-house data of medical conversations and observe a recovery of almost the entire performance degradation in the general word error rate while still maintaining a strong diarization performance. Our main focus is the improvement of recall and precision in the recognition of PII-related words. Depending on the PII category, between $50\% - 90\%$ of the performance degradation can be recovered using our proposed method.
abstract_zh: 用于自动语音识别建模的数据的去标识化是保护隐私的关键组成部分，尤其是在医疗领域。然而，简单地从端到端模型训练数据中删除所有个人身份信息 (PII) 会导致性能显着下降，特别是在识别类似类别的名称、日期、位置和单词时。我们提出并评估了一种两步方法来部分恢复这种损失。首先，识别 PII，并将每次出现的事件替换为同一类别的随机单词序列。然后，通过文本转语音或将从语料库中提取的匹配音频片段拼接在一起来产生相应的音频。这些人工音频/标签对以及来自不含 PII 的原始数据的说话者轮流用于训练模型。我们在医学对话的内部数据上评估了该方法的性能，并观察到一般单词错误率中几乎全部性能下降的恢复，同时仍然保持强大的二值化性能。我们的主要重点是提高 PII 相关单词识别的召回率和精确度。根据 PII 类别，使用我们提出的方法可以恢复 $50\% - 90\%$ 的性能下降。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种端到端语音识别建模方法，通过去标识化数据保护隐私，同时减少性能下降。
AI.motivation: 在医疗领域，语音识别模型训练数据中的个人身份信息（PII）去标识化会导致模型性能显著下降，尤其是对名称、日期等类别词汇的识别。
AI.method: 采用两步法：首先将PII替换为相同类别的随机词序列，再通过文本转语音或音频片段拼接生成合成音频，结合原始非PII数据训练模型。
AI.result: 在医疗对话数据集上，该方法恢复了几乎全部的词错误率下降，同时保持良好的说话人分割性能，PII相关词汇的识别召回率和精确率提升50%-90%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效缓解了去标识化数据导致的性能损失，在隐私保护与模型性能间取得平衡。

authors_text: Florentin Coeurdoux,Nicolas Dobigeon,Pierre Chainais
title: Sliced-Wasserstein normalizing flows: beyond maximum likelihood training
title_zh: Sliced-Wasserstein 标准化流：超越最大似然训练
abstract: Despite their advantages, normalizing flows generally suffer from several shortcomings including their tendency to generate unrealistic data (e.g., images) and their failing to detect out-of-distribution data. One reason for these deficiencies lies in the training strategy which traditionally exploits a maximum likelihood principle only. This paper proposes a new training paradigm based on a hybrid objective function combining the maximum likelihood principle (MLE) and a sliced-Wasserstein distance. Results obtained on synthetic toy examples and real image data sets show better generative abilities in terms of both likelihood and visual aspects of the generated samples. Reciprocally, the proposed approach leads to a lower likelihood of out-of-distribution data, demonstrating a greater data fidelity of the resulting flows.
summary: Despite their advantages, normalizing flows generally suffer from several shortcomings including their tendency to generate unrealistic data (e.g., images) and their failing to detect out-of-distribution data. One reason for these deficiencies lies in the training strategy which traditionally exploits a maximum likelihood principle only. This paper proposes a new training paradigm based on a hybrid objective function combining the maximum likelihood principle (MLE) and a sliced-Wasserstein distance. Results obtained on synthetic toy examples and real image data sets show better generative abilities in terms of both likelihood and visual aspects of the generated samples. Reciprocally, the proposed approach leads to a lower likelihood of out-of-distribution data, demonstrating a greater data fidelity of the resulting flows.
abstract_zh: 尽管有其优点，标准化流通常存在一些缺点，包括它们倾向于生成不切实际的数据（例如图像）以及无法检测分布外的数据。这些缺陷的原因之一在于传统上仅利用最大似然原则的训练策略。本文提出了一种基于混合目标函数的新训练范式，该混合目标函数结合了最大似然原理（MLE）和切片 Wasserstein 距离。在合成玩具示例和真实图像数据集上获得的结果在生成样本的可能性和视觉方面显示出更好的生成能力。相反，所提出的方法可以降低分布外数据的可能性，从而证明结果流的数据保真度更高。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合最大似然估计与切片沃瑟斯坦距离的正则化流训练方法，以解决传统方法生成数据不真实和分布外检测不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统正则化流依赖最大似然估计训练，导致生成数据不真实且难以检测分布外数据，需改进训练策略以提高生成质量与鲁棒性。
AI.method: 设计混合目标函数，将最大似然估计与切片沃瑟斯坦距离结合，优化正则化流的训练过程。
AI.result: 在合成数据与真实图像数据集上，生成样本的似然与视觉质量提升，且对分布外数据的识别能力增强。
AI.conclusion: 新方法通过融合切片沃瑟斯坦距离，显著提升了正则化流的生成能力与数据保真度，同时优化了分布外检测效果。

search_text: Sliced-Wasserstein normalizing flows: beyond maximum likelihood training Sliced-Wasserstein 标准化流：超越最大似然训练 Despite their advantages, normalizing flows generally suffer from several shortcomings including their tendency to generate unrealistic data (e.g., images) and their failing to detect out-of-distribution data. One reason for these deficiencies lies in the training strategy which traditionally exploits a maximum likelihood principle only. This paper proposes a new training paradigm based on a hybrid objective function combining the maximum likelihood principle (MLE) and a sliced-Wasserstein distance. Results obtained on synthetic toy examples and real image data sets show better generative abilities in terms of both likelihood and visual aspects of the generated samples. Reciprocally, the proposed approach leads to a lower likelihood of out-of-distribution data, demonstrating a greater data fidelity of the resulting flows. 尽管有其优点，标准化流通常存在一些缺点，包括它们倾向于生成不切实际的数据（例如图像）以及无法检测分布外的数据。这些缺陷的原因之一在于传统上仅利用最大似然原则的训练策略。本文提出了一种基于混合目标函数的新训练范式，该混合目标函数结合了最大似然原理（MLE）和切片 Wasserstein 距离。在合成玩具示例和真实图像数据集上获得的结果在生成样本的可能性和视觉方面显示出更好的生成能力。相反，所提出的方法可以降低分布外数据的可能性，从而证明结果流的数据保真度更高。 本文提出一种结合最大似然估计与切片沃瑟斯坦距离的正则化流训练方法，以解决传统方法生成数据不真实和分布外检测不足的问题。 Florentin Coeurdoux,Nicolas Dobigeon,Pierre Chainais stat.ML,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Bruno Veloso,João Gama,Rita P. Ribeiro,Pedro M. Pereira
title: A Benchmark dataset for predictive maintenance
title_zh: 预测性维护的基准数据集
abstract: The paper describes the MetroPT data set, an outcome of a eXplainable Predictive Maintenance (XPM) project with an urban metro public transportation service in Porto, Portugal. The data was collected in 2022 that aimed to evaluate machine learning methods for online anomaly detection and failure prediction. By capturing several analogic sensor signals (pressure, temperature, current consumption), digital signals (control signals, discrete signals), and GPS information (latitude, longitude, and speed), we provide a dataset that can be easily used to evaluate online machine learning methods. This dataset contains some interesting characteristics and can be a good benchmark for predictive maintenance models.
summary: The paper describes the MetroPT data set, an outcome of a eXplainable Predictive Maintenance (XPM) project with an urban metro public transportation service in Porto, Portugal. The data was collected in 2022 that aimed to evaluate machine learning methods for online anomaly detection and failure prediction. By capturing several analogic sensor signals (pressure, temperature, current consumption), digital signals (control signals, discrete signals), and GPS information (latitude, longitude, and speed), we provide a dataset that can be easily used to evaluate online machine learning methods. This dataset contains some interesting characteristics and can be a good benchmark for predictive maintenance models.
abstract_zh: 该论文描述了 MetroPT 数据集，该数据集是葡萄牙波尔图城市地铁公共交通服务的可解释预测维护 (XPM) 项目的成果。这些数据收集于 2022 年，旨在评估用于在线异常检测和故障预测的机器学习方法。通过捕获多个模拟传感器信号（压力、温度、电流消耗）、数字信号（控制信号、离散信号）和 GPS 信息（纬度、经度和速度），我们提供了一个可轻松用于评估在线机器学习方法的数据集。该数据集包含一些有趣的特征，可以成为预测维护模型的良好基准。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一个名为MetroPT的预测性维护基准数据集，用于评估在线机器学习方法的异常检测和故障预测能力。
AI.motivation: 现有预测性维护研究缺乏真实场景下的多源异构数据支持，需构建包含传感器、控制信号和GPS信息的基准数据集以推动算法验证。
AI.method: 通过部署传感器采集地铁设备的压力、温度、电流等模拟信号，记录控制信号和GPS数据，构建包含时间序列和空间信息的多模态数据集。
AI.result: 生成包含多种传感器信号和运行状态参数的MetroPT数据集，具备在线学习场景下的异常检测与故障预测研究价值。
AI.conclusion: 该数据集为预测性维护算法提供了真实场景验证平台，可促进可解释AI在工业设备健康监测领域的应用研究。

authors_text: Decheng Liu,Weijie He,Chunlei Peng,Nannan Wang,Jie Li,Xinbo Gao
title: TransFA: Transformer-based Representation for Face Attribute Evaluation
title_zh: TransFA：基于 Transformer 的人脸属性评估表示
abstract: Face attribute evaluation plays an important role in video surveillance and face analysis. Although methods based on convolution neural networks have made great progress, they inevitably only deal with one local neighborhood with convolutions at a time. Besides, existing methods mostly regard face attribute evaluation as the individual multi-label classification task, ignoring the inherent relationship between semantic attributes and face identity information. In this paper, we propose a novel \textbf{trans}former-based representation for \textbf{f}ace \textbf{a}ttribute evaluation method (\textbf{TransFA}), which could effectively enhance the attribute discriminative representation learning in the context of attention mechanism. The multiple branches transformer is employed to explore the inter-correlation between different attributes in similar semantic regions for attribute feature learning. Specially, the hierarchical identity-constraint attribute loss is designed to train the end-to-end architecture, which could further integrate face identity discriminative information to boost performance. Experimental results on multiple face attribute benchmarks demonstrate that the proposed TransFA achieves superior performances compared with state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Face attribute evaluation plays an important role in video surveillance and face analysis. Although methods based on convolution neural networks have made great progress, they inevitably only deal with one local neighborhood with convolutions at a time. Besides, existing methods mostly regard face attribute evaluation as the individual multi-label classification task, ignoring the inherent relationship between semantic attributes and face identity information. In this paper, we propose a novel \textbf{trans}former-based representation for \textbf{f}ace \textbf{a}ttribute evaluation method (\textbf{TransFA}), which could effectively enhance the attribute discriminative representation learning in the context of attention mechanism. The multiple branches transformer is employed to explore the inter-correlation between different attributes in similar semantic regions for attribute feature learning. Specially, the hierarchical identity-constraint attribute loss is designed to train the end-to-end architecture, which could further integrate face identity discriminative information to boost performance. Experimental results on multiple face attribute benchmarks demonstrate that the proposed TransFA achieves superior performances compared with state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 人脸属性评估在视频监控和人脸分析中发挥着重要作用。尽管基于卷积神经网络的方法已经取得了很大的进步，但它们不可避免地一次只能处理一个具有卷积的局部邻域。此外，现有方法大多将人脸属性评估视为个体多标签分类任务，忽略了语义属性与人脸身份信息之间的内在关系。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的基于 \textbf{trans}former 的 \textbf{f}ace \textbf{a} 属性评估方法（\textbf{TransFA}），该方法可以有效增强注意力机制背景下的属性判别表示学习。采用多分支变压器来探索相似语义区域中不同属性之间的相互关联，以进行属性特征学习。特别是，分层身份约束属性损失旨在训练端到端架构，可以进一步集成人脸身份判别信息以提高性能。多个人脸属性基准的实验结果表明，与最先进的方法相比，所提出的 TransFA 实现了卓越的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Transformer的面部属性评估方法TransFA，以提升面部属性判别的准确性。
AI.motivation: 传统卷积神经网络方法在处理面部属性时仅关注局部区域，且忽视属性间语义关系与面部身份信息的关联，导致性能受限。
AI.method: 设计多分支Transformer结构挖掘属性间语义关联，并引入分层身份约束属性损失函数，整合身份信息优化端到端模型训练。
AI.result: 在多个面部属性基准数据集上，TransFA相较现有方法取得更优性能表现。
AI.conclusion: 通过Transformer机制与身份约束损失的结合，TransFA有效增强了面部属性的判别性表征学习。

Although methods based on convolution neural networks have made great progress, they inevitably only deal with one local neighborhood with convolutions at a time. Besides, existing methods mostly regard face attribute evaluation as the individual multi-label classification task, ignoring the inherent relationship between semantic attributes and face identity information. In this paper, we propose a novel \textbf{trans}former-based representation for \textbf{f}ace \textbf{a}ttribute evaluation method (\textbf{TransFA}), which could effectively enhance the attribute discriminative representation learning in the context of attention mechanism. The multiple branches transformer is employed to explore the inter-correlation between different attributes in similar semantic regions for attribute feature learning. Specially, the hierarchical identity-constraint attribute loss is designed to train the end-to-end architecture, which could further integrate face identity discriminative information to boost performance. authors_text: Inês Valentim,Nuno Lourenço,Nuno Antunes
title: Adversarial Robustness Assessment of NeuroEvolution Approaches
title_zh: 神经进化方法的对抗性鲁棒性评估
abstract: NeuroEvolution automates the generation of Artificial Neural Networks through the application of techniques from Evolutionary Computation. The main goal of these approaches is to build models that maximize predictive performance, sometimes with an additional objective of minimizing computational complexity. Although the evolved models achieve competitive results performance-wise, their robustness to adversarial examples, which becomes a concern in security-critical scenarios, has received limited attention. In this paper, we evaluate the adversarial robustness of models found by two prominent NeuroEvolution approaches on the CIFAR-10 image classification task: DENSER and NSGA-Net. Since the models are publicly available, we consider white-box untargeted attacks, where the perturbations are bounded by either the L2 or the Linfinity-norm. Similarly to manually-designed networks, our results show that when the evolved models are attacked with iterative methods, their accuracy usually drops to, or close to, zero under both distance metrics. The DENSER model is an exception to this trend, showing some resistance under the L2 threat model, where its accuracy only drops from 93.70% to 18.10% even with iterative attacks. Additionally, we analyzed the impact of pre-processing applied to the data before the first layer of the network. Our observations suggest that some of these techniques can exacerbate the perturbations added to the original inputs, potentially harming robustness. Thus, this choice should not be neglected when automatically designing networks for applications where adversarial attacks are prone to occur.
summary: NeuroEvolution automates the generation of Artificial Neural Networks through the application of techniques from Evolutionary Computation. The main goal of these approaches is to build models that maximize predictive performance, sometimes with an additional objective of minimizing computational complexity. Although the evolved models achieve competitive results performance-wise, their robustness to adversarial examples, which becomes a concern in security-critical scenarios, has received limited attention. In this paper, we evaluate the adversarial robustness of models found by two prominent NeuroEvolution approaches on the CIFAR-10 image classification task: DENSER and NSGA-Net. Since the models are publicly available, we consider white-box untargeted attacks, where the perturbations are bounded by either the L2 or the Linfinity-norm. Similarly to manually-designed networks, our results show that when the evolved models are attacked with iterative methods, their accuracy usually drops to, or close to, zero under both distance metrics. The DENSER model is an exception to this trend, showing some resistance under the L2 threat model, where its accuracy only drops from 93.70% to 18.10% even with iterative attacks. Additionally, we analyzed the impact of pre-processing applied to the data before the first layer of the network. Our observations suggest that some of these techniques can exacerbate the perturbations added to the original inputs, potentially harming robustness. Thus, this choice should not be neglected when automatically designing networks for applications where adversarial attacks are prone to occur.
abstract_zh: NeuroEvolution 通过应用进化计算技术自动生成人工神经网络。这些方法的主要目标是构建能够最大化预测性能的模型，有时还具有最小化计算复杂性的额外目标。尽管演进的模型在性能方面取得了有竞争力的结果，但它们对对抗性示例的鲁棒性（这成为安全关键场景中的一个问题）受到的关注有限。在本文中，我们评估了 CIFAR-10 图像分类任务上两种著名 NeuroEvolution 方法发现的模型的对抗鲁棒性：DENSER 和 NSGA-Net。由于模型是公开可用的，我们考虑白盒非目标攻击，其中扰动受 L2 或 Linfinity 范数限制。与手动设计的网络类似，我们的结果表明，当使用迭代方法攻击进化模型时，在两种距离度量下，它们的准确性通常会下降到或接近于零。 DENSER 模型是这种趋势的一个例外，在 L2 威胁模型下表现出一定的阻力，即使进行迭代攻击，其准确率也仅从 93.70% 下降到 18.10%。此外，我们还分析了在网络第一层之前对数据应用预处理的影响。我们的观察表明，其中一些技术可能会加剧原始输入中添加的扰动，从而可能损害稳健性。因此，在为容易发生对抗性攻击的应用程序自动设计网络时，不应忽视这种选择。

AI.tldr: 本文评估了两种神经进化方法（DENSER和NSGA-Net）在CIFAR-10图像分类任务中对抗样本的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 尽管神经进化方法在性能上表现优异，但其在安全关键场景中对对抗样本的鲁棒性研究不足，需验证其安全性。
AI.method: 采用白盒未针对攻击（L2和Linfinity范数约束），测试公开模型的鲁棒性，并分析预处理对扰动的影响。
AI.result: 迭代攻击下，多数模型准确率降至零，DENSER在L2攻击下仍保持18.10%准确率；部分预处理可能加剧扰动，损害鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 神经进化模型普遍缺乏对抗鲁棒性，需重视预处理选择以提升安全应用中的可靠性。

search_text: Adversarial Robustness Assessment of NeuroEvolution Approaches 神经进化方法的对抗性鲁棒性评估 NeuroEvolution automates the generation of Artificial Neural Networks through the application of techniques from Evolutionary Computation. The main goal of these approaches is to build models that maximize predictive performance, sometimes with an additional objective of minimizing computational complexity. Although the evolved models achieve competitive results performance-wise, their robustness to adversarial examples, which becomes a concern in security-critical scenarios, has received limited attention. In this paper, we evaluate the adversarial robustness of models found by two prominent NeuroEvolution approaches on the CIFAR-10 image classification task: DENSER and NSGA-Net. Since the models are publicly available, we consider white-box untargeted attacks, where the perturbations are bounded by either the L2 or the Linfinity-norm. Similarly to manually-designed networks, our results show that when the evolved models are attacked with iterative methods, their accuracy usually drops to, or close to, zero under both distance metrics. The DENSER model is an exception to this trend, showing some resistance under the L2 threat model, where its accuracy only drops from 93.70% to 18.10% even with iterative attacks. Additionally, we analyzed the impact of pre-processing applied to the data before the first layer of the network. Our observations suggest that some of these techniques can exacerbate the perturbations added to the original inputs, potentially harming robustness. Thus, this choice should not be neglected when automatically designing networks for applications where adversarial attacks are prone to occur. authors_text: Fernando Alonso-Fernandez,Julian Fierrez-Aguilar,Javier Ortega-Garcia
title: A review of schemes for fingerprint image quality computation
title_zh: 指纹图像质量计算方案综述
comment: Published at 3rd COST-275 Workshop on Biometrics on the Internet. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2111.07432
comments: Published at 3rd COST-275 Workshop on Biometrics on the Internet. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2111.07432
abstract: Fingerprint image quality affects heavily the performance of fingerprint recognition systems. This paper reviews existing approaches for fingerprint image quality computation. We also implement, test and compare a selection of them using the MCYT database including 9000 fingerprint images. Experimental results show that most of the algorithms behave similarly.
summary: Fingerprint image quality affects heavily the performance of fingerprint recognition systems. This paper reviews existing approaches for fingerprint image quality computation. We also implement, test and compare a selection of them using the MCYT database including 9000 fingerprint images. Experimental results show that most of the algorithms behave similarly.
abstract_zh: 指纹图像质量严重影响指纹识别系统的性能。本文回顾了现有的指纹图像质量计算方法。我们还使用 MCYT 数据库（包括 9000 个指纹图像）来实施、测试和比较其中的一部分。实验结果表明大多数算法的行为相似。

AI.tldr: 本文回顾并比较了多种指纹图像质量评估方法，使用MCYT数据库进行实验验证。
AI.motivation: 指纹图像质量直接影响识别系统性能，但现有方法缺乏系统性比较和评估。
AI.method: 综述现有算法并选取部分方法在包含9000张指纹的MCYT数据库中实施测试与对比。
AI.result: 实验表明大多数算法在质量评估上表现相似，未出现显著差异。
AI.conclusion: 当前指纹图像质量评估方法效果趋同，需进一步研究更全面的评估指标或优化方向。

authors_text: Julian Fierrez-Aguilar,Luis-Miguel Muñoz-Serrano,Fernando Alonso-Fernandez,Javier Ortega-Garcia
title: On the Effects of Image Quality Degradation on Minutiae- and Ridge-Based Automatic Fingerprint Recognition
title_zh: 图像质量下降对基于细节和脊线的自动指纹识别的影响
comment: Published at IEEE International Carnahan Conference on Security Technology (ICCST)
comments: Published at IEEE International Carnahan Conference on Security Technology (ICCST)
abstract: The effect of image quality degradation on the verification performance of automatic fingerprint recognition is investigated. We study the performance of two fingerprint matchers based on minutiae and ridge information under varying fingerprint image quality. The ridge-based system is found to be more robust to image quality degradation than the minutiae-based system for a number of different image quality criteria.
summary: The effect of image quality degradation on the verification performance of automatic fingerprint recognition is investigated. We study the performance of two fingerprint matchers based on minutiae and ridge information under varying fingerprint image quality. The ridge-based system is found to be more robust to image quality degradation than the minutiae-based system for a number of different image quality criteria.
abstract_zh: 研究了图像质量下降对自动指纹识别验证性能的影响。我们研究了两种基于细节和脊线信息的指纹匹配器在不同指纹图像质量下的性能。对于许多不同的图像质量标准，基于脊的系统被发现比基于细节的系统更能抵抗图像质量下降。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了图像质量退化对基于细节点和脊线的自动指纹识别验证性能的影响。
AI.motivation: 实际应用中指纹图像可能因采集条件等因素质量下降，需明确不同算法对退化图像的鲁棒性差异以优化系统设计。
AI.method: 通过对比基于细节点匹配和基于脊线信息匹配的两种指纹识别系统在不同图像质量退化条件下的表现。
AI.result: 基于脊线的信息匹配系统在多种图像质量退化指标下均比基于细节点的系统更具鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 脊线特征在图像质量退化场景下比细节点特征更适用于提升指纹识别的可靠性。
