authors_text: Jiehong Lin,Zewei Wei,Changxing Ding,Kui Jia
title: Category-Level 6D Object Pose and Size Estimation using Self-Supervised Deep Prior Deformation Networks
title_zh: 使用自监督深度先验变形网络进行类别级 6D 物体姿态和大小估计
abstract: It is difficult to precisely annotate object instances and their semantics in 3D space, and as such, synthetic data are extensively used for these tasks, e.g., category-level 6D object pose and size estimation. However, the easy annotations in synthetic domains bring the downside effect of synthetic-to-real (Sim2Real) domain gap. In this work, we aim to address this issue in the task setting of Sim2Real, unsupervised domain adaptation for category-level 6D object pose and size estimation. We propose a method that is built upon a novel Deep Prior Deformation Network, shortened as DPDN. DPDN learns to deform features of categorical shape priors to match those of object observations, and is thus able to establish deep correspondence in the feature space for direct regression of object poses and sizes. To reduce the Sim2Real domain gap, we formulate a novel self-supervised objective upon DPDN via consistency learning; more specifically, we apply two rigid transformations to each object observation in parallel, and feed them into DPDN respectively to yield dual sets of predictions; on top of the parallel learning, an inter-consistency term is employed to keep cross consistency between dual predictions for improving the sensitivity of DPDN to pose changes, while individual intra-consistency ones are used to enforce self-adaptation within each learning itself. We train DPDN on both training sets of the synthetic CAMERA25 and real-world REAL275 datasets; our results outperform the existing methods on REAL275 test set under both the unsupervised and supervised settings. Ablation studies also verify the efficacy of our designs. Our code is released publicly at https://github.com/JiehongLin/Self-DPDN.
summary: It is difficult to precisely annotate object instances and their semantics in 3D space, and as such, synthetic data are extensively used for these tasks, e.g., category-level 6D object pose and size estimation. However, the easy annotations in synthetic domains bring the downside effect of synthetic-to-real (Sim2Real) domain gap. In this work, we aim to address this issue in the task setting of Sim2Real, unsupervised domain adaptation for category-level 6D object pose and size estimation. We propose a method that is built upon a novel Deep Prior Deformation Network, shortened as DPDN. DPDN learns to deform features of categorical shape priors to match those of object observations, and is thus able to establish deep correspondence in the feature space for direct regression of object poses and sizes. To reduce the Sim2Real domain gap, we formulate a novel self-supervised objective upon DPDN via consistency learning; more specifically, we apply two rigid transformations to each object observation in parallel, and feed them into DPDN respectively to yield dual sets of predictions; on top of the parallel learning, an inter-consistency term is employed to keep cross consistency between dual predictions for improving the sensitivity of DPDN to pose changes, while individual intra-consistency ones are used to enforce self-adaptation within each learning itself. We train DPDN on both training sets of the synthetic CAMERA25 and real-world REAL275 datasets; our results outperform the existing methods on REAL275 test set under both the unsupervised and supervised settings. Ablation studies also verify the efficacy of our designs. Our code is released publicly at https://github.com/JiehongLin/Self-DPDN.
abstract_zh: 在 3D 空间中精确注释对象实例及其语义很困难，因此，合成数据广泛用于这些任务，例如类别级 6D 对象姿态和大小估计。然而，合成域中的简单注释带来了合成与真实（Sim2Real）域差距的负面影响。在这项工作中，我们的目标是在 Sim2Real 的任务设置中解决这个问题，即类别级 6D 物体姿态和大小估计的无监督域自适应。我们提出了一种基于新颖的深度先验变形网络（简称 DPDN）的方法。 DPDN 学习对分类形状先验的特征进行变形以匹配对象观察的特征，从而能够在特征空间中建立深层对应关系，以直接回归对象的姿态和大小。为了减少 Sim2Real 领域差距，我们通过一致性学习在 DPDN 上制定了一个新颖的自我监督目标；更具体地说，我们对每个对象观察并行应用两个刚性变换，并将它们分别输入 DPDN 以产生双组预测；在并行学习之上，采用内部一致性项来保持双重预测之间的交叉一致性，以提高 DPDN 对姿势变化的敏感性，同时使用单独的内部一致性项来强制每个学习本身的自适应。我们在合成 CAMERA25 和真实世界 REAL275 数据集的训练集上训练 DPDN；在无监督和监督设置下，我们的结果优于 REAL275 测试集上的现有方法。消融研究也验证了我们设计的有效性。我们的代码公开发布于 https://github.com/JiehongLin/Self-DPDN。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于自监督深度先验变形网络（DPDN）的方法，用于解决类别级6D物体姿态和尺寸估计中的合成到真实（Sim2Real）领域差异问题。
AI.motivation: 合成数据虽便于标注，但存在领域差异问题，导致在真实场景中性能下降，需通过无监督域适应方法提升模型泛化能力。
AI.method: 设计DPDN网络，通过变形类别形状先验特征匹配真实观测特征，并引入自监督一致性学习：对观测数据应用双刚性变换生成预测，利用跨预测一致性与内部一致性约束提升姿态变化敏感性。
AI.result: 在REAL275真实数据集上，无论有监督还是无监督设置，均优于现有方法；消融实验证实了设计有效性。
AI.conclusion: DPDN通过自监督一致性学习有效缩小领域差异，在真实场景的6D姿态与尺寸估计任务中表现优异。

search_text: Category-Level 6D Object Pose and Size Estimation using Self-Supervised Deep Prior Deformation Networks 使用自监督深度先验变形网络进行类别级 6D 物体姿态和大小估计 It is difficult to precisely annotate object instances and their semantics in 3D space, and as such, synthetic data are extensively used for these tasks, e.g., category-level 6D object pose and size estimation. However, the easy annotations in synthetic domains bring the downside effect of synthetic-to-real (Sim2Real) domain gap. In this work, we aim to address this issue in the task setting of Sim2Real, unsupervised domain adaptation for category-level 6D object pose and size estimation. We propose a method that is built upon a novel Deep Prior Deformation Network, shortened as DPDN. DPDN learns to deform features of categorical shape priors to match those of object observations, and is thus able to establish deep correspondence in the feature space for direct regression of object poses and sizes. To reduce the Sim2Real domain gap, we formulate a novel self-supervised objective upon DPDN via consistency learning; more specifically, we apply two rigid transformations to each object observation in parallel, and feed them into DPDN respectively to yield dual sets of predictions; on top of the parallel learning, an inter-consistency term is employed to keep cross consistency between dual predictions for improving the sensitivity of DPDN to pose changes, while individual intra-consistency ones are used to enforce self-adaptation within each learning itself. We train DPDN on both training sets of the synthetic CAMERA25 and real-world REAL275 datasets; our results outperform the existing methods on REAL275 test set under both the unsupervised and supervised settings. Ablation studies also verify the efficacy of our designs. Our code is released publicly at https://github.com/JiehongLin/Self-DPDN. 在 3D 空间中精确注释对象实例及其语义很困难，因此，合成数据广泛用于这些任务，例如类别级 6D 对象姿态和大小估计。然而，合成域中的简单注释带来了合成与真实（Sim2Real）域差距的负面影响。在这项工作中，我们的目标是在 Sim2Real 的任务设置中解决这个问题，即类别级 6D 物体姿态和大小估计的无监督域自适应。我们提出了一种基于新颖的深度先验变形网络（简称 DPDN）的方法。 DPDN 学习对分类形状先验的特征进行变形以匹配对象观察的特征，从而能够在特征空间中建立深层对应关系，以直接回归对象的姿态和大小。为了减少 Sim2Real 领域差距，我们通过一致性学习在 DPDN 上制定了一个新颖的自我监督目标；更具体地说，我们对每个对象观察并行应用两个刚性变换，并将它们分别输入 DPDN 以产生双组预测；在并行学习之上，采用内部一致性项来保持双重预测之间的交叉一致性，以提高 DPDN 对姿势变化的敏感性，同时使用单独的内部一致性项来强制每个学习本身的自适应。我们在合成 CAMERA25 和真实世界 REAL275 数据集的训练集上训练 DPDN；在无监督和监督设置下，我们的结果优于 REAL275 测试集上的现有方法。消融研究也验证了我们设计的有效性。我们的代码公开发布于 https://github.com/JiehongLin/Self-DPDN。 本文提出一种基于自监督深度先验变形网络（DPDN）的方法，用于解决类别级6D物体姿态和尺寸估计中的合成到真实（Sim2Real）领域差异问题。 Jiehong Lin,Zewei Wei,Changxing Ding,Kui Jia cs.CV

authors_text: W. W. Ahmed,M. Farhat,P. -Y. Chen,X. Zhang,Y. Wu
title: A Generative deep learning approach for shape recognition of arbitrary objects from phaseless acoustic scattering data
title_zh: 一种利用无相声散射数据识别任意物体形状的生成深度学习方法
abstract: We propose and demonstrate a generative deep learning approach for the shape recognition of an arbitrary object from its acoustic scattering properties. The strategy exploits deep neural networks to learn the mapping between the latent space of a two-dimensional acoustic object and the far-field scattering amplitudes. A neural network is designed as an Adversarial autoencoder and trained via unsupervised learning to determine the latent space of the acoustic object. Important structural features of the object are embedded in lower-dimensional latent space which supports the modeling of a shape generator and accelerates the learning in the inverse design process.The proposed inverse design uses the variational inference approach with encoder and decoder-like architecture where the decoder is composed of two pretrained neural networks, the generator and the forward model. The data-driven framework finds an accurate solution to the ill-posed inverse scattering problem, where non-unique solution space is overcome by the multifrequency phaseless far-field patterns. This inverse method is a powerful design tool that does not require complex analytical calculation and opens up new avenues for practical realization, automatic recognition of arbitrary shaped submarines or large fish, and other underwater applications.
summary: We propose and demonstrate a generative deep learning approach for the shape recognition of an arbitrary object from its acoustic scattering properties. The strategy exploits deep neural networks to learn the mapping between the latent space of a two-dimensional acoustic object and the far-field scattering amplitudes. A neural network is designed as an Adversarial autoencoder and trained via unsupervised learning to determine the latent space of the acoustic object. Important structural features of the object are embedded in lower-dimensional latent space which supports the modeling of a shape generator and accelerates the learning in the inverse design process.The proposed inverse design uses the variational inference approach with encoder and decoder-like architecture where the decoder is composed of two pretrained neural networks, the generator and the forward model. The data-driven framework finds an accurate solution to the ill-posed inverse scattering problem, where non-unique solution space is overcome by the multifrequency phaseless far-field patterns. This inverse method is a powerful design tool that does not require complex analytical calculation and opens up new avenues for practical realization, automatic recognition of arbitrary shaped submarines or large fish, and other underwater applications.
abstract_zh: 我们提出并演示了一种生成深度学习方法，用于根据任意物体的声散射特性来识别其形状。该策略利用深度神经网络来学习二维声学对象的潜在空间与远场散射幅度之间的映射。神经网络被设计为对抗性自动编码器，并通过无监督学习进行训练以确定声学对象的潜在空间。对象的重要结构特征嵌入在低维潜在空间中，支持形状生成器的建模并加速逆向设计过程中的学习。所提出的逆向设计使用具有编码器和解码器式架构的变分推理方法，其中解码器由两个预训练的神经网络、生成器和前向模型组成。数据驱动框架找到了不适定逆散射问题的准确解决方案，其中多频无相远场模式克服了非唯一解空间。这种反演方法是一种强大的设计工具，不需要复杂的分析计算，为实际实现、任意形状的潜艇或大型鱼类的自动识别以及其他水下应用开辟了新的途径。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于生成式深度学习的方法，用于从无相位声学散射数据中识别任意物体的形状。
AI.motivation: 传统逆散射问题存在解不唯一且计算复杂的问题，需开发无需复杂解析计算的数据驱动方法以实现实际应用中的自动识别。
AI.method: 采用对抗自编码器学习声学物体的潜在空间，结合变分推断框架与预训练生成器和正向模型构成解码器，通过多频段无相位远场数据解决逆问题。
AI.result: 该框架准确求解了病态逆散射问题，成功应用于潜艇、大型鱼类等水下目标的自动识别。
AI.conclusion: 该方法无需复杂解析计算，为水下目标识别等实际应用提供了高效可行的解决方案。

authors_text: Yun-Hao Cao,Peiqin Sun,Yechang Huang,Jianxin Wu,Shuchang Zhou
title: Synergistic Self-supervised and Quantization Learning
title_zh: 协同自监督和量化学习
abstract: With the success of self-supervised learning (SSL), it has become a mainstream paradigm to fine-tune from self-supervised pretrained models to boost the performance on downstream tasks. However, we find that current SSL models suffer severe accuracy drops when performing low-bit quantization, prohibiting their deployment in resource-constrained applications. In this paper, we propose a method called synergistic self-supervised and quantization learning (SSQL) to pretrain quantization-friendly self-supervised models facilitating downstream deployment. SSQL contrasts the features of the quantized and full precision models in a self-supervised fashion, where the bit-width for the quantized model is randomly selected in each step. SSQL not only significantly improves the accuracy when quantized to lower bit-widths, but also boosts the accuracy of full precision models in most cases. By only training once, SSQL can then benefit various downstream tasks at different bit-widths simultaneously. Moreover, the bit-width flexibility is achieved without additional storage overhead, requiring only one copy of weights during training and inference. We theoretically analyze the optimization process of SSQL, and conduct exhaustive experiments on various benchmarks to further demonstrate the effectiveness of our method. Our code is available at https://github.com/megvii-research/SSQL-ECCV2022.
summary: With the success of self-supervised learning (SSL), it has become a mainstream paradigm to fine-tune from self-supervised pretrained models to boost the performance on downstream tasks. However, we find that current SSL models suffer severe accuracy drops when performing low-bit quantization, prohibiting their deployment in resource-constrained applications. In this paper, we propose a method called synergistic self-supervised and quantization learning (SSQL) to pretrain quantization-friendly self-supervised models facilitating downstream deployment. SSQL contrasts the features of the quantized and full precision models in a self-supervised fashion, where the bit-width for the quantized model is randomly selected in each step. SSQL not only significantly improves the accuracy when quantized to lower bit-widths, but also boosts the accuracy of full precision models in most cases. By only training once, SSQL can then benefit various downstream tasks at different bit-widths simultaneously. Moreover, the bit-width flexibility is achieved without additional storage overhead, requiring only one copy of weights during training and inference. We theoretically analyze the optimization process of SSQL, and conduct exhaustive experiments on various benchmarks to further demonstrate the effectiveness of our method. Our code is available at https://github.com/megvii-research/SSQL-ECCV2022.
abstract_zh: 随着自监督学习（SSL）的成功，它已成为从自监督预训练模型中进行微调以提高下游任务性能的主流范例。然而，我们发现当前的 SSL 模型在执行低位量化时精度会严重下降，从而阻碍了它们在资源受限的应用程序中的部署。在本文中，我们提出了一种称为协同自监督和量化学习（SSQL）的方法来预训练量化友好的自监督模型，以促进下游部署。 SSQL 以自监督方式对比量化模型和全精度模型的特征，其中量化模型的位宽在每个步骤中都是随机选择的。 SSQL 不仅在量化为较低位宽时显着提高了准确性，而且在大多数情况下还提高了全精度模型的准确性。只需训练一次，SSQL 就可以同时使不同位宽的各种下游任务受益。此外，无需额外的存储开销即可实现位宽灵活性，在训练和推理期间仅需要一份权重副本。我们从理论上分析了 SSQL 的优化过程，并在各种基准上进行了详尽的实验，以进一步证明我们方法的有效性。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/megvii-research/SSQL-ECCV2022 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种协同自监督与量化学习方法（SSQL），用于预训练量化友好的自监督模型，以提升在低比特量化下的性能并促进下游任务部署。
AI.motivation: 当前自监督学习模型在低比特量化时精度显著下降，限制了其在资源受限场景中的应用，亟需一种兼顾量化鲁棒性与模型性能的预训练方法。
AI.method: SSQL通过在自监督框架中对比量化模型与全精度模型的特征，随机选择量化比特宽度进行训练，仅需一次训练即可适配多种比特宽度，且无需额外存储开销。
AI.result: SSQL在低比特量化下显著提升模型精度，同时在多数情况下也优于全精度模型；实验表明其在多个基准数据集上均有效，且支持灵活的比特宽度调整。
AI.conclusion: SSQL通过协同优化量化与自监督学习，实现了模型精度与部署灵活性的平衡，为资源受限环境下的模型部署提供了高效解决方案。

search_text: Synergistic Self-supervised and Quantization Learning 协同自监督和量化学习 With the success of self-supervised learning (SSL), it has become a mainstream paradigm to fine-tune from self-supervised pretrained models to boost the performance on downstream tasks. However, we find that current SSL models suffer severe accuracy drops when performing low-bit quantization, prohibiting their deployment in resource-constrained applications. In this paper, we propose a method called synergistic self-supervised and quantization learning (SSQL) to pretrain quantization-friendly self-supervised models facilitating downstream deployment. SSQL contrasts the features of the quantized and full precision models in a self-supervised fashion, where the bit-width for the quantized model is randomly selected in each step. SSQL not only significantly improves the accuracy when quantized to lower bit-widths, but also boosts the accuracy of full precision models in most cases. By only training once, SSQL can then benefit various downstream tasks at different bit-widths simultaneously. Moreover, the bit-width flexibility is achieved without additional storage overhead, requiring only one copy of weights during training and inference. We theoretically analyze the optimization process of SSQL, and conduct exhaustive experiments on various benchmarks to further demonstrate the effectiveness of our method. Our code is available at https://github.com/megvii-research/SSQL-ECCV2022. 随着自监督学习（SSL）的成功，它已成为从自监督预训练模型中进行微调以提高下游任务性能的主流范例。然而，我们发现当前的 SSL 模型在执行低位量化时精度会严重下降，从而阻碍了它们在资源受限的应用程序中的部署。在本文中，我们提出了一种称为协同自监督和量化学习（SSQL）的方法来预训练量化友好的自监督模型，以促进下游部署。 SSQL 以自监督方式对比量化模型和全精度模型的特征，其中量化模型的位宽在每个步骤中都是随机选择的。 SSQL 不仅在量化为较低位宽时显着提高了准确性，而且在大多数情况下还提高了全精度模型的准确性。只需训练一次，SSQL 就可以同时使不同位宽的各种下游任务受益。此外，无需额外的存储开销即可实现位宽灵活性，在训练和推理期间仅需要一份权重副本。我们从理论上分析了 SSQL 的优化过程，并在各种基准上进行了详尽的实验，以进一步证明我们方法的有效性。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/megvii-research/SSQL-ECCV2022 获取。 本文提出了一种协同自监督与量化学习方法（SSQL），用于预训练量化友好的自监督模型，以提升在低比特量化下的性能并促进下游任务部署。 Yun-Hao Cao,Peiqin Sun,Yechang Huang,Jianxin Wu,Shuchang Zhou cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Haolin Wang,Jiawei Zhang,Ming Liu,Xiaohe Wu,Wangmeng Zuo
title: Learning Diverse Tone Styles for Image Retouching
title_zh: 学习图像修饰的多种色调风格
abstract: Image retouching, aiming to regenerate the visually pleasing renditions of given images, is a subjective task where the users are with different aesthetic sensations. Most existing methods deploy a deterministic model to learn the retouching style from a specific expert, making it less flexible to meet diverse subjective preferences. Besides, the intrinsic diversity of an expert due to the targeted processing on different images is also deficiently described. To circumvent such issues, we propose to learn diverse image retouching with normalizing flow-based architectures. Unlike current flow-based methods which directly generate the output image, we argue that learning in a style domain could (i) disentangle the retouching styles from the image content, (ii) lead to a stable style presentation form, and (iii) avoid the spatial disharmony effects. For obtaining meaningful image tone style representations, a joint-training pipeline is delicately designed, which is composed of a style encoder, a conditional RetouchNet, and the image tone style normalizing flow (TSFlow) module. In particular, the style encoder predicts the target style representation of an input image, which serves as the conditional information in the RetouchNet for retouching, while the TSFlow maps the style representation vector into a Gaussian distribution in the forward pass. After training, the TSFlow can generate diverse image tone style vectors by sampling from the Gaussian distribution. Extensive experiments on MIT-Adobe FiveK and PPR10K datasets show that our proposed method performs favorably against state-of-the-art methods and is effective in generating diverse results to satisfy different human aesthetic preferences. Source code and pre-trained models are publicly available at https://github.com/SSRHeart/TSFlow.
summary: Image retouching, aiming to regenerate the visually pleasing renditions of given images, is a subjective task where the users are with different aesthetic sensations. Most existing methods deploy a deterministic model to learn the retouching style from a specific expert, making it less flexible to meet diverse subjective preferences. Besides, the intrinsic diversity of an expert due to the targeted processing on different images is also deficiently described. To circumvent such issues, we propose to learn diverse image retouching with normalizing flow-based architectures. Unlike current flow-based methods which directly generate the output image, we argue that learning in a style domain could (i) disentangle the retouching styles from the image content, (ii) lead to a stable style presentation form, and (iii) avoid the spatial disharmony effects. For obtaining meaningful image tone style representations, a joint-training pipeline is delicately designed, which is composed of a style encoder, a conditional RetouchNet, and the image tone style normalizing flow (TSFlow) module. In particular, the style encoder predicts the target style representation of an input image, which serves as the conditional information in the RetouchNet for retouching, while the TSFlow maps the style representation vector into a Gaussian distribution in the forward pass. After training, the TSFlow can generate diverse image tone style vectors by sampling from the Gaussian distribution. Extensive experiments on MIT-Adobe FiveK and PPR10K datasets show that our proposed method performs favorably against state-of-the-art methods and is effective in generating diverse results to satisfy different human aesthetic preferences. Source code and pre-trained models are publicly available at https://github.com/SSRHeart/TSFlow.
abstract_zh: 图像修饰旨在重新生成给定图像的视觉上令人愉悦的再现，是一项主观任务，用户具有不同的美感。大多数现有方法都部署确定性模型来向特定专家学习修饰风格，这使得满足不同主观偏好的灵活性较差。此外，由于对不同图像进行有针对性的处理，专家的内在多样性也没有得到充分描述。为了规避这些问题，我们建议通过标准化基于流的架构来学习多样化的图像修饰。与当前直接生成输出图像的基于流的方法不同，我们认为在风格域中学习可以（i）将修饰风格与图像内容分离，（ii）产生稳定的风格呈现形式，以及（iii）避免空间不和谐效应。为了获得有意义的图像色调风格表示，精心设计了联合训练管道，该管道由风格编码器、条件RetouchNet和图像色调风格归一化流（TSFlow）模块组成。具体来说，风格编码器预测输入图像的目标风格表示，作为 RetouchNet 中用于修饰的条件信息，而 TSFlow 在前向传递中将风格表示向量映射为高斯分布。经过训练，TSFlow 可以通过对高斯分布进行采样来生成不同的图像色调风格向量。在 MIT-Adobe FiveK 和 PPR10K 数据集上进行的大量实验表明，我们提出的方法优于最先进的方法，并且可以有效生成不同的结果以满足不同的人类审美偏好。源代码和预训练模型可在 https://github.com/SSRHeart/TSFlow 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于归一化流架构的学习多样化图像润色色调风格的方法，以满足不同用户的审美偏好。
AI.motivation: 现有图像润色方法依赖于单一专家的确定性模型，难以适应多样化的主观审美需求，且未能充分描述专家处理不同图像时的内在多样性。
AI.method: 设计联合训练框架，包含风格编码器、条件RetouchNet和图像色调风格归一化流（TSFlow）模块，通过将风格表示映射到高斯分布实现多样化风格生成。
AI.result: 在MIT-Adobe FiveK和PPR10K数据集上实验表明，该方法在生成多样化结果方面优于现有最先进的方法，且能有效满足不同人类审美偏好。
AI.conclusion: TSFlow方法通过解耦风格与内容、稳定风格表示及避免空间不协调效应，成功实现了多样化图像润色，并公开了代码和预训练模型。

authors_text: Thuy C. Nguyen,Nam LH. Phan,Son T. Nguyen
title: Improving Domain Generalization by Learning without Forgetting: Application in Retail Checkout
title_zh: 学而不忘，提高领域泛化能力：在零售结账中的应用
abstract: Designing an automatic checkout system for retail stores at the human level accuracy is challenging due to similar appearance products and their various poses. This paper addresses the problem by proposing a method with a two-stage pipeline. The first stage detects class-agnostic items, and the second one is dedicated to classify product categories. We also track the objects across video frames to avoid duplicated counting. One major challenge is the domain gap because the models are trained on synthetic data but tested on the real images. To reduce the error gap, we adopt domain generalization methods for the first-stage detector. In addition, model ensemble is used to enhance the robustness of the 2nd-stage classifier. The method is evaluated on the AI City challenge 2022 -- Track 4 and gets the F1 score $40\%$ on the test A set. Code is released at the link https://github.com/cybercore-co-ltd/aicity22-track4.

To reduce the error gap, we adopt domain generalization methods for the first-stage detector. In addition, model ensemble is used to enhance the robustness of the 2nd-stage classifier. The method is evaluated on the AI City challenge 2022 -- Track 4 and gets the F1 score $40\%$ on the test A set. Code is released at the link https://github.com/cybercore-co-ltd/aicity22-track4.
abstract_zh: 由于相似的外观产品和不同的姿势，为零售商店设计一个达到人类水平精度的自动结账系统具有挑战性。本文通过提出一种两级管道的方法来解决这个问题。第一阶段检测与类别无关的项目，第二阶段致力于对产品类别进行分类。我们还跨视频帧跟踪对象以避免重复计数。一项主要挑战是领域差距，因为模型是在合成数据上训练的，但在真实图像上进行测试的。为了减少误差间隙，我们对第一级检测器采用域泛化方法。此外，模型集成用于增强第二阶段分类器的鲁棒性。该方法在 AI City Challenge 2022 - Track 4 上进行评估，并在测试 A 集上获得 F1 分数 $40\%$。代码发布于链接 https://github.com/cybercore-co-ltd/aicity22-track4。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种两阶段流水线方法，用于提升零售收银系统中跨域泛化的物品检测与分类性能。
AI.motivation: 由于商品外观相似且姿态多样，自动收银系统难以达到人类水平的准确率。合成数据与真实场景间的域差异进一步加剧了这一问题。
AI.method: 第一阶段采用类不可知检测器并结合域泛化方法，第二阶段通过模型集成增强分类鲁棒性，同时利用视频帧间跟踪避免重复计数。
AI.result: 在AI City 2022 Track 4测试集A上取得40%的F1分数。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效缓解了合成数据与真实场景的域差异问题，在跨域泛化任务中展现出良好性能。

search_text: Improving Domain Generalization by Learning without Forgetting: Application in Retail Checkout 学而不忘，提高领域泛化能力：在零售结账中的应用 Designing an automatic checkout system for retail stores at the human level accuracy is challenging due to similar appearance products and their various poses. This paper addresses the problem by proposing a method with a two-stage pipeline. The first stage detects class-agnostic items, and the second one is dedicated to classify product categories. We also track the objects across video frames to avoid duplicated counting. One major challenge is the domain gap because the models are trained on synthetic data but tested on the real images. To reduce the error gap, we adopt domain generalization methods for the first-stage detector. In addition, model ensemble is used to enhance the robustness of the 2nd-stage classifier. The method is evaluated on the AI City challenge 2022 -- Track 4 and gets the F1 score $40\%$ on the test A set. Code is released at the link https://github.com/cybercore-co-ltd/aicity22-track4. 由于相似的外观产品和不同的姿势，为零售商店设计一个达到人类水平精度的自动结账系统具有挑战性。本文通过提出一种两级管道的方法来解决这个问题。第一阶段检测与类别无关的项目，第二阶段致力于对产品类别进行分类。我们还跨视频帧跟踪对象以避免重复计数。一项主要挑战是领域差距，因为模型是在合成数据上训练的，但在真实图像上进行测试的。为了减少误差间隙，我们对第一级检测器采用域泛化方法。此外，模型集成用于增强第二阶段分类器的鲁棒性。该方法在 AI City Challenge 2022 - Track 4 上进行评估，并在测试 A 集上获得 F1 分数 $40\%$。代码发布于链接 https://github.com/cybercore-co-ltd/aicity22-track4。 本文提出一种两阶段流水线方法，用于提升零售收银系统中跨域泛化的物品检测与分类性能。 Thuy C. authors_text: Jihao Liu,Xin Huang,Guanglu Song,Hongsheng Li,Yu Liu
title: UniNet: Unified Architecture Search with Convolution, Transformer, and MLP
title_zh: UniNet：使用卷积、Transformer 和 MLP 的统一架构搜索
comment: ECCV 2022, code at https://github.com/Sense-X/UniNet. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2110.04035
comments: ECCV 2022, code at https://github.com/Sense-X/UniNet. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2110.04035
abstract: Recently, transformer and multi-layer perceptron (MLP) architectures have achieved impressive results on various vision tasks. However, how to effectively combine those operators to form high-performance hybrid visual architectures still remains a challenge. In this work, we study the learnable combination of convolution, transformer, and MLP by proposing a novel unified architecture search approach. Our approach contains two key designs to achieve the search for high-performance networks. First, we model the very different searchable operators in a unified form, and thus enable the operators to be characterized with the same set of configuration parameters. In this way, the overall search space size is significantly reduced, and the total search cost becomes affordable. Second, we propose context-aware downsampling modules (DSMs) to mitigate the gap between the different types of operators. Our proposed DSMs are able to better adapt features from different types of operators, which is important for identifying high-performance hybrid architectures. Finally, we integrate configurable operators and DSMs into a unified search space and search with a Reinforcement Learning-based search algorithm to fully explore the optimal combination of the operators. To this end, we search a baseline network and scale it up to obtain a family of models, named UniNets, which achieve much better accuracy and efficiency than previous ConvNets and Transformers. In particular, our UniNet-B5 achieves 84.9% top-1 accuracy on ImageNet, outperforming EfficientNet-B7 and BoTNet-T7 with 44% and 55% fewer FLOPs respectively. By pretraining on the ImageNet-21K, our UniNet-B6 achieves 87.4%, outperforming Swin-L with 51% fewer FLOPs and 41% fewer parameters. Code is available at https://github.com/Sense-X/UniNet.
summary: Recently, transformer and multi-layer perceptron (MLP) architectures have achieved impressive results on various vision tasks. However, how to effectively combine those operators to form high-performance hybrid visual architectures still remains a challenge. In this work, we study the learnable combination of convolution, transformer, and MLP by proposing a novel unified architecture search approach. Our approach contains two key designs to achieve the search for high-performance networks. First, we model the very different searchable operators in a unified form, and thus enable the operators to be characterized with the same set of configuration parameters. In this way, the overall search space size is significantly reduced, and the total search cost becomes affordable. Second, we propose context-aware downsampling modules (DSMs) to mitigate the gap between the different types of operators. Our proposed DSMs are able to better adapt features from different types of operators, which is important for identifying high-performance hybrid architectures. Finally, we integrate configurable operators and DSMs into a unified search space and search with a Reinforcement Learning-based search algorithm to fully explore the optimal combination of the operators. To this end, we search a baseline network and scale it up to obtain a family of models, named UniNets, which achieve much better accuracy and efficiency than previous ConvNets and Transformers. In particular, our UniNet-B5 achieves 84.9% top-1 accuracy on ImageNet, outperforming EfficientNet-B7 and BoTNet-T7 with 44% and 55% fewer FLOPs respectively. By pretraining on the ImageNet-21K, our UniNet-B6 achieves 87.4%, outperforming Swin-L with 51% fewer FLOPs and 41% fewer parameters. Code is available at https://github.com/Sense-X/UniNet.
abstract_zh: 最近，变压器和多层感知器（MLP）架构在各种视觉任务上取得了令人印象深刻的结果。然而，如何有效地将这些算子结合起来形成高性能的混合视觉架构仍然是一个挑战。在这项工作中，我们通过提出一种新颖的统一架构搜索方法来研究卷积、变换器和 MLP 的可学习组合。我们的方法包含两个关键设计来实现对高性能网络的搜索。首先，我们以统一的形式对非常不同的可搜索运算符进行建模，从而使运算符能够使用相同的配置参数集进行表征。这样，整体搜索空间大小显着减小，总搜索成本变得可以承受。其次，我们提出上下文感知下采样模块（DSM）来缩小不同类型运算符之间的差距。我们提出的 DSM 能够更好地适应不同类型运营商的功能，这对于识别高性能混合架构非常重要。最后，我们将可配置算子和DSM集成到统一的搜索空间中，并使用基于强化学习的搜索算法进行搜索，以充分探索算子的最佳组合。为此，我们搜索一个基线网络并将其扩展以获得一系列模型，称为 UniNets，它比以前的 ConvNets 和 Transformer 具有更好的精度和效率。特别是，我们的 UniNet-B5 在 ImageNet 上实现了 84.9% 的 top-1 准确率，优于 EfficientNet-B7 和 BoTNet-T7，分别减少了 44% 和 55% 的 FLOP。通过在 ImageNet-21K 上进行预训练，我们的 UniNet-B6 达到了 87.4%，优于 Swin-L，失败次数减少了 51%，参数减少了 41%。代码可在 https://github.com/Sense-X/UniNet 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种统一的架构搜索方法UniNet，通过结合卷积、Transformer和MLP操作符，构建高性能的混合视觉模型。
AI.motivation: 尽管Transformer和MLP在视觉任务中表现优异，但如何有效融合不同操作符形成高性能混合架构仍是挑战。现有方法难以平衡搜索空间规模与模型性能。
AI.method: 设计统一操作符表征形式以降低搜索空间，并引入上下文感知下采样模块（DSM）缓解操作符差异；通过强化学习算法在统一搜索空间中探索最优操作符组合。
AI.result: UniNet-B5在ImageNet上达到84.9%准确率，较EfficientNet-B7减少44%FLOPs；UniNet-B6在ImageNet-21K预训练后达87.4%，优于Swin-L且参数量减少41%。
AI.conclusion: 统一表征与DSM设计有效解决了多操作符融合难题，UniNet系列模型在精度与效率上均优于现有ConvNet和Transformer架构。

search_text: UniNet: Unified Architecture Search with Convolution, Transformer, and MLP UniNet：使用卷积、Transformer 和 MLP 的统一架构搜索 Recently, transformer and multi-layer perceptron (MLP) architectures have achieved impressive results on various vision tasks. However, how to effectively combine those operators to form high-performance hybrid visual architectures still remains a challenge. In this work, we study the learnable combination of convolution, transformer, and MLP by proposing a novel unified architecture search approach. Our approach contains two key designs to achieve the search for high-performance networks. First, we model the very different searchable operators in a unified form, and thus enable the operators to be characterized with the same set of configuration parameters. In this way, the overall search space size is significantly reduced, and the total search cost becomes affordable. Second, we propose context-aware downsampling modules (DSMs) to mitigate the gap between the different types of operators. Our proposed DSMs are able to better adapt features from different types of operators, which is important for identifying high-performance hybrid architectures. Finally, we integrate configurable operators and DSMs into a unified search space and search with a Reinforcement Learning-based search algorithm to fully explore the optimal combination of the operators. To this end, we search a baseline network and scale it up to obtain a family of models, named UniNets, which achieve much better accuracy and efficiency than previous ConvNets and Transformers. In particular, our UniNet-B5 achieves 84.9% top-1 accuracy on ImageNet, outperforming EfficientNet-B7 and BoTNet-T7 with 44% and 55% fewer FLOPs respectively. By pretraining on the ImageNet-21K, our UniNet-B6 achieves 87.4%, outperforming Swin-L with 51% fewer FLOPs and 41% fewer parameters. Code is available at https://github.com/Sense-X/UniNet. 最近，变压器和多层感知器（MLP）架构在各种视觉任务上取得了令人印象深刻的结果。然而，如何有效地将这些算子结合起来形成高性能的混合视觉架构仍然是一个挑战。在这项工作中，我们通过提出一种新颖的统一架构搜索方法来研究卷积、变换器和 MLP 的可学习组合。我们的方法包含两个关键设计来实现对高性能网络的搜索。首先，我们以统一的形式对非常不同的可搜索运算符进行建模，从而使运算符能够使用相同的配置参数集进行表征。这样，整体搜索空间大小显着减小，总搜索成本变得可以承受。其次，我们提出上下文感知下采样模块（DSM）来缩小不同类型运算符之间的差距。我们提出的 DSM 能够更好地适应不同类型运营商的功能，这对于识别高性能混合架构非常重要。最后，我们将可配置算子和DSM集成到统一的搜索空间中，并使用基于强化学习的搜索算法进行搜索，以充分探索算子的最佳组合。为此，我们搜索一个基线网络并将其扩展以获得一系列模型，称为 UniNets，它比以前的 ConvNets 和 Transformer 具有更好的精度和效率。特别是，我们的 UniNet-B5 在 ImageNet 上实现了 84.9% 的 top-1 准确率，优于 EfficientNet-B7 和 BoTNet-T7，分别减少了 44% 和 55% 的 FLOP。通过在 ImageNet-21K 上进行预训练，我们的 UniNet-B6 达到了 87.4%，优于 Swin-L，失败次数减少了 51%，参数减少了 41%。代码可在 https://github.com/Sense-X/UniNet 获取。 本文提出一种统一的架构搜索方法UniNet，通过结合卷积、Transformer和MLP操作符，构建高性能的混合视觉模型。 Jihao Liu,Xin Huang,Guanglu Song,Hongsheng Li,Yu Liu cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Gabi Shalev,Gal-Lev Shalev,Joseph Keshet
title: A Baseline for Detecting Out-of-Distribution Examples in Image Captioning
title_zh: 检测图像字幕中分布不均示例的基线
abstract: Image captioning research achieved breakthroughs in recent years by developing neural models that can generate diverse and high-quality descriptions for images drawn from the same distribution as training images. However, when facing out-of-distribution (OOD) images, such as corrupted images, or images containing unknown objects, the models fail in generating relevant captions. In this paper, we consider the problem of OOD detection in image captioning. We formulate the problem and suggest an evaluation setup for assessing the model's performance on the task. Then, we analyze and show the effectiveness of the caption's likelihood score at detecting and rejecting OOD images, which implies that the relatedness between the input image and the generated caption is encapsulated within the score.
summary: Image captioning research achieved breakthroughs in recent years by developing neural models that can generate diverse and high-quality descriptions for images drawn from the same distribution as training images. However, when facing out-of-distribution (OOD) images, such as corrupted images, or images containing unknown objects, the models fail in generating relevant captions. In this paper, we consider the problem of OOD detection in image captioning. We formulate the problem and suggest an evaluation setup for assessing the model's performance on the task. Then, we analyze and show the effectiveness of the caption's likelihood score at detecting and rejecting OOD images, which implies that the relatedness between the input image and the generated caption is encapsulated within the score.
abstract_zh: 近年来，图像描述研究通过开发神经模型取得了突破，这些模型可以为与训练图像相同分布的图像生成多样化且高质量的描述。然而，当面对分布外（OOD）图像时，例如损坏的图像或包含未知对象的图像，模型无法生成相关的标题。在本文中，我们考虑图像字幕中的 OOD 检测问题。我们提出问题并提出评估设置来评估模型在任务上的表现。然后，我们分析并展示了标题的似然得分在检测和拒绝 OOD 图像方面的有效性，这意味着输入图像和生成的标题之间的相关性被封装在得分内。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于检测图像描述生成模型中分布外（OOD）样本的基础方法。
AI.motivation: 现有图像描述模型在面对训练分布外的图像（如损坏图像或包含未知对象的图像）时，生成的相关性较低的描述未被有效检测，需建立评估框架和检测机制。
AI.method: 通过分析生成的描述文本的似然分数，评估其与输入图像的相关性，从而判断图像是否为分布外样本。
AI.result: 实验验证了似然分数在检测和拒绝分布外图像方面的有效性，表明该方法能有效反映输入图像与生成描述的相关性。
AI.conclusion: 利用描述的似然分数可作为检测分布外图像的可行方案，为模型鲁棒性提升提供新思路。

search_text: A Baseline for Detecting Out-of-Distribution Examples in Image Captioning 检测图像字幕中分布不均示例的基线 Image captioning research achieved breakthroughs in recent years by developing neural models that can generate diverse and high-quality descriptions for images drawn from the same distribution as training images. However, when facing out-of-distribution (OOD) images, such as corrupted images, or images containing unknown objects, the models fail in generating relevant captions. In this paper, we consider the problem of OOD detection in image captioning. We formulate the problem and suggest an evaluation setup for assessing the model's performance on the task. Then, we analyze and show the effectiveness of the caption's likelihood score at detecting and rejecting OOD images, which implies that the relatedness between the input image and the generated caption is encapsulated within the score. 近年来，图像描述研究通过开发神经模型取得了突破，这些模型可以为与训练图像相同分布的图像生成多样化且高质量的描述。然而，当面对分布外（OOD）图像时，例如损坏的图像或包含未知对象的图像，模型无法生成相关的标题。在本文中，我们考虑图像字幕中的 OOD 检测问题。我们提出问题并提出评估设置来评估模型在任务上的表现。然后，我们分析并展示了标题的似然得分在检测和拒绝 OOD 图像方面的有效性，这意味着输入图像和生成的标题之间的相关性被封装在得分内。 本文提出了一种用于检测图像描述生成模型中分布外（OOD）样本的基础方法。 Gabi Shalev,Gal-Lev Shalev,Joseph Keshet cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Chenxin Li,Mingbao Lin,Zhiyuan Ding,Nie Lin,Yihong Zhuang,Yue Huang,Xinghao Ding,Liujuan Cao
title: Knowledge Condensation Distillation
title_zh: 知识凝结蒸馏
abstract: Knowledge Distillation (KD) transfers the knowledge from a high-capacity teacher network to strengthen a smaller student. Existing methods focus on excavating the knowledge hints and transferring the whole knowledge to the student. However, the knowledge redundancy arises since the knowledge shows different values to the student at different learning stages. In this paper, we propose Knowledge Condensation Distillation (KCD). Specifically, the knowledge value on each sample is dynamically estimated, based on which an Expectation-Maximization (EM) framework is forged to iteratively condense a compact knowledge set from the teacher to guide the student learning. Our approach is easy to build on top of the off-the-shelf KD methods, with no extra training parameters and negligible computation overhead. Thus, it presents one new perspective for KD, in which the student that actively identifies teacher's knowledge in line with its aptitude can learn to learn more effectively and efficiently. Experiments on standard benchmarks manifest that the proposed KCD can well boost the performance of student model with even higher distillation efficiency. Code is available at https://github.com/dzy3/KCD.
summary: Knowledge Distillation (KD) transfers the knowledge from a high-capacity teacher network to strengthen a smaller student. Existing methods focus on excavating the knowledge hints and transferring the whole knowledge to the student. However, the knowledge redundancy arises since the knowledge shows different values to the student at different learning stages. In this paper, we propose Knowledge Condensation Distillation (KCD). Specifically, the knowledge value on each sample is dynamically estimated, based on which an Expectation-Maximization (EM) framework is forged to iteratively condense a compact knowledge set from the teacher to guide the student learning. Our approach is easy to build on top of the off-the-shelf KD methods, with no extra training parameters and negligible computation overhead. Thus, it presents one new perspective for KD, in which the student that actively identifies teacher's knowledge in line with its aptitude can learn to learn more effectively and efficiently. Experiments on standard benchmarks manifest that the proposed KCD can well boost the performance of student model with even higher distillation efficiency. Code is available at https://github.com/dzy3/KCD.
abstract_zh: 知识蒸馏（KD）将来自高容量教师网络的知识转移到加强较小的学生。现有的方法侧重于挖掘知识提示并将整个知识传递给学生。然而，由于知识在不同学习阶段对学生表现出不同的价值，因此出现了知识冗余。在本文中，我们提出知识凝结蒸馏（KCD）。具体来说，动态估计每个样本的知识值，在此基础上构建期望最大化（EM）框架，迭代地凝结来自教师的紧凑知识集来指导学生学习。我们的方法很容易构建在现成的 KD 方法之上，无需额外的训练参数，计算开销也可以忽略不计。因此，它为知识发展提供了一种新的视角，即学生根据自己的能力主动识别教师的知识，可以更有效地学习。标准基准测试表明，所提出的 KCD 可以很好地提高学生模型的性能，并具有更高的蒸馏效率。代码可在 https://github.com/dzy3/KCD 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出知识凝聚蒸馏（KCD）方法，通过动态估计知识价值并迭代压缩教师网络知识，提升学生模型的学习效率。
AI.motivation: 现有知识蒸馏方法在不同学习阶段存在知识冗余问题，导致学生模型无法有效利用教师网络的知识。
AI.method: 基于期望最大化（EM）框架，动态评估每个样本的知识价值，迭代压缩教师网络知识形成紧凑知识集指导学生学习。
AI.result: 在标准基准测试中，KCD显著提升学生模型性能，且蒸馏效率更高，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: KCD为知识蒸馏提供了新视角，使学生模型能根据自身能力动态识别并学习教师知识，实现更高效的知识迁移。

authors_text: Anees Peringal,Mohamad Chehadeh,Rana Azzam,Mahmoud Hamandi,Igor Boiko,Yahya Zweiri
title: Design of Dynamics Invariant LSTM for Touch Based Human-UAV Interaction Detection
title_zh: 基于触摸的人机交互检测的动力学不变LSTM设计
comment: 13 pages, 13 figures, submitted to IEEE access, A supplementary video for the work presented in this paper can be accessed from https://youtu.be/29N_OXBl1mc
comments: 13 pages, 13 figures, submitted to IEEE access, A supplementary video for the work presented in this paper can be accessed from https://youtu.be/29N_OXBl1mc
abstract: The field of Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) has reached a high level of maturity in the last few years. Hence, bringing such platforms from closed labs, to day-to-day interactions with humans is important for commercialization of UAVs. One particular human-UAV scenario of interest for this paper is the payload handover scheme, where a UAV hands over a payload to a human upon their request. In this scope, this paper presents a novel real-time human-UAV interaction detection approach, where Long short-term memory (LSTM) based neural network is developed to detect state profiles resulting from human interaction dynamics. A novel data pre-processing technique is presented; this technique leverages estimated process parameters of training and testing UAVs to build dynamics invariant testing data. The proposed detection algorithm is lightweight and thus can be deployed in real-time using off the shelf UAV platforms; in addition, it depends solely on inertial and position measurements present on any classical UAV platform. The proposed approach is demonstrated on a payload handover task between multirotor UAVs and humans. Training and testing data were collected using real-time experiments. The detection approach has achieved an accuracy of 96\%, giving no false positives even in the presence of external wind disturbances, and when deployed and tested on two different UAVs.

abstract_zh: 无人机（UAV）领域在过去几年中已经达到了高度成熟的水平。因此，将此类平台从封闭实验室带到与人类的日常互动对于无人机的商业化非常重要。本文感兴趣的一个特定的人类无人机场景是有效载荷切换方案，其中无人机根据人类的请求将有效载荷移交给人类。在此范围内，本文提出了一种新颖的实时人机交互检测方法，其中开发了基于长短期记忆（LSTM）的神经网络来检测人机交互动态产生的状态概况。提出了一种新颖的数据预处理技术；该技术利用训练和测试无人机的估计过程参数来构建动态不变测试数据。所提出的检测算法是轻量级的，因此可以使用现成的无人机平台实时部署；此外，它仅取决于任何经典无人机平台上存在的惯性和位置测量。所提出的方法在多旋翼无人机和人类之间的有效负载切换任务中进行了演示。使用实时实验收集训练和测试数据。该检测方法的准确率达到 96%，即使在存在外部风扰动的情况下，并且在两种不同的无人机上部署和测试时，也不会出现误报。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于动态不变LSTM的实时人类-无人机交互检测方法，用于解决无人机与人类之间的负载交接场景中的交互检测问题。
AI.motivation: 随着无人机技术的成熟，将其从实验室环境转移到日常应用中需解决人机交互的可靠性问题，特别是在负载交接等关键场景中需确保检测的准确性与鲁棒性。
AI.method: 设计了一种结合动态不变数据预处理技术的LSTM神经网络，利用无人机惯性与位置传感器数据，通过参数估计构建动态不变测试数据，实现轻量化实时检测。
AI.result: 在真实实验环境下，该方法在两种不同无人机上均达到96%的检测准确率，且在外部风扰环境下无误报。
AI.conclusion: 该方法验证了动态不变LSTM在复杂环境下的有效性，为无人机与人类的安全交互提供了可行的实时检测方案。

One particular human-UAV scenario of interest for this paper is the payload handover scheme, where a UAV hands over a payload to a human upon their request. A novel data pre-processing technique is presented; this technique leverages estimated process parameters of training and testing UAVs to build dynamics invariant testing data. The proposed detection algorithm is lightweight and thus can be deployed in real-time using off the shelf UAV platforms; in addition, it depends solely on inertial and position measurements present on any classical UAV platform. The proposed approach is demonstrated on a payload handover task between multirotor UAVs and humans. Training and testing data were collected using real-time experiments. The detection approach has achieved an accuracy of 96\%, giving no false positives even in the presence of external wind disturbances, and when deployed and tested on two different UAVs. 无人机（UAV）领域在过去几年中已经达到了高度成熟的水平。因此，将此类平台从封闭实验室带到与人类的日常互动对于无人机的商业化非常重要。本文感兴趣的一个特定的人类无人机场景是有效载荷切换方案，其中无人机根据人类的请求将有效载荷移交给人类。在此范围内，本文提出了一种新颖的实时人机交互检测方法，其中开发了基于长短期记忆（LSTM）的神经网络来检测人机交互动态产生的状态概况。提出了一种新颖的数据预处理技术；该技术利用训练和测试无人机的估计过程参数来构建动态不变测试数据。所提出的检测算法是轻量级的，因此可以使用现成的无人机平台实时部署；此外，它仅取决于任何经典无人机平台上存在的惯性和位置测量。所提出的方法在多旋翼无人机和人类之间的有效负载切换任务中进行了演示。使用实时实验收集训练和测试数据。该检测方法的准确率达到 96%，即使在存在外部风扰动的情况下，并且在两种不同的无人机上部署和测试时，也不会出现误报。 本文提出一种基于动态不变LSTM的实时人类-无人机交互检测方法，用于解决无人机与人类之间的负载交接场景中的交互检测问题。 Anees Peringal,Mohamad Chehadeh,Rana Azzam,Mahmoud Hamandi,Igor Boiko,Yahya Zweiri cs.RO,eess.SY

authors_text: Marc Satkowski,Franziska Kessler,Susanne Narciss,Raimund Dachselt
title: Who benefits from Visualization Adaptations? Towards a better Understanding of the Influence of Visualization Literacy
title_zh: 谁从可视化适应中受益？更好地理解可视化素养的影响
comment: Preprint and Author Version of a Short Paper, accepted to the 2022 IEEE Visualization Conference (VIS)
comments: Preprint and Author Version of a Short Paper, accepted to the 2022 IEEE Visualization Conference (VIS)
abstract: The ability to read, understand, and comprehend visual information representations is subsumed under the term visualization literacy (VL). One possibility to improve the use of information visualizations is to introduce adaptations. However, it is yet unclear whether people with different VL benefit from adaptations to the same degree. We conducted an online experiment (n = 42) to investigate whether the effect of an adaptation (here: De-Emphasis) of visualizations (bar charts, scatter plots) on performance (accuracy, time) and user experiences depends on users' VL level. Using linear mixed models for the analyses, we found a positive impact of the De-Emphasis adaptation across all conditions, as well as an interaction effect of adaptation and VL on the task completion time for bar charts. This work contributes to a better understanding of the intertwined relationship of VL and visual adaptations and motivates future research.
summary: The ability to read, understand, and comprehend visual information representations is subsumed under the term visualization literacy (VL). One possibility to improve the use of information visualizations is to introduce adaptations. However, it is yet unclear whether people with different VL benefit from adaptations to the same degree. We conducted an online experiment (n = 42) to investigate whether the effect of an adaptation (here: De-Emphasis) of visualizations (bar charts, scatter plots) on performance (accuracy, time) and user experiences depends on users' VL level. Using linear mixed models for the analyses, we found a positive impact of the De-Emphasis adaptation across all conditions, as well as an interaction effect of adaptation and VL on the task completion time for bar charts. This work contributes to a better understanding of the intertwined relationship of VL and visual adaptations and motivates future research.
abstract_zh: 阅读、理解和理解视觉信息表示的能力属于术语可视化素养（VL）。改进信息可视化的使用的一种可能性是引入适应性。然而，目前尚不清楚具有不同 VL 的人是否能从适应中获得相同程度的益处。我们进行了一项在线实验 (n = 42)，以调查可视化（条形图、散点图）的适应（此处：去强调）对性能（准确性、时间）和用户体验的影响是否取决于用户的 VL 级别。使用线性混合模型进行分析，我们发现去强调适应对所有条件都有积极影响，以及适应和 VL 对条形图任务完成时间的交互作用。这项工作有助于更好地理解 VL 和视觉适应的交织关系，并激发未来的研究。

AI.tldr: 本文研究不同可视化素养（VL）水平的用户从可视化改编（如弱化强调）中获益的程度差异。
AI.motivation: 尽管可视化改编可提升信息可视化效果，但尚不清楚不同VL水平的用户是否从中受益相同，需明确其影响机制以优化设计。
AI.method: 通过在线实验（n=42），对比用户在使用改编（弱化强调）与未改编的柱状图和散点图时的任务表现（准确性、时间）及体验，采用线性混合模型分析数据。
AI.result: 弱化强调改编在所有条件下均提升表现，且改编效果与VL水平在柱状图任务耗时上存在交互作用。
AI.conclusion: 可视化素养与改编效果存在关联，需进一步研究二者关系以指导个性化可视化设计。

authors_text: Julong Young,Junhui Chen,Feihu Huang,Jian Peng
title: Dateformer: Time-modeling Transformer for Longer-term Series Forecasting
title_zh: Dateformer：用于长期序列预测的时间建模转换器
abstract: Transformers have demonstrated impressive strength in long-term series forecasting. Existing prediction research mostly focused on mapping past short sub-series (lookback window) to future series (forecast window). The longer training dataset time series will be discarded, once training is completed. Models can merely rely on lookback window information for inference, which impedes models from analyzing time series from a global perspective. And these windows used by Transformers are quite narrow because they must model each time-step therein. Under this point-wise processing style, broadening windows will rapidly exhaust their model capacity. This, for fine-grained time series, leads to a bottleneck in information input and prediction output, which is mortal to long-term series forecasting. To overcome the barrier, we propose a brand-new methodology to utilize Transformer for time series forecasting. Specifically, we split time series into patches by day and reform point-wise to patch-wise processing, which considerably enhances the information input and output of Transformers. To further help models leverage the whole training set's global information during inference, we distill the information, store it in time representations, and replace series with time representations as the main modeling entities. Our designed time-modeling Transformer -- Dateformer yields state-of-the-art accuracy on 7 real-world datasets with a 33.6\% relative improvement and extends the maximum forecast range to half-year.
summary: Transformers have demonstrated impressive strength in long-term series forecasting. Existing prediction research mostly focused on mapping past short sub-series (lookback window) to future series (forecast window). The longer training dataset time series will be discarded, once training is completed. Models can merely rely on lookback window information for inference, which impedes models from analyzing time series from a global perspective. And these windows used by Transformers are quite narrow because they must model each time-step therein. Under this point-wise processing style, broadening windows will rapidly exhaust their model capacity. This, for fine-grained time series, leads to a bottleneck in information input and prediction output, which is mortal to long-term series forecasting. To overcome the barrier, we propose a brand-new methodology to utilize Transformer for time series forecasting. Specifically, we split time series into patches by day and reform point-wise to patch-wise processing, which considerably enhances the information input and output of Transformers. To further help models leverage the whole training set's global information during inference, we distill the information, store it in time representations, and replace series with time representations as the main modeling entities. Our designed time-modeling Transformer -- Dateformer yields state-of-the-art accuracy on 7 real-world datasets with a 33.6\% relative improvement and extends the maximum forecast range to half-year.
abstract_zh: Transformers 在长期序列预测方面表现出了令人印象深刻的实力。现有的预测研究主要集中在将过去的短子系列（回顾窗口）映射到未来的系列（预测窗口）。训练完成后，较长的训练数据集时间序列将被丢弃。模型只能依靠回溯窗口信息进行推理，这阻碍了模型从全局角度分析时间序列。 Transformers 使用的这些窗口非常窄，因为它们必须对其中的每个时间步进行建模。在这种逐点处理方式下，扩大窗口将迅速耗尽其模型容量。对于细粒度的时间序列来说，这会导致信息输入和预测输出的瓶颈，这对于长期序列预测来说是致命的。为了克服这一障碍，我们提出了一种利用 Transformer 进行时间序列预测的全新方法。具体来说，我们将时间序列按天分割成补丁，并将逐点处理改为逐补丁处理，这大大增强了 Transformer 的信息输入和输出。为了进一步帮助模型在推理过程中利用整个训练集的全局信息，我们提取信息，将其存储在时间表示中，并用时间表示替换序列作为主要建模实体。我们设计的时间建模 Transformer - Dateformer 在 7 个真实世界数据集上产生了最先进的精度，相对提高了 33.6%，并将最大预测范围扩展至半年。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Dateformer模型，通过改进Transformer架构解决长期时间序列预测中的全局信息利用不足和窗口限制问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖短窗口导致无法利用全局信息，且窗口扩展会快速消耗模型容量，造成细粒度时间序列预测瓶颈。
AI.method: 将时间序列按天分割为块进行块级处理，结合时间表示蒸馏技术存储全局信息，以时间表示替代原始序列作为建模主体。
AI.result: 在7个真实数据集上实现33.6%相对精度提升，最大预测范围扩展至半年。
AI.conclusion: Dateformer通过分块处理与时间表示机制有效突破长期预测瓶颈，验证了全局信息建模对提升预测性能的关键作用。

authors_text: Juan Gómez-Gómez,Ester Vidaña-Vila,Xavier Sevillano
title: Western Mediterranean wetlands bird species classification: evaluating small-footprint deep learning approaches on a new annotated dataset
title_zh: 西地中海湿地鸟类物种分类：在新的带注释数据集上评估小足迹深度学习方法
abstract: The deployment of an expert system running over a wireless acoustic sensors network made up of bioacoustic monitoring devices that recognise bird species from their sounds would enable the automation of many tasks of ecological value, including the analysis of bird population composition or the detection of endangered species in areas of environmental interest. Endowing these devices with accurate audio classification capabilities is possible thanks to the latest advances in artificial intelligence, among which deep learning techniques excel. However, a key issue to make bioacoustic devices affordable is the use of small footprint deep neural networks that can be embedded in resource and battery constrained hardware platforms. For this reason, this work presents a critical comparative analysis between two heavy and large footprint deep neural networks (VGG16 and ResNet50) and a lightweight alternative, MobileNetV2. Our experimental results reveal that MobileNetV2 achieves an average F1-score less than a 5\% lower than ResNet50 (0.789 vs. 0.834), performing better than VGG16 with a footprint size nearly 40 times smaller. Moreover, to compare the models, we have created and made public the Western Mediterranean Wetland Birds dataset, consisting of 201.6 minutes and 5,795 audio excerpts of 20 endemic bird species of the Aiguamolls de l'Empordà Natural Park.
summary: The deployment of an expert system running over a wireless acoustic sensors network made up of bioacoustic monitoring devices that recognise bird species from their sounds would enable the automation of many tasks of ecological value, including the analysis of bird population composition or the detection of endangered species in areas of environmental interest. Endowing these devices with accurate audio classification capabilities is possible thanks to the latest advances in artificial intelligence, among which deep learning techniques excel. However, a key issue to make bioacoustic devices affordable is the use of small footprint deep neural networks that can be embedded in resource and battery constrained hardware platforms. For this reason, this work presents a critical comparative analysis between two heavy and large footprint deep neural networks (VGG16 and ResNet50) and a lightweight alternative, MobileNetV2. Our experimental results reveal that MobileNetV2 achieves an average F1-score less than a 5\% lower than ResNet50 (0.789 vs. 0.834), performing better than VGG16 with a footprint size nearly 40 times smaller. Moreover, to compare the models, we have created and made public the Western Mediterranean Wetland Birds dataset, consisting of 201.6 minutes and 5,795 audio excerpts of 20 endemic bird species of the Aiguamolls de l'Empordà Natural Park.
abstract_zh: 部署在无线声学传感器网络上运行的专家系统，该网络由生物声学监测设备组成，可以从声音中识别鸟类物种，这将使许多具有生态价值的任务实现自动化，包括分析鸟类种群构成或检测环境利益区域中的濒危物种。得益于人工智能的最新进展，其中深度学习技术表现出色，赋予这些设备准确的音频分类功能成为可能。然而，使生物声学设备变得经济实惠的一个关键问题是使用可嵌入资源和电池受限的硬件平台的小占用深度神经网络。因此，这项工作对两个重型和大足迹深度神经网络（VGG16 和 ResNet50）与轻量级替代方案 MobileNetV2 之间进行了关键的比较分析。我们的实验结果表明，MobileNetV2 的平均 F1 分数比 ResNet50 低不到 5%（0.789 vs. 0.834），比 VGG16 表现更好，占用空间小了近 40 倍。此外，为了比较模型，我们创建并公开了西地中海湿地鸟类数据集，其中包含 Aiguamolls de l'Empordà 自然公园 20 种特有鸟类的 201.6 分钟和 5,795 个音频摘录。

AI.conclusion: 轻量级MobileNetV2在准确率与模型效率间取得良好平衡，适合部署于资源受限的生物声学监测设备。

search_text: Western Mediterranean wetlands bird species classification: evaluating small-footprint deep learning approaches on a new annotated dataset 西地中海湿地鸟类物种分类：在新的带注释数据集上评估小足迹深度学习方法 The deployment of an expert system running over a wireless acoustic sensors network made up of bioacoustic monitoring devices that recognise bird species from their sounds would enable the automation of many tasks of ecological value, including the analysis of bird population composition or the detection of endangered species in areas of environmental interest. Endowing these devices with accurate audio classification capabilities is possible thanks to the latest advances in artificial intelligence, among which deep learning techniques excel. However, a key issue to make bioacoustic devices affordable is the use of small footprint deep neural networks that can be embedded in resource and battery constrained hardware platforms. For this reason, this work presents a critical comparative analysis between two heavy and large footprint deep neural networks (VGG16 and ResNet50) and a lightweight alternative, MobileNetV2. Our experimental results reveal that MobileNetV2 achieves an average F1-score less than a 5\% lower than ResNet50 (0.789 vs. 0.834), performing better than VGG16 with a footprint size nearly 40 times smaller. Moreover, to compare the models, we have created and made public the Western Mediterranean Wetland Birds dataset, consisting of 201.6 minutes and 5,795 audio excerpts of 20 endemic bird species of the Aiguamolls de l'Empordà Natural Park. 部署在无线声学传感器网络上运行的专家系统，该网络由生物声学监测设备组成，可以从声音中识别鸟类物种，这将使许多具有生态价值的任务实现自动化，包括分析鸟类种群构成或检测环境利益区域中的濒危物种。得益于人工智能的最新进展，其中深度学习技术表现出色，赋予这些设备准确的音频分类功能成为可能。然而，使生物声学设备变得经济实惠的一个关键问题是使用可嵌入资源和电池受限的硬件平台的小占用深度神经网络。因此，这项工作对两个重型和大足迹深度神经网络（VGG16 和 ResNet50）与轻量级替代方案 MobileNetV2 之间进行了关键的比较分析。我们的实验结果表明，MobileNetV2 的平均 F1 分数比 ResNet50 低不到 5%（0.789 vs. 0.834），比 VGG16 表现更好，占用空间小了近 40 倍。此外，为了比较模型，我们创建并公开了西地中海湿地鸟类数据集，其中包含 Aiguamolls de l'Empordà 自然公园 20 种特有鸟类的 201.6 分钟和 5,795 个音频摘录。 本文评估了轻量级深度学习模型在西地中海湿地鸟类分类任务中的性能，对比了VGG16、ResNet50和MobileNetV2三种网络架构。 Juan Gómez-Gómez,Ester Vidaña-Vila,Xavier Sevillano cs.SD,cs.AI,eess.AS

authors_text: Honghui Liu,Changjian Wang,Kele Xu,Fangzhao Li,Ming Feng,Yuxing Peng,Hongjun He
title: Wound Segmentation with Dynamic Illumination Correction and Dual-view Semantic Fusion
title_zh: 具有动态照明校正和双视图语义融合的伤口分割
abstract: Wound image segmentation is a critical component for the clinical diagnosis and in-time treatment of wounds. Recently, deep learning has become the mainstream methodology for wound image segmentation. However, the pre-processing of the wound image, such as the illumination correction, is required before the training phase as the performance can be greatly improved. The correction procedure and the training of deep models are independent of each other, which leads to sub-optimal segmentation performance as the fixed illumination correction may not be suitable for all images. To address aforementioned issues, an end-to-end dual-view segmentation approach was proposed in this paper, by incorporating a learn-able illumination correction module into the deep segmentation models. The parameters of the module can be learned and updated during the training stage automatically, while the dual-view fusion can fully employ the features from both the raw images and the enhanced ones. To demonstrate the effectiveness and robustness of the proposed framework, the extensive experiments are conducted on the benchmark datasets. The encouraging results suggest that our framework can significantly improve the segmentation performance, compared to the state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Wound image segmentation is a critical component for the clinical diagnosis and in-time treatment of wounds. Recently, deep learning has become the mainstream methodology for wound image segmentation. However, the pre-processing of the wound image, such as the illumination correction, is required before the training phase as the performance can be greatly improved. The correction procedure and the training of deep models are independent of each other, which leads to sub-optimal segmentation performance as the fixed illumination correction may not be suitable for all images. To address aforementioned issues, an end-to-end dual-view segmentation approach was proposed in this paper, by incorporating a learn-able illumination correction module into the deep segmentation models. The parameters of the module can be learned and updated during the training stage automatically, while the dual-view fusion can fully employ the features from both the raw images and the enhanced ones. To demonstrate the effectiveness and robustness of the proposed framework, the extensive experiments are conducted on the benchmark datasets. The encouraging results suggest that our framework can significantly improve the segmentation performance, compared to the state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 伤口图像分割是伤口临床诊断和及时治疗的关键组成部分。近年来，深度学习已成为伤口图像分割的主流方法。然而，在训练阶段之前需要对伤口图像进行预处理，例如光照校正，这样可以大大提高性能。校正过程和深度模型的训练是相互独立的，这导致分割性能次优，因为固定照明校正可能并不适合所有图像。为了解决上述问题，本文提出了一种端到端双视图分割方法，将可学习的照明校正模块合并到深度分割模型中。该模块的参数可以在训练阶段自动学习和更新，而双视图融合可以充分利用原始图像和增强图像的特征。为了证明所提出框架的有效性和鲁棒性，在基准数据集上进行了广泛的实验。令人鼓舞的结果表明，与最先进的方法相比，我们的框架可以显着提高分割性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合动态光照校正和双视角语义融合的端到端伤口图像分割方法，以提升分割性能。
AI.motivation: 传统伤口图像分割方法在预处理阶段进行固定的光照校正，无法适应不同图像需求，导致分割效果次优。
AI.method: 将可学习的光照校正模块集成到深度分割模型中，通过双视角融合利用原始图像和增强图像的特征，并在训练过程中自动优化模块参数。
AI.result: 在基准数据集上的实验表明，该框架相比现有方法显著提升了分割性能，具有良好的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 通过动态光照校正与双视角语义融合，本文提出的框架有效解决了传统方法的局限性，为伤口分割提供了更优解决方案。

authors_text: Yichen Sheng,Yifan Liu,Jianming Zhang,Wei Yin,A. Cengiz Oztireli,He Zhang,Zhe Lin,Eli Shechtman,Bedrich Benes
title: Controllable Shadow Generation Using Pixel Height Maps
title_zh: 使用像素高度图的可控阴影生成
abstract: Shadows are essential for realistic image compositing. Physics-based shadow rendering methods require 3D geometries, which are not always available. Deep learning-based shadow synthesis methods learn a mapping from the light information to an object's shadow without explicitly modeling the shadow geometry. Still, they lack control and are prone to visual artifacts. We introduce pixel heigh, a novel geometry representation that encodes the correlations between objects, ground, and camera pose. The pixel height can be calculated from 3D geometries, manually annotated on 2D images, and can also be predicted from a single-view RGB image by a supervised approach. It can be used to calculate hard shadows in a 2D image based on the projective geometry, providing precise control of the shadows' direction and shape. Furthermore, we propose a data-driven soft shadow generator to apply softness to a hard shadow based on a softness input parameter. Qualitative and quantitative evaluations demonstrate that the proposed pixel height significantly improves the quality of the shadow generation while allowing for controllability.
summary: Shadows are essential for realistic image compositing. Physics-based shadow rendering methods require 3D geometries, which are not always available. Deep learning-based shadow synthesis methods learn a mapping from the light information to an object's shadow without explicitly modeling the shadow geometry. Still, they lack control and are prone to visual artifacts. We introduce pixel heigh, a novel geometry representation that encodes the correlations between objects, ground, and camera pose. The pixel height can be calculated from 3D geometries, manually annotated on 2D images, and can also be predicted from a single-view RGB image by a supervised approach. It can be used to calculate hard shadows in a 2D image based on the projective geometry, providing precise control of the shadows' direction and shape. Furthermore, we propose a data-driven soft shadow generator to apply softness to a hard shadow based on a softness input parameter. Qualitative and quantitative evaluations demonstrate that the proposed pixel height significantly improves the quality of the shadow generation while allowing for controllability.
abstract_zh: 阴影对于逼真的图像合成至关重要。基于物理的阴影渲染方法需要 3D 几何图形，但这些几何图形并不总是可用。基于深度学习的阴影合成方法可以学习从光信息到物体阴影的映射，而无需显式地建模阴影几何形状。尽管如此，它们仍然缺乏控制，并且容易出现视觉伪影。我们引入了像素高度，这是一种新颖的几何表示形式，它对物体、地面和相机姿势之间的相关性进行编码。像素高度可以根据 3D 几何形状计算，在 2D 图像上手动注释，也可以通过监督方法从单视图 RGB 图像预测。它可用于基于投影几何计算 2D 图像中的硬阴影，从而提供对阴影方向和形状的精确控制。此外，我们提出了一种数据驱动的软阴影生成器，根据柔软度输入参数将柔软度应用于硬阴影。定性和定量评估表明，所提出的像素高度显着提高了阴影生成的质量，同时实现了可控性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于像素高度图的可控阴影生成方法，通过编码物体、地面与相机姿态的关系，实现对阴影方向和形状的精确控制。
AI.motivation: 传统物理阴影渲染依赖3D几何信息，而深度学习方法虽无需3D模型但缺乏控制且易产生视觉伪影，需一种兼顾控制性与真实感的阴影生成方案。
AI.method: 引入像素高度图作为新型几何表示，结合投影几何计算硬阴影，并设计数据驱动的软阴影生成器，通过软度参数调节阴影柔和度。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在定性和定量评估中均显著提升阴影生成质量，同时实现对阴影方向、形状及软硬程度的精确控制。
AI.conclusion: 像素高度图有效解决了阴影生成中的控制性与真实性矛盾，为图像合成提供了更灵活且高质量的阴影生成方案。

search_text: Controllable Shadow Generation Using Pixel Height Maps 使用像素高度图的可控阴影生成 Shadows are essential for realistic image compositing. Physics-based shadow rendering methods require 3D geometries, which are not always available. Deep learning-based shadow synthesis methods learn a mapping from the light information to an object's shadow without explicitly modeling the shadow geometry. Still, they lack control and are prone to visual artifacts. We introduce pixel heigh, a novel geometry representation that encodes the correlations between objects, ground, and camera pose. The pixel height can be calculated from 3D geometries, manually annotated on 2D images, and can also be predicted from a single-view RGB image by a supervised approach. It can be used to calculate hard shadows in a 2D image based on the projective geometry, providing precise control of the shadows' direction and shape. Furthermore, we propose a data-driven soft shadow generator to apply softness to a hard shadow based on a softness input parameter. Qualitative and quantitative evaluations demonstrate that the proposed pixel height significantly improves the quality of the shadow generation while allowing for controllability. 阴影对于逼真的图像合成至关重要。基于物理的阴影渲染方法需要 3D 几何图形，但这些几何图形并不总是可用。基于深度学习的阴影合成方法可以学习从光信息到物体阴影的映射，而无需显式地建模阴影几何形状。尽管如此，它们仍然缺乏控制，并且容易出现视觉伪影。我们引入了像素高度，这是一种新颖的几何表示形式，它对物体、地面和相机姿势之间的相关性进行编码。像素高度可以根据 3D 几何形状计算，在 2D 图像上手动注释，也可以通过监督方法从单视图 RGB 图像预测。它可用于基于投影几何计算 2D 图像中的硬阴影，从而提供对阴影方向和形状的精确控制。此外，我们提出了一种数据驱动的软阴影生成器，根据柔软度输入参数将柔软度应用于硬阴影。定性和定量评估表明，所提出的像素高度显着提高了阴影生成的质量，同时实现了可控性。 本文提出一种基于像素高度图的可控阴影生成方法，通过编码物体、地面与相机姿态的关系，实现对阴影方向和形状的精确控制。 Yichen Sheng,Yifan Liu,Jianming Zhang,Wei Yin,A. Cengiz Oztireli,He Zhang,Zhe Lin,Eli Shechtman,Bedrich Benes cs.CV,cs.GR

authors_text: Yuyang Long,Qilong Zhang,Boheng Zeng,Lianli Gao,Xianglong Liu,Jian Zhang,Jingkuan Song
title: Frequency Domain Model Augmentation for Adversarial Attack
title_zh: 对抗性攻击的频域模型增强
abstract: For black-box attacks, the gap between the substitute model and the victim model is usually large, which manifests as a weak attack performance. Motivated by the observation that the transferability of adversarial examples can be improved by attacking diverse models simultaneously, model augmentation methods which simulate different models by using transformed images are proposed. However, existing transformations for spatial domain do not translate to significantly diverse augmented models. To tackle this issue, we propose a novel spectrum simulation attack to craft more transferable adversarial examples against both normally trained and defense models. Specifically, we apply a spectrum transformation to the input and thus perform the model augmentation in the frequency domain. We theoretically prove that the transformation derived from frequency domain leads to a diverse spectrum saliency map, an indicator we proposed to reflect the diversity of substitute models. Notably, our method can be generally combined with existing attacks. Extensive experiments on the ImageNet dataset demonstrate the effectiveness of our method, \textit{e.g.}, attacking nine state-of-the-art defense models with an average success rate of \textbf{95.4\%}. Our code is available in \url{https://github.com/yuyang-long/SSA}.
summary: For black-box attacks, the gap between the substitute model and the victim model is usually large, which manifests as a weak attack performance. Motivated by the observation that the transferability of adversarial examples can be improved by attacking diverse models simultaneously, model augmentation methods which simulate different models by using transformed images are proposed. However, existing transformations for spatial domain do not translate to significantly diverse augmented models. To tackle this issue, we propose a novel spectrum simulation attack to craft more transferable adversarial examples against both normally trained and defense models. Specifically, we apply a spectrum transformation to the input and thus perform the model augmentation in the frequency domain. We theoretically prove that the transformation derived from frequency domain leads to a diverse spectrum saliency map, an indicator we proposed to reflect the diversity of substitute models. Notably, our method can be generally combined with existing attacks. Extensive experiments on the ImageNet dataset demonstrate the effectiveness of our method, \textit{e.g.}, attacking nine state-of-the-art defense models with an average success rate of \textbf{95.4\%}. Our code is available in \url{https://github.com/yuyang-long/SSA}.
abstract_zh: 对于黑盒攻击，替代模型与受害者模型之间的差距通常较大，表现为攻击性能较弱。由于观察到可以通过同时攻击不同的模型来提高对抗性示例的可迁移性，因此提出了使用变换图像来模拟不同模型的模型增强方法。然而，现有的空间域转换并不能转化为显着多样化的增强模型。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的频谱模拟攻击，以针对正常训练的模型和防御模型制作更多可转移的对抗性示例。具体来说，我们对输入应用频谱变换，从而在频域中执行模型增强。我们从理论上证明，从频域导出的变换会产生多样化的频谱显着图，这是我们提出的反映替代模型多样性的指标。值得注意的是，我们的方法通常可以与现有的攻击相结合。在 ImageNet 数据集上进行的大量实验证明了我们的方法 \textit{e.g.} 的有效性，它攻击了九个最先进的防御模型，平均成功率为 \textbf{95.4\%}。我们的代码可以在 \url{https://github.com/yuyang-long/SSA} 中找到。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种在频域中进行模型增强的频域模型增强方法，以提高对抗样本的可迁移性。
AI.motivation: 现有空间域的模型增强方法无法显著提升对抗样本的可迁移性，因此需要一种新的方法来生成更具多样性的替代模型。
AI.method: 该论文提出了一种频域谱模拟攻击方法，通过对输入进行频域变换，实现模型增强，并提出频谱显著图指标来衡量替代模型的多样性。
AI.result: 在ImageNet数据集上的实验表明，该方法在攻击九种最先进的防御模型时，平均成功率达到95.4%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法能够有效提升对抗样本的可迁移性，并且可以与现有的攻击方法结合使用。

authors_text: Zuzeng Lin,Ailin Huang,Zhewei Huang
title: Collaborative Neural Rendering using Anime Character Sheets
title_zh: 使用动漫角色表进行协作神经渲染
comment: The three authors contribute equally. In the Arts and Creativity Track of IJCAI2023
comments: The three authors contribute equally. In the Arts and Creativity Track of IJCAI2023
abstract: Drawing images of characters with desired poses is an essential but laborious task in anime production. Assisting artists to create is a research hotspot in recent years. In this paper, we present the Collaborative Neural Rendering (CoNR) method, which creates new images for specified poses from a few reference images (AKA Character Sheets). In general, the diverse hairstyles and garments of anime characters defies the employment of universal body models like SMPL, which fits in most nude human shapes. To overcome this, CoNR uses a compact and easy-to-obtain landmark encoding to avoid creating a unified UV mapping in the pipeline. In addition, the performance of CoNR can be significantly improved when referring to multiple reference images, thanks to feature space cross-view warping in a carefully designed neural network. Moreover, we have collected a character sheet dataset containing over 700,000 hand-drawn and synthesized images of diverse poses to facilitate research in this area. Our code and demo are available at https://github.com/megvii-research/IJCAI2023-CoNR.
summary: Drawing images of characters with desired poses is an essential but laborious task in anime production. Assisting artists to create is a research hotspot in recent years. In this paper, we present the Collaborative Neural Rendering (CoNR) method, which creates new images for specified poses from a few reference images (AKA Character Sheets). In general, the diverse hairstyles and garments of anime characters defies the employment of universal body models like SMPL, which fits in most nude human shapes. To overcome this, CoNR uses a compact and easy-to-obtain landmark encoding to avoid creating a unified UV mapping in the pipeline. In addition, the performance of CoNR can be significantly improved when referring to multiple reference images, thanks to feature space cross-view warping in a carefully designed neural network. Moreover, we have collected a character sheet dataset containing over 700,000 hand-drawn and synthesized images of diverse poses to facilitate research in this area. Our code and demo are available at https://github.com/megvii-research/IJCAI2023-CoNR.
abstract_zh: 在动画制作中，绘制具有所需姿势的角色图像是一项重要但艰巨的任务。辅助艺术家创作是近年来的研究热点。在本文中，我们提出了协作神经渲染（CoNR）方法，该方法可以根据一些参考图像（又名角色表）为指定姿势创建新图像。一般来说，动漫人物的发型和服装多种多样，无法使用像 SMPL 这样适合大多数裸体人体形状的通用人体模型。为了克服这个问题，CoNR 使用紧凑且易于获得的地标编码来避免在流程中创建统一的 UV 映射。此外，由于精心设计的神经网络中的特征空间跨视图扭曲，在参考多个参考图像时，CoNR 的性能可以得到显着提高。此外，我们还收集了一个角色表数据集，其中包含超过 700,000 张不同姿势的手绘和合成图像，以促进该领域的研究。我们的代码和演示可在 https://github.com/megvii-research/IJCAI2023-CoNR 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为CoNR的方法，通过少量参考图像（角色表）生成指定姿势的动漫角色图像。
AI.motivation: 动漫角色绘制需要大量人工劳动，且现有通用人体模型难以适配动漫角色多样化的发型和服装。
AI.method: CoNR采用紧凑的标志点编码替代统一UV映射，并通过设计的神经网络实现多参考图像的特征空间跨视角变形。
AI.result: 构建了包含70多万张手绘和合成图像的角色表数据集，代码和演示已开源。
AI.conclusion: CoNR有效解决了动漫角色姿态生成中的服装发型适配问题，多参考图像显著提升性能，推动了相关研究进展。

authors_text: Buzhen Huang,Yuan Shu,Jingyi Ju,Yangang Wang
title: Occluded Human Body Capture with Self-Supervised Spatial-Temporal Motion Prior
title_zh: 利用自监督时空运动先验进行遮挡人体捕捉
abstract: Although significant progress has been achieved on monocular maker-less human motion capture in recent years, it is still hard for state-of-the-art methods to obtain satisfactory results in occlusion scenarios. There are two main reasons: the one is that the occluded motion capture is inherently ambiguous as various 3D poses can map to the same 2D observations, which always results in an unreliable estimation. The other is that no sufficient occluded human data can be used for training a robust model. To address the obstacles, our key-idea is to employ non-occluded human data to learn a joint-level spatial-temporal motion prior for occluded human with a self-supervised strategy. To further reduce the gap between synthetic and real occlusion data, we build the first 3D occluded motion dataset~(OcMotion), which can be used for both training and testing. We encode the motions in 2D maps and synthesize occlusions on non-occluded data for the self-supervised training. A spatial-temporal layer is then designed to learn joint-level correlations. The learned prior reduces the ambiguities of occlusions and is robust to diverse occlusion types, which is then adopted to assist the occluded human motion capture. Experimental results show that our method can generate accurate and coherent human motions from occluded videos with good generalization ability and runtime efficiency. The dataset and code are publicly available at \url{https://github.com/boycehbz/CHOMP}.
summary: Although significant progress has been achieved on monocular maker-less human motion capture in recent years, it is still hard for state-of-the-art methods to obtain satisfactory results in occlusion scenarios. There are two main reasons: the one is that the occluded motion capture is inherently ambiguous as various 3D poses can map to the same 2D observations, which always results in an unreliable estimation. The other is that no sufficient occluded human data can be used for training a robust model. To address the obstacles, our key-idea is to employ non-occluded human data to learn a joint-level spatial-temporal motion prior for occluded human with a self-supervised strategy. To further reduce the gap between synthetic and real occlusion data, we build the first 3D occluded motion dataset~(OcMotion), which can be used for both training and testing. We encode the motions in 2D maps and synthesize occlusions on non-occluded data for the self-supervised training. A spatial-temporal layer is then designed to learn joint-level correlations. The learned prior reduces the ambiguities of occlusions and is robust to diverse occlusion types, which is then adopted to assist the occluded human motion capture. Experimental results show that our method can generate accurate and coherent human motions from occluded videos with good generalization ability and runtime efficiency. The dataset and code are publicly available at \url{https://github.com/boycehbz/CHOMP}.
abstract_zh: 尽管近年来单目无标记人体动作捕捉取得了重大进展，但最先进的方法仍然很难在遮挡场景中获得令人满意的结果。主要有两个原因：一是被遮挡的运动捕捉本质上是不明确的，因为各种 3D 姿势可以映射到相同的 2D 观察结果，这总是会导致不可靠的估计。另一个是没有足够的遮挡人类数据可用于训练鲁棒模型。为了解决这些障碍，我们的关键思想是利用非遮挡人类数据，通过自我监督策略来学习遮挡人类的联合级时空运动。为了进一步缩小合成数据和真实遮挡数据之间的差距，我们构建了第一个 3D 遮挡运动数据集~(OcMotion)，它可用于训练和测试。我们对 2D 地图中的运动进行编码，并在非遮挡数据上合成遮挡，以进行自监督训练。然后设计时空层来学习联合级别的相关性。学习到的先验减少了遮挡的模糊性，并且对不同的遮挡类型具有鲁棒性，然后用于辅助遮挡的人体运动捕捉。实验结果表明，我们的方法可以从遮挡视频中生成准确且连贯的人体运动，具有良好的泛化能力和运行时效率。数据集和代码可在 \url{https://github.com/boycehbz/CHOMP} 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于自监督时空运动先验的遮挡人体动作捕捉方法，解决遮挡场景下人体动作估计的模糊性和数据不足问题。
AI.motivation: 现有单目无标记人体动作捕捉方法在遮挡场景下表现不佳，主要因遮挡导致动作歧义性强且缺乏足够的遮挡数据进行训练。
AI.method: 利用非遮挡数据通过自监督策略学习关节级时空运动先验，构建首个3D遮挡动作数据集OcMotion，并设计时空层编码关节关联性以减少遮挡模糊性。
AI.result: 实验表明方法能从遮挡视频中生成准确连贯的人体动作，具有良好的泛化能力和运行效率，数据集和代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过自监督学习有效提升遮挡场景动作捕捉性能，公开数据集为后续研究提供重要资源。

authors_text: Masud An Nur Islam Fahim,Nazmus Saqib,Shafkat Khan Siam,Ho Yub Jung
title: Rethinking gradient weights' influence over saliency map estimation
title_zh: 重新思考梯度权重对显着图估计的影响
abstract: Class activation map (CAM) helps to formulate saliency maps that aid in interpreting the deep neural network's prediction. Gradient-based methods are generally faster than other branches of vision interpretability and independent of human guidance. The performance of CAM-like studies depends on the governing model's layer response, and the influences of the gradients. Typical gradient-oriented CAM studies rely on weighted aggregation for saliency map estimation by projecting the gradient maps into single weight values, which may lead to over generalized saliency map. To address this issue, we use a global guidance map to rectify the weighted aggregation operation during saliency estimation, where resultant interpretations are comparatively clean er and instance-specific. We obtain the global guidance map by performing elementwise multiplication between the feature maps and their corresponding gradient maps. To validate our study, we compare the proposed study with eight different saliency visualizers. In addition, we use seven commonly used evaluation metrics for quantitative comparison. The proposed scheme achieves significant improvement over the test images from the ImageNet, MS-COCO 14, and PASCAL VOC 2012 datasets.
summary: Class activation map (CAM) helps to formulate saliency maps that aid in interpreting the deep neural network's prediction. Gradient-based methods are generally faster than other branches of vision interpretability and independent of human guidance. The performance of CAM-like studies depends on the governing model's layer response, and the influences of the gradients. Typical gradient-oriented CAM studies rely on weighted aggregation for saliency map estimation by projecting the gradient maps into single weight values, which may lead to over generalized saliency map. To address this issue, we use a global guidance map to rectify the weighted aggregation operation during saliency estimation, where resultant interpretations are comparatively clean er and instance-specific. We obtain the global guidance map by performing elementwise multiplication between the feature maps and their corresponding gradient maps. To validate our study, we compare the proposed study with eight different saliency visualizers. In addition, we use seven commonly used evaluation metrics for quantitative comparison. The proposed scheme achieves significant improvement over the test images from the ImageNet, MS-COCO 14, and PASCAL VOC 2012 datasets.
abstract_zh: 类激活图 (CAM) 有助于制定显着性图，帮助解释深度神经网络的预测。基于梯度的方法通常比视觉可解释性的其他分支更快，并且独立于人类指导。类 CAM 研究的性能取决于控制模型的层响应以及梯度的影响。典型的面向梯度的 CAM 研究依赖于加权聚合，通过将梯度图投影为单个权重值来估计显着图，这可能会导致过度广义的显着图。为了解决这个问题，我们使用全局指导图来纠正显着性估计期间的加权聚合操作，其中所得的解释相对清晰且特定于实例。我们通过在特征图与其相应的梯度图之间执行元素相乘来获得全局引导图。为了验证我们的研究，我们将拟议的研究与八种不同的显着性可视化工具进行了比较。此外，我们使用七个常用的评价指标进行定量比较。所提出的方案比 ImageNet、MS-COCO 14 和 PASCAL VOC 2012 数据集的测试图像取得了显着的改进。

AI.tldr: 本文重新思考梯度权重对显著性图估计的影响，提出通过全局指导图修正加权聚合操作以提升显著性图的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有基于梯度的显著性图方法依赖加权聚合操作，可能导致显著性图过度泛化，缺乏实例特异性。
AI.method: 通过逐元素相乘特征图与对应梯度图生成全局指导图，利用该图修正加权聚合过程，提升显著性图估计的精确性。
AI.result: 在ImageNet、MS-COCO 14和PASCAL VOC 2012数据集上，所提方法在七种评估指标中均优于八种对比显著性可视化方法。
AI.conclusion: 全局指导图机制有效缓解了梯度权重的过度泛化问题，显著提升了显著性图的实例特异性与解释准确性。
