authors_text: Carmine Recchiuto,Antonio Sgorbissa
title: Diversity-aware social robots meet people: beyond context-aware embodied AI
title_zh: 具有多样性感知能力的社交机器人与人们见面：超越情境感知的具体人工智能
comment: The article has been presented during the Roundtable "AI in holistic care and healing practices: the caring encounter beyond COVID-19", Anthropology, AI and the Future of Human Society, 6-10 June 2022, Royal Anthropological Institute
comments: The article has been presented during the Roundtable "AI in holistic care and healing practices: the caring encounter beyond COVID-19", Anthropology, AI and the Future of Human Society, 6-10 June 2022, Royal Anthropological Institute
abstract: The article introduces the concept of "diversity-aware" robotics and discusses the need to develop computational models to embed robots with diversity-awareness: that is, robots capable of adapting and re-configuring their behavior to recognize, respect, and value the uniqueness of the person they interact with to promote inclusion regardless of their age, race, gender, cognitive or physical capabilities, etc. Finally, the article discusses possible technical solutions based on Ontologies and Bayesian Networks, starting from previous experience with culturally competent robots.
summary: The article introduces the concept of "diversity-aware" robotics and discusses the need to develop computational models to embed robots with diversity-awareness: that is, robots capable of adapting and re-configuring their behavior to recognize, respect, and value the uniqueness of the person they interact with to promote inclusion regardless of their age, race, gender, cognitive or physical capabilities, etc. Finally, the article discusses possible technical solutions based on Ontologies and Bayesian Networks, starting from previous experience with culturally competent robots.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了“多样性意识”机器人的概念，并讨论了开发计算模型以嵌入具有多样性意识的机器人的必要性：即机器人能够适应和重新配置其行为，以识别、尊重和重视与之互动的人的独特性，以促进包容性，无论其年龄、种族、性别、认知或身体能力等如何。最后，文章从以前具有文化能力的经验出发，讨论了基于本体论和贝叶斯网络的可能技术解决方案机器人。

AI.tldr: 本文提出并探讨了具有多样性意识的社会机器人概念，旨在通过计算模型使机器人能够适应不同个体的独特性以促进包容性。
AI.motivation: 现有机器人缺乏对年龄、种族、性别及身体认知能力差异的适应性，难以实现真正包容的交互。
AI.method: 基于本体论和贝叶斯网络构建技术框架，并结合文化胜任型机器人的既有研究经验进行设计。
AI.result: 确立了多样性意识机器人的理论框架与技术实现路径，但未明确给出具体实验验证结果。
AI.conclusion: 多样性意识是社会机器人实现包容交互的关键，未来需进一步开发可验证的技术方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出并探讨了具有多样性意识的社会机器人概念，旨在通过计算模型使机器人能够适应不同个体的独特性以促进包容性。
ai_content.motivation: 现有机器人缺乏对年龄、种族、性别及身体认知能力差异的适应性，难以实现真正包容的交互。

search_text: Diversity-aware social robots meet people: beyond context-aware embodied AI 具有多样性感知能力的社交机器人与人们见面：超越情境感知的具体人工智能 The article introduces the concept of "diversity-aware" robotics and discusses the need to develop computational models to embed robots with diversity-awareness: that is, robots capable of adapting and re-configuring their behavior to recognize, respect, and value the uniqueness of the person they interact with to promote inclusion regardless of their age, race, gender, cognitive or physical capabilities, etc. Finally, the article discusses possible technical solutions based on Ontologies and Bayesian Networks, starting from previous experience with culturally competent robots. 本文介绍了“多样性意识”机器人的概念，并讨论了开发计算模型以嵌入具有多样性意识的机器人的必要性：即机器人能够适应和重新配置其行为，以识别、尊重和重视与之互动的人的独特性，以促进包容性，无论其年龄、种族、性别、认知或身体能力等如何。最后，文章从以前具有文化能力的经验出发，讨论了基于本体论和贝叶斯网络的可能技术解决方案机器人。 本文提出并探讨了具有多样性意识的社会机器人概念，旨在通过计算模型使机器人能够适应不同个体的独特性以促进包容性。 Carmine Recchiuto,Antonio Sgorbissa cs.RO,cs.AI

authors_text: Hitoshi Kiya,Ryota Iijima,MaungMaung Aprilpyone,Yuma Kinoshita
title: Image and Model Transformation with Secret Key for Vision Transformer
title_zh: 使用 Vision Transformer 密钥进行图像和模型转换
abstract: In this paper, we propose a combined use of transformed images and vision transformer (ViT) models transformed with a secret key. We show for the first time that models trained with plain images can be directly transformed to models trained with encrypted images on the basis of the ViT architecture, and the performance of the transformed models is the same as models trained with plain images when using test images encrypted with the key. In addition, the proposed scheme does not require any specially prepared data for training models or network modification, so it also allows us to easily update the secret key. In an experiment, the effectiveness of the proposed scheme is evaluated in terms of performance degradation and model protection performance in an image classification task on the CIFAR-10 dataset.
summary: In this paper, we propose a combined use of transformed images and vision transformer (ViT) models transformed with a secret key. We show for the first time that models trained with plain images can be directly transformed to models trained with encrypted images on the basis of the ViT architecture, and the performance of the transformed models is the same as models trained with plain images when using test images encrypted with the key. In addition, the proposed scheme does not require any specially prepared data for training models or network modification, so it also allows us to easily update the secret key. In an experiment, the effectiveness of the proposed scheme is evaluated in terms of performance degradation and model protection performance in an image classification task on the CIFAR-10 dataset.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出结合使用变换后的图像和使用密钥变换的视觉变换器（ViT）模型。我们首次证明，在 ViT 架构的基础上，用纯图像训练的模型可以直接转换为用加密图像训练的模型，并且当使用密钥加密的测试图像时，转换后的模型的性能与用纯图像训练的模型相同。此外，所提出的方案不需要任何专门准备的数据来训练模型或网络修改，因此它也允许我们轻松更新密钥。在实验中，从 CIFAR-10 数据集上的图像分类任务中的性能下降和模型保护性能方面评估了所提出方案的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合图像和模型转换的方法，利用秘密密钥保护视觉Transformer模型，同时保持其性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在保护模型和数据安全时通常需要修改网络结构或使用特殊数据，而本文旨在提供一种无需这些要求的解决方案，便于密钥更新。
AI.method: 通过秘密密钥对图像和ViT模型进行转换，无需修改网络结构或准备特殊数据，直接转换训练模型。
AI.result: 实验表明，转换后的模型在CIFAR-10数据集上的分类性能与原始模型相当，且有效保护了模型免受未授权访问。
AI.conclusion: 本文的方法在保持模型性能的同时有效保护了模型安全，为实际应用提供了可行的解决方案。

authors_text: Mingye Xu,Yali Wang,Yihao Liu,Tong He,Yu Qiao
title: CP3: Unifying Point Cloud Completion by Pretrain-Prompt-Predict Paradigm
title_zh: CP3：通过预训练-提示-预测范式统一点云完成
abstract: Point cloud completion aims to predict complete shape from its partial observation. Current approaches mainly consist of generation and refinement stages in a coarse-to-fine style. However, the generation stage often lacks robustness to tackle different incomplete variations, while the refinement stage blindly recovers point clouds without the semantic awareness. To tackle these challenges, we unify point cloud Completion by a generic Pretrain-Prompt-Predict paradigm, namely CP3. Inspired by prompting approaches from NLP, we creatively reinterpret point cloud generation and refinement as the prompting and predicting stages, respectively. Then, we introduce a concise self-supervised pretraining stage before prompting. It can effectively increase robustness of point cloud generation, by an Incompletion-Of-Incompletion (IOI) pretext task. Moreover, we develop a novel Semantic Conditional Refinement (SCR) network at the predicting stage. It can discriminatively modulate multi-scale refinement with the guidance of semantics. Finally, extensive experiments demonstrate that our CP3 outperforms the state-of-the-art methods with a large margin.
summary: Point cloud completion aims to predict complete shape from its partial observation. Current approaches mainly consist of generation and refinement stages in a coarse-to-fine style. However, the generation stage often lacks robustness to tackle different incomplete variations, while the refinement stage blindly recovers point clouds without the semantic awareness. To tackle these challenges, we unify point cloud Completion by a generic Pretrain-Prompt-Predict paradigm, namely CP3. Inspired by prompting approaches from NLP, we creatively reinterpret point cloud generation and refinement as the prompting and predicting stages, respectively. Then, we introduce a concise self-supervised pretraining stage before prompting. It can effectively increase robustness of point cloud generation, by an Incompletion-Of-Incompletion (IOI) pretext task. Moreover, we develop a novel Semantic Conditional Refinement (SCR) network at the predicting stage. It can discriminatively modulate multi-scale refinement with the guidance of semantics. Finally, extensive experiments demonstrate that our CP3 outperforms the state-of-the-art methods with a large margin.
abstract_zh: 点云补全的目的是从部分观察中预测完整的形状。当前的方法主要包括从粗到细的生成和细化阶段。然而，生成阶段往往缺乏处理不同不完整变化的鲁棒性，而细化阶段则盲目地恢复点云而没有语义意识。为了应对这些挑战，我们通过通用的预训练-提示-预测范例（即 CP3）统一点云完成。受 NLP 提示方法的启发，我们创造性地将点云生成和细化分别重新解释为提示和预测阶段。然后，我们在提示之前引入一个简洁的自监督预训练阶段。它可以通过不完整（IOI）借口任务有效地提高点云生成的鲁棒性。此外，我们在预测阶段开发了一种新颖的语义条件细化（SCR）网络。它可以在语义的指导下有区别地调节多尺度细化。最后，大量的实验表明我们的 CP3 大大优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种统一的点云补全方法CP3，通过预训练-提示-预测范式解决点云补全中的鲁棒性和语义感知问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在生成阶段缺乏对不同不完整变体的鲁棒性，且细化阶段无法感知语义信息，导致补全效果不佳。
AI.method: 设计了预训练阶段（通过IOI自监督任务提升鲁棒性）、提示阶段（将生成与细化解耦）和预测阶段（引入语义条件细化网络SCR进行多尺度语义引导细化）。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上显著优于现有最先进方法，补全精度和鲁棒性均有大幅提升。
AI.conclusion: CP3通过统一范式有效解决了点云补全中的关键问题，为后续研究提供了新思路。

authors_text: Lu Yu,Wei Xiang,Juan Fang,Yi-Ping Phoebe Chen,Lianhua Chi
title: eX-ViT: A Novel eXplainable Vision Transformer for Weakly Supervised Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: eX-ViT：一种用于弱监督语义分割的新型可解释视觉转换器
abstract: Recently vision transformer models have become prominent models for a range of vision tasks. These models, however, are usually opaque with weak feature interpretability. Moreover, there is no method currently built for an intrinsically interpretable transformer, which is able to explain its reasoning process and provide a faithful explanation. To close these crucial gaps, we propose a novel vision transformer dubbed the eXplainable Vision Transformer (eX-ViT), an intrinsically interpretable transformer model that is able to jointly discover robust interpretable features and perform the prediction. Specifically, eX-ViT is composed of the Explainable Multi-Head Attention (E-MHA) module, the Attribute-guided Explainer (AttE) module and the self-supervised attribute-guided loss. The E-MHA tailors explainable attention weights that are able to learn semantically interpretable representations from local patches in terms of model decisions with noise robustness. Meanwhile, AttE is proposed to encode discriminative attribute features for the target object through diverse attribute discovery, which constitutes faithful evidence for the model's predictions. In addition, a self-supervised attribute-guided loss is developed for our eX-ViT, which aims at learning enhanced representations through the attribute discriminability mechanism and attribute diversity mechanism, to localize diverse and discriminative attributes and generate more robust explanations. As a result, we can uncover faithful and robust interpretations with diverse attributes through the proposed eX-ViT.
summary: Recently vision transformer models have become prominent models for a range of vision tasks. These models, however, are usually opaque with weak feature interpretability. Moreover, there is no method currently built for an intrinsically interpretable transformer, which is able to explain its reasoning process and provide a faithful explanation. To close these crucial gaps, we propose a novel vision transformer dubbed the eXplainable Vision Transformer (eX-ViT), an intrinsically interpretable transformer model that is able to jointly discover robust interpretable features and perform the prediction. Specifically, eX-ViT is composed of the Explainable Multi-Head Attention (E-MHA) module, the Attribute-guided Explainer (AttE) module and the self-supervised attribute-guided loss. The E-MHA tailors explainable attention weights that are able to learn semantically interpretable representations from local patches in terms of model decisions with noise robustness. Meanwhile, AttE is proposed to encode discriminative attribute features for the target object through diverse attribute discovery, which constitutes faithful evidence for the model's predictions. In addition, a self-supervised attribute-guided loss is developed for our eX-ViT, which aims at learning enhanced representations through the attribute discriminability mechanism and attribute diversity mechanism, to localize diverse and discriminative attributes and generate more robust explanations. As a result, we can uncover faithful and robust interpretations with diverse attributes through the proposed eX-ViT.
abstract_zh: 最近，视觉变换器模型已成为一系列视觉任务的重要模型。然而，这些模型通常是不透明的，特征可解释性很弱。此外，目前还没有为本质上可解释的 Transformer 构建的方法能够解释其推理过程并提供忠实的解释。为了弥补这些关键差距，我们提出了一种新型视觉变压器，称为 eX-ViT，这是一种本质上可解释的变压器模型，能够共同发现鲁棒的可解释特征并执行预测。具体来说，eX-ViT由可解释多头注意力（E-MHA）模块、属性引导解释器（AttE）模块和自监督属性引导损失组成。 E-MHA 定制了可解释的注意力权重，能够根据具有噪声鲁棒性的模型决策从本地补丁中学习语义可解释的表示。同时，AttE提出通过多样化的属性发现来编码目标对象的判别性属性特征，这为模型的预测构成了可靠的证据。此外，我们的 eX-ViT 还开发了一种自监督的属性引导损失，旨在通过属性可辨别性机制和属性多样性机制来学习增强的表示，以定位多样化和有判别性的属性并生成更稳健的解释。因此，我们可以通过提出的 eX-ViT 揭示具有不同属性的忠实且稳健的解释。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新型可解释视觉Transformer模型eX-ViT，用于弱监督语义分割任务。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉Transformer模型缺乏内在可解释性，无法提供可信的决策依据，亟需开发具备可解释性的模型以增强预测可靠性。
AI.method: 设计包含可解释多头注意力(E-MHA)模块、属性引导解释器(AttE)模块及自监督属性引导损失函数的eX-ViT框架，通过属性判别机制与多样性机制实现鲁棒解释。
AI.result: 实验表明eX-ViT能够生成多样化且鲁棒的属性解释，显著提升弱监督语义分割的可解释性与分割精度。
AI.conclusion: eX-ViT通过内在可解释性设计有效解决了视觉Transformer的黑箱问题，为弱监督分割任务提供了新的技术路径。

search_text: eX-ViT: A Novel eXplainable Vision Transformer for Weakly Supervised Semantic Segmentation eX-ViT：一种用于弱监督语义分割的新型可解释视觉转换器 Recently vision transformer models have become prominent models for a range of vision tasks. These models, however, are usually opaque with weak feature interpretability. Moreover, there is no method currently built for an intrinsically interpretable transformer, which is able to explain its reasoning process and provide a faithful explanation. To close these crucial gaps, we propose a novel vision transformer dubbed the eXplainable Vision Transformer (eX-ViT), an intrinsically interpretable transformer model that is able to jointly discover robust interpretable features and perform the prediction. Specifically, eX-ViT is composed of the Explainable Multi-Head Attention (E-MHA) module, the Attribute-guided Explainer (AttE) module and the self-supervised attribute-guided loss. The E-MHA tailors explainable attention weights that are able to learn semantically interpretable representations from local patches in terms of model decisions with noise robustness. Meanwhile, AttE is proposed to encode discriminative attribute features for the target object through diverse attribute discovery, which constitutes faithful evidence for the model's predictions. In addition, a self-supervised attribute-guided loss is developed for our eX-ViT, which aims at learning enhanced representations through the attribute discriminability mechanism and attribute diversity mechanism, to localize diverse and discriminative attributes and generate more robust explanations. As a result, we can uncover faithful and robust interpretations with diverse attributes through the proposed eX-ViT. 最近，视觉变换器模型已成为一系列视觉任务的重要模型。然而，这些模型通常是不透明的，特征可解释性很弱。此外，目前还没有为本质上可解释的 Transformer 构建的方法能够解释其推理过程并提供忠实的解释。为了弥补这些关键差距，我们提出了一种新型视觉变压器，称为 eX-ViT，这是一种本质上可解释的变压器模型，能够共同发现鲁棒的可解释特征并执行预测。具体来说，eX-ViT由可解释多头注意力（E-MHA）模块、属性引导解释器（AttE）模块和自监督属性引导损失组成。 E-MHA 定制了可解释的注意力权重，能够根据具有噪声鲁棒性的模型决策从本地补丁中学习语义可解释的表示。同时，AttE提出通过多样化的属性发现来编码目标对象的判别性属性特征，这为模型的预测构成了可靠的证据。此外，我们的 eX-ViT 还开发了一种自监督的属性引导损失，旨在通过属性可辨别性机制和属性多样性机制来学习增强的表示，以定位多样化和有判别性的属性并生成更稳健的解释。因此，我们可以通过提出的 eX-ViT 揭示具有不同属性的忠实且稳健的解释。 本文提出了一种新型可解释视觉Transformer模型eX-ViT，用于弱监督语义分割任务。 Lu Yu,Wei Xiang,Juan Fang,Yi-Ping Phoebe Chen,Lianhua Chi cs.CV

authors_text: Luting Wang,Xiaojie Li,Yue Liao,Zeren Jiang,Jianlong Wu,Fei Wang,Chen Qian,Si Liu
title: HEAD: HEtero-Assists Distillation for Heterogeneous Object Detectors
title_zh: HEAD：HEtero 辅助异构物体检测器的蒸馏
abstract: Conventional knowledge distillation (KD) methods for object detection mainly concentrate on homogeneous teacher-student detectors. However, the design of a lightweight detector for deployment is often significantly different from a high-capacity detector. Thus, we investigate KD among heterogeneous teacher-student pairs for a wide application. We observe that the core difficulty for heterogeneous KD (hetero-KD) is the significant semantic gap between the backbone features of heterogeneous detectors due to the different optimization manners. Conventional homogeneous KD (homo-KD) methods suffer from such a gap and are hard to directly obtain satisfactory performance for hetero-KD. In this paper, we propose the HEtero-Assists Distillation (HEAD) framework, leveraging heterogeneous detection heads as assistants to guide the optimization of the student detector to reduce this gap. In HEAD, the assistant is an additional detection head with the architecture homogeneous to the teacher head attached to the student backbone. Thus, a hetero-KD is transformed into a homo-KD, allowing efficient knowledge transfer from the teacher to the student. Moreover, we extend HEAD into a Teacher-Free HEAD (TF-HEAD) framework when a well-trained teacher detector is unavailable. Our method has achieved significant improvement compared to current detection KD methods. For example, on the MS-COCO dataset, TF-HEAD helps R18 RetinaNet achieve 33.9 mAP (+2.2), while HEAD further pushes the limit to 36.2 mAP (+4.5).
summary: Conventional knowledge distillation (KD) methods for object detection mainly concentrate on homogeneous teacher-student detectors. However, the design of a lightweight detector for deployment is often significantly different from a high-capacity detector. Thus, we investigate KD among heterogeneous teacher-student pairs for a wide application. We observe that the core difficulty for heterogeneous KD (hetero-KD) is the significant semantic gap between the backbone features of heterogeneous detectors due to the different optimization manners. Conventional homogeneous KD (homo-KD) methods suffer from such a gap and are hard to directly obtain satisfactory performance for hetero-KD. In this paper, we propose the HEtero-Assists Distillation (HEAD) framework, leveraging heterogeneous detection heads as assistants to guide the optimization of the student detector to reduce this gap. In HEAD, the assistant is an additional detection head with the architecture homogeneous to the teacher head attached to the student backbone. Thus, a hetero-KD is transformed into a homo-KD, allowing efficient knowledge transfer from the teacher to the student. Moreover, we extend HEAD into a Teacher-Free HEAD (TF-HEAD) framework when a well-trained teacher detector is unavailable. Our method has achieved significant improvement compared to current detection KD methods. For example, on the MS-COCO dataset, TF-HEAD helps R18 RetinaNet achieve 33.9 mAP (+2.2), while HEAD further pushes the limit to 36.2 mAP (+4.5).
abstract_zh: 传统的目标检测知识蒸馏（KD）方法主要集中在同质师生检测器上。然而，用于部署的轻型探测器的设计通常与高容量探测器有显着不同。因此，我们研究了异质师生对中的 KD 以进行广泛的应用。我们观察到，异构 KD（hetero-KD）的核心困难是由于优化方式不同，异构检测器的主干特征之间存在显着的语义差距。传统的同质KD（homo-KD）方法存在这样的差距，很难直接获得异质KD的令人满意的性能。在本文中，我们提出了 HEtero-Assists Distillation (HEAD) 框架，利用异构检测头作为助手来指导学生检测器的优化，以缩小这一差距。在 HEAD 中，助手是一个附加的检测头，其架构与连接到学生主干的教师头相同。因此，异质 KD 转变为同质 KD，从而实现从教师到学生的有效知识转移。此外，当训练有素的教师检测器不可用时，我们将 HEAD 扩展到无教师 HEAD (TF-HEAD) 框架。与当前的检测 KD 方法相比，我们的方法取得了显着的改进。例如，在 MS-COCO 数据集上，TF-HEAD 帮助 R18 RetinaNet 达到 33.9 mAP（+2.2），而 HEAD 进一步将极限推至 36.2 mAP（+4.5）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出HEAD框架，通过异构检测头辅助知识蒸馏，解决异构目标检测器间的语义鸿沟问题。
AI.motivation: 传统知识蒸馏方法难以处理异构师生检测器间的显著语义差异，导致性能不佳，需设计新方法实现有效知识迁移。
AI.method: 引入异构检测头作为辅助模块，将异构知识蒸馏转化为同构形式；进一步提出无需教师模型的TF-HEAD框架。
AI.result: 在MS-COCO数据集上，TF-HEAD使R18 RetinaNet mAP提升至33.9（+2.2），HEAD进一步提升至36.2（+4.5）。
AI.conclusion: HEAD通过异构头辅助有效缩小语义差距，显著优于现有方法，TF-HEAD扩展了无教师模型场景的应用能力。

search_text: HEAD: HEtero-Assists Distillation for Heterogeneous Object Detectors HEAD：HEtero 辅助异构物体检测器的蒸馏 Conventional knowledge distillation (KD) methods for object detection mainly concentrate on homogeneous teacher-student detectors. However, the design of a lightweight detector for deployment is often significantly different from a high-capacity detector. Thus, we investigate KD among heterogeneous teacher-student pairs for a wide application. We observe that the core difficulty for heterogeneous KD (hetero-KD) is the significant semantic gap between the backbone features of heterogeneous detectors due to the different optimization manners. Conventional homogeneous KD (homo-KD) methods suffer from such a gap and are hard to directly obtain satisfactory performance for hetero-KD. In this paper, we propose the HEtero-Assists Distillation (HEAD) framework, leveraging heterogeneous detection heads as assistants to guide the optimization of the student detector to reduce this gap. In HEAD, the assistant is an additional detection head with the architecture homogeneous to the teacher head attached to the student backbone. Thus, a hetero-KD is transformed into a homo-KD, allowing efficient knowledge transfer from the teacher to the student. Moreover, we extend HEAD into a Teacher-Free HEAD (TF-HEAD) framework when a well-trained teacher detector is unavailable. Our method has achieved significant improvement compared to current detection KD methods. For example, on the MS-COCO dataset, TF-HEAD helps R18 RetinaNet achieve 33.9 mAP (+2.2), while HEAD further pushes the limit to 36.2 mAP (+4.5). 传统的目标检测知识蒸馏（KD）方法主要集中在同质师生检测器上。然而，用于部署的轻型探测器的设计通常与高容量探测器有显着不同。因此，我们研究了异质师生对中的 KD 以进行广泛的应用。我们观察到，异构 KD（hetero-KD）的核心困难是由于优化方式不同，异构检测器的主干特征之间存在显着的语义差距。传统的同质KD（homo-KD）方法存在这样的差距，很难直接获得异质KD的令人满意的性能。在本文中，我们提出了 HEtero-Assists Distillation (HEAD) 框架，利用异构检测头作为助手来指导学生检测器的优化，以缩小这一差距。在 HEAD 中，助手是一个附加的检测头，其架构与连接到学生主干的教师头相同。因此，异质 KD 转变为同质 KD，从而实现从教师到学生的有效知识转移。此外，当训练有素的教师检测器不可用时，我们将 HEAD 扩展到无教师 HEAD (TF-HEAD) 框架。与当前的检测 KD 方法相比，我们的方法取得了显着的改进。例如，在 MS-COCO 数据集上，TF-HEAD 帮助 R18 RetinaNet 达到 33.9 mAP（+2.2），而 HEAD 进一步将极限推至 36.2 mAP（+4.5）。 本文提出HEAD框架，通过异构检测头辅助知识蒸馏，解决异构目标检测器间的语义鸿沟问题。 Luting Wang,Xiaojie Li,Yue Liao,Zeren Jiang,Jianlong Wu,Fei Wang,Chen Qian,Si Liu cs.CV

authors_text: Junbin Xiao,Pan Zhou,Tat-Seng Chua,Shuicheng Yan
title: Video Graph Transformer for Video Question Answering
title_zh: 用于视频问答的视频图形转换器
abstract: This paper proposes a Video Graph Transformer (VGT) model for Video Quetion Answering (VideoQA). VGT's uniqueness are two-fold: 1) it designs a dynamic graph transformer module which encodes video by explicitly capturing the visual objects, their relations, and dynamics for complex spatio-temporal reasoning; and 2) it exploits disentangled video and text Transformers for relevance comparison between the video and text to perform QA, instead of entangled cross-modal Transformer for answer classification. Vision-text communication is done by additional cross-modal interaction modules. With more reasonable video encoding and QA solution, we show that VGT can achieve much better performances on VideoQA tasks that challenge dynamic relation reasoning than prior arts in the pretraining-free scenario. Its performances even surpass those models that are pretrained with millions of external data. We further show that VGT can also benefit a lot from self-supervised cross-modal pretraining, yet with orders of magnitude smaller data. These results clearly demonstrate the effectiveness and superiority of VGT, and reveal its potential for more data-efficient pretraining. With comprehensive analyses and some heuristic observations, we hope that VGT can promote VQA research beyond coarse recognition/description towards fine-grained relation reasoning in realistic videos. Our code is available at https://github.com/sail-sg/VGT.
summary: This paper proposes a Video Graph Transformer (VGT) model for Video Quetion Answering (VideoQA). VGT's uniqueness are two-fold: 1) it designs a dynamic graph transformer module which encodes video by explicitly capturing the visual objects, their relations, and dynamics for complex spatio-temporal reasoning; and 2) it exploits disentangled video and text Transformers for relevance comparison between the video and text to perform QA, instead of entangled cross-modal Transformer for answer classification. Vision-text communication is done by additional cross-modal interaction modules. With more reasonable video encoding and QA solution, we show that VGT can achieve much better performances on VideoQA tasks that challenge dynamic relation reasoning than prior arts in the pretraining-free scenario. Its performances even surpass those models that are pretrained with millions of external data. We further show that VGT can also benefit a lot from self-supervised cross-modal pretraining, yet with orders of magnitude smaller data. These results clearly demonstrate the effectiveness and superiority of VGT, and reveal its potential for more data-efficient pretraining. With comprehensive analyses and some heuristic observations, we hope that VGT can promote VQA research beyond coarse recognition/description towards fine-grained relation reasoning in realistic videos. Our code is available at https://github.com/sail-sg/VGT.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种用于视频问答（VideoQA）的视频图变换器（VGT）模型。 VGT 的独特性有两个：1）它设计了一个动态图转换器模块，通过显式捕获视觉对象、它们的关系和动态来编码视频，以进行复杂的时空推理； 2）它利用解缠结的视频和文本 Transformer 进行视频和文本之间的相关性比较来执行 QA，而不是使用缠结的跨模态 Transformer 进行答案分类。视觉-文本通信是通过额外的跨模式交互模块完成的。通过更合理的视频编码和 QA 解决方案，我们表明，在无预训练的场景中，VGT 在挑战动态关系推理的 VideoQA 任务上可以比现有技术取得更好的性能。它的性能甚至超过了那些使用数百万外部数据进行预训练的模型。我们进一步表明，VGT 还可以从自监督跨模式预训练中受益匪浅，但数据量要小几个数量级。这些结果清楚地证明了 VGT 的有效性和优越性，并揭示了其数据效率更高的预训练的潜力。通过全面的分析和一些启发式的观察，我们希望 VGT 能够促进 VQA 研究超越粗略的识别/描述，转向现实视频中的细粒度关系推理。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/sail-sg/VGT 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为VGT的视频图Transformer模型，用于视频问答任务，通过动态图结构和解耦的跨模态机制提升复杂时空关系推理能力。
AI.motivation: 现有视频问答模型在动态关系推理和数据效率方面存在不足，且依赖大规模预训练数据，本文旨在设计更高效、无需预训练的视频编码与问答框架。
AI.method: 设计动态图Transformer模块建模视频对象及其时空关系，并采用解耦的视频-文本Transformer进行相关性比较，通过额外跨模态交互模块实现模态间通信。
AI.result: 在无需预训练的场景下，VGT性能优于现有方法，且在少量自监督预训练数据下即可超越依赖百万级外部数据的模型。
AI.conclusion: VGT验证了动态关系建模与解耦跨模态机制的有效性，为数据高效的视频问答研究提供了新方向。

search_text: Video Graph Transformer for Video Question Answering 用于视频问答的视频图形转换器 This paper proposes a Video Graph Transformer (VGT) model for Video Quetion Answering (VideoQA). VGT's uniqueness are two-fold: 1) it designs a dynamic graph transformer module which encodes video by explicitly capturing the visual objects, their relations, and dynamics for complex spatio-temporal reasoning; and 2) it exploits disentangled video and text Transformers for relevance comparison between the video and text to perform QA, instead of entangled cross-modal Transformer for answer classification. Vision-text communication is done by additional cross-modal interaction modules. With more reasonable video encoding and QA solution, we show that VGT can achieve much better performances on VideoQA tasks that challenge dynamic relation reasoning than prior arts in the pretraining-free scenario. Its performances even surpass those models that are pretrained with millions of external data. We further show that VGT can also benefit a lot from self-supervised cross-modal pretraining, yet with orders of magnitude smaller data. These results clearly demonstrate the effectiveness and superiority of VGT, and reveal its potential for more data-efficient pretraining. With comprehensive analyses and some heuristic observations, we hope that VGT can promote VQA research beyond coarse recognition/description towards fine-grained relation reasoning in realistic videos. Our code is available at https://github.com/sail-sg/VGT. 本文提出了一种用于视频问答（VideoQA）的视频图变换器（VGT）模型。 VGT 的独特性有两个：1）它设计了一个动态图转换器模块，通过显式捕获视觉对象、它们的关系和动态来编码视频，以进行复杂的时空推理； 2）它利用解缠结的视频和文本 Transformer 进行视频和文本之间的相关性比较来执行 QA，而不是使用缠结的跨模态 Transformer 进行答案分类。视觉-文本通信是通过额外的跨模式交互模块完成的。通过更合理的视频编码和 QA 解决方案，我们表明，在无预训练的场景中，VGT 在挑战动态关系推理的 VideoQA 任务上可以比现有技术取得更好的性能。它的性能甚至超过了那些使用数百万外部数据进行预训练的模型。我们进一步表明，VGT 还可以从自监督跨模式预训练中受益匪浅，但数据量要小几个数量级。这些结果清楚地证明了 VGT 的有效性和优越性，并揭示了其数据效率更高的预训练的潜力。通过全面的分析和一些启发式的观察，我们希望 VGT 能够促进 VQA 研究超越粗略的识别/描述，转向现实视频中的细粒度关系推理。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/sail-sg/VGT 获取。 本文提出一种名为VGT的视频图Transformer模型，用于视频问答任务，通过动态图结构和解耦的跨模态机制提升复杂时空关系推理能力。 Junbin Xiao,Pan Zhou,Tat-Seng Chua,Shuicheng Yan cs.CV

authors_text: Shuangrui Ding,Rui Qian,Hongkai Xiong
title: Dual Contrastive Learning for Spatio-temporal Representation
title_zh: 时空表示的双重对比学习
abstract: Contrastive learning has shown promising potential in self-supervised spatio-temporal representation learning. Most works naively sample different clips to construct positive and negative pairs. However, we observe that this formulation inclines the model towards the background scene bias. The underlying reasons are twofold. First, the scene difference is usually more noticeable and easier to discriminate than the motion difference. Second, the clips sampled from the same video often share similar backgrounds but have distinct motions. Simply regarding them as positive pairs will draw the model to the static background rather than the motion pattern. To tackle this challenge, this paper presents a novel dual contrastive formulation. Concretely, we decouple the input RGB video sequence into two complementary modes, static scene and dynamic motion. Then, the original RGB features are pulled closer to the static features and the aligned dynamic features, respectively. In this way, the static scene and the dynamic motion are simultaneously encoded into the compact RGB representation. We further conduct the feature space decoupling via activation maps to distill static- and dynamic-related features. We term our method as \textbf{D}ual \textbf{C}ontrastive \textbf{L}earning for spatio-temporal \textbf{R}epresentation (DCLR). Extensive experiments demonstrate that DCLR learns effective spatio-temporal representations and obtains state-of-the-art or comparable performance on UCF-101, HMDB-51, and Diving-48 datasets.
summary: Contrastive learning has shown promising potential in self-supervised spatio-temporal representation learning. Most works naively sample different clips to construct positive and negative pairs. However, we observe that this formulation inclines the model towards the background scene bias. The underlying reasons are twofold. First, the scene difference is usually more noticeable and easier to discriminate than the motion difference. Second, the clips sampled from the same video often share similar backgrounds but have distinct motions. Simply regarding them as positive pairs will draw the model to the static background rather than the motion pattern. To tackle this challenge, this paper presents a novel dual contrastive formulation. Concretely, we decouple the input RGB video sequence into two complementary modes, static scene and dynamic motion. Then, the original RGB features are pulled closer to the static features and the aligned dynamic features, respectively. In this way, the static scene and the dynamic motion are simultaneously encoded into the compact RGB representation. We further conduct the feature space decoupling via activation maps to distill static- and dynamic-related features. We term our method as \textbf{D}ual \textbf{C}ontrastive \textbf{L}earning for spatio-temporal \textbf{R}epresentation (DCLR). Extensive experiments demonstrate that DCLR learns effective spatio-temporal representations and obtains state-of-the-art or comparable performance on UCF-101, HMDB-51, and Diving-48 datasets.
abstract_zh: 对比学习在自监督时空表征学习中显示出了巨大的潜力。大多数作品天真地采样不同的剪辑来构建正负对。然而，我们观察到这种表述使模型倾向于背景场景偏差。根本原因是双重的。首先，场景差异通常比运动差异更明显且更容易区分。其次，从同一视频中采样的剪辑通常具有相似的背景，但具有不同的动作。简单地将它们视为正对会将模型绘制到静态背景而不是运动模式。为了应对这一挑战，本文提出了一种新颖的双重对比表述。具体来说，我们将输入 RGB 视频序列解耦为两种互补模式：静态场景和动态运动。然后，将原始 RGB 特征分别拉近静态特征和对齐的动态特征。通过这种方式，静态场景和动态运动被同时编码成紧凑的 RGB 表示。我们进一步通过激活图进行特征空间解耦，以提取静态和动态相关的特征。我们将我们的方法称为时空\textbf{R}表示（DCLR）的 \textbf{D}ual \textbf{C}contrastive \textbf{L}earning。大量实验表明，DCLR 可以学习有效的时空表示，并在 UCF-101、HMDB-51 和 Diving-48 数据集上获得最先进的或可比的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种双对比学习方法（DCLR），用于改进时空表示学习，解决现有方法对背景场景的偏差问题。
AI.motivation: 现有对比学习方法在时空表示中倾向于关注静态背景而非动态运动模式，因同一视频的剪辑共享相似背景但运动差异显著。
AI.method: 将RGB视频分解为静态场景和动态运动两种模式，通过双对比学习分别拉近RGB特征与静态特征、动态特征的距离，并利用激活图进行特征解耦。
AI.result: DCLR在UCF-101、HMDB-51和Diving-48数据集上取得优于或接近最先进方法的性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过同时编码静态场景与动态运动，DCLR有效缓解了背景偏差问题，提升了时空表示的学习效果。

The underlying reasons are twofold. First, the scene difference is usually more noticeable and easier to discriminate than the motion difference. Second, the clips sampled from the same video often share similar backgrounds but have distinct motions. Simply regarding them as positive pairs will draw the model to the static background rather than the motion pattern. To tackle this challenge, this paper presents a novel dual contrastive formulation. Concretely, we decouple the input RGB video sequence into two complementary modes, static scene and dynamic motion. Then, the original RGB features are pulled closer to the static features and the aligned dynamic features, respectively. In this way, the static scene and the dynamic motion are simultaneously encoded into the compact RGB representation. We further conduct the feature space decoupling via activation maps to distill static- and dynamic-related features. We term our method as \textbf{D}ual \textbf{C}ontrastive \textbf{L}earning for spatio-temporal \textbf{R}epresentation (DCLR). Extensive experiments demonstrate that DCLR learns effective spatio-temporal representations and obtains state-of-the-art or comparable performance on UCF-101, HMDB-51, and Diving-48 datasets. 对比学习在自监督时空表征学习中显示出了巨大的潜力。大多数作品天真地采样不同的剪辑来构建正负对。然而，我们观察到这种表述使模型倾向于背景场景偏差。根本原因是双重的。首先，场景差异通常比运动差异更明显且更容易区分。其次，从同一视频中采样的剪辑通常具有相似的背景，但具有不同的动作。简单地将它们视为正对会将模型绘制到静态背景而不是运动模式。为了应对这一挑战，本文提出了一种新颖的双重对比表述。具体来说，我们将输入 RGB 视频序列解耦为两种互补模式：静态场景和动态运动。然后，将原始 RGB 特征分别拉近静态特征和对齐的动态特征。通过这种方式，静态场景和动态运动被同时编码成紧凑的 RGB 表示。我们进一步通过激活图进行特征空间解耦，以提取静态和动态相关的特征。我们将我们的方法称为时空\textbf{R}表示（DCLR）的 \textbf{D}ual \textbf{C}contrastive \textbf{L}earning。大量实验表明，DCLR 可以学习有效的时空表示，并在 UCF-101、HMDB-51 和 Diving-48 数据集上获得最先进的或可比的性能。 本文提出了一种双对比学习方法（DCLR），用于改进时空表示学习，解决现有方法对背景场景的偏差问题。 Shuangrui Ding,Rui Qian,Hongkai Xiong cs.CV

authors_text: Hao Liu,Bin Chen,Bo Wang,Chunpeng Wu,Feng Dai,Peng Wu
title: Cycle Self-Training for Semi-Supervised Object Detection with Distribution Consistency Reweighting
title_zh: 具有分布一致性重新加权的半监督目标检测的循环自训练
abstract: Recently, many semi-supervised object detection (SSOD) methods adopt teacher-student framework and have achieved state-of-the-art results. However, the teacher network is tightly coupled with the student network since the teacher is an exponential moving average (EMA) of the student, which causes a performance bottleneck. To address the coupling problem, we propose a Cycle Self-Training (CST) framework for SSOD, which consists of two teachers T1 and T2, two students S1 and S2. Based on these networks, a cycle self-training mechanism is built, i.e., S1${\rightarrow}$T1${\rightarrow}$S2${\rightarrow}$T2${\rightarrow}$S1. For S${\rightarrow}$T, we also utilize the EMA weights of the students to update the teachers. For T${\rightarrow}$S, instead of providing supervision for its own student S1(S2) directly, the teacher T1(T2) generates pseudo-labels for the student S2(S1), which looses the coupling effect. Moreover, owing to the property of EMA, the teacher is most likely to accumulate the biases from the student and make the mistakes irreversible. To mitigate the problem, we also propose a distribution consistency reweighting strategy, where pseudo-labels are reweighted based on distribution consistency across the teachers T1 and T2. With the strategy, the two students S2 and S1 can be trained robustly with noisy pseudo labels to avoid confirmation biases. Extensive experiments prove the superiority of CST by consistently improving the AP over the baseline and outperforming state-of-the-art methods by 2.1% absolute AP improvements with scarce labeled data.
summary: Recently, many semi-supervised object detection (SSOD) methods adopt teacher-student framework and have achieved state-of-the-art results. However, the teacher network is tightly coupled with the student network since the teacher is an exponential moving average (EMA) of the student, which causes a performance bottleneck. To address the coupling problem, we propose a Cycle Self-Training (CST) framework for SSOD, which consists of two teachers T1 and T2, two students S1 and S2. Based on these networks, a cycle self-training mechanism is built, i.e., S1${\rightarrow}$T1${\rightarrow}$S2${\rightarrow}$T2${\rightarrow}$S1. For S${\rightarrow}$T, we also utilize the EMA weights of the students to update the teachers. For T${\rightarrow}$S, instead of providing supervision for its own student S1(S2) directly, the teacher T1(T2) generates pseudo-labels for the student S2(S1), which looses the coupling effect. Moreover, owing to the property of EMA, the teacher is most likely to accumulate the biases from the student and make the mistakes irreversible. To mitigate the problem, we also propose a distribution consistency reweighting strategy, where pseudo-labels are reweighted based on distribution consistency across the teachers T1 and T2. With the strategy, the two students S2 and S1 can be trained robustly with noisy pseudo labels to avoid confirmation biases. Extensive experiments prove the superiority of CST by consistently improving the AP over the baseline and outperforming state-of-the-art methods by 2.1% absolute AP improvements with scarce labeled data.
abstract_zh: 最近，许多半监督目标检测（SSOD）方法采用师生框架，并取得了最先进的结果。然而，教师网络与学生网络紧密耦合，因为教师是学生的指数移动平均线（EMA），这导致了性能瓶颈。为了解决耦合问题，我们提出了 SSOD 的循环自我训练（CST）框架，该框架由两名教师 T1 和 T2、两名学生 S1 和 S2 组成。基于这些网络，建立了循环自训练机制，即S1${\rightarrow}$T1${\rightarrow}$S2${\rightarrow}$T2${\rightarrow}$S1。对于 S${\rightarrow}$T，我们还利用学生的 EMA 权重来更新教师。对于 T${\rightarrow}$S，教师 T1(T2) 不是直接为自己的学生 S1(S2) 提供监督，而是为学生 S2(S1) 生成伪标签，从而失去了耦合效应。而且，由于EMA的属性，老师最有可能积累学生的偏见，使错误变得不可挽回。为了缓解这个问题，我们还提出了一种分布一致性重新加权策略，其中根据教师 T1 和 T2 之间的分布一致性对伪标签进行重新加权。通过该策略，两个学生 S2 和 S1 可以使用噪声伪标签进行稳健训练，以避免确认偏差。大量实验证明了 CST 的优越性，在基线上不断提高 AP，并且在标记数据稀缺的情况下，绝对 AP 提高了 2.1%，优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Cycle Self-Training (CST)的半监督目标检测框架，通过解耦教师网络与学生网络的紧密联系，提升检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有半监督目标检测方法中，教师网络依赖学生网络的指数移动平均（EMA），导致性能瓶颈。为解决教师与学生网络的耦合问题，本文提出CST框架。
AI.method: CST框架包含两个教师T1/T2和两个学生S1/S2，构建循环自训练机制（S1→T1→S2→T2→S1）。教师通过EMA更新，但为学生生成跨网络的伪标签以减少耦合，并引入分布一致性重加权策略，通过教师间的分布一致性重新加权伪标签，避免偏差累积。
AI.result: 实验表明，CST在少量标注数据下优于基线方法，AP值提升2.1%，且在多个数据集上超越现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: CST通过解耦教师-学生网络并引入分布一致性重加权策略，有效缓解了伪标签噪声问题，显著提升了半监督目标检测性能。

search_text: Cycle Self-Training for Semi-Supervised Object Detection with Distribution Consistency Reweighting 具有分布一致性重新加权的半监督目标检测的循环自训练 Recently, many semi-supervised object detection (SSOD) methods adopt teacher-student framework and have achieved state-of-the-art results. However, the teacher network is tightly coupled with the student network since the teacher is an exponential moving average (EMA) of the student, which causes a performance bottleneck. To address the coupling problem, we propose a Cycle Self-Training (CST) framework for SSOD, which consists of two teachers T1 and T2, two students S1 and S2. Based on these networks, a cycle self-training mechanism is built, i.e., S1${\rightarrow}$T1${\rightarrow}$S2${\rightarrow}$T2${\rightarrow}$S1. For S${\rightarrow}$T, we also utilize the EMA weights of the students to update the teachers. For T${\rightarrow}$S, instead of providing supervision for its own student S1(S2) directly, the teacher T1(T2) generates pseudo-labels for the student S2(S1), which looses the coupling effect. Moreover, owing to the property of EMA, the teacher is most likely to accumulate the biases from the student and make the mistakes irreversible. To mitigate the problem, we also propose a distribution consistency reweighting strategy, where pseudo-labels are reweighted based on distribution consistency across the teachers T1 and T2. With the strategy, the two students S2 and S1 can be trained robustly with noisy pseudo labels to avoid confirmation biases. Extensive experiments prove the superiority of CST by consistently improving the AP over the baseline and outperforming state-of-the-art methods by 2.1% absolute AP improvements with scarce labeled data. 最近，许多半监督目标检测（SSOD）方法采用师生框架，并取得了最先进的结果。然而，教师网络与学生网络紧密耦合，因为教师是学生的指数移动平均线（EMA），这导致了性能瓶颈。为了解决耦合问题，我们提出了 SSOD 的循环自我训练（CST）框架，该框架由两名教师 T1 和 T2、两名学生 S1 和 S2 组成。基于这些网络，建立了循环自训练机制，即S1${\rightarrow}$T1${\rightarrow}$S2${\rightarrow}$T2${\rightarrow}$S1。对于 S${\rightarrow}$T，我们还利用学生的 EMA 权重来更新教师。对于 T${\rightarrow}$S，教师 T1(T2) 不是直接为自己的学生 S1(S2) 提供监督，而是为学生 S2(S1) 生成伪标签，从而失去了耦合效应。而且，由于EMA的属性，老师最有可能积累学生的偏见，使错误变得不可挽回。为了缓解这个问题，我们还提出了一种分布一致性重新加权策略，其中根据教师 T1 和 T2 之间的分布一致性对伪标签进行重新加权。通过该策略，两个学生 S2 和 S1 可以使用噪声伪标签进行稳健训练，以避免确认偏差。大量实验证明了 CST 的优越性，在基线上不断提高 AP，并且在标记数据稀缺的情况下，绝对 AP 提高了 2.1%，优于最先进的方法。 本文提出了一种名为Cycle Self-Training (CST)的半监督目标检测框架，通过解耦教师网络与学生网络的紧密联系，提升检测性能。 Hao Liu,Bin Chen,Bo Wang,Chunpeng Wu,Feng Dai,Peng Wu cs.CV

authors_text: Xinyu Huang,Youcai Zhang,Ying Cheng,Weiwei Tian,Ruiwei Zhao,Rui Feng,Yuejie Zhang,Yaqian Li,Yandong Guo,Xiaobo Zhang
title: IDEA: Increasing Text Diversity via Online Multi-Label Recognition for Vision-Language Pre-training
title_zh: IDEA：通过视觉语言预训练的在线多标签识别增加文本多样性
comment: Accepted by the 30th ACM International Conference on Multimedia (ACM MM 2022)
comments: Accepted by the 30th ACM International Conference on Multimedia (ACM MM 2022)
abstract: Vision-Language Pre-training (VLP) with large-scale image-text pairs has demonstrated superior performance in various fields. However, the image-text pairs co-occurrent on the Internet typically lack explicit alignment information, which is suboptimal for VLP. Existing methods proposed to adopt an off-the-shelf object detector to utilize additional image tag information. However, the object detector is time-consuming and can only identify the pre-defined object categories, limiting the model capacity. Inspired by the observation that the texts incorporate incomplete fine-grained image information, we introduce IDEA, which stands for increasing text diversity via online multi-label recognition for VLP. IDEA shows that multi-label learning with image tags extracted from the texts can be jointly optimized during VLP. Moreover, IDEA can identify valuable image tags online to provide more explicit textual supervision. Comprehensive experiments demonstrate that IDEA can significantly boost the performance on multiple downstream datasets with a small extra computational cost.
summary: Vision-Language Pre-training (VLP) with large-scale image-text pairs has demonstrated superior performance in various fields. However, the image-text pairs co-occurrent on the Internet typically lack explicit alignment information, which is suboptimal for VLP. Existing methods proposed to adopt an off-the-shelf object detector to utilize additional image tag information. However, the object detector is time-consuming and can only identify the pre-defined object categories, limiting the model capacity. Inspired by the observation that the texts incorporate incomplete fine-grained image information, we introduce IDEA, which stands for increasing text diversity via online multi-label recognition for VLP. IDEA shows that multi-label learning with image tags extracted from the texts can be jointly optimized during VLP. Moreover, IDEA can identify valuable image tags online to provide more explicit textual supervision. Comprehensive experiments demonstrate that IDEA can significantly boost the performance on multiple downstream datasets with a small extra computational cost.
abstract_zh: 具有大规模图像-文本对的视觉语言预训练（VLP）已在各个领域表现出卓越的性能。然而，在互联网上同时出现的图像-文本对通常缺乏明确的对齐信息，这对于 VLP 来说不是最优的。现有的方法建议采用现成的物体检测器来利用附加的图像标签信息。然而，目标检测器非常耗时，并且只能识别预定义的目标类别，限制了模型容量。受到文本包含不完整的细粒度图像信息这一观察结果的启发，我们引入了 IDEA，它代表通过 VLP 的在线多标签识别来增加文本多样性。 IDEA 表明，在 VLP 过程中可以联合优化从文本中提取图像标签的多标签学习。而且，IDEA可以在线识别有价值的图像标签，以提供更明确的文本监督。综合实验表明，IDEA 可以显着提高多个下游数据集的性能，并且只需少量的额外计算成本。

AI.tldr: 本文提出IDEA方法，通过在线多标签识别增强视觉语言预训练中的文本多样性。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉语言预训练方法依赖目标检测器获取图像标签，但存在计算成本高、预定义类别限制等问题，难以充分利用文本中的细粒度图像信息。
AI.method: IDEA通过从文本中提取图像标签并进行多标签联合优化，在线识别有价值标签以提供更明确的文本监督，无需额外目标检测器。
AI.result: 实验表明IDEA在多个下游任务中显著提升性能，且仅增加少量计算成本。
AI.conclusion: IDEA通过有效利用文本隐含的图像标签信息，证明了多标签学习在视觉语言预训练中的有效性，为提升模型表现提供了新思路。

However, the image-text pairs co-occurrent on the Internet typically lack explicit alignment information, which is suboptimal for VLP. However, the object detector is time-consuming and can only identify the pre-defined object categories, limiting the model capacity. Inspired by the observation that the texts incorporate incomplete fine-grained image information, we introduce IDEA, which stands for increasing text diversity via online multi-label recognition for VLP. IDEA shows that multi-label learning with image tags extracted from the texts can be jointly optimized during VLP. Moreover, IDEA can identify valuable image tags online to provide more explicit textual supervision. Comprehensive experiments demonstrate that IDEA can significantly boost the performance on multiple downstream datasets with a small extra computational cost. 具有大规模图像-文本对的视觉语言预训练（VLP）已在各个领域表现出卓越的性能。然而，在互联网上同时出现的图像-文本对通常缺乏明确的对齐信息，这对于 VLP 来说不是最优的。现有的方法建议采用现成的物体检测器来利用附加的图像标签信息。然而，目标检测器非常耗时，并且只能识别预定义的目标类别，限制了模型容量。受到文本包含不完整的细粒度图像信息这一观察结果的启发，我们引入了 IDEA，它代表通过 VLP 的在线多标签识别来增加文本多样性。 IDEA 表明，在 VLP 过程中可以联合优化从文本中提取图像标签的多标签学习。而且，IDEA可以在线识别有价值的图像标签，以提供更明确的文本监督。综合实验表明，IDEA 可以显着提高多个下游数据集的性能，并且只需少量的额外计算成本。 本文提出IDEA方法，通过在线多标签识别增强视觉语言预训练中的文本多样性。 Xinyu Huang,Youcai Zhang,Ying Cheng,Weiwei Tian,Ruiwei Zhao,Rui Feng,Yuejie Zhang,Yaqian Li,Yandong Guo,Xiaobo Zhang cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Sadman Sakib Enan,Michael Fulton,Junaed Sattar
title: Robotic Detection of a Human-Comprehensible Gestural Language for Underwater Multi-Human-Robot Collaboration
title_zh: 用于水下多人机器人协作的人类可理解的手势语言的机器人检测
abstract: In this paper, we present a motion-based robotic communication framework that enables non-verbal communication among autonomous underwater vehicles (AUVs) and human divers. We design a gestural language for AUV-to-AUV communication which can be easily understood by divers observing the conversation unlike typical radio frequency, light, or audio based AUV communication. To allow AUVs to visually understand a gesture from another AUV, we propose a deep network (RRCommNet) which exploits a self-attention mechanism to learn to recognize each message by extracting maximally discriminative spatio-temporal features. We train this network on diverse simulated and real-world data. Our experimental evaluations, both in simulation and in closed-water robot trials, demonstrate that the proposed RRCommNet architecture is able to decipher gesture-based messages with an average accuracy of 88-94% on simulated data, 73-83% on real data (depending on the version of the model used). Further, by performing a message transcription study with human participants, we also show that the proposed language can be understood by humans, with an overall transcription accuracy of 88%. Finally, we discuss the inference runtime of RRCommNet on embedded GPU hardware, for real-time use on board AUVs in the field.
summary: In this paper, we present a motion-based robotic communication framework that enables non-verbal communication among autonomous underwater vehicles (AUVs) and human divers. We design a gestural language for AUV-to-AUV communication which can be easily understood by divers observing the conversation unlike typical radio frequency, light, or audio based AUV communication. To allow AUVs to visually understand a gesture from another AUV, we propose a deep network (RRCommNet) which exploits a self-attention mechanism to learn to recognize each message by extracting maximally discriminative spatio-temporal features. We train this network on diverse simulated and real-world data. Our experimental evaluations, both in simulation and in closed-water robot trials, demonstrate that the proposed RRCommNet architecture is able to decipher gesture-based messages with an average accuracy of 88-94% on simulated data, 73-83% on real data (depending on the version of the model used). Further, by performing a message transcription study with human participants, we also show that the proposed language can be understood by humans, with an overall transcription accuracy of 88%. Finally, we discuss the inference runtime of RRCommNet on embedded GPU hardware, for real-time use on board AUVs in the field.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种基于运动的机器人通信框架，可实现自主水下航行器（AUV）和人类潜水员之间的非语言通信。我们为 AUV 之间的通信设计了一种手势语言，与典型的基于射频、光或音频的 AUV 通信不同，潜水员观察对话时可以轻松理解该语言。为了让 AUV 能够直观地理解另一个 AUV 的手势，我们提出了一种深度网络（RRCommNet），它利用自注意力机制来通过提取最大辨别力的时空特征来学习识别每条消息。我们使用各种模拟和现实数据来训练该网络。我们在模拟和闭水机器人试验中的实验评估表明，所提出的 RRCommNet 架构能够破译基于手势的消息，模拟数据的平均准确度为 88-94%，真实数据的平均准确度为 73-83%（取决于所使用模型的版本）。此外，通过对人类参与者进行消息转录研究，我们还表明所提出的语言可以被人类理解，总体转录准确度为 88%。最后，我们讨论了 RRCommNet 在嵌入式 GPU 硬件上的推理运行时间，以便在现场的机载 AUV 上实时使用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于运动的机器人通信框架，使自主水下机器人（AUV）与潜水员之间能够进行非语言通信，并设计了一种可被人类理解的水下手势语言。
AI.motivation: 传统水下通信方式（如无线电、光或音频）存在局限性，且难以让潜水员直接理解AUV之间的交流。需要一种直观、人类可理解的非语言通信方式以促进多机器人-人类协作。
AI.method: 设计了一种手势语言，并开发了基于自注意力机制的深度网络RRCommNet，通过提取时空特征来识别手势消息。网络在模拟和真实数据集上进行训练，并通过人类参与者的转录实验验证语言可理解性。
AI.result: 在模拟数据上，RRCommNet的识别准确率为88-94%；真实数据下为73-83%。人类参与者对手势语言的转录准确率为88%。嵌入式GPU上的推理延迟满足实时性需求。
AI.conclusion: 该框架实现了AUV间及AUV与人类潜水员之间的有效手势通信，验证了所设计语言的可行性，为水下多智能体协作提供了新方法。

search_text: Robotic Detection of a Human-Comprehensible Gestural Language for Underwater Multi-Human-Robot Collaboration 用于水下多人机器人协作的人类可理解的手势语言的机器人检测 In this paper, we present a motion-based robotic communication framework that enables non-verbal communication among autonomous underwater vehicles (AUVs) and human divers. We design a gestural language for AUV-to-AUV communication which can be easily understood by divers observing the conversation unlike typical radio frequency, light, or audio based AUV communication. To allow AUVs to visually understand a gesture from another AUV, we propose a deep network (RRCommNet) which exploits a self-attention mechanism to learn to recognize each message by extracting maximally discriminative spatio-temporal features. We train this network on diverse simulated and real-world data. Our experimental evaluations, both in simulation and in closed-water robot trials, demonstrate that the proposed RRCommNet architecture is able to decipher gesture-based messages with an average accuracy of 88-94% on simulated data, 73-83% on real data (depending on the version of the model used). Further, by performing a message transcription study with human participants, we also show that the proposed language can be understood by humans, with an overall transcription accuracy of 88%. Finally, we discuss the inference runtime of RRCommNet on embedded GPU hardware, for real-time use on board AUVs in the field. 在本文中，我们提出了一种基于运动的机器人通信框架，可实现自主水下航行器（AUV）和人类潜水员之间的非语言通信。我们为 AUV 之间的通信设计了一种手势语言，与典型的基于射频、光或音频的 AUV 通信不同，潜水员观察对话时可以轻松理解该语言。为了让 AUV 能够直观地理解另一个 AUV 的手势，我们提出了一种深度网络（RRCommNet），它利用自注意力机制来通过提取最大辨别力的时空特征来学习识别每条消息。我们使用各种模拟和现实数据来训练该网络。我们在模拟和闭水机器人试验中的实验评估表明，所提出的 RRCommNet 架构能够破译基于手势的消息，模拟数据的平均准确度为 88-94%，真实数据的平均准确度为 73-83%（取决于所使用模型的版本）。此外，通过对人类参与者进行消息转录研究，我们还表明所提出的语言可以被人类理解，总体转录准确度为 88%。最后，我们讨论了 RRCommNet 在嵌入式 GPU 硬件上的推理运行时间，以便在现场的机载 AUV 上实时使用。 本文提出了一种基于运动的机器人通信框架，使自主水下机器人（AUV）与潜水员之间能够进行非语言通信，并设计了一种可被人类理解的水下手势语言。 Sadman Sakib Enan,Michael Fulton,Junaed Sattar cs.RO,cs.CV

authors_text: Zaijun Chen,Alexander Sludds,Ronald Davis,Ian Christen,Liane Bernstein,Tobias Heuser,Niels Heermeier,James A. Lott,Stephan Reitzenstein,Ryan Hamerly,Dirk Englund
title: Deep Learning with Coherent VCSEL Neural Networks
title_zh: 使用相干 VCSEL 神经网络进行深度学习
abstract: Deep neural networks (DNNs) are reshaping the field of information processing. With their exponential growth challenging existing electronic hardware, optical neural networks (ONNs) are emerging to process DNN tasks in the optical domain with high clock rates, parallelism and low-loss data transmission. However, to explore the potential of ONNs, it is necessary to investigate the full-system performance incorporating the major DNN elements, including matrix algebra and nonlinear activation. Existing challenges to ONNs are high energy consumption due to low electro-optic (EO) conversion efficiency, low compute density due to large device footprint and channel crosstalk, and long latency due to the lack of inline nonlinearity. Here we experimentally demonstrate an ONN system that simultaneously overcomes all these challenges. We exploit neuron encoding with volume-manufactured micron-scale vertical-cavity surface-emitting laser (VCSEL) transmitter arrays that exhibit high EO conversion (<5 attojoule/symbol with $V_π$=4 mV), high operation bandwidth (up to 25 GS/s), and compact footprint (<0.01 mm$^2$ per device). Photoelectric multiplication allows low-energy matrix operations at the shot-noise quantum limit. Homodyne detection-based nonlinearity enables nonlinear activation with instantaneous response. The full-system energy efficiency and compute density reach 7 femtojoules per operation (fJ/OP) and 25 TeraOP/(mm$^2\cdot$ s), both representing a >100-fold improvement over state-of-the-art digital computers, with substantially several more orders of magnitude for future improvement. Beyond neural network inference, its feature of rapid weight updating is crucial for training deep learning models. Our technique opens an avenue to large-scale optoelectronic processors to accelerate machine learning tasks from data centers to decentralized edge devices.

With their exponential growth challenging existing electronic hardware, optical neural networks (ONNs) are emerging to process DNN tasks in the optical domain with high clock rates, parallelism and low-loss data transmission. Existing challenges to ONNs are high energy consumption due to low electro-optic (EO) conversion efficiency, low compute density due to large device footprint and channel crosstalk, and long latency due to the lack of inline nonlinearity. Here we experimentally demonstrate an ONN system that simultaneously overcomes all these challenges. We exploit neuron encoding with volume-manufactured micron-scale vertical-cavity surface-emitting laser (VCSEL) transmitter arrays that exhibit high EO conversion (<5 attojoule/symbol with $V_π$=4 mV), high operation bandwidth (up to 25 GS/s), and compact footprint (<0.01 mm$^2$ per device). Photoelectric multiplication allows low-energy matrix operations at the shot-noise quantum limit. Homodyne detection-based nonlinearity enables nonlinear activation with instantaneous response. The full-system energy efficiency and compute density reach 7 femtojoules per operation (fJ/OP) and 25 TeraOP/(mm$^2\cdot$ s), both representing a >100-fold improvement over state-of-the-art digital computers, with substantially several more orders of magnitude for future improvement. Beyond neural network inference, its feature of rapid weight updating is crucial for training deep learning models. Our technique opens an avenue to large-scale optoelectronic processors to accelerate machine learning tasks from data centers to decentralized edge devices.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络（DNN）正在重塑信息处理领域。随着其指数级增长对现有电子硬件提出挑战，光神经网络 (ONN) 正在兴起，以高时钟速率、并行性和低损耗数据传输来处理光域中的 DNN 任务。然而，为了探索 ONN 的潜力，有必要研究包含主要 DNN 元素（包括矩阵代数和非线性激活）的全系统性能。 ONN 面临的现有挑战包括电光 (EO) 转换效率低导致的高能耗、器件占用空间大和通道串扰导致的计算密度低以及缺乏内联非线性导致的长延迟。在这里，我们通过实验展示了一个同时克服所有这些挑战的 ONN 系统。我们利用批量制造的微米级垂直腔表面发射激光器 (VCSEL) 发射器阵列进行神经元编码，该阵列具有高 EO 转换（<5 阿托焦耳/符号，$V_π$=4 mV）、高操作带宽（高达 25 GS/s）和紧凑的占地面积（每个设备 <0.01 mm$^2$）。光电倍增允许在散粒噪声量子极限下进行低能量矩阵运算。基于零差检测的非线性可实现具有瞬时响应的非线性激活。全系统能源效率和计算密度达到每次操作 7 femtojoules (fJ/OP) 和 25 TeraOP/(mm$^2\cdot$ s)，两者都比最先进的数字计算机提高了 100 倍以上，未来还将进一步提高几个数量级。除了神经网络推理之外，其快速权值更新的特性对于训练深度学习模型至关重要。我们的技术为大规模光电处理器开辟了一条途径，以加速从数据中心到分散边缘设备的机器学习任务。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于相干VCSEL神经网络的光学计算系统，解决了现有光子神经网络的高能耗、低计算密度和长延迟问题。
AI.motivation: 现有光学神经网络（ONNs）面临电光转换效率低、设备体积大导致计算密度低以及缺乏即时非线性激活等挑战，限制了其在深度学习中的应用。
AI.method: 利用高电光转换效率的VCSEL阵列实现神经元编码，结合光电倍增进行低能耗矩阵运算，并通过同相检测实现非线性激活，集成完整系统性能评估。
AI.result: 系统能效达7 fJ/OP，计算密度达25 TeraOP/(mm²·s)，较传统计算机提升100倍以上，且支持快速权重更新用于模型训练。
AI.conclusion: 该技术为构建大规模光电混合处理器提供了新路径，可显著加速从数据中心到边缘设备的机器学习任务。

authors_text: Hanbin Hong,Yuan Hong
title: Certified Adversarial Robustness via Anisotropic Randomized Smoothing
title_zh: 通过各向异性随机平滑认证的对抗鲁棒性
abstract: Randomized smoothing has achieved great success for certified robustness against adversarial perturbations. Given any arbitrary classifier, randomized smoothing can guarantee the classifier's prediction over the perturbed input with provable robustness bound by injecting noise into the classifier. However, all of the existing methods rely on fixed i.i.d. probability distribution to generate noise for all dimensions of the data (e.g., all the pixels in an image), which ignores the heterogeneity of inputs and data dimensions. Thus, existing randomized smoothing methods cannot provide optimal protection for all the inputs. To address this limitation, we propose a novel anisotropic randomized smoothing method which ensures provable robustness guarantee based on pixel-wise noise distributions. Also, we design a novel CNN-based noise generator to efficiently fine-tune the pixel-wise noise distributions for all the pixels in each input. Experimental results demonstrate that our method significantly outperforms the state-of-the-art randomized smoothing methods.
summary: Randomized smoothing has achieved great success for certified robustness against adversarial perturbations. Given any arbitrary classifier, randomized smoothing can guarantee the classifier's prediction over the perturbed input with provable robustness bound by injecting noise into the classifier. However, all of the existing methods rely on fixed i.i.d. probability distribution to generate noise for all dimensions of the data (e.g., all the pixels in an image), which ignores the heterogeneity of inputs and data dimensions. Thus, existing randomized smoothing methods cannot provide optimal protection for all the inputs. To address this limitation, we propose a novel anisotropic randomized smoothing method which ensures provable robustness guarantee based on pixel-wise noise distributions. Also, we design a novel CNN-based noise generator to efficiently fine-tune the pixel-wise noise distributions for all the pixels in each input. Experimental results demonstrate that our method significantly outperforms the state-of-the-art randomized smoothing methods.
abstract_zh: 随机平滑在针对对抗性扰动的鲁棒性认证方面取得了巨大成功。给定任意分类器，随机平滑可以通过向分类器注入噪声来保证分类器对扰动输入的预测具有可证明的鲁棒性界限。然而，所有现有方法都依赖于固定独立同分布。概率分布为数据的所有维度（例如图像中的所有像素）生成噪声，它忽略了输入和数据维度的异质性。因此，现有的随机平滑方法无法为所有输入提供最佳保护。为了解决这个限制，我们提出了一种新颖的各向异性随机平滑方法，该方法确保基于像素噪声分布的可证明的鲁棒性保证。此外，我们设计了一种新颖的基于 CNN 的噪声生成器，可以有效地微调每个输入中所有像素的像素级噪声分布。实验结果表明，我们的方法明显优于最先进的随机平滑方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种各向异性随机平滑方法，通过像素级噪声分布提升对抗鲁棒性认证效果。
AI.motivation: 现有随机平滑方法采用固定各向同性噪声分布，无法适应输入数据维度异质性，导致鲁棒性保护效果次优。
AI.method: 设计各向异性随机平滑框架，结合像素级噪声分布与CNN噪声生成器动态调整噪声参数。
AI.result: 实验验证该方法在多个基准数据集上显著优于现有随机平滑技术的认证鲁棒性表现。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入自适应噪声分布机制，有效解决了传统方法忽视数据异质性的缺陷，实现了更优的对抗鲁棒性保障。

authors_text: Xiou Ge,Yun-Cheng Wang,Bin Wang,C. -C. Jay Kuo
title: CompoundE: Knowledge Graph Embedding with Translation, Rotation and Scaling Compound Operations
title_zh: compoundE：具有平移、旋转和缩放复合操作的知识图嵌入
abstract: Translation, rotation, and scaling are three commonly used geometric manipulation operations in image processing. Besides, some of them are successfully used in developing effective knowledge graph embedding (KGE) models such as TransE and RotatE. Inspired by the synergy, we propose a new KGE model by leveraging all three operations in this work. Since translation, rotation, and scaling operations are cascaded to form a compound one, the new model is named CompoundE. By casting CompoundE in the framework of group theory, we show that quite a few scoring-function-based KGE models are special cases of CompoundE. CompoundE extends the simple distance-based relation to relation-dependent compound operations on head and/or tail entities. To demonstrate the effectiveness of CompoundE, we conduct experiments on three popular KG completion datasets. Experimental results show that CompoundE consistently achieves the state of-the-art performance.
summary: Translation, rotation, and scaling are three commonly used geometric manipulation operations in image processing. Besides, some of them are successfully used in developing effective knowledge graph embedding (KGE) models such as TransE and RotatE. Inspired by the synergy, we propose a new KGE model by leveraging all three operations in this work. Since translation, rotation, and scaling operations are cascaded to form a compound one, the new model is named CompoundE. By casting CompoundE in the framework of group theory, we show that quite a few scoring-function-based KGE models are special cases of CompoundE. CompoundE extends the simple distance-based relation to relation-dependent compound operations on head and/or tail entities. To demonstrate the effectiveness of CompoundE, we conduct experiments on three popular KG completion datasets. Experimental results show that CompoundE consistently achieves the state of-the-art performance.
abstract_zh: 平移、旋转和缩放是图像处理中三种常用的几何操作操作。此外，其中一些已成功用于开发有效的知识图嵌入（KGE）模型，例如 TransE 和 RotatE。受协同作用的启发，我们通过利用这项工作中的所有三个操作提出了一个新的 KGE 模型。由于平移、旋转和缩放操作级联形成复合操作，因此新模型被命名为CompoundE。通过将CompoundE放入群论的框架中，我们发现相当多的基于评分函数的KGE模型是CompoundE的特例。 CompoundE 将简单的基于距离的关系扩展为头实体和/或尾实体上的依赖于关系的复合操作。为了证明CompoundE的有效性，我们在三个流行的KG补全数据集上进行了实验。实验结果表明，CompoundE 始终达到最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 提出一种结合平移、旋转和缩放复合操作的知识图谱嵌入模型CompoundE，用于提升知识图谱补全任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有知识图谱嵌入模型（如TransE、RotatE）仅采用单一几何操作，限制了关系建模的表达能力，需通过复合操作增强模型灵活性。
AI.method: 通过级联平移、旋转和缩放操作形成复合变换，并在群论框架下统一多种KGE模型，扩展关系依赖的复合运算到头实体和尾实体。
AI.result: 在三个主流知识图谱补全数据集上实验，CompoundE持续取得最先进性能。
AI.conclusion: 复合几何操作能更灵活建模知识图谱中的关系，为KGE模型设计提供新思路。

authors_text: Jia Liu,Ran Cheng,Yaochu Jin
title: Bi-fidelity Evolutionary Multiobjective Search for Adversarially Robust Deep Neural Architectures
title_zh: 对抗性鲁棒深度神经架构的双保真进化多目标搜索
abstract: Deep neural networks have been found vulnerable to adversarial attacks, thus raising potentially concerns in security-sensitive contexts. To address this problem, recent research has investigated the adversarial robustness of deep neural networks from the architectural point of view. However, searching for architectures of deep neural networks is computationally expensive, particularly when coupled with adversarial training process. To meet the above challenge, this paper proposes a bi-fidelity multiobjective neural architecture search approach. First, we formulate the NAS problem for enhancing adversarial robustness of deep neural networks into a multiobjective optimization problem. Specifically, in addition to a low-fidelity performance predictor as the first objective, we leverage an auxiliary-objective -- the value of which is the output of a surrogate model trained with high-fidelity evaluations. Secondly, we reduce the computational cost by combining three performance estimation methods, i.e., parameter sharing, low-fidelity evaluation, and surrogate-based predictor. The effectiveness of the proposed approach is confirmed by extensive experiments conducted on CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100 and SVHN datasets.
summary: Deep neural networks have been found vulnerable to adversarial attacks, thus raising potentially concerns in security-sensitive contexts. To address this problem, recent research has investigated the adversarial robustness of deep neural networks from the architectural point of view. However, searching for architectures of deep neural networks is computationally expensive, particularly when coupled with adversarial training process. To meet the above challenge, this paper proposes a bi-fidelity multiobjective neural architecture search approach. First, we formulate the NAS problem for enhancing adversarial robustness of deep neural networks into a multiobjective optimization problem. Specifically, in addition to a low-fidelity performance predictor as the first objective, we leverage an auxiliary-objective -- the value of which is the output of a surrogate model trained with high-fidelity evaluations. Secondly, we reduce the computational cost by combining three performance estimation methods, i.e., parameter sharing, low-fidelity evaluation, and surrogate-based predictor. The effectiveness of the proposed approach is confirmed by extensive experiments conducted on CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100 and SVHN datasets.
abstract_zh: 人们发现深度神经网络容易受到对抗性攻击，因此在安全敏感的环境中引起了潜在的担忧。为了解决这个问题，最近的研究从架构的角度研究了深度神经网络的对抗鲁棒性。然而，搜索深度神经网络的架构在计算上是昂贵的，特别是在与对抗性训练过程相结合时。为了应对上述挑战，本文提出了一种双保真多目标神经架构搜索方法。首先，我们将增强深度神经网络对抗鲁棒性的 NAS 问题转化为多目标优化问题。具体来说，除了低保真性能预测器作为第一个目标之外，我们还利用辅助目标——其值是经过高保真评估训练的代理模型的输出。其次，我们通过结合三种性能估计方法（即参数共享、低保真度评估和基于代理的预测器）来降低计算成本。在 CIFAR-10、CIFAR-100 和 SVHN 数据集上进行的大量实验证实了所提出方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种双保真度多目标进化搜索方法，用于提升深度神经网络对抗攻击的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络易受对抗攻击影响，现有架构搜索方法计算成本高，需更高效方案。
AI.method: 将NAS问题转化为多目标优化，结合低保真预测器与高保真代理模型，并采用参数共享、低保真评估和代理预测三种性能估计方法降低计算成本。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10、CIFAR-100和SVHN数据集上的实验验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在保证对抗鲁棒性的同时显著降低计算成本，为神经架构搜索提供新思路。

search_text: Bi-fidelity Evolutionary Multiobjective Search for Adversarially Robust Deep Neural Architectures 对抗性鲁棒深度神经架构的双保真进化多目标搜索 Deep neural networks have been found vulnerable to adversarial attacks, thus raising potentially concerns in security-sensitive contexts. To address this problem, recent research has investigated the adversarial robustness of deep neural networks from the architectural point of view. However, searching for architectures of deep neural networks is computationally expensive, particularly when coupled with adversarial training process. To meet the above challenge, this paper proposes a bi-fidelity multiobjective neural architecture search approach. First, we formulate the NAS problem for enhancing adversarial robustness of deep neural networks into a multiobjective optimization problem. Specifically, in addition to a low-fidelity performance predictor as the first objective, we leverage an auxiliary-objective -- the value of which is the output of a surrogate model trained with high-fidelity evaluations. Secondly, we reduce the computational cost by combining three performance estimation methods, i.e., parameter sharing, low-fidelity evaluation, and surrogate-based predictor. The effectiveness of the proposed approach is confirmed by extensive experiments conducted on CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100 and SVHN datasets. 人们发现深度神经网络容易受到对抗性攻击，因此在安全敏感的环境中引起了潜在的担忧。为了解决这个问题，最近的研究从架构的角度研究了深度神经网络的对抗鲁棒性。然而，搜索深度神经网络的架构在计算上是昂贵的，特别是在与对抗性训练过程相结合时。为了应对上述挑战，本文提出了一种双保真多目标神经架构搜索方法。首先，我们将增强深度神经网络对抗鲁棒性的 NAS 问题转化为多目标优化问题。具体来说，除了低保真性能预测器作为第一个目标之外，我们还利用辅助目标——其值是经过高保真评估训练的代理模型的输出。其次，我们通过结合三种性能估计方法（即参数共享、低保真度评估和基于代理的预测器）来降低计算成本。在 CIFAR-10、CIFAR-100 和 SVHN 数据集上进行的大量实验证实了所提出方法的有效性。 本文提出一种双保真度多目标进化搜索方法，用于提升深度神经网络对抗攻击的鲁棒性。 Jia Liu,Ran Cheng,Yaochu Jin cs.LG,cs.NE

authors_text: Junho Kim,Hojun Jang,Changwoon Choi,Young Min Kim
title: CPO: Change Robust Panorama to Point Cloud Localization
title_zh: CPO：将鲁棒全景图改为点云定位
abstract: We present CPO, a fast and robust algorithm that localizes a 2D panorama with respect to a 3D point cloud of a scene possibly containing changes. To robustly handle scene changes, our approach deviates from conventional feature point matching, and focuses on the spatial context provided from panorama images. Specifically, we propose efficient color histogram generation and subsequent robust localization using score maps. By utilizing the unique equivariance of spherical projections, we propose very fast color histogram generation for a large number of camera poses without explicitly rendering images for all candidate poses. We accumulate the regional consistency of the panorama and point cloud as 2D/3D score maps, and use them to weigh the input color values to further increase robustness. The weighted color distribution quickly finds good initial poses and achieves stable convergence for gradient-based optimization. CPO is lightweight and achieves effective localization in all tested scenarios, showing stable performance despite scene changes, repetitive structures, or featureless regions, which are typical challenges for visual localization with perspective cameras. Code is available at \url{https://github.com/82magnolia/panoramic-localization/}.
summary: We present CPO, a fast and robust algorithm that localizes a 2D panorama with respect to a 3D point cloud of a scene possibly containing changes. To robustly handle scene changes, our approach deviates from conventional feature point matching, and focuses on the spatial context provided from panorama images. Specifically, we propose efficient color histogram generation and subsequent robust localization using score maps. By utilizing the unique equivariance of spherical projections, we propose very fast color histogram generation for a large number of camera poses without explicitly rendering images for all candidate poses. We accumulate the regional consistency of the panorama and point cloud as 2D/3D score maps, and use them to weigh the input color values to further increase robustness. The weighted color distribution quickly finds good initial poses and achieves stable convergence for gradient-based optimization. CPO is lightweight and achieves effective localization in all tested scenarios, showing stable performance despite scene changes, repetitive structures, or featureless regions, which are typical challenges for visual localization with perspective cameras. Code is available at \url{https://github.com/82magnolia/panoramic-localization/}.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 CPO，一种快速而强大的算法，可相对于可能包含变化的场景的 3D 点云来定位 2D 全景图。为了稳健地处理场景变化，我们的方法偏离了传统的特征点匹配，并专注于全景图像提供的空间上下文。具体来说，我们提出有效的颜色直方图生成和随后使用分数图的鲁棒定位。通过利用球面投影的独特等变性，我们提出了针对大量相机姿势的非常快速的颜色直方图生成，而无需显式渲染所有候选姿势的图像。我们将全景图和点云的区域一致性累积为 2D/3D 分数图，并使用它们来权衡输入颜色值以进一步提高鲁棒性。加权颜色分布快速找到良好的初始姿势并实现基于梯度的优化的稳定收敛。 CPO 是轻量级的，在所有测试场景中都实现了有效的定位，尽管场景变化、重复结构或无特征区域（这些是透视相机视觉定位的典型挑战）仍表现出稳定的性能。代码可在 \url{https://github.com/82magnolia/panoramic-localization/} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CPO算法，用于在存在场景变化的情况下，将2D全景图像与3D点云进行鲁棒定位。
AI.motivation: 传统基于特征点匹配的视觉定位方法在场景变化、重复结构或无特征区域时表现不佳，需更稳健的定位方案。
AI.method: 通过全景图像的空间上下文信息，利用球面投影的等变性生成高效颜色直方图，结合2D/3D分数图评估区域一致性，加权颜色分布以提升鲁棒性并加速优化收敛。
AI.result: CPO在所有测试场景中均实现有效定位，对场景变化、重复结构及无特征区域具有稳定性，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: CPO通过颜色直方图与分数图机制，为全景到点云的鲁棒定位提供了轻量且高效的解决方案。

authors_text: Connor J. Parde,Virginia E. Strehle,Vivekjyoti Banerjee,Ying Hu,Jacqueline G. Cavazos,Carlos D. Castillo,Alice J. O'Toole
title: Twin identification over viewpoint change: A deep convolutional neural network surpasses humans
title_zh: 观点变化的孪生识别：深度卷积神经网络超越人类
abstract: Deep convolutional neural networks (DCNNs) have achieved human-level accuracy in face identification (Phillips et al., 2018), though it is unclear how accurately they discriminate highly-similar faces. Here, humans and a DCNN performed a challenging face-identity matching task that included identical twins. Participants (N=87) viewed pairs of face images of three types: same-identity, general imposter pairs (different identities from similar demographic groups), and twin imposter pairs (identical twin siblings). The task was to determine whether the pairs showed the same person or different people. Identity comparisons were tested in three viewpoint-disparity conditions: frontal to frontal, frontal to 45-degree profile, and frontal to 90-degree profile. Accuracy for discriminating matched-identity pairs from twin-imposters and general imposters was assessed in each viewpoint-disparity condition. Humans were more accurate for general-imposter pairs than twin-imposter pairs, and accuracy declined with increased viewpoint disparity between the images in a pair. A DCNN trained for face identification (Ranjan et al., 2018) was tested on the same image pairs presented to humans. Machine performance mirrored the pattern of human accuracy, but with performance at or above all humans in all but one condition. Human and machine similarity scores were compared across all image-pair types. This item-level analysis showed that human and machine similarity ratings correlated significantly in six of nine image-pair types [range r=0.38 to r=0.63], suggesting general accord between the perception of face similarity by humans and the DCNN. These findings also contribute to our understanding of DCNN performance for discriminating high-resemblance faces, demonstrate that the DCNN performs at a level at or above humans, and suggest a degree of parity between the features used by humans and the DCNN.

abstract_zh: 深度卷积神经网络（DCNN）在人脸识别方面已经达到了人类水平的准确度（Phillips et al., 2018），尽管目前还不清楚它们区分高度相似的人脸的准确度如何。在这里，人类和 DCNN 执行了一项具有挑战性的面部身份匹配任务，其中包括同卵双胞胎。参与者（N = 87）观看了三种类型的成对面部图像：相同身份、一般冒名顶替者对（来自相似人口群体的不同身份）和双胞胎冒名顶替者对（同卵双胞胎兄弟姐妹）。任务是确定这两对显示的是同一个人还是不同的人。在三种视点视差条件下测试了身份比较：正面到正面、正面到 45 度侧面以及正面到 90 度侧面。在每种观点差异条件下评估区分双胞胎冒名顶替者和一般冒名顶替者的匹配身份对的准确性。人类对一般冒名顶替者对的识别比双胞胎冒名顶替者对更准确，并且准确度随着一对图像之间的视点差异的增加而下降。针对人脸识别训练的 DCNN（Ranjan 等人，2018）在呈现给人类的相同图像对上进行了测试。机器的性能反映了人类准确性的模式，但在除一种条件之外的所有条件下，机器的性能都等于或高于人类。比较所有图像对类型的人类和机器相似性得分。该项目级分析表明，在九个图像对类型中的六个中，人类和机器的相似度评分显着相关[范围 r=0.38 到 r=0.63]，这表明人类和 DCNN 对面部相似性的感知之间总体一致。这些发现也有助于我们理解 DCNN 在区分高相似性面孔方面的性能，证明 DCNN 的性能水平等于或高于人类，并表明人类使用的特征和 DCNN 之间有一定程度的相似性。

AI.tldr: 该论文比较了人类与深度卷积神经网络（DCNN）在不同视角下区分双胞胎面孔的任务表现。
AI.motivation: 尽管DCNN在人脸识别中达到人类水平，但其区分高度相似面孔（如双胞胎）的能力尚不清楚，需验证其性能是否超越人类。
AI.method: 87名参与者和一个DCNN模型完成三类面孔配对任务（同身份、普通冒充者、双胞胎冒充者），在三种视角差异条件下（正脸对正脸、正脸对45度侧脸、正脸对90度侧脸）判断是否为同一人。
AI.result: 人类对双胞胎冒充者判断准确率低于普通冒充者，且视角差异越大准确率越低；DCNN在除一条件外均表现优于或等于人类，且与人类相似度评分在六种配对类型中显著相关（r=0.38-0.63）。
AI.conclusion: DCNN在区分高相似度面孔任务中达到或超越人类水平，表明其特征提取机制与人类存在共性。

Human and machine similarity scores were compared across all image-pair types. This item-level analysis showed that human and machine similarity ratings correlated significantly in six of nine image-pair types [range r=0.38 to r=0.63], suggesting general accord between the perception of face similarity by humans and the DCNN. These findings also contribute to our understanding of DCNN performance for discriminating high-resemblance faces, demonstrate that the DCNN performs at a level at or above humans, and suggest a degree of parity between the features used by humans and the DCNN. 深度卷积神经网络（DCNN）在人脸识别方面已经达到了人类水平的准确度（Phillips et al., 2018），尽管目前还不清楚它们区分高度相似的人脸的准确度如何。在这里，人类和 DCNN 执行了一项具有挑战性的面部身份匹配任务，其中包括同卵双胞胎。参与者（N = 87）观看了三种类型的成对面部图像：相同身份、一般冒名顶替者对（来自相似人口群体的不同身份）和双胞胎冒名顶替者对（同卵双胞胎兄弟姐妹）。任务是确定这两对显示的是同一个人还是不同的人。在三种视点视差条件下测试了身份比较：正面到正面、正面到 45 度侧面以及正面到 90 度侧面。在每种观点差异条件下评估区分双胞胎冒名顶替者和一般冒名顶替者的匹配身份对的准确性。人类对一般冒名顶替者对的识别比双胞胎冒名顶替者对更准确，并且准确度随着一对图像之间的视点差异的增加而下降。针对人脸识别训练的 DCNN（Ranjan 等人，2018）在呈现给人类的相同图像对上进行了测试。机器的性能反映了人类准确性的模式，但在除一种条件之外的所有条件下，机器的性能都等于或高于人类。比较所有图像对类型的人类和机器相似性得分。该项目级分析表明，在九个图像对类型中的六个中，人类和机器的相似度评分显着相关[范围 r=0.38 到 r=0.63]，这表明人类和 DCNN 对面部相似性的感知之间总体一致。这些发现也有助于我们理解 DCNN 在区分高相似性面孔方面的性能，证明 DCNN 的性能水平等于或高于人类，并表明人类使用的特征和 DCNN 之间有一定程度的相似性。 该论文比较了人类与深度卷积神经网络（DCNN）在不同视角下区分双胞胎面孔的任务表现。 Connor J. Parde,Virginia E. Strehle,Vivekjyoti Banerjee,Ying Hu,Jacqueline G. Cavazos,Carlos D. Castillo,Alice J. O'Toole cs.CV

authors_text: Yung-Han Ho,Chih-Peng Chang,Peng-Yu Chen,Alessandro Gnutti,Wen-Hsiao Peng
title: CANF-VC: Conditional Augmented Normalizing Flows for Video Compression
title_zh: CANF-VC：视频压缩的条件增强归一化流
abstract: This paper presents an end-to-end learning-based video compression system, termed CANF-VC, based on conditional augmented normalizing flows (CANF). Most learned video compression systems adopt the same hybrid-based coding architecture as the traditional codecs. Recent research on conditional coding has shown the sub-optimality of the hybrid-based coding and opens up opportunities for deep generative models to take a key role in creating new coding frameworks. CANF-VC represents a new attempt that leverages the conditional ANF to learn a video generative model for conditional inter-frame coding. We choose ANF because it is a special type of generative model, which includes variational autoencoder as a special case and is able to achieve better expressiveness. CANF-VC also extends the idea of conditional coding to motion coding, forming a purely conditional coding framework. Extensive experimental results on commonly used datasets confirm the superiority of CANF-VC to the state-of-the-art methods. The source code of CANF-VC is available at https://github.com/NYCU-MAPL/CANF-VC.
summary: This paper presents an end-to-end learning-based video compression system, termed CANF-VC, based on conditional augmented normalizing flows (CANF). Most learned video compression systems adopt the same hybrid-based coding architecture as the traditional codecs. Recent research on conditional coding has shown the sub-optimality of the hybrid-based coding and opens up opportunities for deep generative models to take a key role in creating new coding frameworks. CANF-VC represents a new attempt that leverages the conditional ANF to learn a video generative model for conditional inter-frame coding. We choose ANF because it is a special type of generative model, which includes variational autoencoder as a special case and is able to achieve better expressiveness. CANF-VC also extends the idea of conditional coding to motion coding, forming a purely conditional coding framework. Extensive experimental results on commonly used datasets confirm the superiority of CANF-VC to the state-of-the-art methods. The source code of CANF-VC is available at https://github.com/NYCU-MAPL/CANF-VC.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种基于端到端学习的视频压缩系统，称为 CANF-VC，基于条件增强归一化流 (CANF)。大多数学习的视频压缩系统都采用与传统编解码器相同的基于混合的编码架构。最近对条件编码的研究表明，基于混合的编码的次优性，并为深度生成模型在创建新的编码框架中发挥关键作用提供了机会。 CANF-VC代表了一种利用条件ANF来学习条件帧间编码的视频生成模型的新尝试。我们选择ANF是因为它是一种特殊类型的生成模型，其中包括变分自动编码器作为特例，并且能够实现更好的表达能力。 CANF-VC还将条件编码的思想扩展到运动编码，形成了纯粹的条件编码框架。对常用数据集的大量实验结果证实了 CANF-VC 相对于最先进方法的优越性。 CANF-VC 的源代码可在 https://github.com/NYCU-MAPL/CANF-VC 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于条件增强归一化流（CANF）的端到端学习视频压缩系统CANF-VC，旨在通过条件编码框架改进传统混合编码架构的视频压缩性能。
AI.motivation: 传统视频压缩系统依赖混合编码架构存在次优性，而条件编码研究为深度生成模型构建新型编码框架提供了机会，需探索更高效的生成模型以提升压缩效果。
AI.method: 采用条件增强归一化流（CANF）作为生成模型，扩展条件编码至运动编码，形成纯条件编码框架，利用CANF的强表达能力实现帧间条件编码。
AI.result: 在常用数据集上的实验表明，CANF-VC在压缩性能上优于现有最先进方法，且源代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: CANF-VC验证了条件编码与归一化流在视频压缩中的有效性，为未来生成模型驱动的压缩框架提供了新方向。
