authors_text: Kai Yao,Penglei Gao,Xi Yang,Kaizhu Huang,Jie Sun,Rui Zhang
title: Outpainting by Queries
title_zh: 通过查询进行绘制
abstract: Image outpainting, which is well studied with Convolution Neural Network (CNN) based framework, has recently drawn more attention in computer vision. However, CNNs rely on inherent inductive biases to achieve effective sample learning, which may degrade the performance ceiling. In this paper, motivated by the flexible self-attention mechanism with minimal inductive biases in transformer architecture, we reframe the generalised image outpainting problem as a patch-wise sequence-to-sequence autoregression problem, enabling query-based image outpainting. Specifically, we propose a novel hybrid vision-transformer-based encoder-decoder framework, named \textbf{Query} \textbf{O}utpainting \textbf{TR}ansformer (\textbf{QueryOTR}), for extrapolating visual context all-side around a given image. Patch-wise mode's global modeling capacity allows us to extrapolate images from the attention mechanism's query standpoint. A novel Query Expansion Module (QEM) is designed to integrate information from the predicted queries based on the encoder's output, hence accelerating the convergence of the pure transformer even with a relatively small dataset. To further enhance connectivity between each patch, the proposed Patch Smoothing Module (PSM) re-allocates and averages the overlapped regions, thus providing seamless predicted images. We experimentally show that QueryOTR could generate visually appealing results smoothly and realistically against the state-of-the-art image outpainting approaches.
summary: Image outpainting, which is well studied with Convolution Neural Network (CNN) based framework, has recently drawn more attention in computer vision. However, CNNs rely on inherent inductive biases to achieve effective sample learning, which may degrade the performance ceiling. In this paper, motivated by the flexible self-attention mechanism with minimal inductive biases in transformer architecture, we reframe the generalised image outpainting problem as a patch-wise sequence-to-sequence autoregression problem, enabling query-based image outpainting. Specifically, we propose a novel hybrid vision-transformer-based encoder-decoder framework, named \textbf{Query} \textbf{O}utpainting \textbf{TR}ansformer (\textbf{QueryOTR}), for extrapolating visual context all-side around a given image. Patch-wise mode's global modeling capacity allows us to extrapolate images from the attention mechanism's query standpoint. A novel Query Expansion Module (QEM) is designed to integrate information from the predicted queries based on the encoder's output, hence accelerating the convergence of the pure transformer even with a relatively small dataset. To further enhance connectivity between each patch, the proposed Patch Smoothing Module (PSM) re-allocates and averages the overlapped regions, thus providing seamless predicted images. We experimentally show that QueryOTR could generate visually appealing results smoothly and realistically against the state-of-the-art image outpainting approaches.
abstract_zh: 基于卷积神经网络（CNN）的框架对图像绘制进行了深入研究，最近在计算机视觉领域引起了越来越多的关注。然而，CNN 依靠固有的归纳偏差来实现有效的样本学习，这可能会降低性能上限。在本文中，受 Transformer 架构中具有最小归纳偏差的灵活自注意力机制的推动，我们将广义图像外画问题重新定义为补丁式序列到序列自回归问题，从而实现基于查询的图像外画。具体来说，我们提出了一种新颖的基于混合视觉变换器的编码器-解码器框架，名为 \textbf{Query} \textbf{O}utpainting \textbf{TR}ansformer (\textbf{QueryOTR})，用于推断给定图像周围的视觉上下文。补丁模式的全局建模能力使我们能够从注意力机制的查询角度推断图像。新颖的查询扩展模块（QEM）旨在根据编码器的输出集成来自预测查询的信息，从而即使在数据集相对较小的情况下也能加速纯变压器的收敛。为了进一步增强每个补丁之间的连接性，所提出的补丁平滑模块（PSM）重新分配并平均重叠区域，从而提供无缝的预测图像。我们通过实验表明，与最先进的图像绘制方法相比，QueryOTR 可以流畅、真实地生成视觉上吸引人的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于查询的图像外推方法QueryOTR，通过结合视觉Transformer架构实现更灵活的图像外绘。
AI.motivation: 传统CNN因固有归纳偏置限制了图像外绘性能，而Transformer的自注意力机制具有更少归纳偏置，能提供更灵活的建模能力。
AI.method: 设计混合视觉Transformer编码器-解码器框架QueryOTR，包含查询扩展模块(QEM)和块平滑模块(PSM)，通过块级序列自回归生成实现多方向视觉上下文外推。
AI.result: 实验表明QueryOTR在视觉吸引力和真实性上优于现有最先进的图像外绘方法，能生成无缝衔接的预测图像。
AI.conclusion: 通过结合Transformer的全局建模能力和优化模块设计，本文提出的QueryOTR框架有效解决了传统CNN在图像外绘任务中的性能瓶颈问题。

A novel Query Expansion Module (QEM) is designed to integrate information from the predicted queries based on the encoder's output, hence accelerating the convergence of the pure transformer even with a relatively small dataset. We experimentally show that QueryOTR could generate visually appealing results smoothly and realistically against the state-of-the-art image outpainting approaches. 基于卷积神经网络（CNN）的框架对图像绘制进行了深入研究，最近在计算机视觉领域引起了越来越多的关注。然而，CNN 依靠固有的归纳偏差来实现有效的样本学习，这可能会降低性能上限。在本文中，受 Transformer 架构中具有最小归纳偏差的灵活自注意力机制的推动，我们将广义图像外画问题重新定义为补丁式序列到序列自回归问题，从而实现基于查询的图像外画。具体来说，我们提出了一种新颖的基于混合视觉变换器的编码器-解码器框架，名为 \textbf{Query} \textbf{O}utpainting \textbf{TR}ansformer (\textbf{QueryOTR})，用于推断给定图像周围的视觉上下文。补丁模式的全局建模能力使我们能够从注意力机制的查询角度推断图像。新颖的查询扩展模块（QEM）旨在根据编码器的输出集成来自预测查询的信息，从而即使在数据集相对较小的情况下也能加速纯变压器的收敛。为了进一步增强每个补丁之间的连接性，所提出的补丁平滑模块（PSM）重新分配并平均重叠区域，从而提供无缝的预测图像。我们通过实验表明，与最先进的图像绘制方法相比，QueryOTR 可以流畅、真实地生成视觉上吸引人的结果。 本文提出一种基于查询的图像外推方法QueryOTR，通过结合视觉Transformer架构实现更灵活的图像外绘。 Kai Yao,Penglei Gao,Xi Yang,Kaizhu Huang,Jie Sun,Rui Zhang cs.CV

authors_text: Tsubasa Harada,Toshiya Itoh,Shuichi Miyazaki
title: Capacity-Insensitive Algorithms for Online Facility Assignment Problems on a Line
title_zh: 线路上在线设施分配问题的容量不敏感算法
abstract: In the online facility assignment problem OFA(k,\ell), there exist k servers with a capacity \ell \geq 1 on a metric space and a request arrives one-by-one. The task of an online algorithm is to irrevocably match a current request with one of the servers with vacancies before the next request arrives. As special cases for OFA(k,\ell), we consider OFA(k,\ell) on a line, which is denoted by OFAL(k,\ell) and OFAL_{eq}(k,\ell), where the latter is the case of OFAL(k,\ell) with equidistant servers. In this paper, we deal with the competitive analysis for the above problems. As a natural generalization of the greedy algorithm GRDY, we introduce a class of algorithms called MPFS (most preferred free servers) and show that any MPFS algorithm has the capacity-insensitive property, i.e., for any \ell \geq 1, ALG is c-competitive for OFA(k,1) iff ALG is c-competitive for OFA(k,\ell). By applying the capacity-insensitive property of the greedy algorithm GRDY, we derive the matching upper and lower bounds 4k-5 on the competitive ratio of GRDY for OFAL_{eq}(k,\ell). To investigate the capability of MPFS algorithms, we show that the competitive ratio of any MPFS algorithm ALG for OFAL_{eq}(k,\ell) is at least $2k-1$. Then we propose a new MPFS algorithm IDAS (Interior Division for Adjacent Servers) for OFAL(k,\ell) and show that the competitive ratio of IDAS for OFAL}_{eq}(k,\ell) is at most 2k-1, i.e., IDAS for OFAL_{eq}(k,\ell) is best possible in all the MPFS algorithms.
summary: In the online facility assignment problem OFA(k,\ell), there exist k servers with a capacity \ell \geq 1 on a metric space and a request arrives one-by-one. The task of an online algorithm is to irrevocably match a current request with one of the servers with vacancies before the next request arrives. As special cases for OFA(k,\ell), we consider OFA(k,\ell) on a line, which is denoted by OFAL(k,\ell) and OFAL_{eq}(k,\ell), where the latter is the case of OFAL(k,\ell) with equidistant servers. In this paper, we deal with the competitive analysis for the above problems. As a natural generalization of the greedy algorithm GRDY, we introduce a class of algorithms called MPFS (most preferred free servers) and show that any MPFS algorithm has the capacity-insensitive property, i.e., for any \ell \geq 1, ALG is c-competitive for OFA(k,1) iff ALG is c-competitive for OFA(k,\ell). By applying the capacity-insensitive property of the greedy algorithm GRDY, we derive the matching upper and lower bounds 4k-5 on the competitive ratio of GRDY for OFAL_{eq}(k,\ell). To investigate the capability of MPFS algorithms, we show that the competitive ratio of any MPFS algorithm ALG for OFAL_{eq}(k,\ell) is at least $2k-1$. Then we propose a new MPFS algorithm IDAS (Interior Division for Adjacent Servers) for OFAL(k,\ell) and show that the competitive ratio of IDAS for OFAL}_{eq}(k,\ell) is at most 2k-1, i.e., IDAS for OFAL_{eq}(k,\ell) is best possible in all the MPFS algorithms.
abstract_zh: 在在线设施分配问题OFA(k,\ell)中，度量空间上存在k台容量为\ell\geq 1的服务器，并且请求一一到达。在线算法的任务是在下一个请求到达之前将当前请求与其中一台有空缺的服务器进行不可撤销的匹配。作为 OFA(k,\ell) 的特殊情况，我们将 OFA(k,\ell) 考虑在一条线上，用 OFAL(k,\ell) 和 OFAL_{eq}(k,\ell) 表示，其中后者是具有等距服务器的 OFAL(k,\ell) 的情况。本文针对上述问题进行竞品分析。作为贪婪算法 GRDY 的自然推广，我们引入了一类称为 MPFS（最受欢迎的免费服务器）的算法，并证明任何 MPFS 算法都具有容量不敏感的属性，即，对于任何 \ell \geq 1，ALG 对于 OFA(k,1) 是 c 竞争的，当且仅当 ALG 对于 OFA(k,\ell) 是 c 竞争的。利用贪心算法GRDY的容量不敏感特性，我们推导出OFAL_{eq}(k,\ell)的GRDY竞争比的匹配上下界4k-5。为了研究 MPFS 算法的能力，我们证明任何 MPFS 算法 ALG 对于 OFAL_{eq}(k,\ell) 的竞争比至少为 $2k-1$。然后，我们针对 OFAL(k,\ell) 提出了一种新的 MPFS 算法 IDAS (Interior Division for Adjacent Servers)，并证明 OFAL}_{eq}(k,\ell) 的 IDAS 竞争比最多为 2k-1，即 OFAL_{eq}(k,\ell) 的 IDAS 在所有 MPFS 算法中是最好的。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在线设施分配问题（OFA(k,ℓ)）在直线上的容量无关算法，提出MPFS算法类并证明其容量无关性，同时设计IDAS算法并证明其最优性。
AI.motivation: 现有在线设施分配算法的性能依赖于服务器容量，导致分析复杂。本文旨在寻找与容量无关的算法，简化问题并提供更通用的性能保证。
AI.method: 通过推广贪心算法（GRDY）提出MPFS算法类，利用竞争分析证明其容量无关性；针对等距服务器场景（OFAL_eq(k,ℓ)）推导GRDY的上下界，并设计IDAS算法实现最优竞争比。
AI.result: 证明MPFS算法的容量无关性，GRDY在OFAL_eq(k,ℓ)中的竞争比界为4k-5；所有MPFS算法的下界为2k-1，而IDAS算法达到该上界，成为最优MPFS算法。
AI.conclusion: MPFS算法类为在线设施分配问题提供了容量无关的通用框架，IDAS算法在等距场景下实现了理论最优的竞争比，推动了该问题的进一步研究。

authors_text: Linfeng Zhang,Xin Chen,Junbo Zhang,Runpei Dong,Kaisheng Ma
title: Contrastive Deep Supervision
title_zh: 对比深度监督
abstract: The success of deep learning is usually accompanied by the growth in neural network depth. However, the traditional training method only supervises the neural network at its last layer and propagates the supervision layer-by-layer, which leads to hardship in optimizing the intermediate layers. Recently, deep supervision has been proposed to add auxiliary classifiers to the intermediate layers of deep neural networks. By optimizing these auxiliary classifiers with the supervised task loss, the supervision can be applied to the shallow layers directly. However, deep supervision conflicts with the well-known observation that the shallow layers learn low-level features instead of task-biased high-level semantic features. To address this issue, this paper proposes a novel training framework named Contrastive Deep Supervision, which supervises the intermediate layers with augmentation-based contrastive learning. Experimental results on nine popular datasets with eleven models demonstrate its effects on general image classification, fine-grained image classification and object detection in supervised learning, semi-supervised learning and knowledge distillation. Codes have been released in Github.
summary: The success of deep learning is usually accompanied by the growth in neural network depth. However, the traditional training method only supervises the neural network at its last layer and propagates the supervision layer-by-layer, which leads to hardship in optimizing the intermediate layers. Recently, deep supervision has been proposed to add auxiliary classifiers to the intermediate layers of deep neural networks. By optimizing these auxiliary classifiers with the supervised task loss, the supervision can be applied to the shallow layers directly. However, deep supervision conflicts with the well-known observation that the shallow layers learn low-level features instead of task-biased high-level semantic features. To address this issue, this paper proposes a novel training framework named Contrastive Deep Supervision, which supervises the intermediate layers with augmentation-based contrastive learning. Experimental results on nine popular datasets with eleven models demonstrate its effects on general image classification, fine-grained image classification and object detection in supervised learning, semi-supervised learning and knowledge distillation. Codes have been released in Github.
abstract_zh: 深度学习的成功通常伴随着神经网络深度的增长。然而，传统的训练方法仅在神经网络的最后一层进行监督，并将监督逐层传播，这导致中间层的优化困难。最近，深度监督被提出在深度神经网络的中间层添加辅助分类器。通过使用监督任务损失来优化这些辅助分类器，监督可以直接应用于浅层。然而，深度监督与众所周知的观察相冲突，即浅层学习低级特征而不是任务偏向的高级语义特征。为了解决这个问题，本文提出了一种名为对比深度监督的新型训练框架，它通过基于增强的对比学习来监督中间层。在 9 个流行数据集和 11 个模型上的实验结果证明了其对监督学习、半监督学习和知识蒸馏中的一般图像分类、细粒度图像分类和目标检测的效果。代码已在Github上发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为对比深监督的新训练框架，通过增强型对比学习监督神经网络中间层，解决传统深监督与浅层特征学习冲突的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统深度学习仅在最后一层进行监督导致中间层优化困难，而深监督虽能直接监督浅层但与浅层学习低级特征的特性存在冲突。
AI.method: 设计对比深监督框架，在中间层引入增强型对比学习任务，通过数据增强生成样本对并计算对比损失，实现对浅层特征的监督。
AI.result: 在九个主流数据集上验证了该方法在图像分类、细粒度分类和目标检测任务中的有效性，覆盖监督学习、半监督学习和知识蒸馏场景。
AI.conclusion: 对比深监督有效缓解了深监督与浅层特征学习的冲突，提升了模型性能，且代码已开源供研究使用。

To address this issue, this paper proposes a novel training framework named Contrastive Deep Supervision, which supervises the intermediate layers with augmentation-based contrastive learning. Experimental results on nine popular datasets with eleven models demonstrate its effects on general image classification, fine-grained image classification and object detection in supervised learning, semi-supervised learning and knowledge distillation. Codes have been released in Github. 深度学习的成功通常伴随着神经网络深度的增长。然而，传统的训练方法仅在神经网络的最后一层进行监督，并将监督逐层传播，这导致中间层的优化困难。最近，深度监督被提出在深度神经网络的中间层添加辅助分类器。通过使用监督任务损失来优化这些辅助分类器，监督可以直接应用于浅层。然而，深度监督与众所周知的观察相冲突，即浅层学习低级特征而不是任务偏向的高级语义特征。为了解决这个问题，本文提出了一种名为对比深度监督的新型训练框架，它通过基于增强的对比学习来监督中间层。在 9 个流行数据集和 11 个模型上的实验结果证明了其对监督学习、半监督学习和知识蒸馏中的一般图像分类、细粒度图像分类和目标检测的效果。代码已在Github上发布。 本文提出一种名为对比深监督的新训练框架，通过增强型对比学习监督神经网络中间层，解决传统深监督与浅层特征学习冲突的问题。 Linfeng Zhang,Xin Chen,Junbo Zhang,Runpei Dong,Kaisheng Ma cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Hamed Nilforoshan,Johann Gaebler,Ravi Shroff,Sharad Goel
title: Causal Conceptions of Fairness and their Consequences
title_zh: 公平的因果概念及其后果
comment: ICML 2022. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:1808.00023
comments: ICML 2022. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:1808.00023
abstract: Recent work highlights the role of causality in designing equitable decision-making algorithms. It is not immediately clear, however, how existing causal conceptions of fairness relate to one another, or what the consequences are of using these definitions as design principles. Here, we first assemble and categorize popular causal definitions of algorithmic fairness into two broad families: (1) those that constrain the effects of decisions on counterfactual disparities; and (2) those that constrain the effects of legally protected characteristics, like race and gender, on decisions. We then show, analytically and empirically, that both families of definitions \emph{almost always} -- in a measure theoretic sense -- result in strongly Pareto dominated decision policies, meaning there is an alternative, unconstrained policy favored by every stakeholder with preferences drawn from a large, natural class. For example, in the case of college admissions decisions, policies constrained to satisfy causal fairness definitions would be disfavored by every stakeholder with neutral or positive preferences for both academic preparedness and diversity. Indeed, under a prominent definition of causal fairness, we prove the resulting policies require admitting all students with the same probability, regardless of academic qualifications or group membership. Our results highlight formal limitations and potential adverse consequences of common mathematical notions of causal fairness.
summary: Recent work highlights the role of causality in designing equitable decision-making algorithms. It is not immediately clear, however, how existing causal conceptions of fairness relate to one another, or what the consequences are of using these definitions as design principles. Here, we first assemble and categorize popular causal definitions of algorithmic fairness into two broad families: (1) those that constrain the effects of decisions on counterfactual disparities; and (2) those that constrain the effects of legally protected characteristics, like race and gender, on decisions. We then show, analytically and empirically, that both families of definitions \emph{almost always} -- in a measure theoretic sense -- result in strongly Pareto dominated decision policies, meaning there is an alternative, unconstrained policy favored by every stakeholder with preferences drawn from a large, natural class. For example, in the case of college admissions decisions, policies constrained to satisfy causal fairness definitions would be disfavored by every stakeholder with neutral or positive preferences for both academic preparedness and diversity. Indeed, under a prominent definition of causal fairness, we prove the resulting policies require admitting all students with the same probability, regardless of academic qualifications or group membership. Our results highlight formal limitations and potential adverse consequences of common mathematical notions of causal fairness.
abstract_zh: 最近的工作强调了因果关系在设计公平决策算法中的作用。然而，目前尚不清楚现有的公平因果概念如何相互关联，或者使用这些定义作为设计原则会产生什么后果。在这里，我们首先将算法公平性的流行因果定义汇总并分类为两大类：（1）限制决策对反事实差异影响的定义； (2) 限制种族和性别等受法律保护的特征对决策的影响。然后，我们通过分析和经验表明，这两个定义系列\emph{几乎总是}——在测度理论意义上——会导致帕累托主导的决策政策，这意味着存在一种替代性的、不受约束的政策，受到每个利益相关者的青睐，这些利益相关者的偏好来自于一个庞大的自然阶层。例如，就大学招生决策而言，每一个对学术准备和多样性持中立或积极偏好的利益相关者都会不赞成为满足因果公平定义而制定的政策。事实上，根据因果公平的显着定义，我们证明了由此产生的政策要求以相同的概率录取所有学生，无论其学历或团体成员身份如何。我们的结果强调了因果公平性的常见数学概念的形式局限性和潜在的不利后果。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨因果公平性概念的分类及其对算法决策的影响。
AI.motivation: 尽管因果性在设计公平算法中至关重要，但现有因果公平性定义之间的关系及其设计后果尚不明确。
AI.method: 将因果公平性定义分为两类：约束决策对反事实差异的影响，或约束受保护特征对决策的影响，并通过分析和实证研究验证其后果。
AI.result: 两类定义几乎总是导致强帕累托占优的决策策略，存在更优的替代方案满足所有利益相关者偏好。
AI.conclusion: 常见因果公平性数学概念存在形式局限性，可能引发不利后果，需重新审视其应用。

authors_text: Zhou Kangneng,Zhu Xiaobin,Gao Daiheng,Lee Kai,Li Xinjie,Yin Xu-Cheng
title: SD-GAN: Semantic Decomposition for Face Image Synthesis with Discrete Attribute
title_zh: SD-GAN：具有离散属性的人脸图像合成的语义分解
comment: 16 pages, 12 figures, Accepted by ACM MM2022
comments: 16 pages, 12 figures, Accepted by ACM MM2022
abstract: Manipulating latent code in generative adversarial networks (GANs) for facial image synthesis mainly focuses on continuous attribute synthesis (e.g., age, pose and emotion), while discrete attribute synthesis (like face mask and eyeglasses) receives less attention. Directly applying existing works to facial discrete attributes may cause inaccurate results. In this work, we propose an innovative framework to tackle challenging facial discrete attribute synthesis via semantic decomposing, dubbed SD-GAN. To be concrete, we explicitly decompose the discrete attribute representation into two components, i.e. the semantic prior basis and offset latent representation. The semantic prior basis shows an initializing direction for manipulating face representation in the latent space. The offset latent presentation obtained by 3D-aware semantic fusion network is proposed to adjust prior basis. In addition, the fusion network integrates 3D embedding for better identity preservation and discrete attribute synthesis. The combination of prior basis and offset latent representation enable our method to synthesize photo-realistic face images with discrete attributes. Notably, we construct a large and valuable dataset MEGN (Face Mask and Eyeglasses images crawled from Google and Naver) for completing the lack of discrete attributes in the existing dataset. Extensive qualitative and quantitative experiments demonstrate the state-of-the-art performance of our method. Our code is available at: https://github.com/MontaEllis/SD-GAN.
summary: Manipulating latent code in generative adversarial networks (GANs) for facial image synthesis mainly focuses on continuous attribute synthesis (e.g., age, pose and emotion), while discrete attribute synthesis (like face mask and eyeglasses) receives less attention. Directly applying existing works to facial discrete attributes may cause inaccurate results. In this work, we propose an innovative framework to tackle challenging facial discrete attribute synthesis via semantic decomposing, dubbed SD-GAN. To be concrete, we explicitly decompose the discrete attribute representation into two components, i.e. the semantic prior basis and offset latent representation. The semantic prior basis shows an initializing direction for manipulating face representation in the latent space. The offset latent presentation obtained by 3D-aware semantic fusion network is proposed to adjust prior basis. In addition, the fusion network integrates 3D embedding for better identity preservation and discrete attribute synthesis. The combination of prior basis and offset latent representation enable our method to synthesize photo-realistic face images with discrete attributes. Notably, we construct a large and valuable dataset MEGN (Face Mask and Eyeglasses images crawled from Google and Naver) for completing the lack of discrete attributes in the existing dataset. Extensive qualitative and quantitative experiments demonstrate the state-of-the-art performance of our method. Our code is available at: https://github.com/MontaEllis/SD-GAN.
abstract_zh: 操纵生成对抗网络（GAN）中的潜在代码进行面部图像合成主要集中于连续属性合成（例如年龄、姿势和情感），而离散属性合成（例如面罩和眼镜）受到的关注较少。直接将现有作品应用于面部离散属性可能会导致结果不准确。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种创新框架，通过语义分解来解决具有挑战性的面部离散属性合成，称为 SD-GAN。具体来说，我们将离散属性表示显式分解为两个组成部分，即语义先验基础和偏移潜在表示。语义先验基础显示了在潜在空间中操纵面部表示的初始化方向。提出通过 3D 感知语义融合网络获得的偏移潜在表示来调整先验基础。此外，融合网络集成了 3D 嵌入，以实现更好的身份保存和离散属性合成。先验基础和偏移潜在表示的结合使我们的方法能够合成具有离散属性的照片般真实的面部图像。值得注意的是，我们构建了一个大型且有价值的数据集 MEGN（从 Google 和 Naver 爬取的面罩和眼镜图像），以弥补现有数据集中离散属性的缺乏。广泛的定性和定量实验证明了我们方法的最先进的性能。我们的代码位于：https://github.com/MontaEllis/SD-GAN。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SD-GAN框架，通过语义分解实现面部图像中离散属性（如口罩、眼镜）的高质量合成。
AI.motivation: 现有GAN方法在处理连续属性（如年龄、表情）时效果较好，但对离散属性（如配饰）的合成存在准确性不足的问题，缺乏专门针对离散属性的生成框架。
AI.method: 将离散属性表示分解为语义先验基底和偏移潜在表示两部分，设计3D感知语义融合网络调整先验基底，并引入3D嵌入提升身份保持能力，结合MEGN数据集（包含口罩和眼镜图像）进行训练。
AI.result: 在定性和定量实验中均达到SOTA性能，能生成具有真实感的带离散属性的人脸图像。
AI.conclusion: SD-GAN通过语义分解和3D融合机制有效解决了离散属性合成难题，MEGN数据集为相关研究提供了重要资源。

authors_text: Siddique Latif,Rajib Rana,Sara Khalifa,Raja Jurdak,Björn W. Schuller
title: Multitask Learning from Augmented Auxiliary Data for Improving Speech Emotion Recognition
title_zh: 利用增强辅助数据进行多任务学习以改善语音情感识别
comment: Under review IEEE Transactions on Affective Computing
comments: Under review IEEE Transactions on Affective Computing
abstract: Despite the recent progress in speech emotion recognition (SER), state-of-the-art systems lack generalisation across different conditions. A key underlying reason for poor generalisation is the scarcity of emotion datasets, which is a significant roadblock to designing robust machine learning (ML) models. Recent works in SER focus on utilising multitask learning (MTL) methods to improve generalisation by learning shared representations. However, most of these studies propose MTL solutions with the requirement of meta labels for auxiliary tasks, which limits the training of SER systems. This paper proposes an MTL framework (MTL-AUG) that learns generalised representations from augmented data. We utilise augmentation-type classification and unsupervised reconstruction as auxiliary tasks, which allow training SER systems on augmented data without requiring any meta labels for auxiliary tasks. The semi-supervised nature of MTL-AUG allows for the exploitation of the abundant unlabelled data to further boost the performance of SER. We comprehensively evaluate the proposed framework in the following settings: (1) within corpus, (2) cross-corpus and cross-language, (3) noisy speech, (4) and adversarial attacks. Our evaluations using the widely used IEMOCAP, MSP-IMPROV, and EMODB datasets show improved results compared to existing state-of-the-art methods.

A key underlying reason for poor generalisation is the scarcity of emotion datasets, which is a significant roadblock to designing robust machine learning (ML) models. Recent works in SER focus on utilising multitask learning (MTL) methods to improve generalisation by learning shared representations. However, most of these studies propose MTL solutions with the requirement of meta labels for auxiliary tasks, which limits the training of SER systems. This paper proposes an MTL framework (MTL-AUG) that learns generalised representations from augmented data. We utilise augmentation-type classification and unsupervised reconstruction as auxiliary tasks, which allow training SER systems on augmented data without requiring any meta labels for auxiliary tasks. The semi-supervised nature of MTL-AUG allows for the exploitation of the abundant unlabelled data to further boost the performance of SER. We comprehensively evaluate the proposed framework in the following settings: (1) within corpus, (2) cross-corpus and cross-language, (3) noisy speech, (4) and adversarial attacks. Our evaluations using the widely used IEMOCAP, MSP-IMPROV, and EMODB datasets show improved results compared to existing state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 尽管语音情感识别（SER）最近取得了进展，但最先进的系统缺乏跨不同条件的泛化能力。泛化能力差的一个关键根本原因是情感数据集的稀缺，这是设计稳健的机器学习 (ML) 模型的一个重要障碍。 SER 最近的工作重点是利用多任务学习（MTL）方法通过学习共享表示来提高泛化能力。然而，这些研究大多数提出的 MTL 解决方案都需要辅助任务的元标签，这限制了 SER 系统的训练。本文提出了一种 MTL 框架（MTL-AUG），可以从增强数据中学习广义表示。我们利用增强型分类和无监督重建作为辅助任务，这允许在增强数据上训练 SER 系统，而不需要任何辅助任务的元标签。 MTL-AUG 的半监督性质允许利用大量未标记数据来进一步提高 SER 的性能。我们在以下设置中全面评估所提出的框架：（1）语料库内，（2）跨语料库和跨语言，（3）噪声语音，（4）和对抗性攻击。我们使用广泛使用的 IEMOCAP、MSP-IMPROV 和 EMODB 数据集进行的评估显示，与现有最先进的方法相比，结果有所改善。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需辅助任务元标签的多任务学习框架MTL-AUG，通过增强数据提升语音情感识别（SER）的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有SER系统因情感数据集稀缺导致泛化能力不足，且多任务学习方法依赖辅助任务的元标签，限制了模型训练。
AI.method: 设计MTL-AUG框架，利用增强数据的分类和无监督重建作为辅助任务，无需元标签即可训练SER系统，并通过半监督学习利用大量未标记数据。
AI.result: 在IEMOCAP、MSP-IMPROV和EMODB数据集上，MTL-AUG在跨语料库、跨语言、噪声语音和对抗攻击场景下均优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: MTL-AUG通过增强数据和半监督学习有效提升了SER的泛化能力，为构建鲁棒模型提供了新思路。

search_text: Multitask Learning from Augmented Auxiliary Data for Improving Speech Emotion Recognition 利用增强辅助数据进行多任务学习以改善语音情感识别 Despite the recent progress in speech emotion recognition (SER), state-of-the-art systems lack generalisation across different conditions. A key underlying reason for poor generalisation is the scarcity of emotion datasets, which is a significant roadblock to designing robust machine learning (ML) models. Recent works in SER focus on utilising multitask learning (MTL) methods to improve generalisation by learning shared representations. However, most of these studies propose MTL solutions with the requirement of meta labels for auxiliary tasks, which limits the training of SER systems. This paper proposes an MTL framework (MTL-AUG) that learns generalised representations from augmented data. We utilise augmentation-type classification and unsupervised reconstruction as auxiliary tasks, which allow training SER systems on augmented data without requiring any meta labels for auxiliary tasks. The semi-supervised nature of MTL-AUG allows for the exploitation of the abundant unlabelled data to further boost the performance of SER. We comprehensively evaluate the proposed framework in the following settings: (1) within corpus, (2) cross-corpus and cross-language, (3) noisy speech, (4) and adversarial attacks. Our evaluations using the widely used IEMOCAP, MSP-IMPROV, and EMODB datasets show improved results compared to existing state-of-the-art methods. 尽管语音情感识别（SER）最近取得了进展，但最先进的系统缺乏跨不同条件的泛化能力。泛化能力差的一个关键根本原因是情感数据集的稀缺，这是设计稳健的机器学习 (ML) 模型的一个重要障碍。 SER 最近的工作重点是利用多任务学习（MTL）方法通过学习共享表示来提高泛化能力。然而，这些研究大多数提出的 MTL 解决方案都需要辅助任务的元标签，这限制了 SER 系统的训练。本文提出了一种 MTL 框架（MTL-AUG），可以从增强数据中学习广义表示。我们利用增强型分类和无监督重建作为辅助任务，这允许在增强数据上训练 SER 系统，而不需要任何辅助任务的元标签。 MTL-AUG 的半监督性质允许利用大量未标记数据来进一步提高 SER 的性能。我们在以下设置中全面评估所提出的框架：（1）语料库内，（2）跨语料库和跨语言，（3）噪声语音，（4）和对抗性攻击。我们使用广泛使用的 IEMOCAP、MSP-IMPROV 和 EMODB 数据集进行的评估显示，与现有最先进的方法相比，结果有所改善。 本文提出一种无需辅助任务元标签的多任务学习框架MTL-AUG，通过增强数据提升语音情感识别（SER）的泛化能力。 Siddique Latif,Rajib Rana,Sara Khalifa,Raja Jurdak,Björn W. authors_text: Xubin Zhong,Changxing Ding,Zijian Li,Shaoli Huang
title: Towards Hard-Positive Query Mining for DETR-based Human-Object Interaction Detection
title_zh: 面向基于 DETR 的人机交互检测的硬阳性查询挖掘
abstract: Human-Object Interaction (HOI) detection is a core task for high-level image understanding. Recently, Detection Transformer (DETR)-based HOI detectors have become popular due to their superior performance and efficient structure. However, these approaches typically adopt fixed HOI queries for all testing images, which is vulnerable to the location change of objects in one specific image. Accordingly, in this paper, we propose to enhance DETR's robustness by mining hard-positive queries, which are forced to make correct predictions using partial visual cues. First, we explicitly compose hard-positive queries according to the ground-truth (GT) position of labeled human-object pairs for each training image. Specifically, we shift the GT bounding boxes of each labeled human-object pair so that the shifted boxes cover only a certain portion of the GT ones. We encode the coordinates of the shifted boxes for each labeled human-object pair into an HOI query. Second, we implicitly construct another set of hard-positive queries by masking the top scores in cross-attention maps of the decoder layers. The masked attention maps then only cover partial important cues for HOI predictions. Finally, an alternate strategy is proposed that efficiently combines both types of hard queries. In each iteration, both DETR's learnable queries and one selected type of hard-positive queries are adopted for loss computation. Experimental results show that our proposed approach can be widely applied to existing DETR-based HOI detectors. Moreover, we consistently achieve state-of-the-art performance on three benchmarks: HICO-DET, V-COCO, and HOI-A. Code is available at https://github.com/MuchHair/HQM.
summary: Human-Object Interaction (HOI) detection is a core task for high-level image understanding. Recently, Detection Transformer (DETR)-based HOI detectors have become popular due to their superior performance and efficient structure. However, these approaches typically adopt fixed HOI queries for all testing images, which is vulnerable to the location change of objects in one specific image. Accordingly, in this paper, we propose to enhance DETR's robustness by mining hard-positive queries, which are forced to make correct predictions using partial visual cues. First, we explicitly compose hard-positive queries according to the ground-truth (GT) position of labeled human-object pairs for each training image. Specifically, we shift the GT bounding boxes of each labeled human-object pair so that the shifted boxes cover only a certain portion of the GT ones. We encode the coordinates of the shifted boxes for each labeled human-object pair into an HOI query. Second, we implicitly construct another set of hard-positive queries by masking the top scores in cross-attention maps of the decoder layers. The masked attention maps then only cover partial important cues for HOI predictions. Finally, an alternate strategy is proposed that efficiently combines both types of hard queries. In each iteration, both DETR's learnable queries and one selected type of hard-positive queries are adopted for loss computation. Experimental results show that our proposed approach can be widely applied to existing DETR-based HOI detectors. Moreover, we consistently achieve state-of-the-art performance on three benchmarks: HICO-DET, V-COCO, and HOI-A. Code is available at https://github.com/MuchHair/HQM.
abstract_zh: 人机交互（HOI）检测是高级图像理解的核心任务。最近，基于检测变压器（DETR）的 HOI 探测器因其优越的性能和高效的结构而变得流行。然而，这些方法通常对所有测试图像采用固定的 HOI 查询，这容易受到一张特定图像中对象位置变化的影响。因此，在本文中，我们建议通过挖掘硬阳性查询来增强 DETR 的鲁棒性，这些查询被迫使用部分视觉线索做出正确的预测。首先，我们根据每个训练图像的标记人体-物体对的真实（GT）位置明确地组成硬阳性查询。具体来说，我们移动每个标记的人体-物体对的 GT 边界框，以便移动的框仅覆盖 GT 边界框的特定部分。我们将每个标记的人体-物体对的移动框的坐标编码到 HOI 查询中。其次，我们通过屏蔽解码器层的交叉注意力图中的最高分来隐式构造另一组硬阳性查询。然后，屏蔽注意力图仅覆盖 HOI 预测的部分重要线索。最后，提出了一种有效结合两种类型硬查询的替代策略。在每次迭代中，DETR 的可学习查询和一种选定类型的硬正查询都被用于损失计算。实验结果表明，我们提出的方法可以广泛应用于现有的基于 DETR 的 HOI 检测器。此外，我们始终在三个基准测试中实现最先进的性能：HICO-DET、V-COCO 和 HOI-A。代码可在 https://github.com/MuchHair/HQM 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过挖掘硬正样本查询来增强基于DETR的HOI检测器的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有DETR-based HOI检测器使用固定查询易受物体位置变化影响，需通过部分视觉线索强制正确预测以提升鲁棒性。
AI.method: 通过显式构造（基于GT框位移生成部分覆盖区域）和隐式构造（掩码解码器交叉注意力图）两种方式生成硬正查询，并采用交替策略结合两类查询进行损失计算。
AI.result: 在HICO-DET、V-COCO和HOI-A三个基准上均达到SOTA性能，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效提升DETR-based HOI检测器性能，具有广泛适用性。
